Comment: Jumped awkwardly, remained at rear. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on quite well final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led field to 250 M. Faded rapidly.
Dropped to rear soon after start. Never a factor.
Behind midfield throughout.
Soon prominent, was 2Ls 3rd turning in. Switched out from the rail near 200 M to take lead closing stages.
Always prominent. Took lead briefly 200 M out. Headed inside 100 M and lost 2nd near finish.
Midfield early. Towards rear home bend. Hung out turning for home and dropped out.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Held 4th to straight. Improved steadily but was unbalanced when bumped twice near 200 M. Kept on.
Travelled wide without cover in midfield throughout.
Settled in midfield. Held 5th turning for home. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Always worse than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish but had too much to do.
Travelled in midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled in last few. Attempted to shift out for a run when last turning for home. Ran on and produced good late impression doing best work at finish.
Raced keenly in first few and refused to settle far side. Close up turning in and quickened and looked a danger early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Niggled along from poor draw and led. Crossed to inside rail coming out of back straight. Hung on well to defy challengers closing stages.
Began well. Held up towards rear. Took closer order around field home bend. Produced only modest progress in straight.
Raced 3-wide in 4th. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Never far off in first few. Gradually weakened soon after straightening.
Soon 4th. Crept closer order to 2nd 400 M. Failed to hold place inside 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, behind midfield. Short-lived effort early straight. One-paced closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Ran on from 7th final turn to take lead 200 M. Just held off runner-up's strong challenges at finish.
Held 3rd until failing to hold place early straight.
Rear. Was last 400 M. Ran on well from outside to be nearest at finish.
Held 2nd to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Pushed along early to take lead from 1500 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Prominent early, dropped back slightly to 6th 1200 M. Kept on without quickening.
Behind midfield. Made up good ground soon after straightening. Never able to threaten the quinella pair.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield home bend. Faded in straight. (Bled.)
Lost ground at start, never in contention.
Better than midfield. Made no show from final turn.
Rear. Made ground along rail early straight. Ran on strongly final 250 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Never seen with a chance. Given reminders entering home straight but found no response.
Began awkwardly but soon in midfield. Shifted inside onto rails after straightening. Steadied for a stride passing 300 M but running on well to grab runner-up place close to finish.
Broke well then held up on heels of leader. Found nothing upon straightening and soon weakened.
Raced wide throughout and in rear early. Made headway coming out of back straight gaining midfield home bend. Soon weakened in home stretch.
Began well settling just off the pace. Shared lead rounding home bend. Gradually overhauled after straightening and found nothing under pressure 200 M out.

Began fairly but lacked early pace despite niggling along. Picked up a position just behind midfield shortly afterwards. Found no room behind runners early in straight. Ran on final 200 M for a good closing.
Settled at the back. Remained well back into straight. Bumped by another runner about 300 M out. Made up good late ground running past beaten runners closing stages.

Jumped well from a poor draw. Gradually shifted in to settle behind leaders. Made swift headway 3-wide rounding home bend leading field into straight. Kicked some 1L clear 200 M out before overshadowed shortly afterwards.
Began well then held up in midfield. Produced for a run upon straightening holding every chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort in the run home.
Travelled towards rear. Responded well under pressure after straightening to hit front 200 M out. Held on well.
Settled just better than midfield and mostly in 5th. Gave ground gradually and was beaten when hampered about 300 M out.

Jumped fairly. Raced keenly and gradually moved up to gain slender advantage 1200 M out. Narrowly headed after halfway mark but still there into straight. Gradually lost touch under pressure and folded up quickly passing 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend disputing 4th into straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Hampered shortly after jump. Remained in last position far side and around home bend. Wide turning in and ran on under pressure down centre of straight to produce good late impression under pressure.
Midfield. Closer order rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight until no extra concluding stages.
Hard ridden with the whip to take lead from 1200 M. Headed at 300 M. Gradually dropped out.
Worse than midfield. Difficult to settle early, struck heels when being interfered near the 900 M. Short-lived effort after straightening until no extra final 200 M.
Slowly away. Worse than midfield. Unbalanced near the 1000 M. No further improvement.
Bounded in the air and lost ground at the start. At back. Not a factor.
Niggled along to lead briefly. Behind leaders from 1000 M. Kept on well to grab 3rd place on the line.
Jumped well, prominent on far side. Always well there. 3-wide from 800 M. Kicked clear from 300 M and won drawing away.
Prominent to early straight. Dropped out and further checked.
Midfield. Not quite settled in middle stages. Under the whip from 500 M and made up a little ground in straight. (Lame off hind.)
Jumped well, settled better than midfield. Kept on in straight but winner too strong.
Niggled along to maintain middle position in early and middle stages. One paced in straight.
Broke best. Steadily dropped to the rear. Widest into straight. Made up some ground despite hanging in.
Raced 2-wide and always about a neck off leader until 400 M out, dropped away tamely in home stretch.
Settled 2-wide 2Ls off speed in 5th place throughout, travelled well entering straight, not quicken up when it mattered.
On fence and 4Ls off speed in 7th through first half of race, niggled 800 M out to take closer order, 2Ls down entering straight, stayed on at one-pace final 300 M.
Held up in 2nd last place on fence and 7Ls off speed, 6Ls down entering straight, short of room 250 M and checked momentarily, ran on again final 200 M.
Led from pillar to post, always about a neck clear on inside until home turn, 400 M out, skipped 2Ls clear 200 M out, driven out to score.
3-wide always about 5Ls off pace until home turn when under strong pressure, retreated swiftly.
Raced 3-wide towards rear about 6Ls off lead until 800 M out, crept a little closer final bend to be 4Ls off pace, stayed on through beaten horses final stages to be nearest finish.
Raced 6-wide first bend and 4-wide and without cover between 1 and 2Ls until home straight, beat a steady retreat from 400 M out.
Held up in rear racing 2-wide 7Ls off speed, never posed any sort of threat closing stages.
3Ls down and 3-wide and never further than 1L off speed through until home stretch, failed to follow through final 400 M.
Always at least 4-wide and never closer to pace than 5Ls, raced 6-wide entering straight, never a factor thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowest away, 6Ls off speed on fence until final bend, 4Ls down entering straight, found very little off bridle final stages.
Held up in 8th about 4.5Ls off speed racing 2-wide, under pressure to keep up turning in to home straight, no further impression.
Settled 2 to 3Ls off pace racing 2 and 3-wide in 6th place until home turn, hard ridden to improve into joint-second 200 M out, never looked like catching winner.
Sent to the front, holding 1L advantage most of the way until worn down by winner final strides when shifting out in the run to the line.
Began fairly, soon moved up to be handy 2 to 3Ls off pace on rail. Switched off rail on straightening and made steady ground from 250 M until no extra close home.
Well back, ran on a bit down centre of straight near 300 M, one-pace final 100 M.
Hard driven and given reminders but failed to muster early speed. Towards rear most of the event.
3/4-wide better than midfield. Not come on straightening, soon emptied.
Began awkwardly and was crowded, soon recovered to rear of midfield. Made gradual ground from 300 M, one-paced last bit.
Pressed leader until one-paced and passed by placegetters inside the 200 M. Tired closing stages.
Prominent 3rd, caught wide early stages, struggled to keep up 500 M out. Dropped out in home straight.
Around midfield before giving ground from 200 M.
Dropped to tail from widest gate, pulled hard when caught wide with cover early stages. Switched wide upon straightening and ran on quite well final 200 M.
Settled in midfield on fence. Under pressure passing 400 M but took time to gather momentum. Flew home along rail final 50 M to get up near the line.
Jumped very awkwardly and shifted out abruptly, soon dropped to last. Recovered some ground near rear 1200 M out. Never seen with a chance.
4Ls off speed early on, 3Ls down 400 M out, outpaced closing stages.
On fence and 4Ls off speed until 400 M out, faded out of contention rapidly.
Slowest away but soon recovered to race in midfield about 4Ls off pace until 200 M out, no extra thereafter.
Never closer than 7Ls off pace, never a factor.
Wasn't far away, between 2 and 3Ls off speed until 400 M out but soon dropped away quickly.
Sat about 2.5Ls off pace down centre of track until about 400 M out, soon under pressure and found little off bridle.
Best away, tacked over to far rail and raced in 3rd about a half length off pace until 200 M out, weakened final stages.
Always prominent, led narrowly from 500 M to 350 M out, weakened quickly thereafter.
Soon 4th about 2Ls off pace down centre of track, niggled to keep up 500 M out, briefly threatened winner 150 M out but didn't find extra gear to go on with it.
Soon led down centre of track, headed about 500 M out, but reasserted again over 200 M out, pushed out hands and heels, readily.
Sat at back of main body of runners about 4Ls off pace, 6Ls down 400 M out, became further detached.
Settled 2.5Ls off speed early on but under pressure to lie up from 500 M out, soon no chance.
Never closer than 4Ls off pace and never had any chance with principals.
Roughly 7Ls off speed throughout, in rear early on but ran on through beaten horses final 300 M.
Settled 2-wide and 4Ls off speed until home straight, disappointed for a run until 200 M out, ran on but too late.
Led by a length from 1000 M out to home turn, skipped 1.75Ls clear 200 M out, stayed on well.
Held up 2-wide and 5Ls off speed until straightening up, switched out wider to challenge 300 M out, ran on strongly to be nearest finish.
Held 2nd spot racing 3-wide 1L off lead until straightening, very much outpaced in stretch.
Took keen hold early on racing 3-wide and 2.5Ls off speed, 2-wide and 3Ls down turning in, no further impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
Thereabouts racing 2-wide and 2 to 2.5Ls off pace until 400 M out, not quicken at top of stretch and beaten over 200 M out.
5Ls off speed through early stages on fence, crept a couple closer on bend, quickened up well straight to be 1.75Ls down in 2nd 200 M out, no extra final 100 M.
On fence and never worse than 2Ls off pace until home straight when travelling well, not quicken up at top of straight and beaten over 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tacked across from wide draw to rails but 7Ls off speed in rear until 500 M out, soon improved but not clear run until 200 M out, finished off strongly once in clear.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace until home straight, steadied 200 M out when short of room and still 5Ls down, ran on again through beaten horses final 200 M.
Not break well but soon on the fence in midfield about 3Ls off speed, quickened up well to hold 2nd place 2Ls off winner 200 M out, grabbed for 3rd spot just metres from line.
4-wide and 2 to 2.5Ls off speed until home stretch, never really threatened in straight and beaten 200 M out.
Made no show.
In touch to straight. Unable quicken to challenge closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
About 6th into home bend. Was staying on quite nicely when checked approaching 150 M, losing all his chance.
Tracked leader to straight where he came under pressure to challenge 150 M. Found winner too strong.
Slowly away and was last to straight. Ran on strongly final 250 M to lead close home.
At back to straight where he made some late progress to take 3rd near finish.
Made running to 150 M when headed. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Never troubled leaders.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he dropped out steadily.
Well there to straight where he failed to get a clear passage. Switched out passing 200 M and kept on.
Midfield or behind. Effort from final turn to be 5th briefly 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Always prominent. Sat outside winner rounding home bend. Just failed to catch the winner at finish.
Jumped very awkwardly, last to early straight. Made up good ground 200 M out, never nearer.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 3rd early straight.
Midfield at best.
Mainly midfield. Made up some ground along rail in straight.
Rear. Made progress 500 M out. Ran on in straight to take 3rd closing stages.
Better than midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield from a wide draw. Made progress far side when racing wide without cover. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Led field soon after start. Held 1L advantage turning in. Just held on.
Always thereabout. Kept on.
Prominent to straight and gradually faded.
Began from wide alley and remained wide with leaders before crossing to rail coming out of back straight. Came under pressure upon straightening then soon overhauled.
Settled behind leaders. Made modest progress early in straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Wide towards rear. Hampered on outside 600 M out on home bend. Hampered again early in straight. Never featured.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Midfield when tightened and lost position approaching home bend. Obtained clear passage about 300 M out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled within striking distance. Shaken up upon straightening. Responded well to take charge about 200 M out.
Held up in midfield. Jostled upon straightening. Quickened well to look dangerous only to find winner too strong.
Well back to straight. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Behind midfield. Tightened slightly 600 M out. Badly hampered upon straightening. No further progress.
Midfield when tightened on rails approaching home bend. Came to challenge upon straightening and produced good late impression closing stages doing best work at finish.
Jumped in air and lost ground. Raced in rear, niggling along early. Saved ground on rail turning in. Kept on same pace.
Never better than midfield.
Better than midfield on the rail. Dropped back steadily final 200 M.
Slowly away, among the rear group before making up good ground inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on quite well 250 M until finding no extra close home.
Prominent from widest draw. Dropped back from 3rd or 4th final turn. Faded final 200 M.
Prominent. Unable to hold place from 2nd 300 M.
Soon led, still holding 3Ls advantage final turn. Unable to quicken when headed closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on when given reminders early straight. Nearest at finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Weakened 200 M out.
Held 4th to home bend. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield. Responded well early straight to be 2nd 200 M. Just missed narrowly.
Midfield. Ran on from outside 300 M to grab lead close home.
Near rear. Made up good ground 200 M out to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Quickened well to hit front about 200 M out. Hung on well.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Never far off to straight. Soon faded.
Brief lead early. Tracked leader to straight. Came under pressure to maintain position early in straight but overhauled passing 200 M.
Behind midfield. No clear run in straight till late.
Well back. Produced good late run closing stages.
Never nearer. Kept on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield and wide. Lost position turning in. Made up late ground closing stages doing best work at finish.
Circled field around stable bend to take up running far side. Held some 2Ls advantage 200 M out but collared final stages.
Just better than midfield to straight, then weakened.
Never nearer.
Behind midfield. Midfield into straight. Ran on to hold some chance.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Always thereabouts. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Worse than midfield. Wide along the back straight and rounding the home bend. Made up some ground in straight.
Jumped well and mostly 4th. Crept closer after straightening but unable to produce extra effort passing 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and then pushed hard to maintain in midfield. Ran on well to the line when into clear 200 M and missed 2nd placing narrowly.
About midfield. Unable to feature in straight.
From a difficult gate steadied and shifted across behind the field to take up a position at the rear but closer to the rail. Made up some ground passing 200 M.
Better than midfield. Niggled along in the middle stages to maintain its position. Improved round the home bend and 4-wide into straight. Ran on steadily in straight and held on 2nd on the line.
Soon settled in a handy 3rd position. Unable to quicken in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, at back. Raced greenly and hung in in the early stages. Made up some ground under hands and heels riding in the straight.
Worse than midfield. Steadied at about 800 M. Did not quicken in straight.
Travelled kindly in midfield or worse. Switched to the outside after straightening and ran on well from 300 M to assert authority inside 100 M.
Soon tracked leader. Weakened steadily final 300 M.
Jumped well and led. Headed inside 100 M when weakened final stages.
3-wide and 3Ls off speed early on, became further detached round home turn and entered straight racing 5-wide, soon no chance.
Raced 2-wide and 4Ls off pace until straight, improved to sit 2Ls off front 200 M out, held when short of room 50 M out.
Never further off pace than 1L in 2nd place racing 2-wide, failed to quicken up from 350 M out, dropped away quite tamely.
Bit keen early on fence 3Ls off lead, switched out wider in straight but not clear run until 250 M out, ran on well.
Awkwardly away, held up in rear racing 2-wide 8Ls off pace, switched out wider to challenge turning for home, vying for lead 200 M out, got up on the nod.
Broke slowly and soon settled 7Ls off speed on fence, 5Ls down entering straight, no threat closing stages.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off speed until straight, never competitive final 300 M.
Raced 2 and 3-wide 1.5Ls off speed until home straight, no response thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled on fence 2Ls off speed until 400 M out, soon dropped away quickly.
Bit keen early on, sat 4-wide without cover 1 to 2Ls off pace until home stretch, briefly led 300 M out but failed to follow through.
Settled on fence 4Ls off pace early on, travelled well 2.5Ls off speed and 2-wide entering straight, led 200 M out, denied by bob of heads.
Pushed along throughout, 6Ls off speed and 2-wide early on, turned in racing 6-wide, responded to pressure in straight to be 1L down 200 M out, one-paced final stages.
2Ls off speed and 2-wide until home straight when travelling well, still place prospects 300 M out but petered out very quickly.
Led by up to a length until straight, no extra from 350 M out.
Began awkwardly, rear of midfield. Under pressure from 500 M, made up some ground, kept on same pace final 200 M. (Significant respiratory noise after race.)
Behind midfield early, dropped to tail 600 M out, ran past beaten runners concluding stages.
Mid-division without cover down centre of track. Made no impression final 200 M.
Never far off standside. Lengthened well when asked 300 M out to lead passing 200 M. Comfortably.
Around midfield. Came under pressure 450 M out, ran on steadily from 300 M until no extra near finish.
Midfield to 300 M, steadily weakened.
Soon led field. Headed 150 M out, kept on.
Held up in middle of inside group early. Steadily improved to lead group near 500 M. Every chance 200 M out before failing to keep up with leading trio towards standside final stages.
Midfield or better on inner, no extra concluding stages.
Slow out, towards rear before making steady headway to be midfield 600 M out. No further progress thereafter.
Slow to begin, trailed field and hung out throughout.
Forward of midfield throughout, unable to quicken to challenge, tired closing stages.
Better than midfield to 300 M, dropped out.
Prominent to 200 M, kept on one-paced.
4Ls off lead and 4-wide throughout, hard ridden home turn, no response.
Handily placed on fence 2 to 3Ls off speed until 500 M out when under pressure, dropped away quickly in straight.
Always 2-wide and about 3Ls off speed, turned into home straight racing 5-wide, soon no chance with winner but hung on for runners-up spot.
3-wide and 4Ls off speed 1200 M out, sent on to loop runners and sit in 2nd place 1L off pace, racing 3-wide, under pressure turning in, no extra.
Not break well though soon settled in 3rd racing 2-wide, 2Ls off speed, under pressure to maintain position entering straight, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide and 4Ls off speed until home turn when hard pressed to improve position, no extra from 300 M out.
Always worse than midfield racing 2 and 3-wide and at least 5Ls off speed until straight, ran on fairly closing stages, though denied 4th place 20 M out.
Never travelled - always 4-wide and 5Ls off lead throughout, struggling and hard ridden 600 M out, became further and detached. (Bled.)
Held up towards rear 6Ls off speed and 2-wide until stretch when forced to switch wider to challenge, still 5Ls down 200 M out, closed off well to take 4th close home.
Settled on inside 5Ls off pace, not clear run until 350 M out, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Took first bend widest of all and at least 6Ls off speed, never tacked onto main body of runners, practically tailed off entering straight.
Prominent first bend racing 3-wide 1L off pace, soon slotted next to fence on pace, travelled well home turn before hitting front 300 M out, drew clear.
Soon led on fence by a length, hard ridden to maintain advantage entering straight, overhauled by winner 300 M out, no extra.
Always towards rear 6Ls off lead until 300 M out when checked for a run and forced to switch out wider, ran on fairly though beaten horses thereafter.
2nd early on but 3rd 2Ls off lead and on fence 1000 M out, very much under pressure when short of running room 200 M out, soon eased down.
Held up on fence 5Ls off pace until straight, not clear run up inside until 200 M out, finished off strongly.
Worse than midfield racing 3-wide and about 5Ls off speed, steadied 500 M out, clear run over 300 M out, quickened up to be just 1L down 200 M out, ran on strongly.
8Ls off matters early on, 6Ls down entering straight and 4Ls off when all passing 200 M pole, no extra.
Slowest away, raced 2-wide 6 to 7Ls off pace until home stretch, improved to 3Ls down 200 M out, no further show.
Chased leaders and 1L off speed 1000 M racing 2-wide, 2nd and flat-out when passed 300 M out, dropped off quickly.
On fence 3Ls off lead until 400 M out, switched inside 300 M out looking for racing room, no impression.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace early on, 3Ls down and still wide entering straight, led briefly about 180 M out, not match pace of winner down to line.
Midfield 4Ls off speed and 3-wide hemmed in between runners, forced to steady at top of straight when similarly positioned, no extra from 200 M out.
Broke well and soon racing keenly, only dropped head about 700 M out when 1L clear, still ahead but under strong pressure 200 M out, soon grabbed and faded away.
Always 3-wide about 4Ls off pace until straight, hard-pressed to get within 2.5Ls of lead 200 M out, no further impression.
Settled in midfield 4Ls off lead racing 2-wide, quickened up well straight and just 1L down 200 M out, bit one-paced final 100 M and just clung on for 3rd place.
Settled 2-wide, 2.5Ls off lead in 4th, similarly placed entering straight but not really quicken up well and swamped 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Held up near rear racing 3-wide and 6Ls off speed until straight, quickened up well to be 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on through couple of beaten rivals to line.
In rear to straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Last approaching home turn. Never on terms.
Towards rear before making up some ground in straight.
Never far off to home turn. Found no extra and faded quickly on straightening.
Led field from 1000 M to straight. Found no extra when headed passing 150 M.
Midfield into straight, going well. Quickened 250 M to lead close home. Won readily.
Well there and held some chance passing 200 M. Outpaced near finish.
Mostly 5th or 6th from 1000 M to straight. Ran on to dispute lead 150 M. Found first 2 too strong.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on a bit from the 300 M.
In touch before steadily losing ground inside final 200 M.
Settled worse than midfield to straight where he made good late impression to take 2nd final strides.
In rear to straight. Kept on closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back when wide 400 M out.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there, took lead passing 800 M until headed 200 M. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Was hampered 200 M when making ground. Never able to recover.
Widest draw, never a factor.
Moderate start, pushed along to be 5th passing 800 M. Responded well final turn to assert authority inside 200 M. Won well.
Jumped awkwardly, behind midfield. Made progress from home turn to be 3rd 150 M. Just lost the minor placing near finish.
In touch. Found no extra 200 M out.
Rear. Made up some ground in straight, never nearer.
Midfield. Ran on steadily from outside in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, never in contention.
Among the front runners early, then sat outside leader approaching 600 M. Kept on but was one-paced final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Never nearer. Some late headway.
Rear with some effort home bend.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Always thereabouts. One-paced under pressure. (See Racing incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Led till narrowly headed into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Niggled at early. Settled outside leader. Gained slender lead turning in. Hung on well.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never better than midfield.
Soon 3rd. Pushed along in straight to take lead passing 200 M. Just held on.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily turning in. Just failed to catch the winner.
Midfield. Made no show when wide into straight.
Was 2nd briefly soon after start, then raced better than midfield. Remained 5th rounding home bend, one-paced.
Pushed along from a wide draw to join the lead far side. Gained slender advantage early straight. Weakened when headed passing 200 M.
Dropped to the rear group soon after start.
Near rear. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Ran on from outside but without reaching the quinella pair.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steadied near 400 M. Made up a little ground in straight.
Soon midfield. Progressed to 4th passing 600 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Never able to feature.
Slowly away, hampered 1000 M. Was last to straight. Made up good ground inside 200 M.
In the front to straight. Faded badly 200 M out.
Attempted to make all. No extra closing stages.
Around midfield. Disputed 4th into straight. No extra passing 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Behind midfield. Forced to switch out for a run early in straight then finishing well.
Rear. Made up late ground down centre of straight.
Settled just off the pace. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear most of way.
Chased leader. Ran on steadily under pressure to draw level passing 200 M but over-shadowed closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Ran on along rails to be nearest at finish.
Missed the break and lost some ground. Never nearer.
Never in contention.
Settled in 4th just better than midfield. Ran on to hit front closing stages.
Soon took up a handy position near the rail. Ran on in straight but failed to catch the winner.
Midfield or worse. Under pressure from 600 M and wide rounding the home bend. Weakened gradually 300 M out.
Towards rear. Commenced to improve from 600 M but caught 6-wide rounding the home bend. Made up good ground in straight to be the nearest at finish.
Prominent until dropping out steadily from 400 M.
About midfield. Closer order before straightening but unable to produce extra effort passing 300 M.
At back. Shifted to the outside to improve from 500 M. Ran past a few beaten runners upon straightening.
Disputed lead early, tracked leader from 1200 M. Under pressure from 500 M. Kept on in straight, just failed to hold on for 3rd near the line.
Soon disputed lead. 1L advantage passing 1200 M. Kept on in straight and fought on gamely to defy challengers final stages to claim victory.
Midfield or worse. Lost position rounding the home bend and dropped to the last into straight.

Midfield early. In the run to the winning post the first time proved difficult to settle and steadily dropped back to the rear. Crept slightly closer along the rail upon straightening. One-paced thereafter.
7Ls off speed on fence, 4Ls down on straightening travelling smoothly, blocked for a run throughout majority on home straight, not extended.
Not break well, held up 5Ls off pace on inside, closer when travelling sweetly final bend, ran on well enough without ever appearing the winner.
Never much better than 5Ls off speed, racing 2 and 3-wide, never got competitive.
Settled 7 to 8Ls off early pace racing 2-wide, crept closer from Rock to be 4Ls down and still 2-wide turning in, ran on well in straight to lead close home.
Darted over to fence from wide alley to sit 8Ls off speed until 600 M out when brief effort to advance through field, turned in racing widest of all, soon beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in 2nd place, 2Ls off pace and on fence, quickened up to lead 200 M out only to be collared final strides.
Broke awkwardly, saved ground about 4Ls off leader, hard ridden from 700 M out to line and kept responding to pressure though one-paced through latter stages.
Pressed on from gates to lead 1st bend, never more than 2Ls clear, not quicken home stretch and grabbed 200 M out, no extra.
Sent on from wide draw to race 3-wide and always 2 to 3Ls off pace though constantly niggled throughout, every chance 200 M out but not come on.
Raced in rear majority of race, never closer than 8Ls off pace.
Broke well and switched to fence, settling 8Ls off speed 800 M out, gradually crept closer and 2.5Ls down 200 M still on fence, not clear run and not fully tested final 150 M.
Raced 2-wide 4 to 5Ls off pace, hard ridden to get competitive 600 M out, no threat in straight.
Slow to begin, settled towards rear. Made gradual ground final 250 M.
3-wide in midfield, hung in near 1000 M and bumped another runner. Improved passing Rock to challenge for lead turning in, run ended inside final 100 M and dropped away.
Up there early, soon eased to take sit behind leaders. Kept on one-paced in straight before dropping out final 100 M.
4 or 5-wide around midfield without cover. Bumped near 400 M and obliged to travel wider. Dropped out soon after straightening.
3Ls off pace just forward of midfield, bumped near 1000 M when starting to pull a bit. Began to struggle from 600 M, never looked likely thereafter and dropped away from 200 M.
Switched off in last position. Shaken up 500 M out and swung widest into straight. Flew home on outer to collect race concluding stages.
2-wide behind midfield, chased along from 500 M. Made steady ground from 150 M, no extra final bit.
Forward of midfield 2Ls off speed on fence. Awkwardly placed near 200 M and became unbalanced, then was unable to find clear running and was not ridden out to the line.
Settled in midfield. Held up for run over final 200 M and was not properly tested out.
Held up 2nd last on rail until straightening. Ran on well along inner final 200 M to be nearest at finish, just denied.
Soon disputing lead on rail. Unable to keep up when tempo quickened 400 M out. Kept on fairly before giving ground steadily final 100 M.
Soon up on pace, 3-wide until 1000 M. Slender advantage turning in and held every chance until passed by 1st pair final 50 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Always thereabout. Was 3rd course proper. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Soon led and made all. Held on very well.
Bounded in the air at start, soon recovered ground to be in touch. Ridden along to be 3rd 200 M. One-paced closing stages. (Hung in.)
Midfield early. Advanced to 4th 600 M. One-paced 300 M.
Towards rear early. Improved to midfield halfway. Continued to make ground but was one-paced inside 200 M.
Was prominent shortly after start. Progressed to 2nd 600 M out. Kept on but never able to threaten.
Mostly in 6th throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 300 M.
Slightly slowly away, recovered some ground to be midfield 600 M out. Found no extra 400 M.
Around midfield to halfway. Faded. (Bled.)
Sluggish at start but quickly ridden to join leaders approaching home bend. Hit front momentarily passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Lacked early speed but ridden to worse than midfield. One-paced in straight.
With leaders early. Dropped to midfield coming out of back straight. No further impression.
Well there but remained wide after beginning from poor draw. Disputed lead rounding home bend. One-paced and hanging when tightened over 200 M out. Never recovered.
Led till joined into straight. Found no extra passing 200 M.
Jumped in air at start losing considerale ground. Recovered ground to join rear of field turning in and sustained progress to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in midfield of main bunch. Not much room early in straight and steadied for a run passing 300 M. Kept on steadily to the line.
Raced keenly in prominent position 4-wide. Quickened under pressure to hit front passing 200 M but caught final strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never on terms.
Prominent early then raced in better than midfield position. Turned into straight on heels of leaders and kept on steadily closing stages.
Soon prominent and always wide. Came to challenge under pressure to hold every chance the length of straight.
Prominent far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Faded in straight.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Waited with. Came with strong late run inside 300 M to snatch victory short of line.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on from 6th early straight, just lost 3rd place narrowly final stride.
Towards rear. Checked 500 M. No subsequent progress.
Soon led. Was joined around 800 M. Regained clear advantage final turn. Just held off runner-up's challenge in the straight.
Better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear early. Pushed along to join the lead 800 M. Hung out home turn, soon faded.
Midfield. Kept on early straight but weakened closing stages.
Midfield. Made progress to be 3rd 900 M. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Midfield. Lost some ground when clipped heels and stumbled near 900 M. Never recovered.
Jumped well from an outside draw, soon settled towards rear. Was held up and steadied 300 M. Ran on strongly 200 M when in clear, doing best work at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily along rail 250 M.
Prominent early. Raced 5th from 1000 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent. Was 2nd on inside 400 M. Ran on steadily but was always held by the winner.
Slow into stride, towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Soon last. Ran on a bit inside 250 M.
Settled just worse than midfield. Ran on under pressure doing best work at finish.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened to gain upper hand about 200 M out and hung on well under pressure.
Settled towards rear. Kept on without quickening in straight.
With leaders far side. Settled in 3rd on heels of leaders home bend. Gradually faded in straight.
Broke well then raced mainly in midfield. Kept on one pace before hampered about 300 M out.
Steadied to rear at start. Always in last few.
Prominent. Giving ground in straight when squeezed and lost position about 300 M out.
With leaders. Took up running home bend but headed into straight. Soon dropped out.
Hampered at start. Travelled towards rear. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Drawn poorly and remained wide far side racing prominently to straight. Widest runner turning in then soon weakened.
Never far off to straight. Lost touch 300 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Held up just off the pace. Hit front turning for home but headed under pressure 200 M out. Fought on to just fail to peg back winner.
Led. Headed near 100 M, no extra.
Led breifly, settled in a forward position. Steadied just on straightening, not a factor afterwards.
Ridden along to maintain midfield position. Closer order around home turn. Short-lived effort near 400 M, soon one-paced to the line.
Midfield or worse. Wide on home bend when creeping closer. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Pushed hard to go forward. 3rd into straight. Dropped out steadily from 300 M.
Outpaced early, midfield. No further improvement in straight.
Checked on jumping, at back. Wide into straight. Made up ground steadily from 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, at back. Not quite enough room to improve near 300 M but made up good ground when into the clear near 200 M.
Outpaced early. Worse than midfield. Wide entering the straight and made good late impression.
Wide early from a difficult gate. Soon midfield. Responded well from 300 M to assert authority inside 100 M and won comfortably.
Tardy start. Slow to get into stride, steadily moved up to be well there. 2nd into straight. Kept on and just held on 2nd on the line.
Midfield or better to 200 M. Soon weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, at back. Never a factor.
In touch. Wide along the back straight and round home bend. Faded on straightening.
Held up in rear 7 to 8Ls off pace racing 3-wide, still in rear turning in racing 6-wide, soon no chance.
Eased back 7 to 8Ls off pace on fence down back stretch, turned for home racing 3-wide and 5Ls off speed, never got competitive.
Eased back 6 to 7Ls off pace on fence until straight, never got a clear run on fence and hardly extended closing stages.
Raced 3-wide 2 to 3Ls off speed until home straight, 1L down, in clear and every chance of a place 200 M out, not come on.
Sat 2.5Ls off back of speed racing 2-wide, similarly positioned and every chance 300 M out but not come on.
Always midfield racing 2-wide about 4Ls off pace, responded gamely to pressure in straight, 2.5Ls down 200 M out, kept on.
Settled 7Ls off pace racing 2-wide, niggled final bend, straightened up racing 5-wide and 5Ls off pace, stayed on well down centre of track to get lead close home.
Crossed to lead on fence 1200 M out, grabbed about 350 M out, stuck on at the one pace.
Always prominent towards inner 1 to 2Ls off pace, one-paced and toiling over 200 M out but staying on again closing stages when disappointed for running behind LUCKY LAD.
Always prominent, clear 2nd racing 2-wide at FRENCH CONNECTION's quarters 1000 M out, led 350 M out, ran around inside final 200 M out, grabbed 20 M from line.
Settled 2 to 3Ls off speed on fence until straight when repeatedly disappointed for a run behind FRENCH CONNECTION, not extended.
Raced 4-wide 5Ls off speed early on, niggled along 800 M out to lie up with pace, one-paced in straight.
Raced prominently but never better than 3-wide throughout, hard pressed entering straight and one-paced to line.
Never worse than 4Ls off speed and 3-wide, hard ridden to keep up 600 M out but kept finding and finished off well down centre of track.
Ridden and forward of midfield early, then remained 3-wide in midfield for most of race.
Began fairly, worked forward to track leader on rail. Switched to outside of leader passing 800 M. Kept on well in straight before losing 2nd spot near finish.
Well back, never seen with a chance.
Steadily dropped to rear towards inner. Ran on a little in straight, soon one-paced.
Niggled a bit early, then travelled kindly within striking distance. Made move at 250 M and had race sewn up 150 M out.
Held up at rear, switched out upon straightening and ran on strongly from 300 M though unable to threaten the winner.
Pressed on to lead 3 or 4 wide, crossed to reach rail 800 M out. Headed at 200 M, tired closing stages.
Began well then held up better than midfield on fence. Ran on a bit after being steadied and shifted out near 200 M.
Mostly midfield, always 4 or 5-wide. Unable to quicken in straight.
Midfield or worse. Clipped heels, stumbled and nearly fell near 500 M, did not recover and droppped out from 300 M.
Around midfield, steadily at 500 M to avoid heels. Found nothing in straight, gave ground from 200 M.
Slow to jump, rear of midfield on rail. Made only moderate headway when into clear inside final 200 M.
Sent on to sit at leader's quarters from 1400 M out, labouring at top of straight and beaten well over 200 M out.
Eased back to sit 3 from rear 9 to 10Ls off pace, crept closer to sit 5Ls off speed 800 M out, brief effort at top of straight and 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide early on in 5th 5Ls off pace, sent 3-wide by hanging DEPECHE MODE 1000 M out, always about 2 to 3Ls down in straight until weakening closing stages.
Raced 3-wide 9Ls off speed, 2-wide 6Ls off 700 M out, never quick enough to threaten.
Sat 9Ls off speed early on, improved to travel 5Ls off 1000 M out creeping closer on fence, 2Ls down 200 M out, weakened.
Settled 8 to 9Ls off pace racing 2-wide, on fence and 7Ls down turning in, switched out wider top of straight to challenge, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Led on fence fully 1600 M out, never more than 1L clear, grabbed over 200 M out, quickly swamped.
Held up two from rear 8Ls off speed and 2-wide, still in rear.
Slowly away, eased back 8 to 10Ls off pace early on, 6Ls off turning in but soon switched outside to challenge, 2.5Ls down 200 M out, ran on well closing stages to score readily.
Settled in 3rd on inside 2Ls off speed, quickened up in straight to lead over 200 M out, soon grabbed 100 M from line, no extra.
Settled about 7Ls off pace on fence through first 1000 M, 2-wide 5Ls off until straight when repeatedly held up for a run, never fully extended.
Never better than 3-wide in the run between 5 and 7Ls off speed early on, 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on well.
Settled in 4th 2 to 3Ls off lead racing 2-wide, driven along turning in but still every chance of a place over 200 M out, no extra.
Held rails position 5Ls off pace early on, hung out 1000 M out, under pressure final bend and quite one-paced in straight.
Generally 2 to 3Ls off speed down centre of track until 200 M out when outpaced, stayed on again late but never a threat.
Away well and led field on stand's rail early on, under pressure over 200 M out and just touched off for 3rd place late on.
Raced nearer stand's rail about 2Ls off speed early on, gradually outpaced from 300 M out.
Chased leader on stand's rail 2Ls adrift, kept closing final 200 M and grabbed third place near line.
Broke slightly awkwardly, soon led those up centre of track before drifting across to far rail, kept responding to pressure final 300 M to run on well.
Away well and led bunch on far rail by 1L, disputed outright lead 400 M out, stuck on well under strong pressure latter stages.
Dwelt at start and lost at least 4Ls as a result, never on terms.
Raced down centre of track 3 to 4Ls off pace early on, came under strong pressure fully 500 M out, no response.
Raced 1 to 2Ls off pace down centre of track, left alone and leading those down the centre from 500 M out, not quicken final stages.
Raced down centre of track 3Ls off speed, gradually outpaced from 300 M out.
Sat 1L of leader on far rail until hitting front just under 200 M out, ran on well.
Trailed field to straight. Never in the hunt.
Midfield to straight when he kept on steadily to claim 3rd near finish.
Prominent to straight where he held every chance approaching 200 M. No extra.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on strongly to take command close home. Won impressively.
Never a factor.
In touch to straight where he dropped out quickly despite coming under pressure.
About 5th into straight. Came under pressure 300 M and kept on. One-paced towards finish.
In rear to straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear till running on quite well final 250 M despite having no chance with winner.
Well there to straight where he kept on till outpaced close home.
Mostly 5th or 6th to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
About 10th 1000 M and similar position into straight. Stayed on a bit closing stages.
Midfield rounding home bend. Was improving when steadied 150 M. Plugged on.
Led soon after start and was still in front 200 M. Found no extra when headed passing 150 M.
Prominent early from widest draw. Unable to maintain position passing 1200 M.
Never far off. Advanced to 2nd final turn. Ridden under pressure in straight, taking advantage near 100 M. Headed close home.
Slowly away, rear to 400 M. Crept closer to midfield early straight. Continued to make ground to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Shifted in to cause interference 200 M out when making ground. Kept on.
Midfield. Checked at 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear on the rail. Made progress to midfield turning in. Ran on steadily to take lead near finish.
Behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Mostly raced 3-wide 3rd until weakening out of contention 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Made some progress from 1000 M to be 4th or 5th far side. Made no impression in straight.
Well there, took lead from 900 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Led field to 900 M. Remained prominent before dropping back steadily 200 M out.
Midfield. Steadied 400 M. Recovered some ground to be 3rd briefly 200 M. Soon one-paced.
Broke well. Caught wide in midfield. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Slowly away losing considerable ground. Trailed the field before headway around home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Made all.
Chased leader. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Behind midfield. Commenced run into straight. Finished strongly to snatch 3rd close to home.
Never better than midfield. (Bled.)
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in 4th. Ran on doggedly under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly. Always in last few. (Bled.)
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight doing best work at finish.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to midfield rounding home bend. No more progress.
Began awkwardly, last to straight. Made up a little ground inside 200 M.
Pushed hard from a wide draw to be prominent. Under pressure rounding home bend. Weakened in straight.
Soon led. Held on well but was headed close home.
Always there. Reached 3rd near 900 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped out from final turn. Wide without cover throughout.
Pushed along from widest draw to be 2nd 1000 M. Unable to hold place final 200 M.
Towards rear. Midfield far side. Responded well when under pressure in straight. Looked like winner inside 100 M, was just beaten on the line.
Towards rear. Improved a bit when given reminders early straight. Soon found no extra.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back steadily passing 1000 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Gradually progressed to midfield rounding home bend. Steadied 200 M and shifted in to find running. Ran on well when in clear to grab victory by the narrowest margin.
Midfield to home bend. Eased down from 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Last early. Improved swiftly to behind midfield over 800 M out. Hampered on rails slightly passing 500 M. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight.
Always prominent. Fought on dourly final 200 M to gain upper hand final stride.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Midfield when hampered and lost position approaching 1000 M bend. Dropped out in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Broke well and led to Rock. Weakened from prominent position upon straightening.
Midfield throughout.
Hampered shortly after start. Never seen with a chance.
Well there. Took up running passing Rock. Faded 200 M out.
Raced in 4th. Ran on steadily to hit front closing stages but caught in the shadows of the post.
Rear till some good late impression closing stages.
Steadied to last few early, then raced keenly behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden to go forward from a difficult gate. Took up running near the 1200 M. Joined and disputed lead from 900 M. Headed soon after straightening and dropped out.

Followed fence and was always in striking distance. Shifted to outside to commence run rounding the home bend. Took lead near the 200 M but soon headed by the winner and just held on for 2nd on the line.
Well there. Shifted out to improve rounding the home bend and 4-wide into straight. Unable to produce extra and one-paced to the line.
Midfield. Shifted out to improve about the 400 M and wide into straight. Kept on one pace until no extra passing 200 M. Rider dropped his near side rein about 100 M out.
On jumping was steadied and taken across behind the field to the rear but nearer the rail. 6Ls off the leader into straight. Made up good ground final 250 M and missed 2nd placing narrowly.
Jumped awkwardly. Restrained to the rear from a difficult draw. Made steady ground in straight until no extra near finish.
About midfield. Wide throughout. Obliged to travel wider and lost position when bumped approaching the 400 M. Unable to recover thereafter.
Midfield or worse. Checked when disappointed for running near the 200 M. Did not recover.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground after straightening until one-paced final 100 M.

Broke well, soon travelled kindly in midfield or better. Cruised along the rail rounding the home bend to be 1L off the leader into straight. Ran on and gained upper hand inside 200 M for a comfortable win.
Soon led, headed near the 1200 M and then commenced to over-race and unsettled. Disputed lead from 900 M until 200 M when weakened and gradually dropped out.
Always in rear or one from rear between 8 and 10Ls off pace until final bend, straightened up racing 5-wide and 7Ls down, soon no chance.
Never better than 3-wide throughout, 4Ls off pace first half of race, improved from 800 M out to go 2Ls 3rd 600 M out, hard ridden home bend, weakened in straight.
Raced 2-wide between 3 and 5Ls off speed until home straight when under pressure, no threat whatsoever final 350 M.
Eased back upon exiting gates, settled 8Ls off speed 1000 M out, crept a little closer to sit 6Ls down entering straight, well beaten 200 M out.
Had run of race in 3rd place on fence 2Ls off pace, shifted out awkwardly 700 M out becoming unbalanced, soon ridden to stay on at one pace through closing stages.
Travelled well enough better than midfield racing 2-wide about 3Ls off pace, struggling at top of straight and soon dropped right out of contention.
Soon led on fence never much more than 1L clear, ceded neck advantage to STRATEGIC MOVE 250 M out but stayed on again under strong driving to lead 100 M out, kept on.
Raced with cover on fence 2 to 4Ls off speed until 600 M out when niggled to lie up, similarly placed on straightening but found nothing under pressure, dropped away.
Slowly into stride, settled on inside about 7Ls off speed, 6Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, finished off down centre of track, 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly but post came too soon.
Travelled 2-wide about 6Ls off lead through early stages, improved racing 3-wide from 600 M to straight when 3Ls down, not come on again.
Settled on inside 4 to 5Ls off pace until 400 M out when shifted out 2-wide, staying on when switched back inside to find racing room 100 M out, ran on.
Always held 2nd place racing 2-wide about 1L off GOOD MAN until straight, went a neck clear 250 M out but collared again 100 M out, no extra.
Fast out and led briefly, behind leader from 1000 M. One-paced in straight, passed by placegetters final stages.
3-wide in midfield without cover, commenced run from Rock to be 2Ls off leader turning in. Emptied inside final 200 M and dropped away tamely.
3-wide on leader's hindquarters, soon taken back to be 3Ls off pace on rail. Remained same in straight without quickening.
Niggled early to be midfield or slightly behind on fence. Ran on a bit late.
2-wide in midfield, 3 or 4Ls off pace. Chased along from 300 M, found very little extra in home stretch.
Jumped awkwardly, behind midfield before dropping to rear 1000 M out. Last into straight, ran past beaten runners concluding stages.
Began awkwardly and was bumped, recovered to be 2-wide 5Ls behind midfield. Switched out before straightening, failed to come on.
Worked forward to dictate pace from 1000 M. Sprinted clear 200 M out to score unchallenged.
Outpaced in last or 2nd last spot. 7Ls off pace turning in, made sustained effort final 200 M towards outer to be nearest at finish, though no threat to winner.
Slow to begin, steadily recovered to rear of midfield 1000 M out. Moved closer 4-wide rounding home bend to be 4Ls off lead on straightening. One-paced.
4 or 5 wide in midfield without cover, bumped after straightening, dropped out.
Towards rear throughout.
Never in contention.
Towards rear early. Made slight improvement far side to be midfield or behind. 5-wide entering straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Dropped back from 1400 M. Tailed off in straight. (Bled.)
Led field to 300 M. Faded.
Towards rear. Improved to 5th 1500 M when the pace steadied. Remained around midfield until running on a bit inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Slightly progressed rounding home bend. Further improved to 3rd early straight. Kept on.
In touch early, soon remained midfield on inside. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent, was 2nd 200 M out. Kept on but unable to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 150 M.
Always there. Ran on from 2nd 400 M to assert authority 300 M. Held on well to the line.
Last. Made progress rounding home bend to be midfield but was widest turning in. Unable quicken to improve in straight.
Better than midfield. Pulled from 1500 M to sit outside leader 1200 M. Unable to hold place soon after straightening.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out. Won comfortably.
Midfield or behind. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and made good late progress.
Towards rear to straight where no clear run but kept on well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield and wide into straight. Ran on under pressure to claim 3rd final stages.
Soon dropped towards rear. Well back into straight. Made up good ground down centre of track.
Settled outside leader to straight, then soon weakened under pressure.
Close up to straight. Weakened.
Behind midfield to straight. Made no impression.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled final 200 M.
Midfield on rails. Tightened for a run about 300 M out. Ran on well between runners to grab 2nd close to home.
Never a factor.
Always thereabouts, racing freely far side. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent and 3- or 4-wide to straight. Weakened gradually.
Slowly away, was last until making up some ground 400 M.
Settled towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Prominent, 2nd 600 M out. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield final turn. One-paced thereafter.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight. (Bled.)
Settled rear from widest draw. Made up good ground in straight while hanging in, doing best work at finish.
Made all. Held on well to the line.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Unable to hold place when 3rd final turn.
Always there. Ran on a bit early straight but failed to quicken closing stages.
Towards rear early, soon improved to midfield. Dropped back steadily from 500 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on quite well in straight without threatening the winner.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. No progress.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped back home bend. Tailed off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Well back. Wide into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Not much room between runners early in straight. Ran on.
Led or disputed lead till weakened and overhauled passing 300 M.
Held up in rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite hanging in early in straight.
Behind midfield. Steadied early in straight. Kept on.
Prominent before dropping to midfield into straight. Kept on.
Settled in midfield or better. Hit front passing 200 M then never threatened.
Prominent and 2L 3rd into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening winner.
Mainly in rear with short-lived effort approaching home bend.
Ridden to lead early. Headed coming out of back straight. Weakened home bend.
Prominent. Quickened to hit front into straight. Weakened passing 300 M.
Midfield. Came to challenge under pressure early in straight but only one-paced.
Never better than midfield. Kept6 on in straight.
Steadily settled towards rear. Disappointed for running near the 200 M and made no improvement thereafter.
Niggled along early to maintain in midfield. Made up some ground after the 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Wide into straight. Made up some ground after 200 M.
About midfield or worse. Short-lived effort along the rail near the 300 M. Kept on one pace concluding stages.
Slowly away, towards the rear. Wide and 2nd last into straight. Ran past a few beaten runners after the 200 M.
At back. Never in contention.
Soon took up running and never headed. Held on well to the line.
Soon tracked leader. Hung out approaching and rounding the home turn. Ran on after straightening until one-paced inside 200 M.

Soon took up a handy position with cover. Shifted out from rail upon straightening to commence a run. Every chance early straight but unable to produce extra effort inside 200 M and missed second near the line.
From a difficult gate was caught wide throughout without cover. At rear early, gradually improved to better than midfield before making the turn. Wide into straight. Steadily weakened after 200 M.
Missed the start and was then inconvenienced. Towards rear. Wide throughout. Made no show in straight.
Broke well. Soon prominent. Ran on well in straight before finding winner too strong.
Better than midfield. Dropped out gradually passing the 200 M.
Settled 4 to 5Ls off early speed racing 2-wide though always niggled along to maintain position, quickened up well from 3Ls off pace 300 M out to hit front 200 M out, ran on well.
Slipped back to race 2-wide 6Ls off speed 1200 M out, 4Ls off and 3-wide turning for home, not clear run until 200 M out, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Awkwardly away, raced in rear, 2-wide and 8Ls off speed, under pressure fully 600 M out, never on terms.
Prominent early on in 3rd racing 3-wide and checked early on also, 2-wide and Ls off pace round home bend, 1L down and still with place prospects 300 M out, soon swamped.
Raced 2-wide to 4Ls off speed early on, turned in 2Ls off, hard ridden to close in straight but never closer than 1L to lead, one-paced final 100 M.
Slowly into stride and soon 8Ls off speed racing 2-wide, 6Ls down turning for home, ran on well from 300 M out to be nearest finish.
3 to 4Ls back the fence until straight when travelled well, found nothing when asked to pick up 350 M out.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace, still wide and 4Ls down 400 M out, managed to get within 1.5Ls of lead 200 M out, no extra.
Held rails position 2 to 3Ls off speed in 4th until home bend when crept closer, every chance 200 M out when just a neck off, not match pace of principals and caught for 3rd close home.
Raced 3 to 4-wide 6 to 7Ls off early pace, improved racing wide round bend and entered straight 5-wide 4Ls down, ran on strongly but never quite grabbed winner.
Bit sluggish early on, 5 or 6Ls behind and on fence until straight, ran on well without posing any threat to leaders final 350 M.
Raced 4-wide 3Ls off pace early on, entered straight 3-wide 2.5Ls down, weakened over 200 M out.
Keen early on, always vying for lead with HORNET, all out 200 M out when overhauled by several rivals, quickly petered out.
Led on fence 1400 M out but never able to dominate owing to pressure from GOLCONDA upsides, folded at top of straight.
Away smartest, steadily eased to be 3-wide 2Ls off lead without cover better than midfield. 4-wide 3Ls turning in, dropped out from 300 M.
Driven early to be 4-wide without cover around midfield. Not come on in straight.
3-wide behind leaders. Responded well to challenge winner in the run to the line but shifted ground and caused interference. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Steadily taken back to be 3-wide at rear. Made up some ground from 300 M, no extra near home.
Slow to jump, at tail on fence throughout.
Jumped very awkwardly and lost ground, at rear most of the event, never a factor. (Bled from off nostril but not deemed official bleeder.)
Around midfield before beginning to drop back a bit near the 800 M. 5Ls off speed into straight, unable to quicken.
Fractious in stall. 3 or 4 wide with cover in mid-division. Made gradual ground from 200 M but was crowded near 200 M. Stayed on but again hampered near finish and was severely checked.
Ridden to be prominent early on fence, unable to keep up and dropped to forward of midfield 900 M out. Ran on a bit from 250 M, crowded and checked 100 M, did not recover.
Pressed on to dispute lead 2-wide from 900 M. Unable to go with winner 250 M out, kept on same pace until passed by placegetter close home.
Niggled to be 2Ls off pace in handy position. Kept on same pace on rail in straight before beginning to tire inside final 200 M.

From widest draw was dropped to rear after start, 4-wide without cover. Ran on steadily from 250 M but shifted in when hanging and caused interfence. Straightened and ran on to be nearest at finish. (Finished 3rd, placed 4th.)
Sent to the lead, hugged rail when joined from 900 M. Drew clear 250 M out and stayed on strongly to fend off challengers.

Away well, gradually dropped to midfield, 2-wide 4Ls off speed. Ran on steadily from 300 M, crowded 100 M out, quickly recovered but only to be hampered again near the line, unlucky. (Finished 4th, placed 2nd.)
Settled on fence 3Ls off pace until home straight, soon outpaced.
Best away but not able to dominate in front though never more than 2Ls off pace, not come on again from 300 M out, weakened.
Settled 7 to 8Ls off pace racing 2-wide always tracking ELECTRONIC UNICORN, not match winner's acceleration but finished strongly to draw clear of remainder of field.
Always in 3rd about 2.5Ls off pace racing 2-wide until straight, well outpaced 350 M out and stayed on at one-pace final 200 M.
Always on fence 5Ls off lead until straight, not quicken weakened from well over 200 M out.
Held up in rear 9Ls off pace, turned for home racing 3-wide and still well behind, ran on fairly.
2-wide 6Ls off pace down back straight, crept a little closer round home turn, 4Ls down when quickened up 350 M out, hit front 250 M out, pushed out.
Travelled in rear on fence in three or four runners throughout, never closer than 7Ls off pace.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, similarly placed at top of stretch but soon outpaced, staying on again nearer finish.
Travelled 8Ls adrift racing 3-wide through first 1200 M, effort at top of straight and 5Ls down 200 M out, ran on evenly final stages.
Raced 3-wide without cover 3Ls off pace in 5th place, outpaced by winner 300 M out but stuck on dourly, laying in a bit, however, to comfortably claim 3rd place.
Sat 6Ls off pace and 1 to 2-wide until straight when brief effort to quicken, faded 200 M out when 5Ls down.
Led after 200 M raced and never more than 2Ls clear, overhauled by winner 250 M out, no extra.
Drifted back on exiting to sit 8Ls off pace, hard driven 600 M out but responded to pressure.
Raced 4-wide early on 7 to 8Ls off pace, 3-wide and 5Ls down turning in, not quicken and beaten 300 M out.
On fence and 4Ls off speed until entering straight when 3Ls down, slightly outpaced by principals 300 M out, ran on well again through beaten horses final 100 M.
Raced 2-wide 7 to 8Ls off pace through early stages, outpaced at top of straight and soon no chance.
Soon led but never by more than 2Ls marginally clear turning in, soon weakened and swamped 200 M out.
Not break well, raced 3-wide early on 5Ls off pace, improved froim 700 M out to sit 1L off pace and 4-wide entering straight, outpaced before running on again closing stages.
Never closer than 5Ls to pace and always in rear group of three or four runners throughout.
At least 5Ls off speed racing 2-wide early on, 4Ls down and rousted along on straightening, tended to hang in when short of racing room 200 M out, no further impression.
Very keen early on racing in 4th 3-wide and 3Ls off pace, sent on round home turn to go 1L off lead 400 M out, soon overhauled by off-pace challengers and no extra close home.
Held rails position 7 to 8Ls off lead early on, crept through field racing 2 and 3-wide to go 4Ls down turning in, never much of a threat in straight.
Settled 4Ls off pace racing 2-wide, 2.5Ls off pace entering stretch, kept finding all the way to line, just missed.
Held up in midfield 5 to 6Ls off pace, 2Ls down and travelled well entering straight, led briefly 200 M out, ran on well though touched off for 2nd on line.
Raced in 2nd never worse than 2Ls off lead down back straight, half-length down turning for home, still in contention 200 M out but soon weakened.
Raced 4-wide early 7Ls off pace, improved from 1000 M out to sit 3.5Ls off lead 600 M out, gradually crept closer before quickening up to hit front over 100 M out, all out.
Settled in 3rd on fence between 1.5 and 3Ls off pace until home straight, weakened 300 M out and ceding further ground when checked by MASTER FAY 200 M out.
Always well there. Ridden to challenge approaching 200 M. Found winner too strong.
In rear to 300 M where he showed great turn of foot to take command close home. Won impressively.
Hard ridden to get in touch and was prominent before losing ground approaching home turn. Dropped out quickly on straightening.
Narrow leader before going clear by 800 M and was still 1L in front on straightening. Found no extra when headed inside 150 M.
Mostly 5th or 6th to home turn. Kept on till starting to give ground by 200 M.
Towards rear before making up some ground from the 300 M. Found no extra.
Never better than mid-division.
Never far away to straight and was 3rd 350 M. Unable quicken to challenge and faded close home.
Never on terms.
Towards rear till making steady headway rounding home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Midfield into straight where he made no show.
Was 5th 1000 M and similar position into straight where he failed to sustain effort.
Soon led and made all.
Towards rear. Pushed along to recover ground to be 5th near 900 M. Dropped out upon straightening.
Always prominent. Kept on but just lost 2nd close to the line.
Pushed along to be 2nd 1000 M. Failed to hold place passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Checked and unbalanced approaching 200 M and steadied 150 M. Made no show.
Rear. Ran on to make up good ground in straight.
Midfield. Steadied at 200 M. Unable to quicken thereafter.
Never better than midfield. Wide throughout.
Always there. 2Ls 4th turning in. Ran on steadily to grab 2nd near finish.
Flat-footed at start, losing ground. Improved a bit rounding home bend. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Made up further ground in straight.
Mostly 5th to straight. Kept on quite well closing stages.
Left awkwardly. Never able to feature.
Around midfield throughout.
Rear to straight. Ran on steadily.
Disputed lead. Gained narrow advantage into straight but overhauled closing stages.
Very sluggish at start. Never in contention.
Prominent in 4th to straight. Behind runner early on. Kept on steadily without quickening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Wide into straight. No extra. (Sore.)
Midfield. Quickened well upon straightening for a commanding victory.
Chased leaders in 3rd to straight. One-paced.
Led till narrowly headed into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout.
Never on terms.
Held 4th to final turn. Ran on to take command 200 M. Never threatened.
Remained 6th to straight. Short-lived effort to be 3rd passing 200 M. Soon found no extra.
In touch. Tightened near 200 M. Unable quicken to challenge.
Behind midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Towards rear and wide throughout.
Tardy start. Never a factor.
Soon 2nd. Came to tackle leader final turn and took lead briefly early straight. Effort not sustained.
Pushed along and soon took the lead. Severely checked approaching 200 M. Never recovered.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Hung in while making ground in straight. Just failed to obtain a minor placing at finish.
Better than midfield. Improved a bit along rail final turn. Tightened 200 M, then one-paced.
Midfield or behind throughout.
Rear. Made up good ground in straight but never able to reach the winner.
Rear into straight. Made up some ground under pressure.
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Faded into straight.
Better than midfield when wide far side. Dropped out.
Well there. Hit front shortly after straightening but failed to sustain effort and caught close to post.
Settled in midfield. Fought on doggedly under pressure in straight but failed to draw level.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Improved to hold every chance in straight but failed to peg back first pair.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly in midfield. Inconvenienced turning in. Recovered some late ground in straight.
Rear. Gained midfield into straight saving ground on inside rails. Kept on steadily.
Never far off. Quickened well to hit front passing 200 M and hung on well for a confident victory.
Niggled along to lead. Headed near the 200 M and steadily weakened.
Slow to begin. At back, never a factor.
Worse than midfield. Found it hard to keep up rounding the home bend and hung out. Made no show in straight.
Towards the rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Tailed off throughout.
Well there. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Better than midfield. Modest improvement concluding stages.
Broke best, restrained to forward of midfield. Ran on well along the rail in straight but failed to catch the winner.
Niggled to go forward, sat outside leader from 600 M. Quickened well upon straightening to hit front inside 200 M. Held on well.
Well there. 4-wide most of way. Under pressure rounding the home bend when beginning to give ground. Weakened further in straight.
Soon took up a handy position with cover. Kept on well in straight without threatening the first pair.
Hard ridden to maintain position. Worse than midfield. Made ground final 250 M.
Stood in stall and lost 4Ls as result, soon tacked on racing 7Ls off pace and 2-wide, crept closer round home turn and ran on well in straight to be nearest finish.
Bit keen early on racing 2-wide through early stages, soon settled to race on inside 6Ls off pace, short of room on inside final 400 M and not fully tested in finish.
Soon led on fence but never more than 2Ls clear, overhauled 200 M and weakened.
Over-raced on inside and carried head awkwardly, 2Ls off pace from 1000 M out on fence until weakening right out of contention upon straightening.
Not best away, raced 2-wide generally about 4Ls off pace throughout, close at heels 700 M out, caught on fence in straight but never really threatened.
Never better than 6Ls off speed and 2-wide until straight when turned on widest of all, ran on through beaten horses latter stages.
Travelled 3-wide 3 to 4Ls off pace until straight, not come on final 200 M.
Raced 4-wide early on, then travelled 3-wide 3Ls off pace down back straight, same position turning for home but under strong pressure, beaten 300 M out.
Ridden quietly 5Ls off pace and 3-wide the trip, entered straight 5-wide and 4Ls down, responded well to hit front 50 M out, kept on.
Raced 3-wide early on to get to 2nd place 1 to 2Ls off pace, still well placed on straightening and hit front 200 M out, overhauled by winner 50 M out, lost 2nd place on line.
Slowly into stride but 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, steadily dropped back to be 7Ls off 800 M out, clear last entering straight, 5Ls down 200 M out, stayed on strongly closing stages.
Raced in 4th travelling 2-wide 2 to 3Ls off speed, similarly placed entering straight but one-paced from that point on.
Slow to begin, steadily recovered to midfield near 800 M. Tired from 250 M and dropped away.
Niggled along from widest gate, midfield out wide early. Gradually dropped to last 500 M out. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Amongst front runners early, steadily dropped to midfield near Rock. Hung out badly about 500 M and was severely checked, lost position and not a factor thereafter.
There or thereabouts to 150 M out where beginning to drop away.
Midfield or slightly better on fence. Switched out rounding home bend to 2-1/2Ls off lead turning in. Ran on well final 200 M but the line came too soon.
Lacked early speed, towards rear 4 or 5-wide. Unbalanced and dipped near 400 M. Made moderate progress from 200 M, no extra close home.
Prominent early, then travelled 3Ls off lead better than midfield 4-wide without cover. Run ended upon straightening and dropped out steadily.
Midfield early, steadily dropped towards rear closer to fence about 4Ls off pace. Made steady headway through runners from 150 M, nearest at finish.
Pushed forward to make running, shifted across to hug rail from 600 M. Drew clear 200 M out, stayed on and just lasted when challenged final stages.
Soon behind leader on rails, one-paced in straight, passed by placegetters inside final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced a bit tight, outpaced at tail before creeping closer along fence rounding home turn. Continued to make ground in the run to the line though having tendency to lay out.
In touch briefly, soon raced just behind midfield and remained in similar position after.
Around midfield. Ran on solidly passing 400 M to assert authority closing stages.
Soon led. Held on well until headed closing stages.
Midfield early, soon reached 3rd course proper. Kept on but unable to match speed with winner. Raced greenly and shifted in close to home.
Last until making up some ground final 400 M.
Tardy start, towards rear throughout.
Mostly midfield. Short-lived effort 300 M but found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield halfway. One-paced.
Never a factor.
Prominent on the rail. Unable to hold place when one-paced inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily passing the course proper.
In touch to 400 M. Weakened.
Never able to feature.
Led field soon after start. Held 4Ls advantage early straight. Won readily.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit when slightly hampered approaching 800 M. Kept on in straight.
Midfield. Made progress to 4th final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. 5-wide turning in. Kept on to gain 3rd 100 M but lost the minor placing near finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Pushed along to soon be 2nd. 4Ls behind winner early straight. Held on until failing to hold place closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back to 5th rounding home bend. Weakened in straight.
Behind midfield. Checked final turn. Ran on steadily to snatch 3rd close home.
Was there until weakening to contend closing stages.
Never able to feature.
Soon last from widest draw. Made up good ground from outside in straight, never nearer.
Missed the start and was in the rear. Ran on a bit on outside final 250 M.
Towards rear. Made ground along rail home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on well final 200 M without threatening.
Held 5th to home turn. Dropped out.
Raced wide without cover. Never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly, never able to feature.
In touch. Steadied and held up 250 M. Unable to improve when in clear final 100 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Crept close order to 3rd early straight. Gained slender advantage breifly 200 M. Kept on when headed 100 M out.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made no show in straight.
Prominent soon after start. Dropped out 450 M.
Behind midfield. Made up good ground 300 M out but unable to threaten the winner.
Towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend. Short-lived effort 400 M to join the leaders 250 M. Soon one-paced.
Soon led. Unable to quicken when headed 200 M.
Towards rear. Made some progress early straight but found not much galloping room. Kept on.
Prominent. Joined the leaders briefly 250 M. Soon weakened.
Behind midfield. Made some progress early straight. Soon weakened.
Soon midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Found no room on inside from 200 M. Ran on when in clear final 100 M.
Rear. Ran on well from outside 350 M to take command 100 M out.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Found no room on rails in straight.
Always in last few.
Well back. Short-lived effort entering straight where one-paced.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Quickly recovered towards rear. Dropped out before home straight.
Wide in midfield. Ran on in straight.
Always thereabouts. Not much room early in straight. Kept on well to the line.
Never in the hunt. (Bled.)
Always well there. Held every chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Never far off. Behind a wall of leaders upon straightening. Obtained split late to make some late progress.
Broke well. Led or disputed lead before gaining slender advantage upon straightening. Just held on by the narrowest of margins.
Settled just off the pace. 3-wide into straight. Fought on resolutely to just fail to peg back winner.
Better than midfield most of way. Kept on.
Never nearer.
