Prominent. Went forward and just sat outside leader from 900 M. Approaching and rounding the home turn hung out. Every chance in early straight but kept on one pace after 200 M.
Niggled along to maintain in midfield until 250 M, then weakened. Made no improvement in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground after straightening until one-paced passing 200 M.
Hard ridden to maintain position. Worse than midfield. Checked when crowded near the 800 M and thereafter.
At back, never in contention.
Steadily improved to a prominent position but wide early. Approaching and rounding the home turn hung out. Steadily weakened after 300 M.
Worse than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Broke well and soon took up running. Kept on strongly in straight to score a comfortable victory.
Niggled to go forward and sat behind leader to be handy with cover. Unable to quicken after straightening and weakened steadily from 250 M.
Better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield. Improved gradually from 800 M to be 5th into straight. Ran on well but unable to catch winner.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up some late finish after 200 M.
On jumping bounded in the air and towards rear. Closer order rounding the home bend. Ran on well in straight. (Rounding the bend and in straight hung in badly.)
Broke best, then settled in midfield or worse. Checked when disappointed for running about the 300 M. Made up some late ground.
Always in midfield 5 to 6Ls off pace racing 2 and 3-wide, 4-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, soon weakened.
Drifted back to race 2-wide 6Ls off pace, slight progress from 800 M to 600 M out, ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held up at least 7Ls off pace racing 3-wide at best, struggling and still in rear when turned in racing 7-wide, no chance.
Pressed on to lead round first bend racing 2-wide, got to fence 1000 M though never clear by more than 1.5L throughout, picked up well off final bend to fend off challengers readily.
Never closer than 6 or 7Ls off lead, raced 3 and 4-wide early on, 6Ls down and struggling entering straight, no extra.
Led on fence upon exiting but soon taken on outside for lead by winner, settled in 3rd place 2Ls of pace 900 M out, effort entering straight to quicken up again but weakened 100 M out.
Settled 4Ls off pace racing 2-wide through early stages, 3Ls down 400 M out, 2Ls down and all out 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 3-wide early on 2 to 3Ls off pace, hard-pressed to keep up round home turn, well beaten 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 4-wide without cover about 4Ls off pace through first half of race, came under pressure fully 600 M out, steadily weakened.
Pressed on to race 2-wide 1L off winner from about 1000 M out, kept tabs with winner until 200 M out, quickly weakened thereafter.
Held up 8Ls off pace on fence early on, 6Ls off 800 M out, ran on steadily closing stages to be nearest finish.
Raced 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, never got any more competitive than that. (Lame.)
Keen very early on before being checked twice on inside through first 800 M, shuffled back to race 4Ls off pace on fence, finished off evenly through final 600 M.
Raced in midfield 5 to 6Ls off pace racing 2-wide, always niggled along to pick up bridle, 3Ls down turning into straight but responded to constant pressure to be nearest finish.

Jumped a little awkwardly, driven forward to be handy 2 or 3Ls off lead on fence from 1000 M. Plenty to do on straightening when winner pulled clear, ran on steadily final 200 M without posing too much of a threat.
Around midfield to halfway where it hung out badly, soon dropped out tamely.
Ridden to maintain midfield position. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Niggled along but soon dropped to rear. Switched 6-wide rounding home bend, not come on in straight.
Led or disputed lead 2-wide. On leader's girth from 500 M. Soon lacked pace to keep up, kept on fairly before losing 2nd place close home.
Ridden to dispute lead out wide, on leaders' hindquarters rounding home bend. Emptied on straightening and dropped away steadily.
Niggled along but outpaced towards rear. 6Ls off pace turning in, made gradual ground from 300 M, no extra final bit.
Jumped only fairly, worked forward to contest lead on rail from 900 M. Held slender advantage from 500 M. Lengthened 300 M out to socre comfortably.
Ridden along but steadily dropped to rear of midfield 1000 M out. Checked severely at 700 M and dropped to tail 600 M out, made steady ground from 250 M, no extra near home.
Best away, then caught wide without cover behind leaders, 3Ls off lead entering straight. Unable to produce extra, tired closing stages.
Ridden but outpaced and raced greenly at rear on fence. Ran past well beaten runners final 200 M.
Bounded in air and lost a lot of ground, ridden and recovered some ground towards rear out wide. Last turning in and stayed same thereafter.
Led very early before electing to sit in 2nd place on fence 1L off SPLENDID PATROL, remained in 2nd before regaining lead about 250 M out, ran on well.
Led 1200 M out, never more than 1.5Ls clear, passed by winner about 250 M out, stayed on at same pace.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off lead 1000 M out, soon niggled to lie up with pace, not come on in stretch and beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide covered up in midfield about 4Ls off pace through first 800 M, niggled on home turn and hard ridden entering straight, dropped away.
Held up on inside 6 to 7Ls off pace until straight (was checked 1000 M out), not clear run until found passage on against rail 300 M out, still 5Ls down 200 M out, ran on well.
Always 4 to 5Ls off lead and on inside until top of home stretch, responded fairly to strong pressure closing stages.
Generally 2 to 3Ls off pace and on fence until home straight, never looked like bridging gap on winner, lost 3rd place close home.
Never more than 1.5Ls off pace in 3rd place racing 3-wide through to 400 M pole, retreated very quickly.
Raced keenly 4-wide without cover through to home straight, never troubled principals.
Raced keenly 2-wide about 5 to 6Ls off speed until asked to quicken up at top of home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Held up in rear at least 7Ls off pace and 2-wide, entered home straight racing 6-wide, soon no chance.
Raced 3-wide about 3Ls off pace until tempo quickened 400 M out, quickly dropped out of contention.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls off pace down back straight, awkwardly positioned home turn and took time to unwind fully in straight, nearest at finish.
Raced keenly 2-wide 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, raced close on heels 800 M out, under pressure to lie up entering straight, no impression.
Settled 2 to 3Ls off pace on fence through to home stretch, loomed up challenging for lead 350 M out, headed winner 250 M out through closing stages battle but outfought close home.
Soon led before being passed and settling close at HIGH SPIRITS' quarters, vying for lead again 400 M out, weakened from 250 M out.
Travelled 3 to 4Ls adrift of leader in midfield racing 2-wide, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Joined DIAMOND TALENTS in lead 1400 M out before relinquishing advantage to same rival 350 M out, dropped away.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace down back straight, crept from 800 M out to enter straight 4-wide 3Ls down, 2Ls down and 3rd 200 M out, soon no extra.
Very slowly away and soon 3-wide 8Ls off pace, 6Ls down and 3-wide 600 M out, posed no threat whatsoever in straight.
Missed the break, never travelling and always about 10Ls off pace, never a factor.
Raced 2-wide generally 2Ls off pace until home straight when under strong pressure to lie up, not come on and one-paced final 300 M.
Raced 3-wide without cover 2Ls off pace until straight when labouring under strong pressure, weakened rapidly.
Awkwardly into stride, crossed over from wide draw to settle 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, shifted across from rails 350 M out to centre of track 200 M out to find clear passage, ran on.
Raced 3-wide 6 to 7Ls off speed until 600 M out, 5Ls down and 3-wide on straightening, quickened up well to go 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on well without reaching front two.
Always 3-wide without cover 3 to 4Ls off pace until 600 M out, turned in racing 4-wide, vying for lead 350 M out, headed by runner-up 250 M out in head-to-head duel, battled back gamely.
Held up on rails about 4Ls off pace, slightly closer at top of straight but one-paced to line.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Jumped well and led field to straight. Was still 2Ls clear 200 M when shifting ground. Headed and found no extra near finish.
Never far off to straight where he ran on well final 200 M to lead close home.
Never in the hunt.
In rear to straight where he made up considerable ground, full of running at the finish.
Midfield rounding home bend and was disputing for 3rd 400 M. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
Well there to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Hampered start and lost touch approaching 800 M. Worse than midfield into straight where he ran on strongly inside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon in rear. Never a factor.
Mid-division most of way.
Made no show.
Was prominent before failing to hold place approaching 200 M.
About 11th into straight where he stayed on quite well.
Never troubled leaders.
Jumped awkwardly, made no show.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group and never able to feature.
Raced 5th before advancing to 3rd 400 M. Weakened final 150 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Found not much room along rail near 100 M. No progress thereafter.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent early and soon shared the lead. Took advantage rounding home bend. Held on well but was just caught near finish.
Led or shared lead before racing 3rd turning in. Ran on to fight back gaining upper hand narrowly final strides.
Jumped awkwardly and was last early. Soon recovered ground to be just behind midfield. Kept on quite well in straight.
In touch. Kept on well in straight but without threatening the first pair.
Prominent. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Midfield. 4-wide behind midfield final turn. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Well back. Ran on in straight to claim 4th.
Behind midfield. Weakened passing 400 M.
Missed the start losing ground. Remained in last few and was last into straight. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Led till narrowly headed rounding home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Settled behind midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on steadily without troubling winner.
Always thereabouts. One-paced.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Always in last few. Found nil under pressure in straight.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to assert authority soon after straightening then never in doubt.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Ridden early joining leader far side. Gained slender advantage home bend before dropped out in straight.
Never far off on the rail. Responded well from 4th final turn to gain narrow advantage 200 M out. Just held on.
Soon towards rear. Unable to feature.
Midfield. Made ground early straight but was one-paced close home.
Left awkwardly and was last to 450 M. Made up good ground but covered a lot of ground final turn. Reached 2nd 200 M out. Always held narrowly by the winner.
Prominent. Led or shared lead from 1200 M. Dropped out near 600 M. Tailed off final 200 M.
Led or shared lead to straight. Weakened when headed approaching 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made very minor progress in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Bounded in the air at start, towards rear. Ran on final 200 M but no threat to the quinella pair.
Slightly better than midfield. Made progress to 3rd 500 M. Made no show soon after straightening.
Pushed along from a wide draw, taking lead or sharing lead far side. Made no show inside 250 M.
Never better than midfield. Making some progress under pressure when baulked on rails inside 200 M.
Mostly in 4th. Ran on under pressure to claim 2nd closing stages.
Never nearer.
Around midfield to straight. No extra.
Behind midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Restrained in lead early. Ceded advantage passing 800 M. One-paced from 3rd into straight.
Niggled along in midfield most of way.
Midfield before gave ground home bend.
Never in contention.
Broke well. Gradually lost touch passing 400 M.
Lost ground at start. Raced in rear. Kept on past beaten runners in straight.
Remained wide early from widest draw. Improved swiftly to lead going up Rock. Extended advantage rounding home bend. Unchallenged in straight.

From the outside gate ridden along early to go forward, was unable to get in and obliged to race wide without cover until the middle stages. Tracked leader from 1000 M until 500 M. Steadily weakened thereafter.
Worse than midfield. Shifted to the outside to commence running upon straightening. Ran on well to the line.
Midfield on the rail. Clear run on straightening. Made moderate ground concluding stages.
Niggled to go forward and soon took up running. Drew clear final 200 M to score comfortably.
Outpaced early despite niggled along. Mainly towards rear. Wide into straight and made no improvement afterwards.
Well there until 400 M, 4-wide into straight. Gradually dropped out.
Soon better than midfield. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Travelled kindly in prominent position, always tracking leader. Kept on after straightening but was outsprinted by the winner inside 200 M. Held on for 2nd.
Jumped awkwardly, then steadily worked to midfield. Unable to maintain position before straightening. Dropped out further in straight.
Inconvenienced on jumping, at back. Never in contention.
Better than midfield. Under pressure from 500 M to maintain position. Gradually weakened from 250 M.
Settled at back. Crept closer along the rail before straightening. Steadied and shifted in abruptly to find running near the 300 M. Made a little late ground.
Raced 2 and 3-wide and 5Ls off speed down backstretch until final bend when struggling to keep up, faded right out.
Held up on breaking racing 2-wide about 10Ls off speed, never on terms and turned into straight racing wide, no chance 300 M out.
Raced prominently early on before settling about 4Ls off pace two off the fence, hard ridden 500 M out and beaten turning for home.
Never far away racing 2-wide about 3Ls off speed until 400 M out when challenging, not come on final stages and well beaten when short of room 100 M out.
Sent on to race 4 and 5-wide around first bend, reached 2nd position 1200 M before settling about 2Ls off LONGMARK, led 150 M out and all out when grabbed near line by winner.
Settled about 9Ls off early pace, crept closer from 800 M out racing 3-wide, turning into stretch at least 6-deep, 3Ls down 200 M out, pushed out to get up close home.
Settled in midfield racing 2-wide about 5Ls off pace until 400 M out when awkwardly positioned, very one-paced once in clear in straight.
Drifted back upon exiting to race in or near rear 10Ls off pace on fence until final bend when improved slightly, finished off evenly and not trouble leaders.
Raced 2 and 3-wide through first half of race, 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, improved from Rock out to sit 3Ls off pace racing 3-wide, briefly threatened principals before weakening 200 M out.
Raced wide round first bend before racing 3-wide without cover from 1000 M out, soon advanced from being 6Ls to 3Ls off pace and hard ridden 500 M out, quickly weakened.
Led on fence though never clear of rivals by much more than 2Ls, ceded advantage to COME SEE YOU 150 M out, no extra.
Settled on rails 6 to 7Ls off pace through early stages, switched out to race 3-wide to challenge turning into straight, stayed on at one pace.
Midfield on fence before switching out 3-wide rounding home turn. Stayed on one pace in straight and was inconvenienced near the 100 M.
Waited with 6 to 7Ls off lead towards rear on fence. Made steady ground final 200 M along inner without threatening the quinella pair.
Well there 2 or 3Ls off lead. Advanced to press leader from Rock, emptied upon straightening and dropped out quickly, eased down final 200 M.
3-wide without cover in midfield. Brief effort on home bend to be 4-wide forward of midfield turning in, one-paced before tiring near home.
Soon outpaced and detached from the field, never in the race.
At rear throughout, never a factor.
2-wide towards rear. Progressed slightly to rear of midfield, under pressure from 600 M, took time to respond before making some late headway.
Tracked leader in 2nd or 3rd spot, never more than 3Ls adrift. Kept on same pace in straight when under pressure. (Rider dropped whip after 200 M.)
Held up 2-wide 4Ls off speed in midfield. Progressed to 2Ls off lead before home bend. Ran on to hold every chance final 150 M, just failed on the line.
Soon led, held 2Ls advantage from 1200 M. Took breather from Rock, then quickened again on straightening. Kept on gamely when challenged final 150 M.
Handy 4th on rail, not come on after straightening and attempted to savage another runner twice 100 M out, one-paced.
3-wide near rear, ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Mostly 5th but unable to maintain position final 200 M.
Jumped well and led. Kept on well when headed inside 100 M.
Left awkwardly and was in rear. Soon recovered good ground to be 3rd 800 M. Remained same until one-paced final 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Widest turning in. Made up some ground while hanging in in straight.
Soon 3rd. Raced 4th from 800 M to 300 M. Ran on well to take command 100 M. Won readily.
Jumped well. Dropped back steadily soon after start.
Dropped to rear soon after start. Was last rounding home bend. Very minor progress in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made slight progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 8th inside 300 M, never nearer.
Slowly away, towards rear. Slightly improved to just behind midfield 800 M. Made no show 200 M out.
Sat outside leader to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Niggled along in midfield far side. Gave ground on home bend.
Not far off racing 4-wide most of way. Yielded ground steadily in straight.
Broke well holding some 1/2L on far side when trapped wide. Crossed to inner on home bend settling outside lead. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight but overhauled close home.
Settled at the back. Wide into straight. Ran on well under pressure down centre of track but the post came too soon.
Never far off. Produced some good impression in straight.
Given reminders to muster early pace. Had to settle for midfield rounding home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened passing 300 M to hit front 200 M out but caught near finish.
Behind midfield to straight. Ran on late.
Ridden to improve to midfield before home bend. Ran on down straight to assert authority close to post.
Sluggish at start. Remained well back to straight. Finished race off well.
Prominent. Lost touch inside 200 M.
Around midfield. Made up good late ground closing stages. (Lame.)
Missed the star. Always towards rear.
Took up running home bend. Joined over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Pushed to lead from widest draw. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily 200 M out. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Moderate progress final 200 M.
Started very awkwardly. At rear throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. Steadied for a run approaching 200 M. No progress.
Never a factor. (Bled.)
Towards rear early. Improved to 2nd 1000 M. Reached lead briefly 200 M. Soon weakened.
Remained 6th to near 200 M. Moved up inside the winner but never able to prevail.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening.
Soon 3rd. Hit front briefly passing 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Slightly behind midfield . Responded well when ridden under pressure from outside 200 M out to take command inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight.
Tracked leader. Took lead into straight going some 1-1/2Ls clear 200 M out. Caught near finish.
Well back. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never in contention.
Led to straight. Dropped out.
Settled towards rear. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Not clear passage early in straight. Obtained run over 200 M out. Ran on without matching pace of winner.
Behind midfield before effort rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Settled within striking distance to straight. Quickened well inside 300 M to assert authority close home.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Always in last few and wide throughout.
Midfield. Raced tightly between runners early in straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Just behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Prominent. Lost touch turning for home. Folded up quickly passing 200 M.
Prominent. Faded closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and then moved forward to be prominent. Unable to quicken passing 300 M. Weakened steadily final 200 M.
Led to 300 M. Gradually weakened thereafter.
Always well there. Kept on same pace to the line.
Steadied on jumping and towards rear. Made no improvement.
Niggled early to maintain in better than midfield. Unable to keep up near course proper. Dropped out gradually.
Soon at the rear. Never a factor.
Always midfield, one-paced to the line.
Travelled kindly in prominent position. Went forward and led briefly passing 300 M. Headed 150 M and kept on one pace. Just held on for 2nd.
Towards rear on stands side. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Soon sat outside leader. Kept on well passing course proper despite racing greenly. Took charge inside 150 M and stayed on.
Always behind. Never a factor.
Worse than midfield. Made up some ground concluding stages.
Towards rear throughout.
About midfield or worse. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Sent on to race wide round first bend and assume lead 1800 M out, never led by more than 2Ls throughout, collared by winner 200 M out, stayed on.
5Ls off leader and on fence 1600 M out, marginally closer entering straight but never threatened to better position in straight.
Bounded on exiting, soon racing 2 and 3-wide 4 to 5Ls off pace until home straight, not finish off well.
Hugged rails and never much worse than 3Ls off pace through to 800 M out when niggled along to lie up, gradually receded.
Never travelled well at any stage though raced 2nd from 1600 M to 350 M out, always niggled and scrubbed along, dropped away very quickly in straight.
Always prominent racing 2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in 3rd, 4th or 5th place until home straight when still travelling smoothly, still with place prospects 200 M out but soon weakened.
Very awkwardly away losing at least 3Ls as a result, raced 8Ls off pace down back straight, turned in racing 5-wide, 6Ls down, ran on to grab third but no chance with principals.
Always wide on the track, 3-wide 6Ls off leader 1600 M out, 4-wide 1000 M before creeping to sit 3Ls off pace but 5-wide 400 M out, one-paced closing stages.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off speed in midfield until final bend home straight when nearer rear and crowded for room on all sides, no further impression.
Raced near rear 2-wide 7Ls off pace, 6Ls down turning in, took time to unwind in straight and comfortably held from 3rd place.
Had the run of the on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1600 M to 700 M when niggled along, all out to maintain position entering straight, soon well beaten.
Raced 3-wide from first bend when about 4Ls off lead, improved from 1200 M to go 3rd 2Ls down but 4-wide and under pressure entering stretch, was first one eased down 300 M out.
3-wide and about 7Ls off pace early on, made steady improvement from 900 M out to enter home straight 3Ls down and 5-wide, quickened up well to grab DARWIN 200 M out, pushed out.
Not break well and checked first bend, steadied in rear and on inside 6 to 7Ls down until straight, disappointed for running room 350 M out and finished off evenly along rail.
Sent up to lead. Joined 800 M out, soon regained 1L advantage. Headed 150 M out, kept on fairly.
Outpaced at rear on fence. Made steady headway through field from 250 M, no extra final bit.
Disputed lead briefly, then 2Ls behind leader on rail. Dropped out quickly from 300 M.
Soon ridden to keep up in mid-division. Steadied when held up near the 400 M. Gained split 200 M out and accelerated well to take charge concluding stages.
Jumped smartly, ridden along out wide to be prominent. Was forced off the track near the 700 M. 4-wide 1.5Ls off lead turning in, run ended 200 M out and dropped away tamely.
Fractious, reared and bumped head in gate. Ridden in rear of midfield. 5-wide last of main group entering straight. Never on terms. (Blood in near nostril but not official bleeder.)
Steadily dropped towards rear from wide gate. Made gradual ground on outer from 300 M until no extra near finish.
3-wide 2 or 3Ls off pace. Checked rather severely near the 500 M. Still 3Ls down 5-wide into straight. Ran on well from 300 M to hold every chance 100 M out, no answer to winner close home.
Began fairly, pressed on out wide to join leader 800 M out. Hung out near 700 M then was on leader's quarters from 600 M. Kept on same pace in straight before beginning to tire inside final 100 M.
Slow to jump, outpaced at tail throughout, detached from the field from 700 M.
Ridden to be around midfield. 5Ls down towards rear on straightening. Ran past tired runners closing stages.
3-wide in handy position about 2Ls off speed. One-paced in straight, gave ground from 100 M.
Generally 5 to 6Ls off pace until turning for home when under pressure to quicken, responded to pressure to gain on principals down straight.
Raced in 2nd 2 to 3Ls off pace until 400 M out, accelerated at top of straight to lead 200 M out, headed final strides.
Over 10Ls off pace early on racing 2-wide, entered straight racing 3-wide and 8Ls down, soon no chance.
Raced keenly through early stages, 7 to 8Ls off pace both on fence and 2-wide until straight, not come on.
Sent on to go 2 to 3Ls clear passing 1600 M pole, 2Ls ahead turning for home, not find much off bridle and grabbed 200 M out, no extra.
7Ls off pace racing 2-wide 1600 M out, 4Ls behind in 4th place 800 M out winner, RAINBOW and GOLD's quarters, never looked like winning in stretch and nearest at finish.
Settled 4Ls off pace in 3rd place until straight, quickened up well to go 1L down 200 M out, led final strides.
12Ls off early speed in rear, 10Ls down on straightening, no impression.
Raced 2-wide and 10Ls off leader early on, 6Ls behind 400 M, ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Eased back to race in rear on fence 10 to 12Ls off pace, never had any chance with leading bunch in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
At least 3-wide and 3Ls off speed until home straight, delivering challenge when steadied 300 M out, ran on evenly again and just held on for 3rd place.
Trapped 4-wide for much of race until straight when 2Ls off leader, not come in again in straight.
Settled 2-wide 4Ls off speed until final bend, steadily lost place as tempo quickened, finished in own time.
Awkwardly into stride, raced in 3rd or 4th place on fence 1 to 2Ls off pace before losing position 800 M out, turned in near rear of field, no chance.
Held up in rear 6 to 7Ls off pace and until 800 M out, gradually improved round outside until 2Ls down 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Always prominent about 2Ls off pace but 3-wide before failing to quicken up well enough at top of straight, weakened from 200 M out.
Held up about 4Ls off pace and 3-wide, entered straight 4-wide, delivered challenged over 300 M out hanging markedly to the left, hit front 200 M out, idling near line but just hung on.
Raced on inside 4 to 5Ls off speed, travelling well when 2Ls behind 200 M out but blocked for a run on all sides, found clear passage around 100 M out, finished off well but too late.
Ridden to lead after 200 M before racing 2-wide and sharing advantage with CALIFORNIA KID until straight, all out but in front when grabbed 200 M out, no extra.
3 and 4Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight when travelling well, not clear run until 100 M out when about 3Ls down, accelerated impressively but just failed, unlucky loser.
Settled one from rear at least 6Ls off pace until final bend when checked 500 M out, stayed on to finish off through some beaten rivals close home.
Very keen early on and soon racing 2-wide about 2Ls off pace, brief effort at top of straight and all out when 1L down 200 M out, no extra.
Never worse than 2-wide and 2 to 3Ls down throughout before home straight when failed to quicken up final 300 M.
Duelled for lead with GRAND FIGHTER from 1100 M out on fence until home straight, soon under strong pressure and weakened right away from 300 M out.
Among rear group into straight. Ran on quite well inside final 250 M despite not reaching first 2.
In rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Never on terms.
Close up to straight. Unable quicken to challenge and faded closing stages.
Last and wide into straight where he made up considerable ground.
At back to straight. Kept on to be closest at finish.
Soon in touch and was 2nd 400 M. Held every chance before finding no extra final 100 M.
Mostly 5th to straight. Ridden 300 M and kept on well to lead passing 200 M. Was soon strongly challenged and lost race on line.
Was prominent when hanging out home turn, losing some ground. Plugged on till finding no extra inside 200 M.
Midfield into straight where he ran on well to challenge inside final 200 M. Gained upper hand last stride.
Led field approaching 1200 M and made running to 200 M where he could find no more.
Never better than midfield.
About 10th 1200 M and was worse than midfield home turn. Stayed on steadily final 300 M.
Was 6th before steadily losing ground passing 900 M. Dropped out quickly on straightening.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
In touch. Dropped to midfield or behind from 700 M. No progress.
Soon led. Weakened out of contention when headed final turn.
Midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Ran on along rail to take lead close home.
Behind midfield. Advanced to 5th final turn. Ran on steadily without threatening the quinella pair.
In touch early before dropping to midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Checked soon after start. Never a factor.
Well there. Tracked leader until taking over upon straightening. Kept on but was headed close home.
Towards rear. Faded in straight.
Always there. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Second last to straight. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Never in contention.
Around midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always in last few.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses final 400 M.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest in straight.
Made all. Just held off challenge under pressure while shifting ground in straight.
Always well there. Fought on resolutely but just failed to peg back winner the length of straight.
Prominent to straight. Faded gradually.
Never seen with a chance.
Began awkwardly, soon last. Made advancement on inner turning in. Ran on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led early, settling 3rd along rail. Came to tackle leader turning in. Took command passing 200 M. Held on well.
Behind midfield. Kept on in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to be in touch. Gradually dropped back to be midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Ran on steadily passing 400 M without threatening.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent, 2nd from 1st turn. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield final turn. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Led field from 1st turn. Unable to quicken when headed inside 200 M.
Midfield or behind. One-paced.
Slowly away, towards rear. Last on outside turning in. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Mainly 4th or 5th to 250 M. Dropped out.
Wide in midfield to 400 M then weakened.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily to gain 2nd late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never seen with a chance.
Led field until run down by winner over 200 M out. No extra and lost 2nd late.
Tracked leaders. Quickened well upon straightening to take charge 200 M out.
Better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Prominent. Lost position 600 M out. Dropped out into straight.
Chased leader to straight then dropped away quickly.
Well back. Ran on to produce good impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear to straight. Ran on.
Travelled kindly better than midfield. Shifted to outside and asked to go upon straightening. Ran on well to grab lead near the line.
Towards rear. Rounding the home turn hung in. Ran on well between runners after straightening but was outsprinted by quinella pair.
With leaders early. Took up running rounding the stable bend. Headed after straightening, soon well beaten.
Restrained at back. Crept closer rounding the home bend but 6-wide and 5Ls off pace entering the straight. Made a little ground.
From a good gate travelled along the rail around midfield. Kept on one pace until picked up some momentum closing stages.
Midfield or worse. Proved difficult to settle in middle stages. Shifted out to obtain clear running upon straightening and made up steady ground concluding stages.

Raced wide without cover at any stage. Towards rear early. Hampered and carried wider near the 1000 M out and dropped further back. Crept closer rounding home bend but continued to race wide. Gradually receded after straightening.

Midfield or worse. Proved very difficult to settle middle stages. Checked near the 1200 M and then improved gradually in outer of the back straight to be midfield before home bend. Faded out from 300 M.
Stood flat-footed on jumping and lost ground. Towards rear. Stuck along the rail rounding the home turn and dropped to last. Ran past a few beaten runners when keeping same pace in straight.
Broke best. Eased down the pace passing the winning post the first time. Tracked leader from 1200 M. Stayed on until no extra passing 150 M.
Prominent until straightening. Steadied and shifted out when disappointed for running after the 300 M. One-paced thereafter.
Always prominent. Hit front near the 300 M. Fought on to be just beaten near finish.
Raced 4Ls off pace on fence early on, went 2-wide 1000 M out, short of room turning in but ran on to hold place chances 200 M out, one-paced closing stages.
Broke fairly, settled on inside 5Ls off pace, slightly closer turning for home when checked and became unbalanced, recovered to run on evenly to line.
Travelled well on inside in 3rd place 2 to 3Ls off pace throughout, went 2nd 400 M out and quickened up in straight to grab lead 150 M out, just hung on.
Drifted back to race in rear 6 to 9Ls off speed on fence before entering straight racing 6-wide and 5Ls down, 4Ls down 200 M out, just missed.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed until 1000 M out, hard ridden and sent on to challenge racing 3-wide 600 M out, entered straight racing 5-wide, stayed on in straight always responding to pressure.
Ridden to lead upon exiting, never more than 2L clear in run, headed by winner 150 M out, no extra.
Raced 3-wide 4 to 5Ls off leader early on, improved position slightly 1200 M out, hard ridden round final bend to lie up, no response and beaten turning in.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace early on and 3-wide and 5Ls down 1000 M out, forced 4-wide round home turn, stayed on final 300 M but never able to get to winner.
Broke well but unable to lead, settled in 2nd place racing 2-wide never worse than 2Ls off speed, off bridle 500 M out, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide 5 to 6Ls off speed, niggled 500 M out to keep up, never landed a blow in straight.
Always thereabouts racing 2-wide 3Ls off pace until final bend when under strong pressure, very one-paced home stretch.
Early speed. Settled to 3rd or 4th position on rails 2-3Ls off pace until straight. Ran on well but no match for winner on this occasion. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly and was checked shortly after start. Raced 2-wide towards rear. 7-8Ls behind until home bend. Found opening and closed off race well on outside.
Raced 2-wide in forward position 3-4Ls off pace. Under pressure from 500 M and weakened in stretch. (Heart Irregularity.)
Slow to begin. In rear many lengths behind until home bend. Improved from 300 M out on fence to be nearest finish.
Settled towards rear from wide gate. Raced 3-wide 6-7Ls behind thereafter. Weakened badly in home straight. (Heart Irregularity.)
Held fence position better than midfield. Always about 4-5Ls behind. One-paced in straight.
Began from wide gate but soon found forward position 2-wide. Settled 1-2Ls behind in 2nd position until straight. Ran on well to score impressively.
Unbalanced when checked at start. Moved up to handy position 2-3Ls behind 3-wide with no cover. Under pressure from home bend and weakened.
Led on fence soon after start until 150 M out. No extra.
Began awkwardly. Soon back about 6Ls off speed on fence. Similarly placed in straight.
Travelled 6Ls behind and on fence. Crept a little closer to race 2-wide 5Ls behind 400 M out. Made moderate ground in the straight.
Allowed to settle 2-wide midfield in early stages, then slipped to worse than midfield 8-9Ls back. Unable to hold position and dropped away.
Ridden along to be prominent but wide. Unable to maintain position when 3rd final turn.
Bounded in the air at start, near rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
In touch early, soon in midfield or behind. Made ground in straight to claim 3rd near finish.
Towards rear early, soon improved to midfield or better. No response when given reminders early straight.
Prominent 2nd. Gained slender advantage briefly inside 100 M. Just caught.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Modest progress in straight.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight, never nearer.
Led. Held 2Ls advantage after turning in. Unable to quicken when headed inside 100 M.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd upon straightening. Unable to quicken while finding no room inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on steadily from 4th early straight to claim a narrow advantage close home.
Prominent to 400 M. Faded.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Dipped at 500 M. Moderate progress 250 M.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight.
Narrow lead far side. Joined rounding home bend. Headed into straight and gradually faded.
Well there. Hit front upon straightening and soon drew clear.
Just better than midfield to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Midfield throughout.
Broke well. Ridden and always well there. Disputed lead rounding home bend but weakened upon straightening.
Around midfield throughout.
Wide behind midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Behind midfield. Ran on well to grab 2nd place over 100 M out without threatening.
Behind midfield. Made modest progress in straight.
Slowly away. Never seen with a chance.
Sluggish at start. Soon in midfield but raced freely and awkwardly placed around home bend. Kept on one pace in straight.
In last few to straight. Ran on along rails but not much room most of straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Prominent. Joined the lead upon straightening. Took command 300 M and never threatened.
Towards rear early. Improved steadily to be 4th 800 M. Gained 2nd 200 M but never able to reach the winner.
Held 5th before advancing to 2nd approaching 800 M. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to be in the front. Weakened when headed 300 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear group final turn. Recovered some ground when under pressure final 300 M.
Rear. Checked approaching 400 M. Recovered some ground thereafter.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Pulled to the 3rd 1300 M. Dropped back to just better than midfield home bend. No response in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made progress on outside to be 5th or 6th home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on from outside in straight to take 3rd closing stages.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily home bend. Checked 400 M. Never recovered.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Progressed along inside rounding home bend. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside 200 M out.
In touch. Dropped back steadily to midfield 700 M. Weakened soon after turning in.
Hampered at start. Well back until making up late ground past beaten horses down centre of straight.
In last few most of way.
Led until headed over 200 M out.
Prominent far side. Weakened home bend.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on without threatening.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Better than midfield. Quickened well to take charge over 200 M out.
Well there to 200 M. Faded. (Bled.)
Midfield to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Midfield or worse. Hampered 400 M out before producing some late impression closing stages.
In last few to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Restrained at the start to be at back. Asked for effort after 400 M where still 8-9Ls behind pace. Made up good ground when into clear after 200 M to be nearest at finish.
At back, never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly and then was tightened, soon travelled in midfield or worse. Made up steady ground from 300 M to be closest at finish.
On jumping bounded in the air and then travelled kindly with cover better than midfield. Commenced run from 300 M and held every chance 200 M out. Found quinella pair too strong concluding stages.
Midfield. Unable to produce extra passing 500 M. One-paced.
With leading division until 250 M. Dropped away steadily.
Prominent. Made run from 250 M and kept on to find extra to defy challengers concluding stages for a courageous victory.
Niggled along early and took up running. Headed just before the 200 M and no extra thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and remained at rear. Made gradual ground from 300 M despite hung out throughout the race.
Ridden along to maintain position in midfield. Under pressure 500 M out but not responded. Steadily dropped to the rear from 200 M.
Worse than midfield. Made up some ground from 400 M, no extra close home.
Broke well, in touch until 200 M. No extra and kept on same pace.
Better than midfield. Unable to keep up from 200 M and then steadily weakened.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well final 300 M, just failed to catch the winner final stages.
Settled about 10Ls off pace in 5th down backstretch, 5Ls down turning in and all out when over 2Ls adrift 200 M out, weakened noticeably final stages.
Raced on inside between 10 and 15Ls off pace from 1600 M to 600 M out, 6Ls down entering straight, very one-paced and hung in closing stages.
Close to 20Ls off pace and on fence down back straight, under pressure and over 10Ls down entering straight, no chance.
At least 2-wide and 15Ls off pace, possibly more, from 1600 M to 600 M out, 3-wide and 10Ls down entering straight, soon no threat.
Raced 2-wide about 12Ls off pace down back straight and round final bend always tracking MILLENNIUM SPIRIT, weakened right away in straight.
Dwelt at start and lost 2 to 3Ls, always at least 15Ls off pace, 10Ls down and 2-wide on straightening, stayed there.
Held 4th position about 7Ls off pace down backstretch, 4Ls down turning for home and 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on.
Missed start slightly and about 14Ls off pace on fence from 1600 M to 600 M out, 7Ls down turning in, no chance with front two but stayed on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2 and 3-wide around 15Ls off pace until final bend when about 8Ls adrift, not come on final stages.
At least 15Ls off pace 1400 M out on inside, 9Ls off entering straight, ran on quite well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Close to 20Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1400 M marker, never on terms and nearest at finish.
Settled in 2nd place 2 to 3Ls off GOOD MAN from 1600 M to 600 M out, led 500 M out racing 2-wide, kept finding in straight to fend off repeated efforts by runner-up.
Hard ridden to lead on fence from wide draw from 1500 M out, never clear by more than 3Ls, came back to field from 800 M out, grabbed by winner 500 M out, well beaten entering straight.
3rd, 3 to 5Ls off pace from 1600 M to 600 M, ridden to challenge DARWIN entering straight when 2Ls down, only a neck down 200 M out, never got head in front.
Held up in midfield with cover about 2-1/2Ls off lead. Gained split after the 300 M and responded well under pressure to take charge concluding stages.
Broke well and disputed lead to 600 M where it failed to keep up, dropped out quickly from 400 M.
Always up there on fence, stayed on well final stages though unable to fend off winner's strong challenge.
In handy position towards inner. Off bridle 400 M out and dropped away steadily.
Slow to jump, at rear before moving up slightly to rear of midfield 700 M out. Brief effort from 300 M to 200 M, soon emptied.
Bounded in the air, soon recovered to dispute lead down centre of track. Looked a chance 200 M out, no extra closing stages when passed by placegetters.
Always within striking distance, kept on well to the line albeit not able to threaten the first pair.
Began very awkwardly and lost ground, recovered to rear of midfield. Advanced to midfield 3Ls off lead 400 M out, not come on and tired close home.
Behind midfield without cover on outer, made up a little ground from 200 M, effort not sustained closing stages.
Tracked leader until unable to keep up and came under pressure 500 M out, always struggling thereafter.
Settled towards rear with cover, some 4 or 5Ls off speed. Shaken up 350 M out when into clear, responded only fairly, one-paced final bit.
Jumped very awkwardly and unbalanced rider, then remained 4 or 5Ls off lead near rear. Made only moderate headway final 200 M.
Midfield briefly, under pressure passing 700 M and dropped to tail. Stayed there for rest of race.
With rear of field briefly, tailed out from 700 M.
Always held 3rd place racing to 1 to 2Ls off pace until 400 M out when travelling well, soon ridden and on terms with every chance 300 M out, not come on.
Raced at least 6Ls off pace and 3-wide down backstretch, 4-wide without cover and 4Ls adrift final bend, quickened up well to challenge 200 M out, drew clear.
Settled on fence 4Ls off pace through first half of race, outpaced and niggled to lie up 700 M out, beaten before home straight.
Always towards rear about 6Ls off pace on fence, straightened up racing 2-wide, bit short of room at top of straight but soon no chance.
Raced 1 to 2Ls off winner throughout and 7 to 8Ls off overall pace and 2-wide, 6Ls off entering straight and ran on well closing stages to grab runners-up spot on line.
Always 4 to 5Ls off speed and 2-wide until home straight, never a factor from then on.
Broke well and always in 2nd place on fence never worse than 1-1/2Ls off pace, quickened up turning in to lead 350 M out, kept battling but no chance with winner.
Led racing 2-wide by under 1L down backstretch, stretched lead to 2L advantage turning for home, grabbed 250 M out, faded right away.
Slowest into stride and always 7 or 8Ls off pace in rear on fence, similarly placed turning in, beaten 350 M out.
Prominent but keen early on, gradually settled to race 2-wide 2 to 3Ls off pace until straight, no answer to leading group's acceleration in straight.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 3Ls off pace down back straight, not match pace of principals from 350 M out but still ran on fairly well.
Raced 3-wide early on 3 to 4Ls off pace, similarly placed when challenged at top of straight, led briefly over 200 M out, no answer to winner's pace and pipped for 2nd on line.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace down back straight through to final bend, effort turning in when inside winner but failed to pick up and well beaten 300 M out.
Raced 3-wide 4.5Ls early on, picked up well in straight to be just 1.5Ls down 200 M out, could never peg back RIVER CENTAINE and finally passed by winner ASIA RISING 50 M out.
Raced 2-wide about 7Ls off speed through to home straight when outpaced, finished off at same pace.
Always racing wide and rear about 8Ls off pace, rounded home bend racing 4 and 5-wide, passed a couple of beaten runners until 200 M out, not come on any further.
Sent on to travel at leader's quarters racing 2-wide 100 M out, led 400 M out, rallied gamely in front only to be foiled by winner close home.
Never better than 2 or 3 from rear, always at least 8Ls off pace, found nothing in straight.
Ridden cold 5Ls off pace and 2-wide, slightly closer turning for home, switched outside 300 M out for clear passage, ran on strongly to lead final strides.
Broke well to share lead very early on fence before settling 2.5Ls off speed from 1000 M out to home straight, finishing well when short of room 300 M out, stayed on again.
Settled 4Ls off pace on fence until straight when appearing to travel well, found nothing off bridle.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off speed through first half of race, ridden 600 M out to remain competitive, responded to pressure all way to line.
Always prominent racing 3-wide 2Ls off pace until home stretch, rallied but a bit one-paced latter stages, lost position final 100 M.
Slowest away, raced 6 to 7Ls off pace on fence until straight, finishing off well when held up 200 M out and not fully extended closing stages, promising.
Not best away and drifted back from gates, raced 3-wide 5 to 6Ls off pace until on bend, ran on well in straight to be nearest finish.
Shared lead early on before holding clear advantage over 1000 M out, overhauled 400 M out by runner-up but stuck to task well before losing position final 100 M.
Never troubled leaders.
In rear to straight where he kept on down centre of the track. Found one-paced near finish.
Never on terms.
About 8th or 9th into straight where he stayed on to dispute for 4th 200 M. Found no extra close home.
Prominent to 350 M where he could find no more.
Was 6th 800 M and similar position when checked on rail turning into straight. Made no show thereafter.
Towards rear till making up some good ground final 250 M despite not reaching first 2.
In touch before taking lead approaching 1000 M. Remained there until headed 150 M. Dropped out steadily.
Rear early. Soon improved and was midfield 800 M. About 6th into straight where he ran on well to challenge inside 150 M. Gained upper hand towards finish.
Was 5th before making steady headway rounding home bend. Kept on till finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Was 4th when becoming unbalanced 900 M and hung out. Lost ground steadily coming into straight.
Always last 2 to straight. Ran on well closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield home bend. Was improving in straight when steadied 200 M. Kept on finish.
Always well there. Tracked leader into straight where he quickened to lead passing 150 M. Was soon taken on by winner and lost race final strides.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Made all.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd 800 M out. Kept on well but just lost 2nd near finish.
Better than midfield. Dropped back towards rear when lost position 800 M. No progress in straight.
Prominent early, soon dropped back slightly. 2Ls 4th turning in. Unable to quicken.
Trailed field most of the trip.
Midfield. Made some progress 800 M. Ran on from 5th 200 M, nearest at finish. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield at best. Found no extra final 200 M.
Prominent. Sat outside leader from 950 M to 150 M. One-paced.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Well there to 400 M. Dropped out.
Never in contention.
Settled within striking distance. Quickened well to assert authority inside final 200 M.
Missed the start slightly but quickly recovered to midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to claim 2nd place closing stages.
Prominent. Hit front into straight but soon weakened under pressure.
Led till weakened over 300 M out.
Never nearer.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Settled in midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never seen with a chance.
Always there or thereabouts. No extra near finish.
In last few. Made up good late ground to reach 3rd place close home.
Midfield or behind. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Always there. Held on well turning in to gain slender advantage early straight. Kept on same pace when headed inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Advanced to 4th final turn. Soon weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit from outside soon after turning in.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 1300 M. Dropped back steadily from final turn.
Soon last. Made up some ground in straight.
Better than midfield. Found no extra from final turn.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made up good ground in straight.
Midfield. Made steady progress to 3rd 1000 M. Took lead 650 M to 400 M. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Weakened 250 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to prevail inside 200 M. Held on well.
Midfield. Stayed on well for a remote 4th.
Soon led until headed 650 M. Held 2nd to 300 M. Faded.
Near rear. Responded well soon after turning in, doing best work final 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order along rail early straight. One-paced.
Ridden to take up running approaching home bend. Led until no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on down centre of straight to get up on line.
Prominent before hampered on rails and lost position coming out of back straight. Kept on same pace final 400 M.
Lost touch upon straightening when found nothing under pressure.
Led early. Settled behind leaders home bend. Faded under pressure in straight.
Settled in last few. No clear passage early in straight. Finished race off well.
Settled wide behind midfield. Ran on to hold every chance final 200 M but found winner too good.
Midfield before headway rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to hold some chance over 100 M out but quickly overshadowed.
Soon dropped to last few despite niggled at early stages.
Never nearer than 6th with some late impression.
Settled around midfield. Improving when steadied for a run closing stages.
Never far off before straight. Faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Hampered upon straightening. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Worse than midfield. Closer order turning for home. Made no show after 200 M.
Midfield or better. Hampered and raced wide after the 600 M. Dropped out steadily thereafter.

Worse than midfield and wide in back straight. Hampered after 600 M and raced wider rounding the turn. Made some headway after straightening but unable to produce extra passing 200 M. One-paced to the line.
Hard ridden early but still outpaced, towards rear. Crept closer from 800 M but wide. Hampered and raced wider after 600 M. Made up some ground early in straight but no extra after passing 200 M.
Broke well and soon sat outside leader. Stayed on until 300 M. Weakened steadily and dropped away from 200 M.
Ridden to be well there. Crept closer to leader before entering the straight. Led briefly near 400 M but effort could not be sustained passing 200 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Mainly midfield. Kept on one pace in straight without threatening.
Bumped and knuckled at start, soon at back. Ridden from 600 M and sent to the widest into straight where still 7 to 8Ls off leader. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, soon settled in midfield on inside. Shifted out little turning for home. Kept on after straightening until weakened steadily final 150 M.
Began fairly then ridden to lead from 1200 M. Steadily dropped out from 250 M.
Broke best and ridden to go forward then travelled behind leaders to 3rd. Kept on quite well in straight but was outsprinted by quinella pair.
Towards rear. Steady progress from 600 M and ridden to 6-wide into straight. Quickened well after into clear 400 M out. Took command passing 100 M and never threatened.
Ridden early to maintain position worse than midfield. Improved a little passing 600 M. Never a factor from 300 M.

Settled towards rear and travelled kindly along rail. Switched out from the fence to make steady headway from 800 M to be midfield into straight. Ran on well to claim narrow advantage 200 M but found winner too strong .....
Raced 4-wide into first bend to form a front line of four, led 700 M out racing 3-wide, all out when passed 150 M out by winner, kept on.
6Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, 4-wide 5Ls off 800 M out, 5-wide and no cover on home turn, hard ridden entering straight, not come on.
3-wide forming a line of four vying for lead early on, narrowly led 1100 M to 700 M out, niggled to keep up round home turn, faded right out from top of straight.
Settled 5Ls off pace racing 2-wide, 3Ls down turning for home and travelling well, ran on strongly in straight but just held by winner.
Checked exiting stalls and soon detached from field, 9Ls adrift in rear 900 M out, 7Ls down 400 M out, ran on through a few beaten rivals close home.
1 to 2Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight when held up for a run 300 M out, soon switched out and finished off strongly, unlucky not to be placed.
Always about 3 to 4Ls off pace and at least 3-wide before being sent on racing 4-wide from 600 M to challenge leaders entering straight, led 150 M out, hung on.
Held rails position 5 to 6Ls off speed through to straight, stayed on well from rear closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Led on fence from gates to 1100 M, travelled well a neck off lead on fence from there until straight when found nothing under pressure, dropping away tamely and rapidly.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace down back straight, 3Ls down round final bend, offered no response under pressure in straight.
Held up 2 to 3Ls off speed racing 2-wide, ran on fairly well in straight but not match pace of principals. (Bled.)
Not break well and settled on fence 5 to 6Ls off pace, 4Ls down and on fence turning in, no impression.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 5 or 6Ls off lead until straight, finished off one-paced posing no threat.
On fence about 3Ls off pace until entering home straight when under pressure to quicken up, soon petered out.
Broke well and niggled to stay prominent, soon outpaced and dropped to mid-division, about 2-1/2Ls off speed. 4-wide behind leaders turning in, ran on well from 300 M to hit front 150 M out, readily.
Soon trailed field. Never in the race.
Broke best from widest gate, then knuckled and steadily dropped to midfield without cover from 1000 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.

Hard driven to muster speed, steadily dropped to rear of main group 800 M out, some 4Ls off pace. Hung out in middle stages and became further detached from 600 M. Ran on passing tired runners closing stages.
Soon niggled along at rear of main bunch, roughly 5Ls off lead. Under pressure 400 M out, made steady headway to be nearest at finish.
Never far off out wide, stayed on well under pressure in straight though posing not much threat to the winner.
In handy position, came under pressure 500 M out. No response, kept on same pace in straight.
Slow to begin and tailed out by a wide margin.
Hard ridden to stay 2Ls off lead. Had difficulty holding position near 700 M and was checked when crowded. 5Ls down upon straightening, not come on.
Held lead out wide early, shifted across to be one off rail going into the bend, still holding 3/4L advantage. Headed upon straightening and dropped away tamely from 250 M. (Bled.)

Began awkwardly, soon pushed along to take up prominent position, pinched rail near 800 M. Led field into straight and had every chance until headed by winner passing 200 M. Kept on quite well, no extra near home.
Amongst front runners on rail before dropping back to midfield going into the turn. Soon under pressure, dropped out further final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace until straight, brief effort until 200 M marker when about 2Ls down, not follow through.
Settled on fence 3 to 4Ls off pace until straight, every chance 300 M out but no answer to winner's acceleration.
Raced keenly in lead by up to 4Ls down centre of track before crossing to fence 800 M out, 2Ls clear on straightening but grabbed by winner and others about 150 M out.
Very keen early on 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, under pressure turning in when 3Ls down, struggled to get on terms in straight, weakened from 200 M marker.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace until turning for home when under pressure to lie up, one-paced from then on.
Held up 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, crept closer from 800 M to be 3.5Ls adrift turning in, ran on well to hit front about 150 M out, driven out.
Settled 2 to 4Ls off TRILLION WIN on fence down back straight, 2Ls off leader turning in and a neck down 200 M out, grabbed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
Awkwardly away and soon racing 2 and 3-wide 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, still in rear when turned in racing at least 5-wide, 4Ls down 200 M out, no further show.
7Ls off pace racing 3-wide 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out, ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Not best away and soon settled 7Ls off pace racing 2-wide, 5Ls down and unpromisingly placed 300 M out, finally in clear 150 M out, ran on strongly but too late.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off speed 1000 M out, 4Ls down and still quite wide at top of straight when severely checked by two rivals, quickly eased down.
Missed start and raced keenly early on about 8Ls off pace and 2-wide, entered home straight very wide but ran on well enough to be nearest at finish.
Always 2-wide and 3 to 4Ls off pace until straight, quickened up to go 2nd about 2Ls off winner 200 M out, stayed on.
Took keen hold early on racing 7 to 8Ls off pace towards rear, still in rear and very wide turning for home, ran on very strongly in straight passing post on stands rail.
Hugged rails 6Ls off pace leaving back straight, improved 700 M out to go 5th about 3Ls off pace turning in, no chance with winner but ran on well.
Led at 1200 M marker, never clear by more than 2Ls down backstretch, grabbed by winner 400 M out, soon dropped right out.
Sent on to race in 3rd 2-wide and 2Ls off pace, ridden entering straight and quickly faded out of contention.
Broke well and raced in 2nd place no worse than 2Ls off pace until home turn when assumed lead, 2Ls clear 200 M out, driven out.
Always at least 4-wide without cover and never closer to pace than 4Ls until straight, all out to go 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Settled in 4th 3 to 4Ls off pace on fence, fully extended 200 M out and clinging onto a place but quickly weakened thereafter.
Raced 2-wide about 6Ls off pace in back straight, effort at top of straight to go about 3Ls off leader 200 M out, a bit one-paced to line closing stages.
Travelled 4 to 5Ls off pace racing 2-wide until home straight when short of room 300 M out, one-paced closing stages.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, still wide around home turn and no acceleration at top of straight, no further impression.
Not break well but recovered to sit 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, soon lost place and struggling when tight on fence 800 M out, beaten turning for home.
Midfield to straight. Kept on to hit front briefly 150 M. Found winner too strong.
Became last approaching 800 M and trailed field into straight. Made up considerable ground final 250 M.
Midfield to home bend. Was making steady headway when severely baulked 150 M. Eased down thereafter.
Jumped smartly, taking lead until headed and faded 150 M.
Close up before giving some ground by 800 M. About 5th or 6th into straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
In touch to straight and held some chance 200 M out. Found no extra and soon dropped out of contention.
Never far away to straight and was disputing for 3rd 300 M. Was beaten when severely checked 150 M.
Prominent to straight where he held every chance 250 M. No extra close home.
2nd last into straight where he ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield into straight. Kept on to hold some chance passing 200 M. Soon shifted out under pressure and had to settle for 3rd.
Never a factor.
Soon in midfield and was about 9th home bend. Ran on to challenge 200 M, taking lead close home under vigorous riding.
Led field to around 100 M. Held on.
Pushed along early to be prominent. Weakened soon after straightening.
Never able to feature.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Sustained effort to take command closing stages.
Soon 2nd. Unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Rear. Made up a little ground soon after straightening.
Never better than midfield.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace when 5th final turn.
In touch from widest draw. Dropped back steadily final 400 M. Raced wide throughout.
Towards rear. Moderate progress in straight.
Settled in midfield. Improved well despite hanging in to take charge nearing finish.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Travelled in 3rd or 4th to straight. Weakened gradually.
Led till headed shortly after straightening. Kept on same pace.
Quickly ridden from wide draw to settle just behind pace. Hit front under pressure shortly after straightening but caught final strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Planted at start. Trailed field to straight. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Towards rear. Raced tightly early in straight. Kept on well to finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Towards rear early. Stumbled in midfield over 400 M out. Never recovered.
Left very awkwardly, towards rear. Crept closer order final turn, then one-paced.
Led field to 1000 M. Re-gained advantage passing the Rock. Held on until being caught by the winner inside 100 M.
Was 3rd before taking lead from 1000 M. Headed passing the Rock. Weakened from 2nd 350 M.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield far side. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress final 200 M.
Held 5th to around 500 M. Widest home turn. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to 700 M. Weakened.
Last or 2nd last. Made up some ground soon after turning in.
Midfield. 3-wide turning in. Ran on without threatening.
In touch. Progressed to 3rd home bend. Chased leader early straight, gaining upper hand inside 100 M.
Rear. Crept closer to 7th early straight. Weakened 200 M.
In touch to home turn. Dropped back steadily.
Rear into straight. Produced some late progress down centre of straight.
Wide and mostly in midfield before short-lived effort entering straight.
Broke well settling better than midfield. Commenced run turning in hitting front briefly closing stages before run down by fast-finishing winner final strides.
Just better than midfield. Came to challenge under pressure and ran on steadily without threatening.
Travelled in 2nd to straight then weakened.
Behind midfield. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Just better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Soon took up running and bolted clear far side. Came back to the field upon straightening before overhauled final stages.
Pulled up on stable bend.
Around midfield most of way. Weakened upon straightening.
Settled at the back. Made up a lot of ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Finished well to snatch victory near line.

Midfield along rails. 7-9Ls down when the field spread out in the middle stages. Crept closer from 600 M and 4Ls off lead into straight. Ran on a little early in the straight until one-paced passing 200 M. (Lame.)

Broke well, raced in handy position along rails, 2-4Ls off speed. Steadily improved from 600 M and accelerated well after straightening. Asserted authority inside 200 M and stayed on strongly to the line.
3-wide without cover towards rear. Dropped to tail 700 M out, became further detached from 500 M.

Towards rear, stayed along the rails. 10Ls off pace middle stages. Saved ground on fence rounding the home bend when asked to commence run, 6Ls behind into straight. Made up steady ground, no extra close home.

Jumped awkwardly, at back. 10Ls off speed on rails passing the winning post the first time. Shifted out to commence run rounding home bend, 4-wide and 8Ls off leader into straight. Made up some ground.
Always well there. Under pressure 400 M out, gave ground steadily on straightening.
Raced 4-5Ls off pace and 2 to 3-wide, always niggled along to maintain its position. Ridden from 600 M but only stayed on at same pace in straight, just grabbed 3rd near the line.
Prominent early, 3-wide making the first bend, then steadily moved up to take up running passing the winning post the first time. Headed inside 300 M, steadily dropped out.
Pushed along and soon took the lead. Headed just before passing the winning post the first time and tracked leader. Brief lead 200 M out but soon collared, no match with winner.
Steadily restrained to the back. 2 to 3-wide, 10Ls behind until asked to catch up around 400 M. 5-wide and 8Ls off pace into straight. Made up some ground but never a threat.
Broke well, midfield early. Steadily dropped towards rear at 1200 M, 9Ls off pace. Made no impression in straight.
Settled worse than midfield. 10Ls off leader in the middle stages. Commenced run rounding the home bend, 3-wide and 6Ls behind into straight. Made up some steady ground final stages.
3-wide and 3 to 4Ls off pace down backstretch, closer and travelling well entering straight, stayed on strongly final 200 M, failed narrowly.
Away well and near lead down back straight racing 3-wide, under pressure when about 3Ls off pace entering straight, no extra in final 350 M.
Slowest away and already 8Ls off pace 800 M out, moderate late headway through beaten runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Unruly prior to exiting, broke tardily and fully 8Ls off pace passing 800 M marker, worse off turning for home, made up minor ground in straight.
Outpaced early on and 6Ls off pace 700 M out, made some progress entering straight and stayed on well closing stages to claim 3rd close home.
4-wide and on pace early on, 3Ls down and 4-wide turning for home, weakened noticeably final 200 M.
Under pressure throughout, raced 4-wide 3 to 4Ls off pace down back straight, hung in quite a lot at top of straight when well beaten.
Always niggled slightly to remain prominent, 2nd 2Ls off pace set by winner and 2-wide entering straight, ran on at same place to line.
Broke well and soon in front on fence, 2Ls clear on straightening, just lasted home.
Amongst leading group early on, under pressure and became 5Ls detached off speed about 600 M out, kept on at same pace in straight.
Raced 4 and 5-wide from wide draw down back straight about 2Ls off pace, turned in racing 5-wide and 4Ls down, no further impression.
Raced 2 to 3Ls off pace on fence until home straight, failed to quicken up again, finishing off at even tempo.
Settled on fence towards rear and 4Ls back when turning in. Shifted out from rails to find running 200 M out but ran on only evenly.
Bounded at start. Raced in 6 or 7th place 5-6Ls behind on fence. Straightened up racing 3 to 4-wide and 3Ls down still 6th. No further impression, kept on one pace to the line.

Racing 2-wide 4Ls off pace in 5th position early on. Made steady improvement from 1000 M out to be 3rd place 2Ls down entering straight. Ran on well but one-paced last 100 M and passed by placegetters.
Always near rear on rails. Found nothing upon straightening, soon tailed off.
Pushed to lead from wide gate and sent to race on fence 1200 M out. Joined on home bend, kept on until beginning to tire inside final 200 M.
Raced in 6 or 7th place 2-wide, improving to 4Ls off pace near Rock. Entered straight wide and in 8th position. Unable to quicken and gave ground steadily from 200 M.

Raced in 3rd or 4th place 2-wide in early stages, gradually creeping up until outside leader HORNET around home bend. Led 300 M out and held every chance until overhauled by rivals inside final 150 M.
Held up at rear and 2-wide until home bend when beginning to come under pressure. Made up a little late ground.
Checked at start. From wide gate travelled 2-wide worse than midfield 6-7Ls back. Turned in 4Ls down and 4-wide, then ran on strongly 1-1/2Ls behind winner to grab close 3rd.
Soon found rails position 1-1/2Ls behind pacesetter HONET in 2nd then 3rd place. Ran on steadily when found racing room 200 M out to finish 2nd.
Waited with at rear until home stretch. Switched out upon straightening and ran past beaten runners final 200 M.

Began well and held position on fence in 4th or 5th place about 3Ls off speed. Pulled out in straight still in 5th place racing 5-wide 3Ls down. Ridden hard and hit front final 100 M to score comfortably.
Slowly away, never a threat.
Soon 5th. Kept on steadily for a remote 4th.
Behind midfield. Kept on closing stages.
Crossed field to the rail and led. Just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
Always prominent. Came to tackle the winner 400 M. Unable quicken to challenge closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Gradually recovered ground to be midfield course proper. No further progress.
Jumped awkwardly, always at the back.
Behind midfield. Dropped out from 600 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon 4th. Ran on well inside 300 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Knuckled at start but still prominent. One-paced final 200 M.
Held 6th to 200 M. No extra.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening.
Prominent briefly. Dropped to rear before reaching course proper.
Never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly. Always in last few. (Bled.)
Broke well. Settled some 2Ls off pace after first 200 M. Came under pressure inside final 200 M but only one-paced.
In similar position throughout. One-paced.
Raced keenly in first few onto course proper then gradually faded to midfield.
Raced awkwardly behind leaders onto course proper. Kept on same pace for 5th place.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure closing stages.
Jumped well to lead. Unable to fend off winner closing stages.
Never in contention.
Always well there. Came to challenge passing 300 M. Gained upper hand final strides.
Never better than midfield. (Bled.)
Ridden along rail to be 4th from 1200 M. Slightly inconvenienced 250 M, then one-paced.
Took lead passing 1400 M. Unable to match speed with the winner when headed passing 200 M.
Behind midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Prominent. 2nd final turn. Weakened out of contention 300 M.
Better than midfield. Found no extra 250 M.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily inside 300 M.
Knuckled right after start, remained at midfield. Moved up steadily from 1000 M to be 3rd turning in. Held some chance 250 M but failed to quicken closing stages.
Midfield from a wide draw. 4-wide turning into straight. Kept on steadily.
Settled at rear from widest draw. Responded well from final turn to assert authority passing 200 M. Won readily.
Midfield. Steadied when improved to 5th early straight. Recovered good ground along rail to just miss 2nd at finish.
Behind midfield. Awkwardly placed early straight and steadied 300 M to find running. Kept on when in clear.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Behind midfield. Widest at the rear final turn. Very moderate progress in straight.
Led field to 1300 M. Remained prominent to home turn. Faded.
Did not begin well but soon improved to share pace approaching home bend. Gain 1L break upon straightening but headed 200 M out. Fought on under pressure.
Prominent briefly. Gradually dropped to rear by home bend.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Settled in last few. Produced good steady headway between runners in straight.
Never nearer.
Better than midfield. Quickened upon straightening but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Began well. Shared lead most of way until weakened shortly after straightening.
Began best. Settled behind leaders. Held up in box seat on rails early in straight. Quickened to hit front 200 M out and hung on well under pressure.
Towards rear. Ran on well to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Ridden to produce some late headway in straight.
Better than midfield in 5th position. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Jumped fairly but soon handy behind leaders. 2-3Ls behind pace until 300 M. Responded fairly when asked effort, inconvenienced about 100 M and weakened final stages. (Bled.)
Niggled to go forward. 2-wide and 2-3Ls behind pace until 300 M. Steadily weakened thereafter.

Missed the start slightly and then was checked. Gradually recovered to midfield along rails before 800 M. Ran on steadily on the fence 400 M but was held up near the 100 M. Closed off strongly and missed 2nd narrowly.
Broke best and then restrained to the back. Remained last and 6Ls behind lead into straight. Made up steady ground without threatening.
About midfield or worse. Found nothing in straight.
Settled towards rear. 5Ls off lead and shifted to outer to commence run upon straightening. Cruised up and took control inside 200 M. Won comfortably.
Broke well, soon raced 3-wide, 2-3Ls behind pace. Plugged on until gradually weakened passing 200 M.
Midfield and wide early, sat outside leader from 1000 M. Every chance after straightening until no extra inside 150 M and one-paced to the line.
Sent to lead. Kept on after straightening until overhauled by winner 150 M out. Held on for 2nd.
Stood flat-footed when the gates opened, lost ground and at back. Took some time to gain momentum after straightening to make up late ground.
Held 6th place 4Ls off pace on inside down back straight, 3Ls off when switched out wider to challenge entering straight, stayed on strongly to nose in front 70 M out, held on.
Held up near rear and 8Ls off speed leaving back straight, tr4avelled well entering straight when 5Ls down, clear run 300 M out, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Slowest into stride, raced 3-wide 5 to 6Ls off pace 800 M out, became unbalanced 600 M out but still only 4Ls down and 4-wide on straightening, finished off strongly, just missed.
Prominent early on racing 2-wide 2Ls off pace, came under pressure turning for home, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 5Ls off speed on fence until 500 M out when lost position slightly, bit short of room in straight before running on well final 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace down back straight, turned for home racing 4-wide 3Ls off lead, stayed on fairly well before wilting final 100 M.
Sent on racing 3 and 4-wide without cover to sit 3 to 4Ls off pace until 800 M out, 2Ls down and under pressure entering straight, no extra final from 300 M out and faded.
Soon in front, never led by more than 2Ls, overhauled by GOLCONDA 400 M out, dropped out of contention.
Raced on inside rail about 2Ls off pace 800 M out, not quicken up entering straight and finished off very one-paced.
Held up 8Ls off pace down back straight racing 2-wide, niggled to draw closer to lead 600 M out, found little off bridle in straight. (Bled.)
