Raced keenly early on when 1L off pace and 2-wide, led at top of straight, battled on well to line but grabbed by winner 70 M out and lost runners-up berth closer to line.
Never on terms - not break well, ridden from 1000 M out when at least 10Ls adrift, struggling from then on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled on fence 6Ls off pace down back, improved position slightly round bend, bit one-paced for most part of home straight and never any chance of reaching a place.
Inconvenienced at start, pushed forward to stay 4-wide without cover behind leaders. Joined leaders, still 4-wide, going into straight, one-paced before dropping away 250 M out.
3 or 4-wide in mid-division, unable to quicken, plugged on in straight.
Steadied after start, then travelled 6Ls behind midfield. Short of room 400 M out, made steady headway when into clear near 300 M. One-paced and failed to get a minor placing.
Away smartly, steadily eased back to take up handy position. Checked near the 400 M when disappointed for running. Did not recover.
Began fairly, steadily worked forward to hold slender advantage on rail before 1200 M. Overtaken by winner 200 M out. Kept on quite well before tiring final 100 M.
One off fence around midfield. Made gradual ground from 300 M, kept on same pace closing stages.

Slow to muster speed, steadily improved along rail to obtain handy position 3Ls off lead 1300 M out. Crept a bit closer on straightening and stayed on quite well before dropping out steadily from 100 M.
Trapped wide well there early, steadily dropped to rear closer to rail. Switched out upon straightening and ran on well under pressure from 300 M until one-paced near home.
Soon dropped to tail. 3-wide 7Ls down turning in, ran on steadily but was steadied near 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Hard driven to make running early, at leader's girth from 1200 M. Emptied upon straightening and dropped out quickly.
Jumped awkwardly, quickly ridden along to sit 3-wide behind front runners. 3Ls down entering straight, pushed out from 300 M to have race sewn up 200 M out.
Settled 7Ls off pace near rear. Ran on down centre of track from 300 M until no extra final stages and lost 2nd place.
Jumped awkwardly and outpaced at rear. Quickly recovered to be 4-1/2Ls on fence rear of midfield. Dropped back a little 900 M out, 3rd last into straight, ran past beaten runners in straight.
Began awkwardly, driven to dispute lead, 1-1/2Ls behind leader from 1200 M. Became unbalanced near the 800 M, under pressure from 500 M to hold position, dropped away quickly from 300 M.
Never travelled well, raced 2-wide and 7Ls off speed leaving back straight, hard pressed to keep up 400 M out, faded right out from 300 M out.
Held rails position 7Ls off pace 1500 M out, steady improvement to sit 2Ls off pace turning for home, every chance of a place 250 M out but couldn't go with principals final stages.
Within striking distance of leaders early on racing 2-wide and 4 to 5Ls off speed, came off bridle 600 M out and well beaten before entering home straight.
At least 12Ls off leader 1000 M out, 8Ls down and on fence entering straight, all out when 4Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Held up at least 12Ls off pace and 2-wide, 8Ls down on straightening, closed off well inside final 200 M but much too late to make any worthwhile impression.
Just 2Ls off pace early on racing 2-wide, similarly placed when niggled to lie up fully 800 M out, well beaten before entering home straight.
About 11Ls off pace on fence down back straight, improved tracking winner round final bend to go 4Ls down entering straight, rallied very well but never quite latched onto front two.
Raced 2 and 3-wide at least 12Ls off pace down back straight, niggled along and 8Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, beaten over 200 M out.
Never a factor, as far as 13 or 14Ls off speed and occasionally 3-wide through first half of race, 10Ls down turning for home, no chance in straight.
Driven to take prominent position no worse than 2 to 3Ls off pace very early on, travelled well entering straight and led 300 M out, all out when collared by winner close home.
Sat 3Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, 2Ls off and 2-wide turning for home, very one-paced over 200 M out and soon passed by those staying on much more strongly from further back.
Raced outside winner 8 to 10Ls off speed early on, outpaced around 600 M out and turned in racing 5-wide and about 6Ls down, finished off strongly final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Held up 8 to 10Ls off pace on inside rail early on, crept much closer rounding final bend and only 3Ls down entering straight, stayed on strongly to lead close home.
Led and on fence 1600 M out, never clear by more than 3Ls, came back to field entering straight and grabbed by HELENE VITALITY 300 M out, weakened steadily.
Awkwardly away and content to sit 6 to 7Ls off pace, entered straight racing 5-wide 5Ls off speed, briefly threatened to challenge leaders 200 M out when 2Ls down, soon no extra.
Clear 2nd place 1000 M out wide, at leader MERRY MERRY's quarters 800 M out racing 2-wide, hard ridden 300 M out to maintain challenge but soon swamped and faded final 100 M.
Never on the track - 4-wide and 5Ls off pace down back straight, 5-wide without cover whilst improving round final bend, entered straight 6-wide, stayed on well.
Raced about 2Ls off pace on fence until 400 M out, pretty one-paced in straight and beaten over 200 M out.
Raced prominently 3-wide and 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, in 2nd place less than 1L off lead 200 M out, soon no extra.
Soon led though by never any more than a length, ceded advantage to winner about 100 M out, kept on same pace.
Settled in midfield racing 3-wide and 3 to 4Ls off lead until 600 M out, gradually drew closer to lead but no answer to winner's winning surge 200 M out, couldn't peg back deficit.
Never on terms - raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace down back straight, similarly placed in straight but would never land a blow, well beaten 300 M out.
On back of speed racing 2-wide and 2.5Ls off leader 800 M out, niggled along 600 M out to pick up bridle, no response and beaten at top of straight.
About 5Ls off speed and nearest fence 1000 M out, apparently struggling 300 M out when on fencre and 4Ls down, ran on well again once granted a clear run inside final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide 4 to 5Ls off pace through to home straight, clear run 300 M out and quickened up well to hit front 100 M out, readily.
Raced 4-wide and 4Ls off lead leaving back stretch, straightened up racing 5-wide and 3Ls off pace, cracked under pressure and well beaten 300 M out.
Keen early on racing 4-wide and 3Ls off leader 1000 M out, steadily drew closer and all out to go less than 1L off lead 200 M out, bit one-paced final 150 M and lost position. a144
8Ls off speed on fence 600 M out, disappointed for running along inside 300 M out, switched back to centre of track 200 M out when 5Ls down, finished off very strongly.
Mostly in 8th to home bend. Quickened 350 M to lead briefly 150 M. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Mostly in 4th to straight. Kept on to dispute for 2nd 200 M out. Found no extra under pressure.
Never far off to straight where he kept on to dispute 2nd 200 M out. Plugged on under pressure.
Led soon after start despite losing iron. Regained iron halfway and went 2Ls clear 300 M. One-paced when headed 150 M.
Soon dropped to last. Never in contention.
Prominent to straight where he dropped out of contention 250 M.
Made no show.
Among rear group to straight. Unale to make any impression on leaders.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well to challenge inside final 200 M. Gained upper hand near finish.
Well there early and was close up turning into straight. Started to give ground approaching 200 M.
6th halfway and was worse than midfield early in straight. Kept on steadily final 200 M.
Lost considerable ground at start and was worse than midfield before home turn. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Never on terms.
Among rear division home turn. Kept on without threatening final 250 M.
Midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend. Kept on well to hit front briefly passing 200 M. Unable to contain winner closing stages.
Soon 2nd. Dropped out rapidly passing 500 M. Tailed off in straight.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made slight progress to 5th or 6th turning in. Weakened final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Held 3rd to final turn. Found no extra.
Slightly behind midfield. Crept closer order to 5th turning in. Kept on same pace to the line.
Mainly 4th to 600 M. Advanced to 2nd home bend. Held on until finding no extra 100 M out.
Towards rear. Severely checked approaching 400 M, dropping to last final turn. Made up some ground in straight.
Last or 2nd last. Made up some ground final 400 M, never nearer.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped to the rear when severely checked 450 M. Never recovered.
Settled towards rear. Made progress to just behind midfield final turn. Ran on from 7th on outside to claim victory closing stages. Stayed on well.
Led field to inside 150 M. Unable quicken to fight back.
Midfield early. Effort home bend before faded in straight.
Reared and lost ground at start. Trailed field until headway on rails around home bend. Gained midfield into straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Never nearer.
Always thereabouts. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Chased leader throughout.
Prominent. Lost position around home bend. Behind midfield halfway. Drifted out in home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Virtually made all.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield.
Always in last few.
Better than midfield. Responded well 250 M to take brief lead near 100 M. Just caught by the winner close home.
Towards rear. Last turning in. Made up some ground in straight.
Sat outside leader to early straight. Faded.
Held 5th to 700 M. Dropped back steadily.
In touch. Raced 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened out of contention final 200 M.
Pulled hard early at rear. Unbalanced near 800 M. Ran on strongly from 9th early straight to snatch victory near finish.
Around midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Soon towards rear. Made progress 400 M to be midfield turning in. Kept on.
Rear. Crept closer order final turn. Ran on well final 200 M but without threatening the quinella pair.
Pushed along early to be prominent. Dropped back a bit from 1st turn to be 5th home bend. Unable to quicken.
Among front runners early, took clear lead from 700 M. Weakened when headed near 100 M.
Never in contention.
Prominent early. Midfield far side. Weakened home bend.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Commenced move into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Hampered and lost ground in straight.
Led to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened to hit front briefly 200 M out but soon overhauled.
Well there to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled around midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Around midfield. Ran on to hit front closing stages.
Missed the break. In last few. Ran on in straight.
Rear. Made up some late ground straight.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent until 300 M. Gradually dropped out inside final 200 M.

Restless after being boxed, jumped badly and got well back. Steadily improved to worse than midfield travelled 2-wide 6-7Ls behind pace. Shifted out after straightening and made up good ground but unable to catch winner.
Midfield or worse, wide and without cover along back straight. Unable to keep up from 400 M and was last into straight, not a factor thereafter.
Ridden to maintain position along rails slightly behind midfield. Short-lived effort after straightening until one-paced passing 150 M.

From a difficult gate, steadily dropped to the back, travelled 3-wide until the home bend. Remained 2nd last, along rails and 6-7Ls behind lead in straight. Made up steady ground from 200 M. Steadied and shifted 100 M out.
Jumped well but gradually dropped to midfield or worse 3-wide 800 M out. Hard ridden rounding the home and 4-wide into straight. Plugged on without threatening.
Ridden to sit, 1/2 or 1L behind leader. Kept on one pace to the line, passed by placegetters close home.

Ridden along to maintain prominent position along rails. Eased slightly at the Rock and dropped to midfield. 3-4Ls off speed into straight and switched out near 250 M. Made steady ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running. Kicked 2Ls clear 200 M out and held on well concluding stages for solid victory.

At back, wide in the early stages until approaching the 800 M where it found cover, still 2-3 wide rounding the home bend and 6-7Ls off lead entering the straight. Shifted out and made up some ground from 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, but gradually picked up momentum and improved to midfield near the 800 M. Found nothing after straightening and soon dropped out quickly.
Soon prominent, 2-3Ls behind pace and 2-wide. Asked to go upon straightening but only kept on one-paced, weakened steadily closing stages.
Enjoyed run of the race 2Ls off speed on fence in 4th place, quickened up turning in to lead briefly 200 M out, not match winner's kick.
Bit too keen early stages racing 2-wide in 2nd place practically upsides pacesetting GALLANT HORSE, soon under pressure in straight and beaten well over 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off lead 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down 600 M out, stayed on at same pace to line.
Generally 3Ls adrift of leaders on fence through to 250 M from line when under strong pressure, not come on and dropped away.
Sat 2-wide about 5 to 7Ls off pace before creeping closer halfway down back straight, 3Ls down entering straight, ran on well to grab lead 180 M out, driven out.
Led on fence passing stands for first time, never led by more than half a length, came under pressure home turn, swamped 200 M out, soon eased down.
Awkwardly into stride, soon on pace racing 3-wide, still 3-wide and 1L off pace 500 M out, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 5Ls off leader on inside 800 M out, bit closer but crowded for running room turning for home, rather one-paced once in the clear.
Slowest away losing at least 3Ls, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide 500 M out, forced 6-wide entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Checked upon exiting, settled 10Ls off pace in rear on fence, 6Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down in rear entering straight, ran on fairly well but hung out carrying head high closing stages.
8Ls off speed against rail 1200 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, 4Ls down turning in, offered little response in straight.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th until turning for home, faded out tamely in straight.
3Ls off speed in midfield on fence. Crept a bit closer swinging into straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Slow to jump and soon left behind, always trailing field by big margin.
Ridden forward and 5-wide behind leaders going into first bend. Still prominent 3rd when 3-wide from 900 M. Emptied 400 M out and dropped away steadily.
Pushed forward but only managed position 3-wide 3Ls off lead forward of midfield. Hung out badly from home bend and soon beaten when rider lost off side iron from 400 M to 100 M out.
Hard ridden on exiting but trapped wide behind midfield going into first bend. 3-wide towards rear from 900 M. Under pressure from 500 M, found little and only ran past tired runners.
Soon dropped back to 3-wide rear of midfield. Dropped further from 600 M and was last of main group entering straight. Ran past well beaten runners.
Broke smartly and disputing lead, held 1L advantage one off rail 800 M out. Crossed over to be on rail from Rock. Headed 200 M out and gave ground steadily. (Lame.)
Handy 4th 3-wide until 500 M where it began to struggle to keep up. Weaken further final 200 M.
At rear, wide early then 8Ls off lead 2-wide from 900 M. Ran past beaten runners in straight.

Niggled along early to be on the pace on rail, then eased to sit behind leader 900 M out. Came to tackle leader one off rail after straightening and quickly put daylight itself and rest of the field inside 200 M, easily.
Midfield briefly, soon steadily dropped towards rear. Niggled along from 900 M to move a bit closer before going into home turn. Kept on after making slight progress inside 200 M.
Pushed along but outpaced at rear 7 or 8Ls off lead. Steady improvement from Rock and was 3Ls down turning in. Ran on quite well in straight though never looked likely to give winner any threat.
Always 4-wide and about 6Ls off pace early stages, entered home straight racing 6 and 7-wide when still well adrift, no chance.
On inside and 3Ls off pace early on, 2Ls down turning for home, stuck tight to fence and hit front 200 M out, readily.
In 2nd place and 1L off pacesetting HONEST DRAGON through to straight, never managed to overhaul that rival in straight and one-paced closing stages.
Slowly away and tacked across to inside rail from wide draw, about 5 to 6Ls off pace down back straight, 2-wide and 4Ls down turning in, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide about 6 or 7Ls off speed round first bend and down back straight, marginally closer turning for home, never looked like closing on those in front.
Hard ridden to take prominent position upon exiting, always 3 to 4Ls off speed and 2-wide, not quicken up in straight.
Race 2 and 3-wide early on about 3Ls off pace, 3-wide and 2Ls down entering straight and under pressure, found little off bridle.
5Ls off pace on inside 1200 M out, 3Ls down on straightening, never a threat to principals, kept on at same pace to line.
Soon led on rail though never clear by more than 2Ls, hung out in straight and grabbed by winner 300 M out, kept on but caught for 2nd close home.
3-wide and 6 to 7Ls off leader on first bend, always in rear group and at least 2-wide until home bend when became unbalanced 500 M out, no chance from 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
5Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide and under strong pressure turning into home straight, found nothing.
3-wide round first bend, soon niggled along 1100 M out when 8 or 9Ls off pace in rear, moderate late headway to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Moderate progress closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final turn to be 7th around 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Pushed along to take lead from 1000 M. Sprinted 4Ls clear 200 M. Won readily.
Well there. Sat outside the winner to straight. Found no extra and lost 2nd passing 200 M.
Behind midfield. One-paced.
Held 3rd or 4th to 250 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Ran on well 400 M to be 2nd passing 200 M. Unable to threaten the winner.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Behind midfield and wide. Dropped to the last rounding home bend. Ran on moderately in straight.
Prominent early, soon raced 5th. Ran on steadily soon after straightening to take 3rd closing stages.
In touch. Failed to hold place final 250 M.
Near rear. Tailed off inside 300 M.
Midfield. Came under reminders turning in. Found nothing.
Prominent. No extra in straight.
Led or disputed lead to straight, then weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield.
Wide throughout. Brief effort rounding home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Never in contention. (Bled and heart irregularity.)
Disputed lead around home bend. Hit front into straight. Soon went clear.
Well back. Ran on under pressure past beaten runners.
Never far off. Improved to grab 2nd place passing 200 M.
Led briefly. Prominent till weakened from 500 M.
Trailed field most of way.
Pushed along early to take lead passing 1200 M. Became 2nd 900 M to straight. Kept on well.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on from 9th 200 M out to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear. Ran on moderately in straight.
Midfield. Made progress to 5th rounding home bend. Weakened steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Moved forward to be 4th 900 M. Kept on until finding no extra 300 M.
Rear. Made up some ground from outside final 300 M.
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead around 900 M. Kept on without quickening when headed final turn.
Never a factor.
Midfield or behind. Improved to 5th passing 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Prominent early, soon in midfield. Made slight progress early straight but was soon one-paced.
Midfield or slightly better. Ran on steadily 300 M to hit front passing 200 M. Held on well.
Better than midfield early. Dropped back to behind midfield near 1100 M. Unable to feature thereafter.
Led early, raced 3rd from 1000 M. Re-gained advantage turning in. Kept on when headed inside 200 M.
Led or disputed lead. Kicked 1L clear 200 M out, but caught final stride.
Settled just better than midfield. Obtained clear run passing 300 M. Ran on to just get up on line.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent till no extra final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Disputed lead to 200 M, then weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Jumped best. Settled just better than midfield. Pulled out to avoid runners early in straight. Kept on.
Held up in rear. Produced good late progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Refused to jump and took no part.
Prominent. Came to tackle leaders under pressure upon straightening but unable to sustain effort final strides.
Sat 1L outside leader until straightening. Every chance until headed inside 100 M, just held on 2nd narrowly.
Bounded in the air, jumped awkwardly and raced at back. Made no show in straight.
Handy 3rd along rails. Unable to find running about the 300 M and again near the 200 M. Into the clear along rails final 100 M and ran home strongly to miss 2nd narrowly, unlucky.
Soon led. Held on well and fought on with challengers in the early straight until headed passing 200 M. Kept on one pace and just missed 3rd on the line.
Raced 5 to 6Ls 2-wide behind pace around midfield. Shifted to 4-wide to improve rounding the home bend but no extra soon after straightening. Weakened steadily 250 M out.
Travelled comfortably 2-wide 3Ls off pace at 4th. Loomed up and sat outside leaders upon straightening, ran on well to snatch victory final 100 M. Won decisively.
Worse than midfield. Crept close rounding the home bend, shifted out for running and wide into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Bounded in the air, rider bumped his head upright and was then unbalanced in the saddle. At back and trailed field throughout.
Around midfield, on rails and 3 to 4Ls off pace. Shifted out after straightening to commence running. Ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Never threatened from mid-division, raced 2-wide 3 to 4Ls off pace until home straight, never picked up.
On inside about 4Ls off pace 1400 M out until 800 M out when briefly lost position, recovered but soon no chance upon straightening.
4-wide 4Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down 800 M out and under pressure, struggling from then on.
Very wide (5-wide) round first bend when 4Ls off pace, improved to go 3Ls off pace out 3-wide 600 M out, made no impression in straight.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1400 M out, held position down back straight and improved to 3Ls down entering straight, found little under pressure in straight. (Lame.)
Enjoyed run of race on fence 2Ls off pace, travelled well entering home straight, left with clear run just over 200 M out, went clear, readily.
Never far away racing 2-wide 2Ls off pace until swinging for home under pressure, not come on in straight and beaten 200 M out.
2-wide about 5Ls off speed down back straight, 4Ls down turning in, ran on through beaten horses to improve position in homestretch.
Held up in rear 10Ls off pace early, on bridle but 3-wide round final bend and 5Ls off pace entering straight, short of room about 300 M out, ran on again when clear but too late.
Raced 2-wide flanking pacesetter HIGHLIGHT through to final bend, went for home 500 M out, collared by winner just over 200 M out, no response and quickly grabbed for second.
Took first bend 4-wide 6Ls off pace, never got into race from then on, entered home straight 6-wide and 4Ls down, very one-paced to line.
Always 3-wide and about 2Ls off pace until home straight, 1L off lead 200 M out, kept on pretty well but no chance with winner.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1400 M out, 5-wide 1000 M out when sent on to 3rd 1L off pace 600 M out, still wide entering straight, briefly challenged before weakening final 200 M.
Soon on fence always sharing lead with HAPPY HARVEST upsides, under pressure to maintain position 600 M out, weakened from 400 M out, eased down from 200 M.
Caught wide without cover at rear. Crept closer to midfield rounding home bend, still 5-wide without cover. Effort not sustained in straight and dropped away.
Prominent briefly, soon eased to midfield, 4Ls off speed on rail. Under pressure just before straightening but only kept on same pace without threatening the placegetters.
Caught wide in midfield without cover, pressed on from 1200 M to race 3-wide behind leader 900 M out. 2-wide 1L off leader from the 600 M, emptied 200 M out and steadily dropped away.
Began well from wide gate, soon taken back to rear of midfield racing 4-wide. Unable to pick up in the straight.
Prominent early on fence, then eased to midfield. Dropped back further from 800 M. One-paced in straight.
Slow to jump then was crowded, well back on fence before running past beaten runners closing stages.
Disputed lead early, then travelled kindly on fence behind leader from 1100 M. Obtained split 250 M out to hit front inside final 150 M, comfortably.
Crowded after start, remained 3-wide at rear. Hung out near 400 M and made gradual ground down centre of track from 250 M, no extra near home.
Began fairly, soon mustered speed to lead 1200 M out. No answer to winner when challenged 200 M out, but kept on quite well to the line.
Steadily dropped to rear 900 M out, 3-wide about 8Ls off pace. Last on straightening, ran on steadily through field final 250 M to narrowly miss 2nd place final strides.
3-wide around mid-division till fading from the 250 M.
Ridden to maintain 4-wide position in midfield. Began to struggle from the 600 M, tailed off in home straight.
Settled 5 to 6Ls off lead behind middle of field. Failed to respond in home straight and kept on same pace.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd before failing to keep up going into home bend, soon niggled and managed to stay 2 or 3Ls off leader. One-paced in straight, tired final 100 M.
Raced 2-wide 4 to 5Ls off pace until home straight, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Prominent in 3rd place 1.5Ls off pace early on racing 2-wide, niggled along to keep up 700 M out, lost position at top of straight, dropped right out.
Eased back upon exiting to sit 8 to 9Ls off pace on fence, 5Ls down travelling smoothly turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 2.5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down and under pressure turning for home, no extra from 200 M out.
Never got into race, 2-wide and about 8 or 9Ls off pace until straight, 6Ls down 200 M out, weakened again.
Bit keen early on, raced 3-wide without cover and 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, travelled well but 4-wide and 5Ls down turning in, hung in from 200 M out, never reached principals.
Held up 6Ls off speed racing 2-wide until 400 M out, picked up from rear in straight making some headway before meeting with some interference closing stages.
6Ls off pace early on fence, 4Ls down entering straight, 1L down inside final 200 M when impeded by PREMIER SPEED, ran on again, finished 3rd, placed 2nd.
Soon led on fence by a neck from BRILLIANT ATTORNEY through to home straight, all out 350 M out to maintain lead, overhauled 300 M out and faded away.
Shadowed ARROGANCE in front racing 2-wide, came off bridle at top of home straight and soon struggling, well beaten over 200 M out.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down 400 M out, 1L down and definite place chances 200 M out, inconvenienced by JOINT PEACE closing stages, not recover.
Eased back early on to be about 10Ls off pace, 7Ls down turning in and remained at same distance off pace through to finishing line.
Had run of race on fence 2Ls off pace until straight, challenged on inside over 250 M out, kept on to lead 100 M out, held on well.
4Ls of pace on fence early on, closer turning in and hit front 250 M out, hung out 150 M when challenged by winner impeding JOINT PEACE in behind, finished 2nd, placed 3rd.
Generally 2 to 3Ls off pace on fence in 2nd place until home straight, soon on top of leader over 200 M and kept finding all the way to line, just hung on from late thrust out wide by GOGGLES.
Soon over 10Ls off pace in rear, driven along 600 M out to take closer order, entered straight racing wide and still 10Ls down, 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on very strongly, just missed.
Led after 200 M raced, went 3Ls clear 800 M out, overhauled just over 200 M out, kept on well but could not regain lead.
About 8Ls off pace and 2-wide, similarly placed entering straight racing 3-wide under pressure, not come on final stages.
Raced 3-wide 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, slightly closer but still 3-wide turning in, picked up quite well in straight but never looked like latching onto leading group.
3-wide early on before settling about 6Ls off pace racing 2-wide until straight, never managed to get close enough to leaders.
2-wide and about 6 or 7Ls off pace until home straight, kept on fairly well but nearest at finish.
On fence racing 5 to 6Ls off pace, niggled along to keep up 600 M out, never really got on terms in straight.
Held up about 8Ls off pace one from rear until straight when under pressure, very one-paced final stages and became detached from main body of runners.
Bit keen early on , clear 4th racing 4 to 5Ls behind leader, bit closer and travelling well entering straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, soon weakened.
Always in 3rd place either on fence or 2-wide, never worse than 4Ls off speed, quickened up in straight and briefly led 200 M out, kept on but couldn't head winner, pipped for 2nd place close home.
Raced 6 to 7Ls off pace on fence down back straight, travelled well entering straight, rallied to go 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on to be nearest at finish.
Always first 2 before losing ground steadily inside final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Always thereabouts. Kept on under pressure closing stages.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Was midfield 1000 M and about 5th into straight. Ran on to challenge final 200 M, taking lead near finish.
Soon prominent, holding narrow advantage before home turn. Kept on till failing to hold place 200 M out.
Midfield to straight where he kept on till finding no extra closing stages.
Made no show.
Soon in last and remained there to straight. Stayed on final 200 M.
Always well there. Hit front briefly passing 200 M but unable to hold winner near finish.
Improved steadily from rear before 1000 M and was about mid-division turning into straight. Ran on to threaten 200 M. One-paced towards finish.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Never on terms.
Around 5th to 600 M. Dropped back steadily.
Towards rear early, recovered ground to 6th 1200 M. Steady progress passing the Rock, becoming 4th turning in. Ran on to take command inside 100 M.
Near rear. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Raced 3rd before dropping slightly to 4th far side. One paced in staight.
Never better than midfield.
In touch. Gained 2nd briefly turning into straight. Soon weakened.
Mainly 8th. Faded closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up some ground along inside final 300 M.
Led. Kept on without quickening when headed inside 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Sat outside leader 1000 M . out. Unable to hold place final turn. Weakened 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well from outside in straight.
Broke well. Led field before headed rounding home bend. Fought on doggedly down straight to gain upper hand final 200 M.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace.
Disputed lead, racing keenly. Took up running around home bend. Caught closing stages.
Raced just better than midfield 3 or 4 wide. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Fought on to be nearest at finish.
Tailed-off most of way.
Lost many lengths at start. Quickly recovered to midfield racing keenly far side. Sustained headway in home straight.
Always at the back.
Never nearer.
Never in contention.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on.
Pushed along to take lead from 800 M. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear. Made up good ground on inside final 250 M.
Midfield to 600 M. No extra. (Dropped whip 400 M.)
Never able to feature.
Held 3rd to the Rock, then remained in better than midfield. Found no extra final 150 M.
Towards rear. Made progress to 7th 400 M. Ran on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Moved up steadily to be 3rd leaving the Rock. Held on until failing to hold place closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 200 M.
Led early briefly, then sat outside winner but never able to prevail.
Better than midfield. Held 4th from final turn. Weakened closing stages.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily final 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on in straight.
Attemped to make all.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Well back. Virtually last into straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Rear. Commenced run turning in. Ran on to get up final strides.
Never better than midfield. Made moderate progress down centre of track.
Chased leaders throughout. Unable to quicken to threaten closing stages.
Better than midfield. Fought on under pressure for 4th.
Well back. Not much room early in straight. Produced moderate progress final 200 M but lost 4th place late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Dropped out from halfway. (Heart irregularly.)
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Caught wide from poor draw early. Improved to dispute lead from stable bend. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out home bend.
Broke well, slender lead 2-wide. Kept on upon straightening until headed 200 M out. Unable to produce extra concluding stages and lost 2nd on the line.
Broke well and always 3-wide amongst front runners. Unable to accelerate when asked for extra after straightening, plugged on before tiring closing stages.
Towards rear on rail. Very moderate late headway.
4-wide midfield early, then 2-wide 4Ls off lead worse than midfield approaching home turn. Shifted out to make run upon straightening. Made some late ground.
Pushed early to maintain prominent position 2-wide and 2Ls behind pace. Stayed on early in the straight but was flat after the 200 M.
Sent forward and soon raced along the rails disputing lead. Asked to go upon straightening. Went clear after the 200 M and held on well to the line.

Jumped well from difficult gate, soon outpaced and steadily dropped to the rear racing 2-wide 5-6Ls behind pace. Shifted to the outside upon straightening and made up steady ground from 200 M until no extra close home.

Niggled along to be prominent early, restrained back to midfield 3Ls off pace 3 wide 600 M out. Took some time to gain momentum after straightening, accelerated well after the 200 M to grab 2nd on the line.
In touch briefly, soon worse than midfield, 4Ls off pace. Under pressure rounding home bend, one paced in straight.
At back. Never in contention.
Midfield or better, travelled along the rails 2-3Ls off pace. Steadied rear 800 M then bushed rail about 500 M out when crowded. Kept on same pace in straight.
Trailed the field throughout.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls to 8Ls off pace before dropping away inside final 200 M, was always niggled along to lie from 700 M out, offered no response.
Barely closer than 8 to 9Ls off pace at any stage, always amongst back three runners, remained there.
Broke awkwardly and soon in rear racing at least 10 to 12Ls off pace, ridden along 700 M out, 8Ls down 200 M out, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Always racing 3-wide and without cover about 6Ls off pace until final bend, 4Ls down 200 M out, weakened.
Soon in 2nd and content to let LONGMARK lead, 4Ls down 800 M out, crept closer to go 2Ls down 400 M out, hit front 200 M out, driven out for easy win.
2-wide and 4Ls to 6Ls off pace in 4th place until Rock, 3Ls down turning in and under pressure, found nothing off bridle and eased down final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in midfield against rails about 8Ls off pace, never managed to get any closer to pace, weak in home straight.
Held 4th place on rails between 4 and 6Ls off pace, driven along 600 M out, clear 3rd entering straight but one-paced to line.
Slowest into stride racing 2-wide and 8Ls to 10Ls off pace racing 2-wide, 8Ls down 400 M out, 6Ls down 200 M out, fair late headway to be nearest at finish.
8Ls to 10Ls off pace before Rock, raced 3-wide to improve round final bend, 6Ls down turning in, 5Ls down 200 M out, not come on.
Soon led on fence and clear by 4Ls 800 M out, 2Ls down clear 400 M out and grabbed by winner 200 M from line, never looked like losing quinella spot from then on.
On fence and always between 6Ls to 8Ls off speed until rounding home turn, fairly one paced in straight and never a threat.
Best away and led briefly, soon eased to take sit on fence behind pacemaker. Made move at the 200 M and had race sewn up 100 M out.
Pushed along but failed to muster speed and was 4-wide without cover near rear. Inconvenienced and caught wider 400 M out, no impression thereafter.
Began fairly in early stages hung in and steadily dropped to tail. Till detached last turning in became unbalanced and dipped near 200 then made up some late headway passing beaten runners.
Jumped quite well then outpaced behind midfield 3-wide. Brushed and carried wider 400 M out, not in contention in the straight.
Jumped very awkwardly and lost a couple of lengths, 5 or 6 Ls off speed towards rear, under pressure 400 M out, made gradual ground final 250 M.
2 or 3Ls off lead better than midfield on rail. Ran on steadily from 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Began well then settled 4Ls off speed behind midfield. Steadied at 600 M and shifted out near the 400 M to go toward. Made gradual progress down centre of track from 250 M until no extra final bit.
2-wide handy 4th before failing to quicken upon straightening when shifted out to be 4-wide. Very much one- paced in straight.

Worked forward from difficult barrier to lead going into first bend, gradually shifting across to hug rail 800 M out. Every chance on straightening when holding 1L advantage. No extra when overhauled by first pair 100 M out.

Soon shifted across from widest barrier to be 4-wide behind leaders going into back stretch. Shifted closer to be 2- wide behind leader 800 M out. Began to tire 400 M out and dropped out quickly final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, 3-wide at rear before making some headway final 200 M.
Left the gate awkwardly, never better than midfield while racing greenly.
Among front runners. Was 2nd passing 400 M and was always held by the winner. Raced greenly throughout.
Prominent on the rail. Unable quicken to challenge final 200 M.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground to be in touch near 600 M. Kept on.
Midfield. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Always prominent. Unable to threaten the quinella pair.
Soon behind midfield. Raced 9th from 400 M. No progress.
Made no show.
In touch. Raced 6th 400 M and remained in similar position thereafter.
Midfield early. Dropped back steadily from 600 M.
Left awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Among front runners 600 M. Took clear advantage passing 400 M and never headed.
Never a factor.
Settled wide in midfield. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Never nearer.
Settled behind midfield. Held up on rails turning in. Produced late impression closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Wide and better than midfield to straight. Dropped out under pressure passing 300 M.
Settled wide in midfield or behind. Ran past beaten runners.
Waited with. Ran on down centre of straight to snatch victory final strides.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to hold every chance inside 200 M but unable to draw level.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled around midfield on rails. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Began slowly but ridden to take up running after first 400 M. Fought on under pressure to fend off challengers till worn down close home.
Led field from 1400 M and never headed.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back 600 M out. Tailed off in straight.
Led briefly early. Raced 4th 1200 M before advancing to 3rd 800 M. Kept on well in straight but no threat to the winner.
Mainly behind midfield. Made ground steadily 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Rear. Very minor progress in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Steady progress from 800 M to be midfield turning in. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Modest progress close home.
Midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3-wide 4th turning in. Weakened 200 M.
Mainly 5th. Dropped back 250 M.
Prominent. Remained 2nd far side. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In touch. Dropped back rounding home bend. Tailed off in straight.
Last and 2nd last before making ground rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from 10th 400 M, never nearer.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Began quickly, then travelled in 5th just better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Wide in last few throughout.
Dropped out from midfield home bend.
Prominent to 300 M then weakened.
Never nearer.
Missed the start. Settled in last few. Not much room and shifted away from rails early in straight. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide towards rear. Jostled turning in. Kept on steadily in straight.
Made all. Hung on under pressure.
Settled behind midfield. Produced good late finish final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. No room early in straight. Kept on to the line.
Always thereabouts. Fought on for 3rd.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Held up behind pace. Gradually faded inside final 300 M.
Better than midfield. Wide rounding the home bend. Steadily dropped out after 300 M.
Soon at back. Switched to outside entering straight. Ran past a few beaten runners. (Lame near front leg.)
Around midfield. Plugged on early in the straight until gradually dropped out after 250 M.
Midfield along the rails 4 to 5Ls behind lead. Kept on same pace in straight.
Jumped well and then restrained back to worse than midfield along the rails. Switched to outside to improve upon straightening, made some ground final 200 M.
Ridden along to go forward, handy with cover. Unable to produce extra in straight. Kept on same pace to the line.
Broke well, ridden hard to lead from a wide gate. Headed upon straightening. Plugged on until steadily weakened 200 M out.
Missed the start slightly, then inconvenienced and towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Niggled to go forward, soon 4th, 2-wide and 2Ls behind pace. Shifted to 3-wide into straight. Kept on one pace until no extra final 200 M.
Worse than midfield. Shifted to outside to improve from 500 M. Inconvenienced near the 400 M and taken wider into straight. Ran on well final 350 M to snatch victory concluding stages.
Slow to begin, then steadily improved to better than midfield along the rails. Ran on in straight to miss 2nd narrowly.

Held a slender lead soon after jumping, then restrained to sit outside leader until straightening. Took up running and held 2Ls clear 200 M. Unable to hold off winner final stages and just held on for 2nd.
Midfield or worse. Switched wide entering straight. Made up a little late ground.

At back, wide early. Commenced run near the 600 M but inconvenienced and carried wider upon straightening. Ran on steadily despite continuing to hang in. Rider had to stop riding and straighten several times.
Raced keenly 6 to 7Ls off pace on fence until 600 M out, switched off inner entering straight, clear run 300 M out, ran on well enough though no chance with winner.
Sat 4 to 5Ls off pace on inner until home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out and with enough room along rail to challenge if quick enough, could only stay on same pace.
Soon flanking pacesetting THE ONLY HERO out 2-wide, passed by winner 250 M out, no extra and stayed on at one pace to line.
Broke awkwardly, 2-wide and 7Ls off lead 1200 M out, 5Ls down and widest (3-wide) into straight, 3Ls down 200 M out but failed to follow through.
Soon led, hung out slightly round 1st bend, never clear by more than half length, hung out and head high under pressure, grabbed by winner over 200 M out, still kept on well.
On fence 8Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 7Ls down and two from rear entering straight, never looked like getting involved in the finish.
Settled 3 to 4Ls off pace racing 2-wide until straight when travelling smoothly, quickened up on bridle to hit front over 200 M out, pushed out.
Slowest into stride, 2-wide racing keenly about 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, same position turning for home, no chance 300 M out.
Raced 3-wide about 7Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide and without cover 700 M out, in rear and 3-wide turning in, became further detached from main body of field.
Wide round 1st bend but sent on to race 2-wide about 2Ls off pace in 4th, similarly placed turning in, came under pressure and found nothing off bridle.
Never better than mid-division, 6Ls off speed and 2-wide 1400 M out, all out when about 4Ls down in 10th position 200 M out, finished moderately.
Enjoyed run of race on fence about 2-1/2Ls off pace until home straight, soon under strong pressure and quickly back-pedalled.
Held rails position 3 to 4Ls off pace in about 5th or 6th place until home straight when under pressure, staying on at same pace when short of room closing stages.
About 5Ls off pace and 3-wide 1400 M out, 4Ls down entering straight and quickened up to 2Ls off lead 200 M out, not follow through final stages.
Brief lead before easing behind leaders 3-wide. Dropped back a bit going into home bend, under pressure from 500 M and 4Ls off lead turning in, made moderate ground from 200 M, soon one-paced.
Bumped at start then checked, shifted to rail at rear, 5 or 6Ls off speed. Advanced to midfield 2-wide rounding home bend. Ran on a bit after 200 M, one-paced close home.

Jumped only fairly, ridden to muster speed, gradually advanced to be within 2Ls off leaders 900 M out. Ran on under pressure in straight to wear down leader 50 M out, stayed on well to fend off challenger.
Jumped very awkwardly and towards rear early, steadily recovered to midfield 1000 M out. Unable to find extra in straight and gave ground steadily from 250 M.
Ridden but outpaced towards rear, 5Ls off lead. Made steady progress from 250 M, effort not sustained concluding stages.
Driven along but only managed position 3Ls off lead in midfield. Unable to hold position going into home turn and was last entering straight, not a factor thereaftter.
Pressed to share lead on rail. Began to struggle to keep up after straightening, dropped away tamely from 200 M.
3-wide forward of midfield about 2Ls off speed. Dropped to midfield 600 M out and was 5Ls down turning in. Dropped out from 200 M.
Jumped smartly, ridden and soon disputing lead 2-wide. Took clear lead after straightening, every chance until overhauled by first pair closing stages.
From widest gate soon dropped to rear never less than 5-wide. Never a factor. (Saddle shifted back in early stages.)
Jumped well, soon niggled along to hug rail, 2 to 3Ls behind leaders. Switched out upon straightening to launch challenge, made gradual ground final 200 M whilst hanging out, just denied.
Niggled but gradually dropped towards rear. Stayed same entering straight, ran past tired runners close home.
Settled on fence 4Ls off pace down back straight, 3Ls down turning for home, every chance over 200 M out but not match winner's toe, just done for 2nd on line.
5Ls off pace and caught 4-wide without cover 1500 M out, sent on from 900 M out to lead racing 2-wide 600 M out, ceded advantage again over 200 M out, no extra to line.
Led on fence by no more than 2Ls through early stages, passed by CLASSA WIN 600 M out, assumed lead again over 200 M out, soon weakened and swamped.
Keen early on racing 2-wide 1Ls to 2Ls off pace, similarly placed turning in and 200 M out, tried hard but just lacked the necessary kick to grab lead and go on with it.
3-wide and 4Ls off pace from 1400 M out through to turning for home, quickened up to go 1L off pace 200 M out, led 180 M out, readily.
Held up in rear about 6 to 7Ls off pace racing 2-wide through to home turn, ran on only evenly and never any chance of catching leading players.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3Ls off pace and struggling 200 M out when severely checked, soon eased down.
Raced 4-wide early on in mid-division, improved to go about 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, all out when at front pair's quarters 200 M out, quickly folded.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace 1400 M out, outpaced entering straight and no threat from 200 M out.
Held rails position about 5Ls off pace until home straight, rallied and 3Ls down 200 M out but got no closer.
2nd slowest out of gates, generally 5 to 6Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight, picked up strongly final 350 M to snatch runners-up spot on line.
Bounded in air and very awkwardly into stride, raced about 6Ls off pace on fence until straight, got within 3Ls off leaders 200 M out but no extra and soon eased down.
Raced keenly through early stages 3-wide and between 2 and 3Ls off lead, 1L off front and menacing 200 M out but not follow through and held final 100 M. (Lame.)
On fence and about 3Ls off pace down back straight, under pressure 500 M out and short of room turning for home and 300 M out, ran on.
In rear to straight where he ran on quite well despite not reaching winner.
Never far off to home turn. Made no show on straightening.
Severely checked 800 M and was midfield rounding home bend. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Among rear division to straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Was 5th or 6th, pulling hard, 1000 M. Close up into straight where he dropped out from the 300 M.
Towards rear before making up some late progress inside final 200 M.
Well there to straight where he failed to hold place 200 M out.
6th or 7th rounding home bend. Never a threat in straight.
Worse than midfield 800 M and similar position into straight. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Improved from rear 1000 M and was just worse than midfield home bend. Could not make any impression on leaders in straight.
Never a factor.
Made all. Kept on strongly to line.
Midfield into straight. Ran on close home.
Made rapid headway from 1200 M to be 2nd passing 1000 M. Chased winner unavailingly 200 M out. Found no extra towards finish.
Soon led, still holding 2Ls advantages 200 M. Kept on but was caught close home.
Midfield. Ran on well from 5th early straight to claim victory close home.
Soon sat outside leader until weakening out of contention final 100 M.
Slightly slowly away. Made no show.
Mainly 9th to straight. Moderate progress.
Slightly better than midfield. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Prominent to final turn. Weakened.
Always there. Kept on without quickening in straight.
2nd last to final turn. Made some progress in straight.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Jumped well and was prominent briefly before dropping back to midfield. Weakened from 400 M when racing wide.
Broke well. Settled widest in midfield. Soon dropped out upon straightening.
Settled at the back. Finished strongly down centre of straight to miss narrowly.
Soon dropped to rear.
Settled just off the pace. Closed on leader steadily in straight to just fail to get up on line.
Began awkwandly losing ground at start. Remained in rear until making late impression in straight.
Midfield early. Steadied and lost ground far side. Saved ground on rails turning in. Kept on same pace.
Chased leader to straight. No extra.
Settled in midfield. Ran on in straight.
Made all. Fought on determinedly to just fend off challengers closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Made up late ground closing stages (See Racing Incidents).
Prominent to straight. Soon weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, behind midfield. Slightly improved from 400 M. Tightened approaching 200 M, then one-paced.
Took lead passing 1400 M. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Widest turning in. Made no show in straight.
Flat-footed at start, lost a lot of ground. Never a threat.
Midfield or slightly better. Ran on from 5th early straight but unable to capture the winner.
Bounded at start, never a factor.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Mainly 8th to final turn. Made up good ground to claim 3rd final 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field early stages, then raced 2nd and 3rd to final turn. Ran on steadily to take command passing 200 M. Held on well.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be prominent, gained 2nd home bend but found no extra final 200 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace to the line.
Chased leader early stages. Lost touch home bend.
Close up. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M. Hung on well.
Never nearer.
Settled in rear. Improving when forced to steady at 200 M pole. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Unable to sustain progress final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened under pressure.
Raced wide in midfield. Dropped out before straight.
Broke well. Attempted to make all. Headed passing 200 M. Kept on.
Improved to chase leader far side. Weakened turning in.
Towards rear. Some headway before entering the straight but soon no extra.
Slow to begin and trailed field. Detached further after straightening.

Niggled to go forward but unable to get in and was obliged to race 3 or 4 wide without cover throughout. Travelled around midfield 4-5Ls behind speed. Under pressure rounding the home bend. Weakened in straight.
Bounded in the air and lost a lot of ground. At back throughout.
Sat outside leader early, took up running from 1200 M. Under challenge after straightening, had a ding-dong battle with 2nd runner and fought on well to the line. Won gamely.
Broke well, niggled to lead field early. Headed at 1200 M and stayed along the rails handily 2nd or 3rd. Kept on well to the line.
Worse than midfield. Steadily improved along the back straight to be midfield before making the home bend. Unable to give extra in straight and plugged on to the line.
Broke well, niggled to go forward and raced along the rails. Steadily dropped to 4th and 3 or 4Ls off speed running pass the 1200 M. No extra in straight, just plugged on to the line.
Travelled 2-wide 3-4Ls off speed better than midfield. Crept closer to 4th near the Rock. Under pressure rounding the home bend, plugged on in straight.
Midfield or worse on rails. Shifted out to make run upon straigtening. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Well there early, steadily moved forward and tracked leader from 800 M. Challenged winner upon straigtening and had a ding-dong battle. Just denied on the line.
Bit too keen early out 2-wide in 4th place and never worse than 3Ls off lead until home straight, tried hard but never looked like catching principals.
Settled in midfield on fence about 4 to 5Ls off pace until 800 M out when hard ridden to lie up, kept on under pressure until 200 M out, no extra.
Never had any cover, always 3-wide 3 to 4Ls off speed, hard ridden to keep up 600 M out, well beaten at top of straight.
Held rails 5Ls off early speed, switched out 2-wide to challenge final bend, moderate late headway in straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowest into stride but ridden to take prominent spot upsides pacesetting DE INTEGRO, still there turning in but one-paced to line.
Had run of the race about 2Ls off pace on fence, travelled well entering straight, bit short of room over 300 M out, ran on well near finish. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off pace until final bend when slightly closer and travelling well, every chance 200 M out, not finish off strong enough.
Took keen hold early stages, settled towards rear racing 2-wide, closer but 5-wide turning in, briefly threatened 200 M out when 2.5Ls down, not come on.
2-wide in rear 8Ls off early pace, went forward 600 M out racing 3-wide, 5Ls off pace and at least 6-wide turning for home, soon beaten.
Soon led on fence, flanked on outside by THISTLEJADE until 400 M out, hung in slightly over 300 M out, kept on well. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
Sat 4 to 5Ls off speed racing 2-wide, 3-wide and struggling turning into home straight, never any threat.
Crossed to fence from wide draw immediately and raced in rear 8Ls off pace, 6Ls down entering straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, nearest at finish.
Settled 3-wide without cover around midfield. 3-1/2Ls down turning in, made steady progress final 200 M but no answer to the winner.
3-wide in handy position early, steadily advanced to be at leader's quarters one off rail 1200 M out. Unable to keep up after straightening, just plugged on afterwards.
Forward of midfield, about 3Ls off pace. Stuggled to keep up before going into final turn. 5Ls down into straight, not a factor thereafter.
Soon went forward to make running, 2Ls advantage on straightening until 100 M out, overhauled by quinella pair close home when no extra.
Slow to begin, waited with on rail 7Ls off pace at rear. Switched 4-wide into straight, ran on well final 200 M, nearest at finish.
Midfield on fence most of the way, failed to respond in straight.
Held up 3-wide at tail. Became detached rounding home turn. Eased down in straight. (Heart irregularity and made abnormal breathing noises.)
About 2Ls behind leader on fence. Kept on very much one-paced in straight.
2-wide 4Ls off lead rear of midfield. Under pressure 500 M out, no response.
Held up 3-wide 5Ls off lead towards rear. Moved closer rounding home bend. Made sustained effort from 200 M to lead closing stages, kept on well.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 5Ls off leader through to 800 M out when advanced to go 3Ls down 600 M out and still out 3-wide, entered straight even wider and not come on.
Led on fence and never clear by more than 2Ls, all out 200 M out before being collared by winner 150 M out, quickly passed by two more.
Raced on fence in 7th place 1000 M out, driven along 400 M out, made no impression closing stages.
Bit slowly away and held up in rear 8Ls off pace on inside, never looked like landing any kind of blow and nearest at finish.
2-wide and 6 to 7Ls off lead 1000 M out, never got any closer to the lead and very weak in home straight.
Slowest away, raced 2-wide about 4 to 5Ls off pace until home straight, soon weakened.
Raced in 5th place 3 to 4Ls off pace on fence, bit closer and travelling smoothly turning for home, quickened up to hit front 150 M out; kept on well.
Sat 2 to 3Ls off lead on inside, quickened up to be a neck off leader SUPER CENTURY 200 M out, no answer to winner's pace 150 M out, kept on.
Raced 2-wide 2 to 3Ls off pace, rallied at top of straight though hung out slightly around 200 M out, no chance with winner and nearest at finish.
Attempted to make early pace but soon sat 2Ls off pacesetting SUPER CENTURY and out 2-wide, similarly placed turning for home, once-paced to line.
Raced 5Ls off pace put out 2-wide 1000 M out, remained similarly placed through to 200 M marker when all out and already well beaten, eased down.
Out 2 and 3-wide in rear 8Ls off pace, 6Ls down 500 M out and hard ridden, no chance in straight.
Prominent. Took lead passing 1000 M. Was joined 600 M and re-gained brief advantage 250 M out. Kept on without quickening when headed closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back a bit when steadied 800 M. Kept on but without threatening in straight.
Towards rear from the widest draw. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Tardy start, never a threat.
Always there. Moved up home bend to join the leader 600 M. Remained prominent when headed 250 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Tardy start, never in contention.
Always prominent. Ran on from 3rd or 4th early straight to take command close home.
Mainly midfield. Found no extra final 150 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Well there early, soon raced behind midfield keenly. Made moderate progress in straight.
Better than midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Well there. Ran on from 3rd or 4th early straight to take lead briefly 100 M out. Unable to withhold the winner close home.
Towards rear. Kept on inside 250 M.
Behind midfield. Made no show.
Prominent. Ran on under pressure down straight but just failed to peg back winner.
Never seen with a chance.
Wide in midfield. Quickened early in straight but no extra closing stages.
Restraining in last few when hampered rounding home bend. Ran on down centre of straight to hit front inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Tracked leader. Quickened to lead inside 300 M but swamped close home.
Around midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled at the back. Commenced move entering straight. Ran on to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Settled in midfield. Raced tightly between runners early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Led to 300 M then weakened under pressure.
Midfield when blundered and lost considerable ground home bend. Renewed effort from last entering straight. Ran on to just fail to get up on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled 5th. Advanced to 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Responded well 200 M out to just prevail at finish. (Saddle shifted slightly.)
Mostly 2nd until failing to hold place 100 M out.
Tardy start, was last until making ground steadily in straight.
Led field to early straight. Faded.
Behind midfield. Ran on well from outside in straight without threatening.
Towards rear throughout.
3rd early, held 5th from 1100 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Always in touch. Ran on from 3rd final turn to take lead 250 M out. Just caught narrowly on the line.
Towards rear. Made up good ground when widest final 300 M.
Left awkwardly. Midfield. Weakened 200 M.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Around midfield to straight. Ran on a bit 300 M but was one-paced closing stages.
Very slowly away, last early. Remained in the rear group until making up some ground turning in. One-paced.
Towards rear and wide. Raced ungenerously throughout.
Held up in first few. Hit front momentarily over 200 M out but soon found no extra.
Never nearer.
Led early. Behind leader home bend. Regained lead upon straightening but overhauled closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Kept on.
Always thereabouts. Fought on.
Towards rear. Gained midfield on rails saving ground turning in. Steadied 200 M out before producing good late headway.
Wide better than midfield. Kept on well.
Never nearer than midfield.
Settled within striking distance. Quickened well to take charge 200 M out. Pushed out.
Took up running approaching home bend and led to straight. Soon weakened.
Wide in midfield throughout.
Midfield. No room early in straight. Ran on closing stages.
Awkward early. Always at the back. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always well back.
Mainly midfield. Crept close near the 500 M, ran on well but failed to catch the winner.
Midfield or better. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
About midfield. Asked to go from 300 M, made up some ground.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Steadied near the 600 M and then gradually made up good ground through the field from 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Bounded in the air, at back. Commenced to run closer near the 300 M but was steadied when awkward between runners after the 200 M. Unable to challenge thereafter.
Worse than midfield. Unable to keep up passing 400 M and soon dropped out.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Always well there. Kept on.
Sent to share lead early. Headed near the 600 M and under pressure 500 M out. Unable to quicken.
Soon prominent. Cruised up from 600 M and took lead passing course proper. Kept finding extra final 200 M, held on well to the line.
Worse than midfield. Made up some ground from 350 M until plugged on 100 M out.
Led or disputed lead. Headed 500 M. Steadily weakened from 300 M.
Shared lead. Headed near the 400 M. Kept fighting on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Niggled to maintain its position in midfield. Plugged on until no extra final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 2Ls off pace until straight, picked up fairly well to lead 300 M out, overhauled 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls off pace down back straight, forced wider turning for home, one-paced in straight.
Raced keenly early on out 3-wide about 4Ls off speed, turned for home 4-wide and still 4Ls down, accelerated well to lead 200 M out, headed by eventual runner-up 50 M out.
4 to 5Ls off pace racing 1 and 2-wide through to home straight, rallied to go 3Ls down 200 M out, failed to maintain momentum and soon no chance.
Travelled on fence 2Ls off pace, similarly placed 500 M out when under strong pressure to maintain position, dropped away upon entering straight.
Raced 3-wide in 2nd place from 1100 M out until struggling but still positioned outside leader turning for home, soon no chance.
Soon led though raced keenly and never clear by more than 2Ls, overhauled 300 M out, weakened rapidly.
Steadied 6 to 7Ls off pace down until home straight, picked up well to go 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well closing stages to lead on line.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace until losing position slightly about 700 M out, 3Ls down turning in but threatened to rally again 300 M out, not come on and beaten when crowded 150 M out.
Never on the track, caught 4 and 5-wide without cover early on and about 5Ls off pace, under pressure turning for home and soon no chance, bled.
Always about 3Ls off pace on fence until 200 M out when a bit short of racing room, not come on again when in clear.
Over-raced two off the fence and 4Ls off pace down back straight, slightly better placed turning in, not match principals but still kept on well in home straight.
Missed start and lost at least 2Ls as a result, sat 7 to 8Ls off pace on fence until home straight, no chance 300 M out but ran on past a few beaten rivals closing stages.
Drifted back to rear about 9Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 7Ls down and widest of all (5-wide) turning in, quickened up well to go 2Ls off lead 200 M out, led 30 M from post, caught on line.
Smartest away from widest draw and tracked leader, became 2-wide from 600 M. Took over 500 M out and quickly drawing a few lengths 400 M out, headed near home when finding winner too strong.
Settled 3-wide towards about 7Ls off speed. 5-wide into straight and asked the question 300 M out, lengthened well to collar tearaway leader close home, readily.
From outside gate failed to muster early speed and was caught 3-wide in midfield or slightly worse. Minimal effort around 300 M, then kept on one-paced.
Handy early then steadily dropped to midfield 1200 M out. Checked when disappointed for running 300 M out, did not recover, weakened closing stages.
From wide gate pressed on to dispute lead, clear advantage and gradually shifting across to reach rail 1200 M out. Dropped out rapidly near 500 M, tailed off into straight and collapsed near 300 M.
Ridden but outpaced early, steadily improved to 6Ls off lead rear of midfield. Made no impression in home straight.
Prominent 3rd on rail. Struggled to keep up upon straightening and dropped away tamely. (Moderate amount of blood in trachea.)
Fractious in stall, not far off about 1-1/2Ls off lead in 4th. Moved closer on home bend to be behind leader swinging for home. Dropped out from the 300 M.
4Ls off lead in mid-division on fence. Crept closer 2 or 3-wide rounding home turn. One-paced when unable to keep with principals from 400 M, gave ground final 200 M.
Steadily dropped to rear racing 2-wide. Only ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Niggled but outpaced at rear. Attempted to improve along rails after straightening but was tightened for room approaching 200 M. Ran on a bit when into clear.
Well there early, then travelled 3-wide without cover in midfield 1200 M out. Moved closer 4 or 5 wide rounding home bend to be behind leaders turning in. Dropped away quickly inside 400 M.
Held up 3 or 4-wide at rear. Switched 6-wide after straightening and made up good ground final 300 M.

6Ls off lead rear of midfield on rail. Gradually shifted out rounding home bend to be 3-wide entering straight. Steadied after straightening then made steady headway final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Took good pull and 4-wide round 1st bend, 3-wide and 6Ls off pace 1400 M out tracking the winner, 4Ls behind leader 400 M out, all out at 200 M marker when 3Ls down and no extra final stages.
On fence about 3Ls off speed through to home straight, came off rails to find running home at top of straight and only clear 200 M out, ran on well.
Bounded in air on exiting, raced 3-wide without cover 3Ls off pace down back straight, still 3-wide but 1.5Ls off pace and every chance turning in, quickly swamped and no chance.
Always 2 or 3-wide in midfield between 3 and 5Ls off speed until 600 M out, 2.5Ls off leader turning in, quickened up to go 2Ls clear 200 M out, ran on strongly, impressive.
Raced on inside about 4 to 5Ls off pace until final bend when travelling well, switched off fence to challenge at top of straight, kept on well but no chance with winner.
Never far away early on though took keen hold about 2Ls off pace out 2-wide until home straight when not really quicken up, struggling 200 M out before weakening further.
Raced 2 and 3-wide 3Ls off pace until home straight, soon under pressure and dropped right away rapidly.
Soon in 2nd at pacesetting GOLCONDA's quarters though always over-racing a bit, still favourably placed turning in and definite place prospects 200 M out, weakened.
Had the run of the race until straight on the fence in 3rd place 1 to 2Ls off pace, under pressure turning for home and soon dropped out of contention.
Keen through early stages 6 to 7Ls off pace, turned for home in 3rd last place 2-wide and 5Ls off pace, kept finding all the way to line.
Always in or near rear, never closer than 5 or 6Ls off pace and beaten a long way out.
Dropped out in rear about 8Ls off pace early on, 3-wide and 6Ls off pace rounding final bend, stayed on well in straight but never looked like grabbing front two.
Quickly to front though never led by more than 1L, passed by winner 250 M out and just about clinging on to a place chance 200 M out before weakening away quickly.
Raced too freely early on out wide and at least 5Ls off pace through to home straight when settled and travelling well though 4-wide, asked to pick up 350 M out, found nothing.
Raced 3-wide about 5Ls off pace and always driven along to keep up, still near rear turning in, soon no chance and eased down 200 M out.
Raced prominently about 2Ls off pace at least 2-wide, still challenging and every chance of running the frame 300 M out, not come on closing stages.
2nd on inside early on about 1L off pacesetting CHARIOT OF STORM, joined leader turning for home and left in front 300 M out, weakened once headed by winner over 200 M out.
Steadied near rear at least 7Ls off pace and about 3-wide, turned in racing widest of all (5-wide), stayed on well up centre of course without threatening principals.
Mostly driven along to maintain position 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, struggling once pace quickened up again and beaten 300 M out.
Outpaced from outset and always driven along 8Ls off pace until home straight, stayed on fairly well through beaten rivals in home straight to be nearest at finish.
Dwelt at start, soon 6Ls off pace on fence, 5Ls down turning for home, quickened up to go 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on and just grabbed for 2nd place near line.
Always about 5Ls off speed and 2-wide through to home straight, finished off fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Prominent, never further than 2Ls off pace throughout though always at least 3-wide, picked up well at top of straight and led over 200 M out, kept on strongly.
Keen early on racing in midfield about 2-wide and 3 to 4Ls off pace until home straight, ran on well though never looked like gunning winner down.
Soon led racing 2-wide but never clear by more than 2Ls, joined by GRAND FIGHTER on inside turning for home, failed to pick up again and beaten well over 200 M out.
Near fence and about 4Ls off pace down back straight, driven along 600 M out to keep up, short of room and steadied about 250 M out, any slight chance gone at that point. (Bled.)
Raced 2-wide no worse than 3Ls off pace at any stage through to home straight, not come on at top of straight and beaten 300 M out.
Always about 4-wide and 4 to 5Ls off pace through to home straight, never landed a blow.
Never a factor.
About midfield into straight where he made some headway inside 200 M.
Well there to straight. Held every chance 250 M. Found first 2 too strong.
Made no show.
Ridden to lead or share lead to straight. Was still there 250 M. Soon beaten and found no extra.
Mostly midfield to straight where he kept on well on the inside to the 200 M. Found no extra.
Worse than midfield 1000 M and was among rear group into straight. Kept on steadily closing stages.
About 6th halfway and 8th early in straight. Kept on till finding only one-pace close home.
Mostly 5th or 6th to home turn. Moved up stylishly to take charge passing 200 M. Won impressively.
Always at the back.
Never troubled leaders.
Worse than midfield to home bend. Ran on well to take 2nd close home.
Ran 4th to home turn. Unable to quicken to threaten in straight.
Led or shared lead from 1000 M. Was overhauled 200 M and dropped out of contention.
Dropped out from halfway.
Missed the break. Niggled along behind midfield. Finished well.
Never nearer.
Well there. Hit front passing 200 M.
Midfield. Fought on under pressure to claim 3rd closing stages.
Always well back.
Travelled just better than midfield. No extra closing stages.
Lost considerable ground at start. Always towards rear.
Midfield most of way. No extra closing stages.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Held narrow lead to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Dropped out onto course proper.
Similar position throughout.
Last few until some late impression closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Disputed lead. Hit front briefly entering straight. Soon overhauled.
Behind midfield early. Rapid progress on outside far side. Weakened home bend.
Settled behind leaders. Moved up to assert authority inside 300 M. Never in doubt.
Prominent to halfway when lost position far side. Weakened badly in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight.
Made running to straight. Weakened.
Always in last few.
Well back. Ran on late.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped away quickly.
Behind midfield. Commenced move entering straight. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd inside 200 M.
Midfeild to straight. Faded.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Never nearer.
Well back to straight. Made moderate progress under pressure.
Attempted to make all. Fought on doggedly final 200 M but just failed to fend off winner.
Wide towards rear. Widest turning in. Made shortlived effort early in straight. No extra closing stages.
Wide throughout and never better than midfield.
Midfield. Made steady headway far side. Prominent into straight and soon weakened.
Always prominent. Quickened to draw level final 200 M and battled on resolutely to claim victory in bob of heads.
Midfield. Made steady headway without threatening in straight.
Prominent till dropped out final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Wide stages bend. Improved to chase leader far side. Dropped out home bend.
Midfield. Dropped out home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always prominent and 4-wide. Ran on down straight holding every chance but unable to peg back first two.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Ridden to dispute lead early. Took up running home bend but dropped out upon straightening.
Missed the break but quickly improved to midfield or better. Quickened into straight to just get up in the shadows of the post.
Well back. Made some late progress down centre of straight. (See Racing Incidents)
Midfield, with some effort in straight.
Midfield. Produced good late impression in straight.
Midfield. Ran post beaten runners in straight.
Never far off. Improved to hit front final 200 M. Pipped at post.
Settled in 3rd. Gained some 1L advantage early in straight but had no more to give final stages.
Close up. Improved to hold every chance final 200 M but had to settle for joint 3rd.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on well down centre of straight.
Behind midfield. Gave ground from home bend.
Ridden to the front early. Settled for 2nd approaching home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Around midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Always midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Ridden early but outpaced. Worse than midfield. 3-wide 6-7Ls behind pace. Shifted wider entering straight, made up little ground on outer without threatening.
Always pushing but at back throughout.
Soon led. Challenged inside 400 M, kept on well until finding winner too strong 200 M out, but drew well clear of the 3rd placegetter.
Travelled 2-wide, 6Ls off lead worse than midfield. Made up steady ground from 300 M to grab a distant 3rd near the line.
From a difficult gate steadied, shifted across behind runners at the rear. Checked near the 300 M, made up little ground when into clear final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Outpaced early, steadily dropped to the tail. Ran past a few beaten runners closing stages.
Brief lead then travelled comfortably behind leader along the rails. Loomed up after straightening and took command 200 M out. Won unextended.
Niggled to go forward, sat outside leader near the 900 M. Hung out approaching and rounding the home turn, unable to keep up from 300 M, dropped out steadily.
Better than midfield 2 or 3-wide, crept closer rounding the home bend. Weakened steadily 300 M out.
Towards rear on the fence. Hung in from home turn and under pressure 400 M out, unable to produce extra, one paced to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there early then took up a rail run in midfield 5Ls off pace. Saved ground to move closer upon straightening. Plugged on without quickening.
Jumped clearly, 2-3Ls off lead along the rail. Shifted away from the rail to commence run on straightening. Unable to quicken, gave ground inside final 150 M.
Broke best, then raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace in midfield. Shifted to 5-wide entering straight to commence run, ran on until one paced concluding stages and just missed a place.
Worked hard to lead out 3-wide early on, only led on fence 900 M out, responded well to skip 1L clear 200 M out, tied up in closing stages and grabbed by winner and others 20 M out.
