Bit keen early on racing 2-wide and 3Ls off pace, similarly placed turning in and very one-paced to line.
Had run of the race on fence 1L to 2Ls off pace, lost place slightly and ridden 800 M out, under pressure on straightening, weakened out of contention from over 200 M out.
Settled about 5 or 6Ls off pace racing 2-wide until home straight, picked up well to go 3Ls off leader 200 M out, kept finding to lead 20 M from post.
Always driven along to maintain position about 3Ls off pace on fence, lost position 800 M out, steadily weakened.
Soon in rear about 8Ls off pace on fence down back straight, similarly placed and under pressure turning in, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
In leading bunch racing 2-wide 1L to 2Ls off pacesetting EXCITING TIMES until home straight when 1L down, one-paced to line and swamped 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide about 6Ls off pace early on, 5Ls down when widest (5-wide) into straight, not come on and eased down close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
4-wide early on and soon 3-wide outside winner about 5 or 6Ls off pace, came on strongly in straight to go joint 2nd 200 M out, kept on well but narrowly outfought close home.
Steadied one from rear about 7Ls off pace out 2-wide, similarly placed turning for home, over 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly to snatch 3rd place on line.
Held rails position 5 or 6Ls off pace down on inside through to home straight, never got any closer than that.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls off pace through to home straight when in 5th, quickened up to go 2Ls down in joint 2nd place 200 M out, kept on well to line but no chance with winner's late surge.
Raced 3-wide in 2nd place about 1000 M out, slightly outpaced from 600 M out but still only a little over 2Ls off pace turning in, emptied in straight.
Raced 2-wide 5 or 6Ls off speed through to straight, one-paced in straight and never a threat.
On pace early then took up prominent position 2-wide 1.5- 2Ls back. Still 2-wide and 5th upon entering straight. Close behind leaders 200 M out but unable to produce extra.
Moved up to midfield from a little further back to be about 5Ls back on fence. Hung out from home turn, moved a little closer on straightening, soon one-paced.
Ridden at back of forward bunch 3Ls off speed in 6th place and 2-wide. One paced in straight and was not ridden out to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there early then settled 3-wide 2Ls off speed 1000 M out. Entered straight in good position but no further impression and steadily dropped away from 150 M.
Always rear of midfield about 7 or 8Ls behind and 2-wide. Made moderate ground in straight but never a threat.
Eased back from wide gate to race near rear 3-wide with no cover. Still about 2nd last at top of straight when made move up. Zoomed past leaders and hit front final 100 M.
Bumped on jumping and raced well back along rails. Made good headway through field in straight to grab 4th.
Handy early, steadily dropped to midfield 6Ls back and 3-wide 1000 M out. Failed to respond when under pressure rounding home bend, dropped out further upon straightening, tailed off inside 200 M.
Travelled well on fence about 2 or 3Ls off pace in 5th place. Switched out between HORNET and GOLDEN YEARS in straight to be equal lead 200 M out. Stayed on very well to line but winner too strong.
Assumed lead 1300 M out on rails. Unable to quicken when challenged 250 M, soon tired.
Eased to race 2-wide 5Ls back in midfield. Similar position turning for home and ran on steadily to go past beaten runners.
Raced in rear from widest gate, shifting across to rails 1200 M out. Made only moderate late headway passing tired runners.
Jumped smartly, settling in forward position outside of pacesetter HORNET. Every chance 200 M out when equal lead with CELEBRATION but no match for winner.
Bumped on jumping and always near rear travelling 2-wide. Rounded home turn at rear and entered straight widest. Made up some ground in straight until final stages.
In touch early, then just slightly better than midfield. Remained same until faded soon after straightening. Wide without cover throughout.
Behind midfield. Steadied at 300 M. No progress.
Better than midfield. Advanced to 3rd 1000 M out. Kept on without threatening.
Around midfield and raced greenly throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led. Held 1L advantage 400 M. Kept on when headed 150 M.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Moderate progress final 300 M.
Behind midfield. Lost position middle stages and dropped towards rear. Recovered good ground in straight. (Lame.)
Always well there. Sat outside leader before gaining command 150 M. Rider had to stop riding and straighten 100 M out.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced at 300 M. Unable to recover.
Midfield. Weakened in straight.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Towards rear. Made up some ground rounding home bend. Stayed on 200 M.
In touch. Dropped out from 4th early straight.
Held 3rd before dropping to 5th 1st turn. Kept on early straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Gradually improved to prominent position before home bend. Gave ground steadily upon straightening.
Soon took up running and led until swamped over 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never seen with a chance.
Behind midfield. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Restrained in 5th position. Gradually weakened upon straightening.
Well back. Ran on well under pressure.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Ridden early settling in close-up position. Dropped to 6th when 4-wide home bend. Bumped and carried wider turning for home. One paced under pressure.
Never a factor.
Settled just off the pace. Kept on in straight but swamped for 2nd near finish.
Well back. Widest runner turning in. Made no show.
Rear early. Improved to midfield home bend. Weakened in straight.
Midfield. Wide early. Effort early in straight but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Never far off. Just behind leader turning in. Moved up to lead over 300 M out. Won easily.
Rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground in the extreme outside in straight. (Bled.)
In touch to straight. Dropped out.
Led field to final turn. Faded.
Never better than midfield. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow into stride, recovered some ground to be 6th. Remained in similar position until running on quite well close home.
Tardy start, never a factor.
Towards rear. Tailed off in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd early straight. Soon weakened.
Midfield early. Soon dropped back a little behind midfield. No improvment.
Prominent. Took lead rear 600 M. Held on until finding no extra when headed 100 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on despite hanging in in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from outside inside 300 M.
In touch. Weakened closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on well from 7th early straight to assert authority 100 M out. Won going away.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down straight, doing best work at finish.
Never better than midfield. Faded under pressure.
Broke well travelling in first few. Led into straight and went 2Ls clear early on. Overhauled final stages.
Ridden to settle behind leaders. Dropped out upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield.
Led field to straight. Dropped out. (Lame.)
Waited with. Made significant progress down centre of straight to take charge close home.
Wide better than midfield. Weakened in straight.
Wide in midfield. Weakened in straight.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never better than midfield. Hampered 200 M out. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in midfield. Gained 3rd early in straight. No extra closing stages.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Worse than midfield, raced wide most of the way from a difficult gate. Dropped out from 300 M.
Niggled early to lead field. Headed 300 M, kept on one pace.
Ridden early to go forward, always niggled to maintain prominent position but 3-wide throughout. Took lead near the 300 M and kept on well, just caught on the line.
Soon well there, dropped to midfield before making the home turn. Kept on one pace in the early straight until making little ground final 100 M.
Niggled early to race handily along the rail. Weakened from 300 M, steadily dropped out.
Broke well, midfield or better. Was bumped near the 700 M and then hung out badly. Did not quicken in the straight.
Midfield or worse. Wide along the back straight and rounding the home bend. Dropped out badly after straightening.
Outpaced early, towards rear. Shifted to outside entering the straight to commence running, made up some ground until no extra final 100 M.
Always pushing to track leader. Disputed lead just before straightening but soon headed near the 300 M. Kept on but unable to match speed with quinella pair closing stages.
Missed the start slightly, at back and wide. Shifted to inside near the 600 M. Closer order upon straightening but unable to obtain clear running over the last 300 M.
Midfield or worse on the rail. Steadied and shifted in when unable to hold its position near the 800 M. Plugged on in the straight.
Prominent early, then travelled nicely in midfield. Asked to go passing 300 M and accelerated well 200 M out to snatch victory on the line.
Took good hold in midfield about 3Ls to 4Ls off pace out 2-wide until home straight when one-paced and unable to come on.
Unable to dominate early on and forced to settle outside pacesetting SWEETIE, still on pace turning in but caught flat-footed about 300 M out, kept on at same pace to line.
Driven along to hold rails spot in lead early on, ceded advantage 900 M out, under pressure to lie up over 600 M out, beaten turning into straight.
Always at least 3Ls to 4Ls off speed on or one off the fence until 400 M out, found nothing off bridle in straight and soon dropped right away.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 5Ls off pace through to straight when travelling well, quickened up to go 3Ls down at 200 M, kept on well to lead final strides.
Awkwardly into stride losing 2Ls or 3Ls as a result, on fence but 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, never got any closer to leaders than that.
Raced too freely through early stages when 3-wide and about 2Ls to 3Ls off early pace, same position on straightening ut not pick up and beaten 300 M out.
At least 9Ls or 10Ls off pace out 2-wide early, hard ridden 6Ls down and 7-wide turning for home, responded to constant pressure to close off very well and be nearest at finish.
Raced prominently, no worse than 2Ls off pace until home straight, loomed upsides leader and eventual runner-up COSMO STAR 300 M out, not follow through.
Never on bridle racing 2-wide about 3Ls off pace down straight, under pressure to take closer turning for home, no extra from that point.
Flew the start but dragged back to settle about 4Ls off pace out 4-wide, similarly placed turning for home and at 200 M marker, ran on well final stages to be nearest at finish.
6Ls off pace and 4-wide down back straight, 4Ls down but 5-wide turning for home and still well adrift 200 M out, finished final 200 M very strongly to be nearest at finish.
2nd slowest into stride but soon on fence 3Ls to 4Ls off pace until home straight, soon emptied and came home in own time.

Wide in midfield early before being sent on to lead out 4-wide 900 M out, led out 3-wide entering straight, vulnerable 300 M out but rallied gamely and only caught final strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well to take up position at midfield 2 wide and 4Ls off pace going into first turn. At about 700 M came under pressure but maintained one pace before weakening closing stages.
Settled near rear 4-wide and 6Ls off pace. Still 5Ls off pace 400 M out. Finished well but failed to chase down the placegetters.
Pushed hard to settle in 3rd place 3 wide 2Ls off pace. At 400 M commenced challenge for the lead but found no extra one paced, tired near home.
Settled in rear racing 3-wide 8Ls down back straight. 5-wide rounding home turn. Came under pressure at 400 M found nothing. Only running on through beaten horses.
Soon took up running and travelled kindly until challenged entering straight. Surrendered lead at 300 M when racing tight and became unbalanced. Fought on again but was always held by winner.
Broke well and settled in 2nd place about 3/4L behind leader held its position. Commenced challenge from 400 M. Took the lead 300 M out and stayed on gamely to win readily.
Fractious in stall. Jumped well and worked forward but caught 3 or 4 wide without cover near midfield. Under pressure 500 M out, very one paced till the end. Dropped out final 100 M.
Soon settled in 4th place on rail 2-1/2Ls off pace and held the position until entering straight. Did not respond when under pressure maintained one pace to finish.
Worse than midfield on rail 5Ls off pace going into the 1st turn. Under pressure at top of home turn but maintain one pace throughout. Ran past a couple of beaten runners closing stages.
Midfield or worse racing 2 wide towards home turn when shifted out wider. Gradually became detached from 300 M, eased down.
Short of room upon exiting stalls and 3Ls off pace early on, driven along to be 2Ls off pace 400 M out, kept on fairly well but no chance with leading pair.
3Ls off pace 800 M out struggling 600 M out and never on terms thereafter.
Sat 2Ls to 3Ls off pace in main body of runners until outpaced and 4Ls down 200 M out, petered out.
Slowly away and short of room upon exiting, soon 5Ls off main body of field 800 M out, always under pressure and ran on past a couple of tired rivals closing stages.
Always driven along to lie up with pace, no extra from 500 M out.
Not break well and soon detached by 3Ls from main body of field, always struggling thereafter, ran on past a few stragglers late on.
Never worse than 2Ls off pace and at 200 M ridden to go 1L off leader and runner-up HOKKIEN ALL, kept on to lead 100 M out, pushed out.
Soon led but by never more than 1L, all out for line 200 M out but grabbed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Prominent until around 400 M from home, soon toiling and no chance.
Held 3rd position about 1L off pace until 400 M out before weakening rapidly and finishing in own time.
Upsides pacesetting HOKKIEN ALL from early on to 400 M marker though always tended hang out, soon no chance with leaders and one-paced to line.
Always hanging out about 2Ls to 3Ls off pace until 400 M out, 1.5Ls off lead when switched off fence and inside GOLFING PATNERS 150 M out, no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Less than 2Ls off pace, steadily grew more and more detached from 500 M out.
Settled 5Ls off pace racing 2 and 3-wide 1000 M out, not much closer turning in, very one-paced in straight.
Raced 4-wide 3Ls off pace from 1200 M out to final bend, very tame finish and beaten over 200 M out.
Held rails position about 3Ls off pace until entering straight when hard pressed to keep up, responded to pressure until 200 M out then weakened away.
Raced prominently but 3-wide about 1L off pace until home straight, kept on fairly well at same pace to line though no threat to front two.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls from 1200 M out through to home straight, picked up fairly well to go 3Ls off pace 200 M out, finished off at same pace.
Bounded on exiting and 9Ls or 10Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, further detached as main body straightened up, came home in own time.
Always at least 4-wide and without cover 4Ls to 5Ls off pace until home straight, quickened up well to go 1L off DANRIVA 200 M out, kept on well and well in control closing stages.
Bumped upon exiting and soon 5Ls off speed and on fence through to home straight, never looked like posing any threat in finish.
Raced 3-wide about 3Ls off pace until straight, found nothing off bridle and eased down a long way out.
Had run of the race in 4th place on fence 2Ls off pace through to home straight, picked up to lead 300 M out but grabbed by winner about 100 M from line.
Soon led by no more than half a length on fence until home straight, unable to quicken again at top of straight, dropped out. (Lame.)
Held up 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and out 2-wide 1000 M out, same distance adrift of pace but 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on evenly to post.
Always on the pace until straight racing 2-wide upsides pacesetting MY JOY, very brief lead over 300 M out but soon under pressure and no extra from 200 M out.
Went all right in 5th position between 2Ls and 3Ls off speed until 600 M when lost position, hard ridden on straightening, soon no chance.
About 5th 800 M and similar place into straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Never troubled leaders.
About midfield rounding home bend. Came with strong run from 250 M to challenge inside 150 M. Gained upper hand towards finish.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 3rd into straight. Moved up to lead 250 M out and look winner. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Towards rear till staying on a bit in straight. Found one-paced near finish.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Came under pressure 250 M and ran on well to threaten close home.
Jumped well and was always first two to straight. Gave ground steadily from 300 M.
Rushed up to be 1st or 2nd from 1000 M to straight. Unable to hold place and dropped out quickly from 300 M.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit closing stages.
Never far off to home bend. Found nothing on straightening.
Never near to challenge.
Mostly 2 to 3L 3rd to home bend. 4th into straight where he kept on till finding no extra inside 150 M.
Led field from 1000 M to 600 M. Re-gained advantage final turn. One-paced when headed 100 M.
Last to final turn. Very minor progress in straight.
In touch early. Dropped back to midfield or behind from 800 M. No progress.
Always prominent. Responded well soon after straightening but never able to catch the winner.
Never in contention.
Prominent. Unbalanced and crowded near 700 M. Midfield turning in. Soon weakened.
Slightly behind midfield. Made steady progress in straight.
In touch. Pushed along far side to be 3-wide 2nd 800 M. Took lead briefly 600 M to final turn. Failed to quicken final 100 M.
Better than midfield. Advanced to 3rd final turn. Found no extra close home.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside inside 250 M. Unable to threaten the leading pair.
Towards rear. Steady progress from 800 M. Improved to 3rd on the rail turning in. Ran on well 200 M to take command 100 M. Held on.
Never able to feature.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Chased leader to 400 M. Weakened.
Always thereabouts. Quickened under pressure to lead over 100 M out but lost advantage final strides.
Attemped to make all. Swamped final 150 M.
Always in last few.
Never a danger.
Well back. Swift progress far side. Dropped out from prominent position into straight.
Wide in midfield. Ran on well down straight to narrowly miss first two.
Settled better than midfield. Ran on to hold every chance but denied by bob of head.
Settled in midfield. No room early in straight. Quickened well final 200 M to just get up on line.
Towards rear. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent. Gave ground from home bend.
In touch. Steady progress from 1200 M to take slender advantage from 400 M. Failed to quicken when headed 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Unable quicken to challenge.
Behind midfield throughout.
Midfield early. Dropped to the last at 1200 M.
Led field to 1100 M. Remained prominent but was tightened for room from 200 M. Kept on when in clear 100 M.
Well there. Took lead from 1100 M to 400 M. Remained prominent until finding no extra final 200 M.
In touch early. Dropped back to midfield far side. Dropped out from 400 M.
Midfield or slightly behind throughout.
Prominent. Dropped back to 5th far side. Advanced to 3rd near 700 M. Ran on well in straight to assert authority 200 M. Held on well.
Midfield. Improved from 900 M to be 3rd 700 M. Kept on until one-paced close home.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside 250 M. Never nearer.
Never in contention.
Well there to 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Always prominent but unable to quicken to threaten.
Behind leaders to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily down straight.
Midfield throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide throughout. Around midfield to straight. Weakened.
In similar position throughtout. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Well back. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Took up running 1000 M bend. Carreered away final 200 M.
Midfield till weakened home bend.
Niggled to go forward, better than midfield 2 to 3Ls off pace 3-wide. Accelerated well after the 250 M but just failed to pick up the winner final stages.
Missed the start badly but steadily improved closer to midfield before making the turn. Wide and under pressure rounding home turn. Unable to produce extra in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, bumped another runner and became badly unbalanced, lost a lot of ground and got well back. Never a factor.
Outpaced early despite niggled along, staged along the fence 6 to 7Ls behind lead. Made up steady ground near the rail from 250 M but no match with the quinella pair.
Towards rear, under pressure from 500 M and hung out rounding the turn. Dropped out upon straightening.
Always pushing to maintain handy 3rd or 4th along the rail 2 or 3Ls behind lead. Ran on well after straightening to gain upper hand 150 M out. Kept on well to defy challenger final stages.
Steadily dropped to worse than midfield. Travelled 3 to 4 wide from a difficult gate. 6Ls off pace. Raced greenly throughout and made the turn very awkwardly. No improvement in straight.
Broke well, prominent 2-wide behind leaders. Unable to hold position from 600 M and was 3Ls off pace on straightening. One paced then weakened 100 M out.
Show good early speed and soon sat outside leader. Hung in early stages then made the turn awkwardly and shifted out. 2Ls off lead into straight, kept on one pace, tired final 100 M.
Settled at rear from a difficult gate 3-wide. Made up steady ground from 200 M.
Soon led. 2Ls clear into straight until headed near 150 M. Weakened gradually final 100 M.
Around midfield 2-wide 4Ls behind pace. Ran on a bit after 200 M without threatening.
Awkwardly away, settled 5Ls off pace on fence 1100 M out, 3Ls down and 2-wide 400 M out, every chance of filling a place 200 M out, no extra close home.
Always in rear about 7Ls off pace and out 2-wide, one-paced from 600 M out and never got any closer to pace.
Very keen racing 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, forced 3-wide turning for home, not come on and beaten over 200 M out.
Never on the track, raced 4-wide and 5-wide in places and 4Ls to 5Ls off pace, beaten upon straightening for home.
Sat 2-wide 2Ls off pace in 4th until straight, not quicken up and beaten 200 M out.
6Ls off pace early on but keen, 5Ls down turning in, quickened up along fence to go 3Ls down 200 M out, staying on before being steadied due to apparent shortage of room 20 M out.
Raced 3-wdie early on before settling 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down turning in and 200 M out, finished off well.
Soon led on fence but never more than 1L clear until home straight, hung out before being grabbed by winner about 150 out when started to hung in, no extra.
Settled 2Ls to 3Ls off pace on fence until home straight, not match pace of principals.
Not break well but soon racing outside pacesetting REWARD, hard ridden to keep up from 600 M out, swamped 200 M out.
Enjoyed run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight, picked up well to lead about 150 M, kept on. (Lame.)
Raced 3-wide 3Ls to 4Ls off pace until home straight, soon beaten.
Set pace until overhauled passing 200 M, gave ground steadily.
Soon prominent 3rd on rail travelling kindy. Gained split 200 M out and took charge passing 150 M, comfortably.

Steadily shifted across to be 3-wide towards rear going into 1st bend. Moved closer 700 M out, 3 1/2Ls down upon straightening, nowhere to go until into clear inside final 100 M, responded well but too late.
Niggled early to find midfield position on rail 3Ls off pace. Shifted out 2-wide swinging for home, took time to get motivated, ran on late and just missed 3rd placing.
4-wide close up into 1st turn, then 3-wide without cover in midfield from 1200 M. Closer order home turn to be 2Ls down into straight. Dropped away quickly from 250 M.
Never far away one off fence. Taken a bit wider before straightening and was 3Ls down 3-wide on straightening. Ran on steadily and looked booked for 2nd until pipped before the line.
Ridden early to secure position in midfield 3 1/2Ls off lead. Rider hard at work 400 M out when 4-wide and rear of midfield. Made only moderate ground final 200 M.
Jumped fairly, steadily taken back to rear. 4-wide 8Ls down entering straight, no show.

Held up at rear 7 or 8Ls off lead. Switched out rounding home bend, 4-wide 5Ls down turning in, made up good ground to be nearest at finish despite laying in and causing rider to stop riding and straighten.
Jumped well, steadily dropped towards rear of midfield 2 or 3 wide. Got within 4Ls off leader in midfield going into home bend when 5 wide, soon no extra and one-paced in straight.
Up there 5-wide into 1st turn, then shifted across to sit at leader's quarters 1100 M out. Run ended passing 200 M, dropped out.
Settled behind mid-division on rail, about 5Ls off pace. Not quicken much in home straight, only a little late headway.
Midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be in touch. One-paced in straight.
Made no show.
Slow into stride, soon last.
Midfield. Improved steadily to be 3rd or 4th from 900 M. Kept on well in straight to snatch 2nd near finish.
Lost ground at start, recovered ground far side to be midfield home bend. 4-wide 4th turning in, gaining 2nd 200 M out. Kept on but lost 2nd close home.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. One-paced throughout.
Towards rear. Very minor improvement in straight.
Midfield soon after start. No progress.
Led early, then raced 2nd before moving up to tackle leader final turn. Regained advantage 250 M, running on very well to win unchallenged.
Led field 1000 M out. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily to recover some ground from home turn.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group and never seen with a chance.
Always in last few.
Chased leader to straight. Soon weakened.
Settled within striking distance. Quickened well upon straightening to assert authority final 100 M.
In similar position and wide throughout. Kept on well.
Well back. Ran on steadily under pressure on rails to just claim 3rd.
Prominent to straight and gradually weakened.
Better than midfield in 5th to straight. Weakened steadily. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield throughout. Kept on well.
Held up just better than midfield. Kept on one pace without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Racing freely in rear when ran off the track rounding home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Attempted to make all. Swamped closing stages.
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th turning in. Kept on.
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened 200 M.
Rear. Recovered some ground final 400 M.
Towards rear. Moderate progress to midfield rounding home bend. No further improvement.
Prominent early, dropped back gradually to the rear group. Widest turning in, making up some ground until one-paced closing stages.
In touch to final turn. Dropped out.
In touch. Moved up to be 2nd 1000 M. Kept on but was weakened closing stages. (Saddle shifted.)
Took lead approaching 1200 M. Unable to match speed with winner when headed 200 M.
Left awkwardly, last to home turn. Crept closer order turning in. Made no show in straight.
Settled 3rd. Responded well after turning in to take command passing 200 M. Won going away.
Better than midfield. Dropped back slightly to midfield 1000 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Behind midfield. Last from 400 M.
Towards rear. Last few turning in. Steadied 250 M. Recovered a little ground thereafter.
Towards rear throughout.
Led to straight. Dropped out.
Well back. Made moderate progress in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Never nearer.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to hit front inside 200 M and hung on gamely to the line.
Always prominent. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to peg back winner.
Tracked leader. Hit front into straight but unable to sustain effort and overhauled final stages.
Never better than midfield.
Raced wide just better than midfield. Gained 4th shortly after straightening but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Behind midfield. Made steady headway down straight to gain 5th place close to home.
Jumped awkwardly but soon settled well 2-wide 4th and 5th until entering straight. Ran on, just caught final strides to miss 2nd.
Soon led. Under pressure and headed just before straightening. Weakened steadily 300 M out.
Midfield or better. In the early stages raced ungenerously and got its head up. Unable to keep up rounding the home bend, dropped out gradually thereafter.
Travelled kindly in midfield or worse. Wide rounding the bend. Made up good finish from 250 M to be closest at finish.
Prominent until 1000 M. Steadily dropped to midfield. Further dropped out from the 300 M.

Missed the start slightly, then settled towards rear. Crept closer to midfield rounding the bend but still 5 to 6 Ls off lead entering the straight. Made up good ground after cleared from 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Wide rounding the home bend. Ran past a few beaten runners in straight.
Ridden hard but no response from the start. Always a long way back detached from the field.
Driven to midfield. 3-wide rounding the bend. Ran on well in straight but failed to catch the winner.
Prominent until straightening. Weakened steadily thereafter.

Niggled early to maintain better than midfield. Gradually improved along the back straight to sit outside leader from 800 M. Took up running before straightening and kept on to the line to fend off late challengers.
On jumping bounded in the air, then worse than midfield. Dropped to the back from the 700 M. Never a factor thereafter.
Niggled early to maintain a rail run in midfield. Shifted out for running near the 800 M and then crept closer rounding the bend. Ran on in the straight until no extra final 150 M out.
Settled at back. Commenced running from the 600 M. Made up a little ground halfway up the straight until one-paced final 100 M.
Raced 3-wide about 6Ls off pace until turning for home, on terms with winner 3Ls off lead 200 M out, kept on at same pace to line.
Soon led, around 2Ls clear and on fence 1000 M out, still 2L clear and going well 200 M out, just grabbed by winner on line.
Raced 4Ls to 5Ls off lead on fence, niggled along to keep up 600 M out, beaten at top of straight.
2-wide about 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, similarly positioned when outpaced 400 M out, stayed on at same pace.
2-wide and at least 10Ls off pace throughout.
Not break well, raced on fence 7Ls to 8Ls off pace until home straight when hard ridden, no response.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, improved to go 3Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide and about 8Ls off pace until home straight, moderate late headway through some beaten rivals close home.
Not break well, held up in rear on fence about 10Ls off pace, never latched on to main body of field.
Settled in 2nd place about 2Ls off pace, one-paced in straight and unable to reel in pacesetting GREEN CENTURY, lost 2nd place 100 M out.
On fence and about 6Ls off pace until home straight when already hard ridden, no impression.
Settled in 4th place racing 2-wide about 4Ls off speed early on, still 3Ls adrift 200 M out, not follow through.
Held 3rd place on rails about 3Ls off pace until home straight when quickly came under pressure, beaten over 200 M out.
At least 8Ls off pace racing 2-wide through to home straight, picked up well to go 3Ls down 200 M out, kept finding to lead on line.
Dipped on exiting, 3-wide in mid-division till straightening, dropped away tamely from 400 M.
Ridden and was well there early, then remained 3Ls behind lead on fence in mid-division. Stayed on quite well, passing beaten runners in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, held up mostly 3rd from rear near rail. Minimal headway near 200 M, soon no extra.
At rear and travelled greenly throughout, never in the race.
Bit keen 4-wide just behind midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Behind midfield, failed to maintain position passing 800 M, last into straight and stayed there.

Best away and led briefly out wide. 1 1/2Ls behind leader 1000 M out, still 3-wide without cover. At leaders girth latter part of home bend, unable to keep up on straightening, swamped near 200 M when hanging in.
Ridden along a bit after jump then dropped steadily to tail 5th last swinging into straight, made up some steady ground down centre of straight from 250 M, no extra near finish.
Jumped fairly, soon pulled to the front 1000 M out, pinched rail near the 800 M. Asked to lengthen passing 300 M, quickly put plenty of daylight between itself and the field, very easily.
Niggled a bit early to stay prominent 3rd or 4th. Followed leader into straight and stayed on quite well before being passed by 2nd and 3rd placegetters inside final 200 M.

In front of midfield early, then settled 2 1/2Ls off pace 800 M out, wide without cover along back straight. Under pressure inside 400 M and ran on steadily to claim 2nd 100 M out though absolutely no threat to winner.
Jumped awkwardly, 2-wide midfield to 200 M when hanging out, 3rd last entering straight, made no impression.
Settled 5Ls off lead rear of midfield on rail. Switched 4-wide on straightening and made gradual ground final 200 M to take 3rd closing stages.
Broke only fairly, quickly improved to sit behind leader on rail 1000 M out. Hung in rounding home turn, given reminders before straightening, one paced before fading away from 200 M.
Always prominent racing 2-wide less than 1L off pace, led 300 M out to about 100 M out when grabbed by leading pair and no extra.
Sat 3-wide about 4Ls to 5Ls off pace until home straight, quickened up to go within 1L of lead 200 M out, hit front 100 M out, drew nicely clear.
Dropped in 2L to 3Ls off 2-wide in 5th place until home straight, outpaced about 350 M out but rallied to keep on again close home.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace through to home straight when under pressure, couldn't pick up leading group by 200 M and soon beaten.
Held up in rear 7Ls off pace 2 and 3-wide 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide turning for home, quickened up only fairly and never looked like catching main players.
Led by about 1L until home straight, passed by AUCASH 300 M out but kept on well to line.
Not break well though soon 4Ls off pace on fence and travelling well turning for home, 1L off lead 200 M out, kept on well but found winner too strong.
Missed the break losing about 3Ls but soon recovered racing on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace, same position turning in but never competitive in straight.
Raced 3 and 4-wide down back straight and hard ridden round final bend, beaten over 200 M out.
In midfield racing 3Ls off pace out 2-wide, always niggled along from 800 M out, one-paced in straight.
Had run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th position, all out when still in same position 200 M out, stayed on at same pace.
Settled in rear 6Ls off pace racing 2-wide down back straight, short of room about 300 M out, ran on fairly well late on to be nearest at finish.
On fence 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, niggled along 700 M out, ridden turning for home, no impression.
Held rails position 2Ls to 3Ls off pace down back straight, only 1L down on fence turning for home, not come on.
Took keen hold racing 2-wide 3Ls off lead in midfield through to home stretch, showed no acceleration.
Bunched in midfield racing 2-wide 4Ls off pace until home straight, not pick up in straight and beaten over 200 M.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, kept on fairly well without ever looking like running the frame.
Settled 2-wide and 6Ls off speed near rear early, 5Ls down and travelling well turning in, non-threatening when bumped slightly when short of room 200 M out.
Took over lead 1100 M out, crossed to fence by 900 M out when 2Ls clear, overhauled by winner 300 M out, no extra.
Settled 3-wide 3Ls off pace down back straight, niggled 500 M out, 2Ls down turning for home and under strong pressure, found nothing and eased down close home.
Prominent early on racing 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, same place turning for home, dropped out.
Raced 4-wide 5Ls to 6Ls off lead before entering home straight wide, finished off strongly down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Never on the track racing 5-wide early on and 4-wide generally 4Ls to 5Ls off speed, widest turning for home, kept on at same pace.
Held up in rear 8Ls off pace on fence early on, 6Ls off pace entering home straight but held up for a run over 200 M out, well beaten.
Soon led but ceded advantage to CROCKER 1100 M out and sat 2Ls off pace, drew closer rounding home turn to lead again on bridle 300 M out, pushed out, comfortably.
Raced 3Ls off pace but always 4-wide until home straight, no impression thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to straight where he made up some ground inside final 200 M.
Well there to straight where he failed to hold place.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Was headed 200 M out and faded steadily.
About 7th or 8th into straight. Kept on steadily under pressure final 300 M.
In rear to straight where he stayed on quite well. Did not find much room near finish.
Was under pressure in rear coming into straight. Kept on steadily final 200 M.
In touch to straight where he ran on to lead approaching 200 M. Was soon under strong challenge and lost advantage near finish.
Mostly midfield before dropping out quickly on straightening. (Finished lame.)
Tracked leader from 1400 M to home turn. Gave ground on straightening and soon beaten.
Among rear group to straight where he ran on a bit.
Never on terms.
Never far off to straight where he ran on well to challenge closing stages. Gained upper hand final strides.
In touch before dropping to 8th or 9th 1200 M and remained in similar position into straight. Plugged on under pressure closing stages.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Kept on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Rear, was 10th turning in. Made up good ground while hanging in in straight.
Better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Jumped awkwardly, never a factor.
Better than midfield. Dropped out from 300 M.
Midfield or better. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always there. Improved to 2nd 200 M until finding no extra closing stages.
Led field to 800 M. Held 2nd until failing to hold place 250 M.
Prominent early, soon dropped to midfield. Made no show soon after straightening.
Prominent. Took lead 800 M. Just held off late challenges.
Towards rear throughout.
Last to final turn. Recovered some ground along rail in straight.
Settled just better than midfield. Made up late ground to claim 2nd final strides.
Midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Missed the start badly. Always in last few.
Always towards rear.
Prominent far side. Midfield home bend. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Always towards rear.
Soon took up running from difficult draw. Held advantage under pressure closing stages.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Jumped fairly then quickly improved to 3rd behind leaders. No extra closing stages.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Chased leaders. Swamped close home.
Led early, was then prominent until dropping back steadily from 400 M.
Moved up from outside to be 2nd near 900 M. Weakened 250 M.
Towards rear. Ran on 300 M.
Rear. Last and was hanging out turning in. Made up some ground from outside final 200 M.
Was 3rd early, soon dropped back to midfield or behind. Made no show in straight. (Finished distressed.)
Last. Moderate progress early straight. Held up and found no room 200 M. No improvement.
Soon midfield. Gradual progress early straight to 4th 200 M. One-paced. (Bled.)
Midfield and behind. Dropped to 2nd last turning in. Made no show.
Led field soon after start. Kept on when headed 250 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Soon found no extra.
Behind midfield. Progressed to 6th final turn. Continued to make ground to be 2nd 150 M. Unable to threaten the winner.
Slightly behind midfield. Moved up gradually to be 5th home bend. Ran on well in straight to take command 250 M out.
Rear. Ran past beaten horses early in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Well there to straight. Weakened closing stages.
Midfield most of way with some short-lived effort early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled at the back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Led to middle of home bend. Dropped out.
Better than midfield early stages. Gave ground from halfway. (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield into straight. Ran on steadily under pressure to gain 4th closing stages.
Tracked leader. Led into straight. Hung on gamely.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Settled at the back. Saved ground on rails turning in. Sustained progress from midfield into straight to reach 3rd without threatening.
Behind midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled better than midfield. Quickened to challenge upon straightening holding some chance but staved off by winner close to home.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Jumped well, tracked leader(winner). Put in strong challenge from 250 M but unable to catch winner. (Rider dropped whip 200 M out.)
Soon at the back. Last into straight. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Soon towards rear. Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield, not settled due to slow pace. Made up little ground late.
Midfield and wide without cover, difficult to settle due to slow pace in early and middle stages. Weakened from 300 M.
Broke well and made all. Held off challenge by 2nd runner throughout the straight.
Mainly midfield. Steadied near the 800 M. Kept on one pace in the straight.
Well there on rails, in the early and middle stages due to slow pace. Unable to get into clear from straightening till 200 M. Ran on well. (Rider dropped off side rein 100 M out.)
Worse than midfield. Shifted out for running at 400 M but only kept on one pace.
Steadied after the start, worse than midfield. Held up for running near the 300 M. Made up some late ground.
Settled on fence about 3Ls off pace through to home straight, challenging when impeded 300 M out, recovered and ran on well.
Very keen and difficult to settle, bumped about 1300 M out and sent 3-wide 2Ls to 3Ls off pace, still pulling turning for home, beaten when brushed by winner over 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-wide without cover 2Ls off pace 1400 M out, 1L down and 2-wide from 800 M to home straight and brief lead over 300 M out, shifted out under pressure and not come on.
Handily placed in midfield racing 2-wide 4Ls off pace, closer turning for home, driven through narrow gap 250 M out, led 100 M out, ran on.
Hampered 1300 M out and forced to race 3-wide about 4Ls off pace down back straight, hard ridden to go 1/2L off pace 200 M out, no extra final stages.
Led very early on before settled to race 2Ls off speed on fence, attempted to challenge inside 300 M out when severely checked by CELEBRATION, not recover.
Rear early on but checked and sent 4-wide, improved position from 1200 M out to lead 800 M out racing 3-wide, still on terms turning in but soon faded.
Raced keenly and badly hampered 1300 M out and forced to race 3-wide and 6Ls off pace, turned for home racing widest of all (6-wide), soon no chance.
Settled 4Ls to 5Ls off pace down back straight, closer turning in and came inside to find running room, not match pace of principals.
Prominent racing 2-wide 2Ls off pace down back straight, closer turning for home and a neck off pace with every chance 200 M out, one-paced latter stages.
Checked early on and forced to race 3-wide and 3Ls off pace, 4-wide round final bend, not quicken up in straight.
Missed start losing about 3Ls but soon settled on fence about 6Ls off pace, ridden to take closer order turning for home, no impression in straight.
Always towards rear about 5Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight when made brief effort to draw closer to pace, well beaten 200 M out.
Led from 1400 M out by a neck, headed 800 M out, rallied again in home straight to lead by a neck with 200 M to race, no match for leading players final 100 M.
Began awkwardly and lost a lot of ground, recovered to be 6Ls off lead towards rear 2-wide 1200 M out. Steady headway from 300 M before finding no more concluding stages.
Settled 3Ls off pace in midfield with cover. Switched out into clear 300 M out, kicked well clear passing 200 M to score impressively.
Handy 4th on rail, became 3rd 600 M out, kept on same pace under pressure in home straight, no extra close home.
Midfield on fence early then steadily dropped towards rear 1100 M out. Crept closer rounding home bend, brushed rail near 500 M, stayed on fairly having to steady and shift out after the 200 M.
Pushed forward to secure position behind leaders. Commenced to struggle after straightening, soon dropped away steadily.
Pressed on along fence to make running, never more than 1L clear. Headed near 300 M. Kept on and looked like hanging on for a minor placing until swamped closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, a bit keen travelling 4-wide without cover towards rear. Made no impression in home straight.
Driven but failed to muster early pace, 3-wide 5Ls off pace towards rear, not come on in home stretch.
Quickest away, brief lead out wide before shifting across to track leader 2-wide 1000 M out. Hit front momentarily near 300 M but quickly passed by winner, run ended from 200 M and dropped away.
Held up at tail from widest draw, never less than 4-wide. Switched widest on straightening, made up some ground from 300 M, one paced final bit. (Bled and lame.)
Settled 2-wide 2 1/2Ls off pace better than midfield. 3-wide into straight, unable to keep up, dropped out quickly from 250 M.
Ridden but outpaced at rear. On rail 6Ls down entering straight, shifted out towards centre of track and made up some ground until no extra concluding stages.
From difficult gate steadily dropped to rear travelling 4 or 5 wide. 2nd last 8Ls down into straight, made steady ground from 300 M to claim a distant 2nd closing stages.
Wide behind front runners early, then eased to midfield 3-wide 1200 M out. Under pressure 450 M out, minimal headway close home.
Midfield or better. Was hampered first time passing winning post. Advanced to 4th final turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Shifted to the rail in rear soon after start. Improved slightly to just behind midfield far side. One-paced.
In touch to final turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Never a factor.
Midfield or slightly behind. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Bounded at start and was in midfield. Shifted to the rail to take lead 1300 M and caused interference. Held on until headed inside 250 M.
Midfield or better. Was moving up from 1st turn to be prominent far side. Ran on from 2Ls 3rd early straight to gain narrow victory close home.
Led early. Became 2nd 1300 M where being checked. Kept on well to re-gain advantage 250 M. Was caught narrowly close home.
Midfield. Checked passing winning post the first time. Unable to recover.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield when checked passing winning post first time. Never able to recover.
Towards rear and hung out throughout.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Better than midfield to straight, then faded.
Settled behind midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. No clear passage the length of straight.
Settled within striking distance. Quickened well upon straightening to gain upper hand closing stages.
Well there. Gained slender advantage turning in. Headed closing stages.
Prominent early. Dropped to midfield halfway out. One-paced.
Midfield most of way before weakened home bend.
Midfield when awkward and lost position 1200 M out. Made up late ground in straight.
Wide throughout. Towards rear before swift progress far side. Prominent into straight but gradually faded.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Soon recovered to midfield but raced keenly and lost position early in back straight. Kept on well final stages.
Led until joined rounding home bend. Narrowly headed into straight and weakened passing 200 M.
Mainly better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Left awkwardly, moved up to be prominent passing 1200 M. Weakened in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Ran on from 7th early straight to win marginally.
Towards rear. Improved a bit rounding home bend. Widest turning in. Made no show in straight.
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead most time until final 100 M where he kept on but without quickening.
Moved to the rail from widest draw and was last to final turn. No clear run early straight when improving. Made up good ground when in clear.
Always there, 2Ls 3rd final turn. Kept on to hold some chance passing 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Midfield early. Dropped to the rear group far side. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on well along rail to just miss narrowly.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Prominent to 1200 M where he dropped to midfield. Kept on a bit early straight but soon found no extra.
Behind midfield. Unable to make progress in straight.
Well there. Took lead very briefly far side. Weakened out of contention from 2nd final turn.
Settled just better than midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in holding some chance but soon weakened.
Settled in prominent position. Driven to challenge upon straightening but unable to draw level.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Well back. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Never in the hunt.
Around midfield throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Settled just better than midfield. Swung wide into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight for remote 4th.
Behind midfield to straight. Never nearer.
Made all. Hung on well to resist strong late challenges.
Always in last few.
Broke best, but then made the first turn awkwardly and lost its position to midfield. Weakened gradually from 250 M.
Broke fairly, then pushed along to maintain a rail running and prominent. Unable to produce extra in straight. Kept on same pace to the line.
At back. Second last near the rails into straight. Made up good ground through field in straight to grab 2nd final stages.
On jumping was checked and dropped towards rear. Made little late impression near the rails.
Pushed along early from a bad gate and soon tracked leader. Kept on one pace in straight until no extra final 50 M.
About midfield. Wide entering straight to commence running. Kept on without threatening.
Worse than midfield. No extra in straight.
Well there. 3-wide into straight, kept on until no extra passing 200 M. Steadily weakened.
Ridden to go forward from difficult gate. Led field from 1000 M. Responded well when asked to kick away 200 M out. Won comfortably.
Steadily dropped towards rear. Shifted to outside to commence running after straightening. Responded well 200 M out to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Wide along the back straight. Faded after straightening.
Broke well, then settled in worse than midfield. Shifted to the outside after straightening, did not quicken.
Away well and 3-wide 4Ls off speed 800 M out, gradually lost position and at least 6Ls down on straightening, not recover.
About 4-wide early on and 3Ls off pace, ridden along to keep up over 600 M out, 5Ls down and still wide turning in, weakened away.
Outpaced early and racing 2-wide 4Ls off pace 800 M out with awkward head carriage, always under pressure from then on and never any closer.
Never on terms, never closer than 6Ls off pace.
Slowest into stride, recovered to be 3Ls off speed 800 M out, 4Ls down turning for home and 200 M out, quietly guided through latter stages.
On fence in 2nd 1L off pace through to home straight, soon under pressure and one-paced final 300 M.
Outpaced early on fence 6Ls off pace, back on bridle 600 M out, never threatened but kept on fairly closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls to 3Ls off pace from early on through to home straight, same margin 200 M out, drew closer nearer finish.
Raced 3-wide 1L off pace early on but hung out on bends, 3-wide and still hanging 3Ls off pace turning in, 4Ls down turning in, ran on well close home.
Away well and raced 3-wide 1L off pace, all out and 2Ls down off home turn to 200 M out, kept on same pace, grabbed for 2nd close home.
Broke well and led racing 2-wide 1L clear down back straight, skipped 2Ls clear off home turn and held same margin 200 M out, ran on well.
Held rails position 2Ls to 3Ls off pace from back straight to 200 M out, made some progress final stages.
Jumped well, caught wide without cover around mid-division. Did not quicken in the straight.
Ridden in midfield early, gradually dropped towards rear passing Rock to be 6Ls off lead, always on rail. Made up some ground in home straight, one-paced final 150 M.
Began quite well from difficult draw, then dropped steadily to rear closer to fence. Unable to keep up and became detached from main bunch 600 M out.
Soon 2-wide behind leaders, kept on same pace in straight, crowded near the line and was steadied.

Away smartly and quickly made running. Challenged and surrendered lead 700 M out, still travelling nicely on fence. Head and head with leader from straightening before prevailing final stages, won well.
Ridden early to be handy 3rd then 4th, unable to hold position 500 M out and dropped to 4Ls behind pace, stayed there.
Began only fairly, passed forward to lead 2 or 3 wide 700 M out, holding not more than 1L's advantage. Joined swinging into straight. Kept on well though zig-zagging a bit, found winner too strong.
Driven but only managed position forward of midfield on rail about 3Ls off pace. Shifted out 3-wide rounding home bend, one-paced before minor progress late.
Missed the start, about 4 to 6Ls off lead towards rear. Responded well under pressure after straightening though hanging in, shifted out abruptly near winning post when doing best work.
Slowly away and tailed off throughout, more than 20Ls adrift from the 600 M.
Close up out wide early, steadily dropped to midfield 2-wide 4 or 5Ls off pace 800 M out. Not come on in home straight.
Soon held up on fence at rear, became 7Ls off lead 700 M out. Made no show in straight, inconvenienced concluding stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led very early on before sitting 2Ls off pace on fence, travelled well turning in and disappointed for running on fence about 280 M out, chance soon gone, came home in own time.
Always caught 3-wide 1L to 2Ls off pace to home straight, effort 300 M out but no match for winner's pace, all out to hang on for 2nd.
Prominent 1L off speed early on racing 4-wide, under pressure to keep up turning for home but still in contention 200 M out, quickly weakened away.
Not best away, raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace early on and similarly placed turning for home, picked up well in straight and 2.5Ls off pace 200 M out, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace from back straight to home straight when turned in racing 5-wide, kept on very well to be nearest at finish.
Led from 800 M out on fence but never clear by more than 1L, under pressure entering straight and overhauled 250 M out, dropped away.
Not break well, on fence 6Ls off pace through to home straight, 3Ls down and short of room 200 M out when lost a stride momentarily, ran on again.
Sat just off leading bunch about 4Ls off pace 800 M out, always scrubbed along to lie up and still 4Ls down turning in, finished off well to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 4-wide 2Ls off pace early on, 3Ls down turning for home, quickened up well to lead 200 M out, kept on strongly.
Joined CONJURING in lead racing 2-wide, lost ground to go 1L down and under pressure on home turn, beaten 250 M out.
Never on terms and always under pressure and at least 7Ls off pace.
Settled just 2Ls to 3Ls off speed on fence through to home straight, shifted out to challenge and battled on well but never looked like getting to leading pair.
Always well there. Came to challenge early in straight. Led 150 M and soon went clear.
Worse than midfield stable bend. Commenced move passing the Rock and was 3rd home turn. One-paced under pressure closing stages.
Never on terms.
5th into back straight and was 3rd or 4th on straightening. Unable quicken to challenge.
Was prominent before failing to hold place from 500 M. Dropped out quickly on straightening.
Never a factor.
Never better than mid-division.
In rear to straight. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Soon took up running and led field to 150 M when headed. Found no extra towards finish.
Never far off to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Towards rear before improving approaching home bend. Midfield into straight where he ran on quite well inside final 200 M to claim 2nd near finish.
Well there before settling in midfield stable bend. Improved towards leaders after the Rock and was steadied 500 M. Made no show thereafter.
Always there. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear. Very minor advancement in straight.
Behind midfield. Made slight progress rounding home bend. Faded in straight. Wide without cover throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, never a factor.
Mainly 4th to final turn. Ran on steadily to assert authority final 100 M.
Midfield. Widest turning in. Moderate progress in straight.
Better than midfield. Ran on from 5th early straight to snatch 2nd near finish.
Towards rear throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield.
Held 2nd until fading out of contention in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to take the lead. Held 2Ls advantage turning in. Headed 100 M and lost 2nd final strides.
Rear. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Broke well. Settled in close up position. Ran on steadily down straight to miss narrowly.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Hampered home turn. Kept on same pace.
Led early stages. Headed at Rock. One-paced in straight.
Settled in prominent position. Quickened well into straight and led inside 200 M. Hung on well under pressure.
Wide around midfield. Made steady headway down straight despite inconvenienced final 200 M.
Wide throughout. Broke well but soon in midfield. Improved to lead going up Rock and held advantage until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Rear till some late progress closing stages.
Behind midfield. Hampered turning in. Never recovered.
Well back. Finished race off strongly.
Midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground from outside in straight.
Midfield. Made some progress from 1200 M to be in touch far side. Responded well final turn to hit front very briefly 200 M. Kept on.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit far side. Weakened rounding the home bend.
In touch. Pushed along to take lead briefly from 1000 M. Remained prominent until fading out of contention in straight.
Mostly in the front before headed 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Behind midfield on the rail. Advanced to 4th final turn. Ran on well to take lead passing 200 M. Won readily.
Bounded in the air at start, remained in midfield or slightly behind throughout.
Prominent to early straight. Soon weakened.
Well there before dropping to midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Left awkwardly, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Near rear. Improved to midfield on inside turning in. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
Chased leader throughout. Unable to quicken to draw level.
Soon picked up 3rd position. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Lost considerable ground at start. Tailed off most of way. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never in the race.
Broke well. Settled for 5th and wide. Found nothing in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to get up on line.
Ridden early. Prominent to straight then gradually faded.
Settled in rear. Saved ground on inside turning in. Produced good impression in straight.
Soon led and attempted to make all. Caught in the shadows of the past.
Severely checked at start. Never featured.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Always towards rear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon took up running and travelled well in front. Headed after the 200 M but kept on quite well for second.
Sat outside leader under pressure before straightening. Weakened steadily after 200 M.
Travelled in 4th 2-wide 2.5Ls behind pace. Under pressure rounding the home bend. plugged on in straight.

Jumped fairly, then niggled to race handily on rails 1-2Ls behind leader. Shifted out from rail to tackle leader upon straightening. Ran on well to grab victory final 200 M. (Rider dropped whip after 200 M.)
Towards rear, raced 4-5Ls 2 wide off lead. Ridden hard to maintain its position from 600 M. Unable to produce extra in straight.
Ridden early to maintain position on rails, raced 3Ls off pace. One paced in straight.

Restrained to rear. Raced 5-6Ls behind lead on rails shifted out to commence run before straightening when still in last position. Made up steady ground. (Rider momentarily dropped near side rein after 200 M.)
Held up in midfield about 6Ls off pace and on fence through to home straight when short of room, ran on well to be nearest at finish once in the clear final 200 M.
Awkwardly away but soon racing 2-wide about 5Ls off pace, steadily drew closer racing 3-wide round final bend, kept on fairly in straight and never a threat to principals.
Ridden from gates to hold rails position in front, clear by only 1/2L before being passed by I WIN 700 M out, quickly under pressure and retreated.
In rear racing 3-wide and 8Ls off pace early on, ridden along 800 M out, moderate late headway through beaten horses.
Racing 3-wide 5Ls off pace when checked 1000 M out by MY DELIGHT, 6Ls down and 2-wide turning in, ran on quite well to be nearest at finish.
Always travelling well on fence 3Ls to 4Ls off pace until home straight when came off rail to challenge, still at least 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly to lead close home.
Raced 4-wide early on 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and on terms 800 M out, hard ridden when 3-wide and 3Ls off pace on straightening, kept on at same pace.
Not best away but soon racing keenly in mid-division 3Ls to 4Ls off pace until home straight when weakened right out.
3-wide and 4Ls off pace very keen early stages when became unbalanced, steadily lost touch from 800 M out.
Just 1L off lead racing 3-wide 1200 M out, lost position and 3-wide 4Ls off pace 800 M out, became further detached.

3-wide 2Ls to 3Ls off pace 1000 M out running free, sent on racing 4-wide to lead 700 M out, at least 2Ls clear turning in and 200 M out, very tired and no extra closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sat 2-wide about 1/2L off pace early on, niggled along to keep up I WIN 700 M out, 2Ls adrift in 2nd place until 200 M out, kept on at same pace and no chance with winner's late rush.
Jumped relatively well and soon pulled to the front, shifting in to a 2-wide position 900 M out. From 650 M held close 2nd until home straight when unable to produce extra and away from 200 M.
From widest gate was ridden back towards rear racing 3-4 wide throughout. Found nothing in home straight.
Pushed from wide gate but unable to final lead. Caught wide racing 2Ls off speed. Shifted in to go around home turn 2-wide 4th. Begin to tire final 250 M.
Missed start slightly & was further inconvenienced just after the start. Travelled 2nd last outside CARRY THE NEWS until fell to last position in home turn, shifting in to fence. Never on terms.
Broke well travelling behind speed. Shifted across to rails 650 M out in 3rd off pace. Moved closer home bend, running strongly in straight and hit front 200 M out, comfortably.
Jumped well and found rails position just inside leader COMPANION. Took over lead 650 M out, headed near 200 M and still with place prospects but tired close home. (Bled.)
Began well. Gradually slipped back to midfield position racing 3-4 wide in back straight and around home turn. Ran on a bit down centre of track without threatening.
A little slow to begin and raced behind midfield near rails. Entered straight 3-wide still behind midfield and raced strongly through rest of field to finish 3rd.

Reared just before the start and jumped very awkwardly. Raced greenly not too far from rails last position, and then second last around home turn. Weaved around runners and made up steady ground in straight.
Led briefly before entering back straight when gradually dropped to race 2-3 wide in midfield, then worse than midfield and 3-wide in home turn. Never in contention in straight.
A little slow into stride but made ground to race midfield on fence 900 M out. Similarly place entering straight and finished off one-paced.
Shifted out abruptly on jumping but otherwise began well. Dropped back to midfield in 5th or 6th position 2-3 wide. Ran on well in straight, winner too good, for distant 2nd.
Not break well and 10Ls detached from main body of field passing stands for first time, soon tailed off.
Raced 3-wide round first bend on pace, soon settled 1L to 2Ls off lead until home straight, failed to go with winner straight and weakened from 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls to 5Ls off pace early on, soon improved to go 3rd 2Ls off pace racing 2-wide 600 M out, under pressure turning for home not come on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Restrained 5Ls off speed and 3-wide 1200 M out, improved racing 4-wide to go 3Ls off pace 500 M out, turned for home racing 4-wide, no extra.
Shadowed winner in lead early on racing 2-wide but gradually lost position from 1000 M onwards.
Dropped in midfield 2-wide and 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to Rock, forced wider and under pressure on final bend, well beaten 300 M out.
Settled on fence 5Ls off pace through to final bend when crept closer, kept on fairly well latter stages to just miss out on 3rd.
Broke very well and led on fence though never more than 2Ls clear, travelled well entering home straight and only driven out final 200 M for comfortable win.
Always racing one from rear about 8Ls off pace until straight, moderate late headway through beaten runners.
Held rails position about 3Ls off pace down back straight, closer and travelled well turning for home, threatened to pick off winner 200 M out but not follow through final stages.
2-wide in 5th place 3Ls off pace from 1200 M out to about 700 M out when hard ridden, responded to pressure to stay on at same pace past beaten rivals in straight.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground steadily to be 3rd around 400 M. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
In touch early. Dropped back to be among the rear group halfway. No significant progress.
Behind midfield. Moderate progress final 400 M.
Checked soon after start, last to 200 M. Very minor progress.
Left awkwardly, behind midfield throughout.
Always in the leading pair. Kept on to gain upper hand close home.
Better than midfield. Weakened steadily final 400 M.
Made no show.
Disputed for the lead most of his trip. Was beaten narrowly close home.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace to the line.
Towards rear early, soon raced in midfield. Picked up gradually to be 4th 350 M. One-paced thereafter.
In touch. Dropped to midfield or behind course proper. Maintained similar position final 400 M.
Midfield. Found no extra inside 400 M.
Never able to feature.
Prominent. Kept on for remote 3rd.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled behind midfield. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well and led till headed over 200 M out. Winner too good.
Never better than midfield. Made some late impression closing stages.
Jumped slowly. Better than midfield onto course proper. No extra.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to 200 M. Faded.
Never featured.
Never in contention.
Better than midfield to halfway. Faded.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Always there. Led over 200 M. Won in a canter.
Held 3rd to straight. Ran on steadily to take lead final 100 M. Held on.
Better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to take the lead. Set pace far side, still holding 1L advantage turning in. Just held on for 3rd after being headed 100 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground early straight but was then one-paced.
Always there. Checked 300 M. Kept on. (Lame.)
Held 2nd to 200 M. Lost a minor placing final strides.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside inside 200 M.
Always at the rear.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Made ground gradually from 4-wide 6th 300 M. Just failed to catch the winner.
Left awkwardly, towards rear. Slightly improved to 9th near 1600 M. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Made some progress early straight. Found no clear passage 200 M. Kept on.
Settled in first few. Quickened to challenge upon straightening but failed to peg back winner.
Sluggish at start. Soon picked up to rear of field. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield. Faded in straight.
Raced wide amongst leaders far side. Kept on till lost touch close to finish.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled final stages.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent. Gave ground inside 200 M.
Midfield. Produced some late headway closing stages.
Behind midfield. Weakened in straight.
Behind midfield. Quickened well to take lead close home.
Well back. Produced late impression closing stages.
Never nearer.
Settled just better than midfield. Behind runners early in straight. Loomed up on rails to challenge, holding every chance. Just denied.
Better than midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, then steadily improved to midfield. Hung out in the middle stages. Ran on in straight, just missed a placing narrowly. (Blood in windpipe.)
Ridden early to go forward, prominent. Unable to quicken after straightening. Checked near the 300 M and dropped out gradually.
Jumped awkwardly, worse than midfield along the rails. Made up little ground after into clear 250 M out.
Raced 3-wide better than midfield. Closer order rounding the home bend but 4-wide into straight. Ran on steadily in straight, just missed a second narrowly. (Hung in about 300 M.)
Worse than midfield. Steadied and shifted out when disappointed for running near the 400 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Pushed hard to go forward, led field from 1200 M until headed upon straightening. Plugged on until weakened steadily passing 200 M.
Jumped clearly, raced handy 4th along the fence. Ran on steadily down straight but never likely to get close to winner.

Travelled kindly on the fence around midfield. Moved away from the rails after straightening to commence running, was inconvenienced near the 300 M. Made up little late ground but not quite enough room final 50 M.
Soon at back. Never a factor.
Broke well, soon tracked leader. Cruised up to take lead upon straightening, dashed away 250 M out for an easy victory.
Broke best, then settled worse than midfield. Wide rounding the home turn. Some headway on the outer after straightening but no extra final 150 M.
Missed the start, got back towards rear on the rails. Made some ground after straightening until final 200 M when avoiding a weakening runner. Unable to challenge thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
About midfield, pulled hard in the early and middle stages. Crept closer on the home turn. Plugged on until weakened steadily passing 200 M.
Tardy start, towards rear. Wide rounding the home bend. Never a threat.
Slowest away and took 1st bend racing 6-wide, 3-wide 1000 M out about 3Ls off speed, driven along entering straight and not come on when required.
2nd slowest away, very keen early on, raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down off final bend but kept responding to pressure to be nearest at finish.
4-wide and right on pace 1200 M out, still wide when took narrow lead 800 M out, went 1L clear 200 M out but no extra inside distance and just hung on for 3rd place.
Sat 3-wide about 1L off lead 1200 M out kept advancing to dispute lead about 800 M out, entered home straight still on terms but soon under pressure and faded over 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off speed 1000 M out, 4-wide when attempted to take closer order 800 M out, 5Ls down and all out turning for home, no further impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon in rear about 5Ls off lead, remained there until home straight before passing a few tired rivals but failing to make any inroads on principals.
Sat 2-wide about 3Ls off speed 1200 M out, travelled well when similarly placed turning for home, quickened up to lead final 100 M, driven out.
Settled on fence about 2Ls off speed through to 600 M out when niggled along to lie up, came off fence to challenge in straight but one-paced to line.
Over-raced early on and 4-wide without cover 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, similarly positioned and under pressure off home turn, not come on.
Led early on by 1/2L racing 2-wide, headed 800 M out and 2Ls down on straightening and 200 M out, stayed on at same pace closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Between 2Ls and 3Ls off lead and 2 or 3-wide early on, ridden along 600 M out to take closer order, responded to pressure to go 1L off lead 200 M out, not match winner's pace.
On fence about 4Ls to 5Ls off pace through to straight, quickly weakened right out of contention.

Missed the start slightly, ridden along throughout, raced 4 to 5Ls off pace towards rear and 4-wide turning for home and still well adrift 200 M out, finished strongly final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Outpaced at rear on rail 6Ls off pace ridden along. Switched off rail entering straight, ran past beaten runners.
Ridden to race 3 wide 3Ls off pace near mid-division, lost position and dropped to rear 600 M out and soon became detached in home straight.
Always trailed field about 8Ls off pace and raced 5 to 6 wide, ran past a couple of beaten runners final stages.
Broke well, led until tracking leader comfortably 900 M out racing 1 to 2 wide under pressure around 300 M claimed the lead inside 200 M and pushed out to score readily.
Niggled early forward of midfield, 4 wide and 3Ls off pace entering straight, responded to pressure to close off quite well, no extra concluding stages and lost 3rd position.
Not break well, then held rail position 3Ls off pace down back straight, 4Ls down entering straight, under pressure and found nothing, dropped away tamely.

Jumped well and pushed to lead 900 M out on rail never more than 1L clear until straight. Under pressure around 300 M when challenged but was unable to hold off winner just held on for 2nd close home.
Raced 4-wide 3 to 3Ls off pace around midfield without cover, faded right out from top of straight.
Moderate break, raced 2 to 3 wide and 2 to 3Ls off pace through to straight, when put under pressure kept on same pace in straight, no extra near finish.
Jumped well from a wide draw soon but caught wide without cover 1 to 1-1/2Ls off pace entering straight, weakened noticeably final 300 M.
Soon shifted in from wide barrier to race 3 wide 1L off pace until entering the straight when under pressure found no extra, one-paced before beginning to tire final stages.
Away well and soon racing keenly about 2Ls off pace racing 2-wide, about 3Ls adrift entering home straight, became further detached. (See Racing Incidents.)
4Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, slightly closer turning in and travelling well, kept finding down stretch and only barely missed victory.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 3Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight when under pressure, kept responding to hard driving to be nearest at finish.
Slowest away and in rear no better than 7Ls of 8Ls off lead until home straight, never looked like improving racing position even slightly.
Always outpaced and at least 6Ls off leaders through to home straight, moderate progress final 200 M.
Raced 4Ls to 5Ls off pace and on fence virtually throughout, never posed any threat.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off speed 1000 M out, niggled to take closer order 600 M out, entered straight wider again, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
On inside 2Ls off pace from early on until home straight when hard ridden to keep tabs on principals, found little in latter stages.
Keen 3-wide and 3Ls off lead 1000 M out, went 4-wide 800 M out 2Ls off pace 800 M out, disputing lead 600 M out and clear advantage turning in, all out to just hang by narrowest margin.
Soon led though not clear by more than 2Ls, joined by winner 600 M out and hard pressed to stay in touch at top of straight, 1L down 200 M out and no extra final stages.
On fence 2Ls to 3Ls off pace early on, lost position about 600 M out and turned in racing 4-wide, outpaced at top of straight but stayed on again to draw closer near line.
Driven to race in 2nd place early 1L off pace and 2-wide, relegated to 2Ls 3rd turning for home, one-paced to line.
At least 3-wide and 5Ls off pace until home straight, moderate late headway to be nearest at finish but never any threat.
On fence about 3Ls off pace early on, niggled along 600 M out and 2Ls down turning for home, kept on fairly well under strong pressure to line.
Always in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off leaders until home straight, still rear but only just over 3Ls down 200 M out, soon ran out of steam.
Had run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, travelled well turning for home and 1/2L off speed and every chance 200 M out, not follow through closing stages.
Raced 3-wide about 5Ls off pace early on, closer but niggled along turning for home, soon no impression.
Settled 4Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, travelled well entering straight and got run along fence to be about 1L down 200 M out, ran on well but narrowly failed.
Led passing 1200 M marker on fence though never clear by more than 1L through to home straight, all out 200 M out and grabbed by nearest pursuers.
Raced 4-wide 5Ls off speed 1000 M out 3Ls down 4-wide 400 M out and improved to go 1L down 200 M out, one-paced latter stages and dropped away.
Prominent early on racing 3-wide, went 2nd 1L off pace 1000 M out, similarly placed turning for home but one paced in striaght and well beaten over 200 M out.
Tried to race prominently early on from out wide but had to settle between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace and 3-wide from 800 M out, under pressure at top of home straight and soon beaten.
Settled one from rear about 7Ls off pace early on, 5Ls down straightening up and 2Ls down 200 M out and briefly threatened, not sustain run final 200 M.
Settled 4Ls to 5Ls off pace racing 2-wide early on, travelled well tracking winner turning in 3Ls off pace, followed winner's path to line finished off very strongly but just too late.
