Keen early on but soon racing 2-wide 3Ls off pace 800 M out, slightly closer turning in, quickened up to lead 150 M out, hung in slightly and held on under strong pressure.
Raced 3-wide about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace early on, 4Ls down turning for home but largely one-paced in straight.
At least 5Ls or 6Ls off pace racing 2-wide through to home straight, picked up to go about 3Ls down 200 M out, made further progress close home to be nearest at finish.
Among rear group to home bend. Ran on to challenge final 250 M, having every chance.
Never better than mid-division.
Hampered start. In rear to straight where he made up some ground final 250 M.
At back to straight where he ran on strongly closing stages, doing best work at the finish.
Midfield halfway and remained there to straight. Kept on steadily to threaten passing 200 M. One-paced near finish.
Close up into straight where he held every chance 200 M out. Did not sustain effort close home.
Never troubled leaders.
Was prominent before dropping out of contention shortly on straightening.
Settled worse than midfield to straight. Quickened from 300 M to lead 150 M. Kept on well under pressure.
In rear to straight. Ran on a bit close home.
Soon led and was still in front 200 M. Headed 150 M and found no extra.
Mostly in 5th to straight. Kept on till finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Well there before failing to hold place final 150 M.
Was 6th rounding home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Midfield the best.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up good ground from 10th early straight.
Midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Improved steadily from 5th 800 M. Ran on when 3rd early straight to claim victory final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Kept on steadily after turning in.
Always there. Held 3rd approaching the Rock. Kept on despite of being inconvenienced 200 M. (Lame.)
Soon prominent. Disputed lead from the Rock. Gained clear advantage turning in. Kept on until headed 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Always at the back.
In touch. Dropped back to be slightly better than midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
Led or disputed lead to final turn. Found no extra.
Held up 3 or 4 wide in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Always last few.
Never seen with a chance.
Soon took up winning after jumping from a difficult draw. Crossed to rails stables bend and held lead until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Broke well. Settled in 4th some 2 to 3Ls behind pace. Had nothing to give in straight.
Never better than midfield. Faded upon straightening.
Chased leader to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Always towards rear.
Settled behind leader. Driven to lead inside 200 M. Won readily.
Never better than midfield.
Never in contention. (Lame.)
Never a danger.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Raced 10th to final turn. Made very minor progress then no extra.
Midfield throughout.
Led field to passing 200 M. Kept on.
Pulled hard in slightly behind midfield position. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly behind midfield. Very moderate progress closing stages.
Remained 2nd until taking over passing 200 M. Held on well.
Remained in similar position throughout.
Mainly 4th. One-paced.
Always there. Kept on without threatening.
Towards rear throughout.
Raced wide in prominent position to straight. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always thereabouts. Fought on without threatening.
Made all. Hung on well.
Ridden in prominent position early. Soon gave ground far side.
Midfield. Gained 3rd closing stages only to lose it final strides.
Behind midfield. Made steady progress in straight to claim 3rd late.
Better than midfield to straight. One-paced.
Midfield throughout.
Well back to straight. Made moderate progress past beaten runners in straight.
Chased leader. Weakened from 400 M.
Never in contention.
In last few. Swung wide into straight. Made steady headway before no extra closing stages.
Restless in stall and came out awkwardly, lost ground and got well back, about 8Ls behind lead. Crept closer rounding the bend when shifted wide. Made up steady ground in straight despite hanging in.
Broke well, then sat behind leader handily on rails after running past the first turn. Lost position steadily rounding the home turn. Not a factor thereafter. (Abnormal breathing noises.)
Travelled kindly in midfield along the rails 4Ls behind pace. Was held up on the latter part of the turn. Accelerated well final 200 M and took charge 100 M out to win going away.
Travelled 3-wide behind midfield. Pushed along to creep closer to midfield from 700 M. Unable to keep up after straightening and dropped out.
Soon took up running. Headed near the 500 M, dropped out steadily in straight.
Sent forward from a difficult gate and made the first turn wide, sat 2-wide and tracked leader from 1100 M. Took over near 500 M but headed inside 100 M. Fought on to just hold on for 3rd.
Outpaced early despite hard ridden. Towards rear along the fence. Ran past a few beaten runners in straight.

Raced wide without cover in midfield 4-5Ls off pace. Closer order rounding the bend to be 2nd on straightening but soon no extra. Steadied near the 200 M when giving ground steadily. (Hung in throughout.)
Travelled in 4th or 5th, 2 wide, 3 or 4Ls behind pace. Under pressure from 500 M, kept on one paced in straight until no extra final 100 M
Became fractious after boxed, then slowly away and raced towards the tail. Remained last into straight made up some ground.
Pushed along early to maintain position 2 wide around midfield 4-5Ls off pace. Ran on steadily after straightening to just miss a minor placing.
Broke well, steadily dropped back towards rear, raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace. Shifted to 4-wide at 600 M to commence run, ran on in straight but no match with winner final 100 M.
Keen racing 2-wide and right up with pace early on, settled 2Ls off speed from 1000 M out, hard ridden round final bend and very one-paced in straight.
Soon led on fence, 2Ls clear 1200 M out, went 3Ls clear 600 M out, back to 2Ls clear 200 M out, drew right away final stages.
2-wide 5Ls off pace 1600 M out, 3-wide 4Ls off from 1200 M through to home straight, staying on when impeded by RISING INDEX 150 M out, ran on again. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
4Ls off pace and very tight to fence 1800 M out, ridden to improve on inside 4Ls off pace when brought down 600 M out.
Soon in rear on fence 7Ls off pace, advanced from 1000 M out racing 4 and 5-wide to go 3Ls off speed turning for home, kept on at same pace final stages.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls to 7Ls off pace 1600 M out, under pressure and 4Ls down off final bend, moderate late headway close home.
Had run of race on fence 2Ls to 3Ls off pace through to home straight, 2Ls down when hung sharply left impeding SUPER SPLENDID 150 M out. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Always about 2 or 3-wide and 4Ls off pace, niggled along 1000 M out and toiling when brought down 600 M out.
3-wide 1L off pace 1600 M, still wide and 3Ls down 800 M out, gradually lost position and no chance on straightening.
Prominent and keen early before racing 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1600 M out, 4Ls off pace and 2-wide when fell 600 M out.
Settled on fence and 2-wide between 3Ls and 4Ls off pace until 600 M out when severely hampered by stricken FAIR LADY, jockey lost an iron, very awkward round home turn, no chance.
On fence 5Ls off pace 1600 M out, struggling in rear and 7Ls down when severely hampered by grounded runners 600 M out, came home in own time.

From widest gate had no option but to shift across to race 2 or 3-wide towards rear. Made strong run from behind midfield out wide final 200 M and just grabbed 3rd, despite hanging in and proving difficult to ride out.
One off rails rear of midfield, turning into straight marginally closer. Managed to run on steadily despite check between runners 200 M out.
Well positioned on rails about 3Ls off pace 3rd. Crept closer from home turn and ran on well in straight. Led 200 M out but winner too good and headed near 100 M. Lost to placegetters final strides.
From inside gate settled behind midfield along rails. Was crowded into running rail and checked after the 1200 M. Kept on steadily along rails in home straight.
Always behind midfield, racing 2-3 wide along back straight and moved out to race even wider from 600 M out, entering home stretch widest. Never a threat.
Mustered speed to lead on rails until 250 M out. Unable to further sustain effort and weakened steadily final 200 M.
From wide gate was niggled to maintain 4th position racing 2-wide and about 5Ls off pace. Began to struggle running into home turn, behind midfield into straight, dropped out further.
Jumped well from wide gate to race just outside leader PRECIOUS SWEETIE, maintaining 2nd position until 250 M out when one-paced and overhauled by rivals.
Found rails position 4-5Ls off pace and 5th. Pulled out from rails 500 M out and entered straight 2Ls down. Hit front 100 M out to win comfortably.
Jumped awkwardly. Pulled hard and became unbalanced behind heels at the 1000 M. Raced along fence towards rear and entered home straight last. No threat whatsoever.
Ridden early but outpaced at rear, racing on rails or 2-wide some 10Ls off pace. 2nd last position upon straightening, ran on strongly final 200 M to make late bid for 2nd.
Raced midfield about 2-wide in 6th position. Under pressure 400 M out. Ran on steadily from 250 M until tired final stages.
Had run of race on fence 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, similarly positioned turning for home and every chance of at least a place 200 M out when 3/4L off lead, not come on final stages.
Raced in rear 2-wide and about 10Ls off front 1000 M out, 7Ls out of touch off home turn, moderate late headway through a few beaten rivals in straight.
3-wide and 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, advanced racing 3 and 4-wide to 4Ls down 400 M out, kept on well in straight without reaching principal pair.
Led on fence over 1400 M out, ceded advantage 1200 M to CARACOLER, raced 1/2L off pace until 550 M out when led again, about 2Ls up turning in, kept on well but not fend off winner close home.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, advanced out wide to go 2Ls off pace 600 M out, 3Ls down on straightening and well beaten 300 M out.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, became further detached and no chance from as far as 600 M out.
Driven along to take lead out 2-wide 1200 M out, never clear by more than 1/2L and niggled along 700 M out, headed again 600 M out and dropped out of contention very quickly.
Not break well but soon travelling smoothly on fence 4Ls off pace in 4th place 1200 M out, 3Ls down and still going well turning in, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept finding to lead close home.
Not break well and about 10Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, sent on racing 3, 4 and 5-wide to go 5Ls down turning for home, ran on very well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held up 9Ls off speed 1000 M out, travelled well 500 M out when 4Ls down, failed to pick up in straight and beaten 200 M out.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace early on, slightly closer but niggled along 700 M out, not making any impression 400 M out and soon beaten in straight.
Settled 7Ls off speed on inside 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace off home turn, not quicken up and never a threat.
Midfield. Faded from 800 M.
Led or joined lead to 400 M. Dropped out. (Saddle shifted.) (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch. Dropped back steadily from 900 M to be midfield turning in. No progress.
Always thereabout. Ran on from 500 M to be close-up 3rd turning in. One-paced final 200 M.
Led or joined lead to 250 M. Kept on without quickening.
Pushed along to be in touch. Held up from final turn to early straight. Kept on when in clear.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Left awkwardly, rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Behind midfield. Was steadied 100 M when making some progress after straightening.
Never able to feature.
Midfield. Slight progress rounding home bend. Ran on well from 5th early straight to assert authority 250 M out. Held on.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield home bend. Made ground steadily in straight to be 2nd 100 M. Unable to threaten the winner.
Led or disputed lead. Headed onto course proper. Fought on under pressure to miss 2nd place narrowly while inconvenienced. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
Never a feature.
Behind midfield most of way. Kept on to hold place under pressure.
Checked at start. Midfield till dropped out final 200 M.
Soon outpaced.
Always in last few.
Shared lead. Gained some 1/2L advantage 200 M out while shifting ground. Caught near finish. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Prominent. Lost touch under pressure final 300 M.
Prominent. Unable to quicken to challenge.
Midfield throughout. (Bled.)
Never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Settled in last few. Finished strongly to grab victory close to home.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Well there. Unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Pushed from widest draw to lead. Unable to hold place when headed close home.
Prominent. Ran on under pressure in straight to gain lead close home.
Prominent. 2nd 400 M. Kept on well.
Never a factor.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer on rail turning in. One-paced.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Left badly and was difficult to settle. Never better than midfield.
Jumped very awkwardly, losing a lot of ground. Always at the back.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily 200 M but found no clear passage final strides.
Better than midfield. Dropped back final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th 900 M out. Kept on well in straight, just failing to obtain a minor placing.
Slowly away, picked up early stages to be better than midfield. Kept on in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Made up good ground final 200 M, doing best work at finish.
Held up wide in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Broke well. Soon in rear. Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in last few. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
In remote 4th to straight, then kept on same pace.
Last into straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Settled in 3rd just better than midfield. Quickened to challenge upon straightening and gained upper hand final strides.
Never better than midfield. No extra upon straightening.
Tracked leader. Took lead over 300 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped close home.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened well in straight to hold every chance but just fended off by winner close home.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to grab 3rd close home.
Missed the start badly. Quickly recovered to rear of field. Made no impression in straight.
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Steadily dropped to the back. Wide rounding the home turn and into straight. Ran on steadily but never likely to get close to winner.
Ridden along to go forward to lead from a difficult gate. Headed 300 M and soon weakened.
Broke well, then steadied to avoid heels to race in midfield along the fence. Kept on same pace in straight without threatening.
Midfield or better. Made the home turn awkwardly. Kept on one pace early straight until no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made no show throughout.
Slowly away and at back. Crept close along the rails turning for home but then no further improvement.

Broke best and led breifly, then settled just behind handily along the rail. Shifted out from rails to commence run upon straightening, took charge at 300 M and dashed away 200 M out to score impressively.
Niggled early to maintain in midfield or better. Wide rounding the home turn. Made no impression in straight.
Niggled along to maintain prominent. Wide in early middle stages. Unable to quicken when asked for effort in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, then settled worse than midfield. Ran on well through field in straight, just missed 2nd closing stages.
Soon prominent, then raced freely to dispute lead near 700 M. Headed after straightening and no extra final 300 M. Hung out on home turn and in straight.
Midfield or worse. Dropped out from the 300 M.
Held rail position about 5Ls off pace until 600 M out when took closer order, 2-1/2Ls off pace turning for home and 200 M out when came off fence, kept on to lead 100 M out, pushed out.
Broke well and soon in front but never clear by more than 1-1/2Ls, still in front on straightening but not pick up and well beaten 300 M out.
4-wide and 4Ls off pace 800 M out, improved to go 2Ls off pace but still 4-wide turning for home, not quicken up and beaten 300 M out.
Midfield and wide very early on before advancing to join leader 1000 M out, led at top of home straight, 1L clear 200 M out, overhauled by winner and runner-up 100 M out.
About 2-1/2Ls off early pace but out 3-wide without cover, similarly placed turning for home, not pick up and beaten 300 M out.
Very keen early on, 4Ls to 5Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight, never troubled leaders.
On fence 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, never looked comfortable on bends, 4Ls down turning in but soon no chance with leaders.
Always about 4Ls off pace in midfield and racing 2 and 3-wide, brief effort at top of straight to go 3Ls off pace 200 M out, finished off at same pace.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls to 4Ls off lead until home straight, outpaced at top of straight but ran on again final stages.
Settled 3-wide in midfield about 4Ls off speed down back straight, 3-wide into stretch and improved to go 1-1/2Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra final 200 M.
In 2nd place 1L off lead 1200 M out before settling 2-wide 2Ls off pace, similarly positioned and travelling well turning for home but never threatened.
At least 7Ls off pace in rear and 2 and 3-wide, 6Ls off and 4-wide turning for home, soon no chance.
Sat 3-wide and in rear bunch about 6Ls off pace until 600 M out when took closer order wider again, turned in 3Ls off pace and 5-wide, still about 3Ls down 200 M out, not come on.
Enjoyed run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace until home straight, quickened up to go 1L down 200 M out, ran on well but no answer to winner's pace.
Bit keen at rear, never less than 3-wide. Made up a little ground on outer from 250 M, one-paced closing stages.
Pressed on to lead out wide, shifted across 1200 M out to be 3-wide outside leader. Took up lead into straight, swamped inside 300 M, dropped away.
Waited with near rear, reached rail 900 M out. Still 7Ls adrift turning in, ran on well along rail final 300 M, just denied.
Soon handily placed 2Ls off pace on fence. Challenged leader 300 M out, hit front 200 M out, no extra when headed inside 100 M. (Swollen off side eye before race but passed suitable to race.)

Well there and wide early, then steadily taken back to rear 1000 M out, racing 3 or 4 wide. 8Ls down at tail turning in, crowded, struck heels and nearly fell 300 M out, recovered and passed beaten runners final 200 M.
Settled 2 or 3 wide 5Ls off lead rear of midfield. Ran on steadily from 250 M, effort not sustained concluding stages.
Behind leaders, began to struggle to keep up before straightening, faded from 350 M.

Jumped fairly, then travelled 2-wide 3Ls off pace just in front of mid-division. 4Ls down upon straightening, not much room near 400 M, steadied and shifted in abruptly, recovered a little late ground passing tired runners.
Missed start badly, gradually recovered ground to become midfield on rail 1100 M out. Made a little headway near 300 M, soon one-paced.
Never far off out wide without cover, 3Ls off lead swinging for home, gave ground quickly from 300 M.
Pulled a bit early around midfield. 4 or 5Ls adrift on straightening, minor improvement near 200 M, soon kept on at same pace.
Soon 3-wide better than midfield, laying in a bit. Commenced run 300 M out, responded well and hit front inside final 100 M, stayed on well.
Began only fairly, steadily worked forward to take slender lead passing 1200 M. Headed just before straightening, weakened rapidly 300 M out and was not persevered with.
Niggled along early but outpaced at rear. Improved slightly 1000 M out to be 6Ls off lead on fence. Crept close rounding home turn, 4Ls down into straight, ran on well from 300 M, one-paced last bit.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls off lead from back to home straight, picked up well to challenge 200 M out, kept on strongly but not reel in winner.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, switched out wider to go 2Ls off lead 200 M out, levelled out final stages.
Bit slowly away and soon in rear on fence about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace, made moderate late headway in straight until 200 M, faded.
Raced 4-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home straight, slight chance of earning prize-money until 100 M out when lost action, eased down.
Always 3-wide and about 3Ls off pace in midfield just outside runner-up AGNES DIGITAL until straight, 1/2L off pace and challenging strongly 200 M out, not find any extra.
Settled on fence 5Ls off speed down back straight, travelled well and closer on straightening, short of room 300 M out and switched wider looking for clear passage, never got it.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, quickened up to go 2-1/2Ls off pace 200 M out, not reach leaders.
Restrained to sit 3-wide 5Ls 1200 M out, 4Ls down and 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, quickened up very impressively to lead narrowly 200 M out, always holding runner-up.

Not break well and raced keenly out 3-wide about 2 to 3Ls off pace until home straight when 4-wide, led 350 M out but grabbed by principals just over 200 M out, kept on evenly to line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 5-wide around first bend, soon racing 2-wide 1L off pacesetting IDOL, headed for 2nd turning for home and faded out tamely in straight.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L, still in front turning for home, but soon swamped and beaten 300 M out.
Tracked winner throughout racing 3-wide and about 6Ls off pace, turned for home in rear, 3Ls down 200 M out and ran on very strongly to claim 3rd, narrowly missing runners-up spot.
Away well and very keen early on fence, settled in 3rd place about 1-1/2Ls off pace, 1L 2nd turning for home, found little under pressure and well beaten 250 M out.
Never worse than 3Ls off pace and on fence through to home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out but one-paced to line.
On fence about 1L off pace in 2nd place through to home straight, loomed upsides winner when travelling very easily 300 M out, quickly came under pressure, not recover. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up one from rear about 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, hardly got any closer to the lead than that.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace racing 3-wide from 1000 M out until stretch, ran on very well to be nearest at finish.
Settled on fence 2Ls to 3Ls off lead virtually throughout, ran on fairly well in straight but never looked like picking up principals.
Covered up in midfield racing 2-wide and 5Ls off pace through to stretch when under strong pressure, found nothing off bridle.
On fence about 4Ls off pace until stretch, very one-paced to winning post.
On fence about 6Ls off pace early on, 5Ls down and under pressure to improve on straightening, moderate late headway close home.
Soon led out 2-wide, never clear by more than 1-1/2Ls, travelled smoothly turning in and lengthened well in straight, all out to hang on at line.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, quickened up to go 2-1/2Ls off lead 200 M out, kept finding and just missed out.
Always very wide and without cover, 4Ls down and 5-wide 1000 M out, similarly placed turning for home, outpaced at top of straight but still stuck to task fairly well.
Away very awkwardly and lost at least 4Ls as a result, about 9Ls in rear 800 M out, 7Ls off 400 M out, no further impression.
Raced 2 and 3-wide and 2Ls to 3Ls off pace until home straight, went clear 3rd 2Ls off lead 200 M out despite hanging in, ran on again close home.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace early on, went joint 2nd 600 M out, still on terms at top of straight but weakened quickly and well beaten 300 M out.
Always about 4Ls off speed racing deep on track out 3 and 4-wide, similarly placed turning for home briefly threatened when about 2-1/2Ls off lead 200 M out but not come on.
Never near to challenge.
Led soon after start and went 2Ls clear into straight. Looked winner but did not sustain effort and headed 100 M.
In touch and was 2nd into straight. Unable to hold place and dropped out of contention 250 M.
About 5Ls 4th passing 800 M and similar position into straight. Reached 3rd 200 M out and held some chance closing stages. Found one-pace near finish.
Settled midfield to home turn. Switched in passing 400 M and kept on well to lead 100 M. Found winner too strong final strides.
Made no show.
Towards rear halfway and was worse than midfield home turn. Kept on final 250 M.
Well there before dropping to 5th 800 M, made no show thereafter.
Towards rear before running on strongly in straight to lead towards finish.
In touch before fading rapidly 300 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Was among rear group home bend before making some headway in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, losing lots of ground at start. Last turning into straight where he stayed on to be nearest at finish.
About 5th or 6th rounding home bend. Could make no impression on the leaders in straight.
In touch. 3rd from 800 M. Found no extra inside 150 M.
Made all. Held on well on the rail to finish dead-heated.
Towards rear throughout.
Tracked leader soon after start. Ran on under pressure in straight to share victory.
Slightly better than midfield. No progress in straight.
Midfield to 500 M. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Widest turning in. No improvement. (See Racing Incidents.)
Checked after start, remained near rear. Made progress home bend to be midfield turning in. Kept on well final 200 M.
Rear. Made ground steadily from final turn.
Midfield or slightly better on rail. Kept on but rider had to stop riding and straighten while shifting out 100 M.
Always at the back.
Pushed along from widest draw to be in touch from 1200 M. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Well there to straight. Lost touch gradually.
Midfield early. Commenced move rounding home bend, making ground steadily to just get up on line.
Jumped in all losing ground. Remained in rear before making good headway on rails rounding home bend. Just 4Ls off pace upon straightening but could find no more.
Well back to straight. Finished race off well.
Wide behind midfield. Lost ground rounding home bend. Ran past beaten horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to home bend. Weakened.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Always in last few.
From widest draw, raced 3 or 4-wide prominently to home bend and faded.
Jumped fairly. Prominent before taking slender lead leaving Rock and led until caught near finish.
Rear. Ran on late to produce best work at finish. (Bled.)
Bounded in the air at start, soon picked up to be 4th. Remained there until dropping out inside 200 M.
Ridden along to take lead from 1200 M until the final turn. Remained 2nd before finding no extra final 100 M.
Checked soon after start, dropped towards the rear. Made up some ground after turning into the straight.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Dropped back far side to be last early straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made ground from 800 M to be midfield home bend. Made no show in straight. (Dropped whip 300 M.)
Towards rear. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Prominent early, settling 5th. Remained in similar position until making some improvement inside 200 M.
Led field to 1200 M. Remained 3rd until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Soon prominent. Tracked leader before taking over final turn. Held on well to win comfortably.
In touch early, soon raced in 6th. Dropped back to behind midfield far side. No progress.
Midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M without ever reaching the winner.
Left the gate awkwardly, raced in last or 2nd last to 400 M. Recovered good ground from 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Behind leaders when tight on rails early in straight. Shifted out for a run over 200 M out and gained upper hand close home.
Towards rear. Weakened into straight.
Never better than midfield.
Ridden to contest lead early holding some 1L advantage until worn down passing 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Raced freely in midfield far side. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to quicken to threaten.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear. Commenced run rounding home bend. Continued progress early in straight but only one-paced closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide and better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Tracked leader. Moved up to lead inside 200 M but unable to stave off winner's late challenge final strides.
Well back. Ran on late past beaten horses in straight.
Broke well, travelled in 3rd or 4th position, 3 or 4Ls off pace. Kept on in straight.
Towards rear. Steadied near the 400 M and found nothing thereafter.
Tardy start, towards rear and wide early. Improved steadily along the back straight to be around midfield rounding the home turn. One paced in straight.
Soon at back. Remained last into straight, never a factor.
Niggled early to maintain position in midfield. Slightly closer order before making the home turn. Kept on same pace to the line.
Broke well, steadily dropped to midfield along the rails. Made up little ground after 200 M without threatening placegetters.
Not broke well, at back. Wide rounding the bend. Never able to feature.
Soon worse than midfield. Unable to keep up with early speed. Made no impression in straight.
Sent to the front from a difficult gate and soon tracked leader. Kept on in straight but never likely to catch up winner.
Midfield early, steadily improved to 3rd before rounding the home turn. Kept on one pace in straight until no extra final 150 M.
Niggled early to go forward and soon took up running. Drew away after straightening and won it comfortably.
Broke well, raced prominently until having difficulty to keep up with the pace near the rock. Dropped steadily to worse than midfield rounding the home bend. One paced in straight.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off speed 1200 M out 3-wide and 3Ls down 500 M out, on terms in 2nd place and with very chance 300 M out but not come on final stages.
Always holding rails about 4Ls off pace until home straight when outpaced, staying on again fairly near line.
3-wide without cover and 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide down back straight, under pressure round final bend, no impressoin in stretch.
Unable to lead early on and forced to race 2-wide 2Ls off speed, weakened from 700 M out and soon no chance.
About 3Ls off lead and 2-wide 1200 M out, went 3-wide 700 M out, 1L 2nd and 2-wide turning for home and menacing, found little off bridle and well beaten 200 M out.
Ridden to lead on fence 1300 M out, never more than 2Ls clear, 1L in front off home turn but found nothing under pressure, headed 300 M out and weakened.
On inside 6Ls off lead 1200 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace when short of room and steadied 500 M out, not get any closer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away but soon racing 3-wide about 1L off pace 1200 M out, 2Ls 2nd when niggled along 700 M out, gradually weakened out of contention.
No speed early on raced in rear about 9Ls off pace on inside 1100 M out, 6Ls down 400 M out, remained at similar distance off front.
Settled on fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, improved from 600 M out racing 2 and 3-wide, turned in travelling well and 4-wide, led 300 M out, pushed out.
Keen but with run of race on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th place, lost position 600 M out, never much of threat closing stages.
On fence in 2nd last about 8Ls off pace early on, improved racing 3-wide from about 550 M out, 2Ls off winner 200 M out, kept on well but no chance with winner's pace.
Soon led, hugged rail 900 M out. Kicked clear inside final 200 M to score unchallenged.
Soon outpaced near rear. 6Ls down on straightening, ran on steadily from 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Worked forward from awkward barrier to dispute lead, 4-wide outside leader from the 1000 M. Dropped out from the 400 M.
Began well and behind pace early, steadily dropped to midfield 900 M out. 5Ls adrift turning in and was held up, made steady ground final 200 M.
Niggled early towards rear 3-wide about 4Ls off lead. Made steady progress down centre of track final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly, niggled to travel behind front runners. 2-wide at leader's quarters 800 M out, no chance with winner upon straightening, just held on for 2nd.
Ridden from difficult gate and was caught wide not far off the lead. Run ended 400 M out and dropped away steadily.
Prominent and never more than 2Ls adrift until finding no extra 200 M out, one-paced to the line.
Jumped awkwardly, then mainly midfield or slightly behind on rail. Brushed rail near 400 M, not quicken in straight.
In prominent position before struggling to keep up passing the 600 M. Gave ground further from top of home straight.
Ridden early to be 3 or 4-wide amongst front runners, unable to maintain position 900 M out and dropped back slightly. 2-wide 3 1/2Ls down into straight, one-paced.
Checked at start and soon trailed field 4-wide. Ran on steadily on outer from 200 M until one-paced close home.
Not break well, about 7Ls off lead and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from back straight to home straight, well beaten lost action about 200 M out.
On fence 8Ls off lead 1100 M out, one-paced through remainder about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed, never troubled leaders.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, ridden to take closer order 600 M out when 4Ls down, but short of room turning for home, stayed on fairly well close home.
Not break well, 7Ls off speed 1200 M out on fence, 4Ls down when niggled along 600 M out, over 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off pretty well.
In rear 10Ls off lead early on, 6Ls rear turning into stretch, moderate late headway past a few beaten rivals late on.
Slowest away and about 10Ls off speed and 2-wide early on, 5Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, soon well outpaced.
Settled on fence 6Ls off lead 1200 M out, closer down back straight and 3Ls down entering straight, one-paced to line.
Hard pressed to lead 1400 M out and only got to fence about 1000 M out when about 2Ls clear, joined by winner and runner-up turning for home, capitulated.
Away well and led through very early stages before ceding advantage to HORNET, 2Ls down 1000 M out, upsides HORNET and winner turning for home, not match winner's pace. (See Racing Incidents.)
3rd 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down and 3-wide 700 M out, lost position turning for home and soon beaten.
3-wide without cover round first bend and 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down from 800 M to 400 M our, found nothing in stretch.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, improved racing 4-wide without cover 700 M out about 2-1/2Ls down, advanced to lead 3-wide on straightening, 1L clear 200 M out, ran on well.
Midfield. Widest turning in. Weakened steadily passing 300 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped very awkwardly, losing ground. Always at the back.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Raced 4th or 5th throughout.
In touch. 2nd 800 M. Came to tackle leader turning in. Asserted authority inside 100 M. Held on.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground final 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Improved to midfield home turn. One-paced thereafter.
Well there from a wide draw. Took clear lead from 900 M. Hung out badly rounding home turn. Maintained advantages until headed inside 100 M.
Always thereabout. One-paced.
Raced very greenly early and was never better than midfield.
Never a factor.
Led early. Found difficulty to settle and was 3rd 800 M. Held on for a minor place without threatening the quinella pair.
Midfield. Produced some headway on rails turning in. Soon found no extra.
Well there. Hit front briefly before home turn, then soon faded.
Ridden to muster early speed, settling behind leaders. Quickened up to take charge upon straightening but caught final strides.
Prominent. Quickened to challenge upon straightening. Hitting front close to home, but pipped at past.
Never in contention.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Never in contention.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Soon in rear.
Well back. Made up late ground in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Jumped best and led to straight. Dropped out.
Jumped badly losing ground but rapidly recovered to rear of midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to get up on line.
Sluggish at start. Ridden to prominent position but wide. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit close home.
Behind midfield. Hung out home turn. No progress.
Toward rear throughout.
Midfield. One-paced.
Jumped awkwardly, last early. Soon recovered some ground to be 10th. No further improvement.
Made no show.
Midfield or slightly better. Weakened inside 200 M.
Led briefly early, then ran outside leader to straight. Kept on for a minor placing.
Soon in touch. Ran on from 3rd early straight to assert authority inside 150 M. Won readily.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
In touch from a wide draw. 3-wide 3rd turning in. Kept on until weakening closing stages.
Took lead passing 1200 M. Held on until 150 M when finding no extra.
Towards rear. Made some morderate progress 200 M.
Never a factor.
Led or disputed lead until headed 400 M out. Dropped out closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Held up in rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
Travelled in midfield or worse. Did not find much room in straight.
Always thereabouts. One-paced in straight.
Rear early. Improved to rear of midfield before home bend. Made good progress in straight when forced to check inside 200 M. Kept on to the line.
Travelled better than midfield. One-paced under pressure without quickening in straight.
Rear. Made steady headway on rails in straight.
Well there. Disputed lead rounding home bend. Gained 1L advantage over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and collared close home.
Prominent and wide throughout. Faded in straight.
Well there to straight then weakened.
Settled in rear. Ran on down centre of straight to grab lead close home.
Very sluggish at start. Quickly improved to better than midfield before home bend. Some 2Ls 4th turning in. Fought on under pressure without threatening.
Planted at start losing considerable ground. Never in contention.
Broke well. Soon sat handily behind leader. Shifted out to commence run upon straightening. Kept on well until no extra final 50 M.

Travelled in midfield or better. Shifted away from rails to commence run near the 700 M. Took narrow advantage after straightening. Fought on well to fend off challengers to win it gamely. (In straight hung in.)
About midfield. Kept on the same pace to the line.
Midfield. Steadied near the 800 M and dropped to worse than midfield. Made up little late ground in straight.
Worse than midfield early, then improved steadily on outside to join the lead near 1000 M and sat outside leader. No extra after straightening and steadily dropped out.
Soon midfield, wide until the home turn. Made no show in straight.
Raced very fresh in the early stages, pulled hard and got back. Found little in early straight.
Outpaced early, raced 2-wide worse than midfield. Under pressure to maintain position rounding the home turn. Unable to produce extra in straight, one paced.
Towards rear, wide along the back straight and rounding the home turn. Switched to the most extreme outside after straightening. Accelerated well inside the 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Ridden early to go forward. Well there to home bend and wide into straight. Gradually dropped out after the 300 M.
Steadily dropped to back. Never a factor.
Soon led field. Was joined near the 1000 M. Went clear again near the 700 M until headed at 400 M. Kept on one pace to the line.
Towards rear. Steadily improved to midfield along the fence rounding the home turn and shifted wide entering the straight. Ran on steadily down straight but just failed to catch the winner.
2Ls off pace 1400 M out when checked severely, recovered and travelled well in 3rd place 400 M out when 4Ls off lead on fence, 1L down 200 M out but no extra latter stages.
About 3Ls off pace and 3-wide 1200 M out, 5Ls down 800 M out, 6Ls off and 2-wide entering stretch, kept on well at same pace to recover lost ground close home.
Settled on fence about 7Ls off speed 1000 M out, similarly positioned turning for home, no threat final 400 M.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off speed 1000 M out, shuffled back to be 8Ls down entering stretch, moderate late headway but never troubled leaders.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, over 10Ls down 600 M out and turned in 6-wide, stayed on well to be nearest at finish but had too much to do.
Raced 2-wide and about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, picked up to hit front 200 M out, driven out, readily.
Keen on fence 1L off pace 1600 M out, led 1200 M out and 2-1/2Ls clear from 800 M out through to stretch, joined by winner just over 200 M out, no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led by 1L when 2-wide early on, passed by ORLANDO FLYER 1200 M out, scrubbed along in 2nd from 800 M to 300 M out to reduce 1Ls to 2Ls deficit, weakened final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide 1L off pace 1400 M out, gradually lost position from 1000 M out when 3Ls down and ridden to stay in touch from 800 M out, faded in straight.
4-wide and 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, still wide, 6Ls down and under pressure on straightening, drew slightly closer at finish but never threatening.
Always about 5Ls off lead and on fence until home straight, quickened up to go 2Ls off pace 200 M out, one-paced to line and no chance with winner.
Without cover 4-wide and 1L off pace 1400 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down 800 M out, 6Ls down and struggling entering straight, weakened right out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Took keen hold when 2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 10Ls down 600 M out, stayed on fairly well closing stages to be nearest at finish.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace 1200 M out and 3-wide, slightly further behind and hard ridden turning for home, found nothing. (Lame.)
Settled 2 wide around mid-division. Crept closer from 1000 M to be 3 wide 3Ls off pace 800 M out. Under pressure from 600 M, took time to respond, ran on steadily final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
2 wide just in front of midfield. Under strong pressure 600 M out when having difficulty to maintain position. Ran on a little bit again closing stages.
Taken back to rear on fence. Last turning in, ran on steadily from 250 M, no extra closing stages.
Pulling in rear of midfield 2 or 3 wide, dropped back a bit 1400 M out. Unable to quicken in straight.
Taken across behind runners to rear on rail. Hung out rounding home turn, no impression in straight.

Brief lead, then ceded advantage to sit 1/2L off lead on fence passing winning post first time. Equal lead 500 M out, tendency to shift out in straight, no extra 100 M out when headed by placegetters, one paced.
Pressed on from wide gate to hold narrow advantage one off rail going into 1st bend. Equal lead from 500 M, every chance in straight until headed inside final 100 M, lost 2nd spot near finish.
Midfield on rail, awkwardly placed approaching and rounding home turn, kept on same pace in straight before tiring close home.
Behind midfield early, dropped back towards rear 1200 M out. No progress thereafter.
3 wide forward of midfield early, then advanced to be within 2Ls off lead 1200 M out. Asked to tackle leader 300 M out and kept finding extra to take charge inside last 100 M, stayed on well.
2 or 3 wide behind leaders. Under pressure passing 500 M, kept on same pace before tiring concluding stages.
Soon settled in handy position on rail, given a few smacks passing 600 M when struggling to keep up, kept on at one pace in straight.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, not travelling well and 4Ls down 400 M out, very one-paced to line.
6-wide round 1st bend and always in rear thereafter, 4-wide and about 8Ls off pace 800 M out, virtually tailed off entering home straight.
Always about 4Ls off pace on fence until 400 M out when under strong pressure to keep up, never dangerous but drew slightly nearer in latter stages.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls off speed until home straight when not quicken up and well beaten 300 M out.

Took 1st bend 6-wide, 4Ls or 5Ls off pace and at least 3 and 4-wide from 1000 M out to home straight, 3Ls off lead (but on terms with winner) 200 M out, kept rallying, just failed. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence about 2Ls off front 1200 M out, similarly positioned entering straight, all out to go 1L 2nd 1000 M out, soon collared by quinella pair and no extra.
Led on fence by 1L 1200 M out, joined by ARROGANCE 800 M out until top of straight when quickly left behind, weakened.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, advanced racing 3-wide to share lead 800 M out, travelled well turning for home, 2Ls clear 200 M out, grabbed by winner 50 M out, held on for 3rd.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, 7Ls off pace and in rear on straightening, 5Ls down and still in rear 200 M out, finished off well to be nearest at finish.
Always tucked away on fence about 5Ls off lead until home straight, found running room and went 3Ls down 200 M out, hit front 50 M out, all out to just hang on from WATCH ME WIN.
Raced 2-wide 1L off pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down and niggled along 800 M out, soon struggling and beaten at top of home stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
Not break well, settled on inside about 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, same distance off lead but 2-wide turning into stretch, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, hard ridden to maintain this position on straightening up, dropped away quickly.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace and 2-wide until stretch, short of room top of straight to 200 M out, ran on once in clear but much too late.
2Ls off speed near far rail same distance off pace 300 M out when crowded and short of room, not recover and no chance final 200 M.
About 1L to 2Ls off pace until 300 M out when short of room, soon beaten.
Always in front line, clear lead about 300 M out, never looked like being caught final stages.
2Ls off pace 800 M out, 4Ls down 400 M out, became further detached.
About 4Ls or 5Ls behind leaders through to 400 m out, very one-paced final stages.
On terms with leaders early on, under pressure 500 M out, weakened right out final 200 M out.
Settled about 3Ls off pace towards centre of track, lost touch from 300 M out and eased down close home.
About 2Ls off pace and with cover until 400 M out, soon outpaced.
Always on term nearest far rail through to 300 M out, all out and 1L off winner 200 M out, weakened final stages.
Soon covered up about 2Ls off pace, 1L off pace and menacing over 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Keen, carrying head high early, but prominent, brief lead 400 M out but weakened right out of contention from 300 M.
Slowest away, 8Ls off pace after 800 M out, became further detached.
Settled on fence early on about 4Ls off pace, challenged through centre of field to go 1L off winner 200 M out but could get no closer.
4Ls off pace nearest stands until 400 M out, soon lost all touch.
Was prominent before dropping out of contention approaching 250 M.
Was worse than midfield turning into straight before making some late headway inside 150 M.
Always prominent. Took charge passing 800 M and held narrow advantage into straight. Unable to resist first two close home.
Never better than mid-division.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well from the 250 M to lead near finish.
Towards rear before improving a bit from the 250 M.
Midfield into straight where he kept on under pressure. No extra towards finish.
Close up before dropping to 5th or 6th 1000 M. Similar position into straight where he quickened well to challenge closing stages. Held every chance but found winner too strong.
2nd last to home turn. Kept on final 250 M, never nearer.
Was last before making up some ground in straight.
Never far off to straight. Stayed on to reach 3rd 200 M out. Did not sustain effort near finish.
In touch before failing to hold place 250 M out.
In touch to straight where he kept on to threaten 200 M out. One-paced under pressure final 100 M.
Among rear group to home bend. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear. 8th turning in. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Unable to quicken from 400 M.
Mainly behind midfield.
Last from widest draw. Ran on 250 M but found no extra closing stages.
In touch, 3Ls 4th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to take control passing 200 M. Won going away.
Ridden on inner to take lead 800 M. Weakened when headed passing 200 M.
Towards rear early, soon picked up to be slightly better than midfield. Ran on early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Jumped well and led early before dropping to midfield 900 M. Recovered ground soon after turning in but no match with the winner.
Well there. 1L behind leader final turn. Weakened soon after turning in.
Led briefly early, raced 3rd from 800 M. Dropped out badly final 250 M.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside inside 300 M.
Midfield throughout. No room inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Soon in rear.
Never far off. Quickened to challenge upon straightening holding some chance 200 M out. Swamped for 2nd close to home.
Settled in rear. No clear passage early in straight. Steadied for a run 200 M out before finishing race off well.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Mostly in 3rd to straight. Weakened.
Soon took up running. Broke some 4Ls clear early in straight but flattered and caught near finish.
Settled in midfield or behind. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite steadied a few times in straight.
Led early. Chased leader around home bend. Some 4Ls back turning in. One-paced.
Ridden early, settling in midfield. Ran on in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Very slowly away. Never in contention. (Distressed.)
Settled in rear. No clear run upon straightening. Finished well inside final 300 M to get up on line.
Toward rear. Made up good ground from outside final 300 M.
Well there. Failed to hold place in straight.
Towards rear. Made gradual progress to be 3rd final turn. Kept on until failing to quicken 200 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily to the last 400 M. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to midfield. Ran on in straight to be 3rd passing 200 M but lost a minor placing near finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Dropped back when steadied 800 M out. Made no show thereafter.
Midfield or behind. Made up good ground from outside after turning in.
Prominent. Joined the leader 900 M before gaining upper hand 700 M. With 2Ls advantage turning in, just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Better than midfield. Weakened steadily in straight.
Soon led until headed near 700 M. Dropped out from 3rd final turn.
Lost ground at start, soon recovered to be in touch. Ran on from 5th early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Last. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Difficult to settle towards the rear. Steady progress rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on when given reminders early straight, just failed.
Towards rear into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in midfield before dropped out home bend.
Ridden along in prominent position to straight, then weakened.
Well there. Hit front over 200 M out. Swamped closing stages.
Well back to straight. Never nearer.
Prominent and wide. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Always in last few.
Led to 300 M then weakened under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Ran on in straight to miss 2nd narrowly.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight to score comfortably.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace.
Missed the break. Quickly recovered to rear of midfield. Took closer order home bend. Soon weakened in straight. (Lame.)
Settled around midfield. Held up on rails behind leaders turning in. Obtained split inside 200 M and ran on to snatch 2nd close home.
Last into straight. Made moderate progress down centre of straight.
Travelled along the rail 4th or 5th, 5-6Ls behind lead. Responded well when asked for effort upon straightening, ran on but failed to catch the winner.
Settled towards rear. Crept closer rounding the home turn when racing 3-wide. Made up some late ground.
Jumped awkwardly and steadily settled at back. Remained in 2nd last into straight. Made up good ground through field to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along to share lead early, then ceded advantage and sat outside leader from 1200 M. Took over upon straightening until headed near the 200 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Outpaced, steadily dropped to the tail of the field. Remained last into straight. Ran past a few beaten runners concluding stages.
Handy 3rd along the fence, 4Ls off lead. Raced greenly and hung in after straightening, was bumped near the 300 M and then dropped out gradually.
Jumped awkwardly and lost considerable ground, then steadily improved to midfield before rounding the home bend. Made up steady ground early in the straight until no extra passing the 200 M.
Raced along the fence 6-7Ls off pace in midfield. Under a bit of pressure rounding the bend to maintain position. Ran on steadily in straight, tired close home. (Brushed the rail near 600 M.)
Soon towards rear. Made up little ground on the outer of the track passing 300 M until one paced final 50 M.
Niggled along to maintain at 4th or 5th position, 5 or 6 Ls off pace. Found it hard to keep up near the 800 M, became unbalanced 500 M out when dropping out, tailed off from 300 M.
Travelled 2-wide worse than midfield 8-9Ls off pace. Kept on same pace in straight.
Soon travelled comfortably 6-7Ls off pace 2-wide around midfield. Cruised up to 2nd soon after straightening and took charge near the 200 M. Held on well to defy challenger to the line.
Raced along the fence worse than midfield, about 8-9Ls off pace. Made up steady ground in straight until one paced concluding stages to miss a minor placing.
Overraced when taken to the lead along the rail. Headed upon straightening and then dropped out steadily passing the 300 M.
Raced 2-wide 1L off pace 1000 M out through to straightening up for home when niggled to lie up, struggling when passed for 2nd over 200 M out, weakened.
Ridden to lead on fence 1000 M out, never more than 1L clear, grabbed at top of straight, found nothing off bridle.
In 4th place racing 2-wide about 2-1/2Ls off speed from 900 M out to stretch, carried head high under pressure and short of room about 300 M out, soon no chance.
4-wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6-wide and 5Ls off lead into straight, quickened up well while hanging in to go 1L down 200 M out, led 150 M out, easily.
On fence about 7Ls off lead 1000 M out, 4Ls adrift on inside 600 M out, travelling well on straightening, good turn of foot to go 1-1/2Ls off pace 200 M out, kept on well.
About 7Ls or 8Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, similar distance off lead but wider still turning for home, hampered 300 M out, 6Ls down in centre of track 200 M out, ran on fairly well.
Raced 3-wide and 3Ls off pace from 1000 M until stretch, under strong pressure when checked 300 M out, soon beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well and led very early on before sitting in 3rd 2Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, regained lead at top of straight, grabbed by winner final 200 M and just hung on for 2nd.
On fence 3Ls or 4Ls off lead from back straight to home turn when briefly threatened, soon one-paced and weakened final 200 M.
Broke through stalls prior to race, raced 2-wide 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, similarly positioned turning in, not come on.
Driven along early, 6Ls down and 2-wide 1000 M out, still hard ridden 600 M out, 4Ls down turning in and kept responding to pressure to go 2Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide 3Ls off speed 600 M out, under pressure when checked about 300 M out, soon eased down.
Slowest away, 8Ls off pace on rails 1000 M out, 5Ls down travelling well turning for home, short of room around about 300 M out, ran on fairly well once in clear. (See Racing Incidents.)
4Ls off speed on fence 1000 M out, 2-wide 3Ls off pace 600 M out, hard ridden when shifted out about 300 M out, one-paced to line.
Ridden a bit early, caught wide without cover in mid-division. Covered a lot of ground and ran on well on outer final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well from widest barrier, then steadily dropped back towards rear 800 M out, never less than 5 wide. Under pressure 500 M out. Made up a bit of ground in home straight.
Midfield early, soon niggled along to be forward of midfield 3 wide 900 M out. Unable to hold position rounding home turn, dropped out further in home straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, driven along but outpaced near rear. No significant progress in home straight.
Ridden early to be handy 3rd 2Ls off lead. Ran on steadily from 300 M to hold some chance before tiring noticeably final 100 M.
Just rear of midfield on rail. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Better than midfield 3Ls off speed near fence. Ran on well under pressure to prevail close to the line.
Jumped only fairly but soon took up running on fence. Surrendered lead passing 800 M to be at leader's girth. Dropped away quickly from 300 M.
Slow to jump then was inconvenienced, hard driven in last position but unable to recover ground, never in the race.
Niggled a bit early to travel in midfield 3 wide, tracking the winner. Hung out rounding home turn. Improved alongside winner from 300 M when racing ungenerously and hanging out, just denied.
Pushed along to dispute lead 2 wide. Slender advantage going into home bend, went clear 300 M out and shifted in to hug rail, no extra when overhauled by first pair closing stages.
Pushed along 4 or 5 wide at rear, ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Right on speed early on about a neck off pace, gave way about 300 M out, weakened rapidly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowest away, never sighted thereafter.
Smartly away and disputed lead until about 300 M out when hard ridden, faded out of contention very quickly.
Raced as one of only two on far rail, 4Ls off pace about 800 M out, soon struggling and well out of the reckoning from at least 500 M out.
Pushed out by winner at start, raced about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through final 400 M out when drew closer to go 3Ls down 200 M out, same pace to line.
Never closer than 6Ls off pace at any stage, under pressure from at least 600 M out, found very little.
Ploughed lone furrow on far rail about 1L off pacesetters on stand's side until final 200 M, not match principals late on but game effort nonetheless.
Held narrow lead from a line of three others from 800 M to 400 M out, rallied gamely until 200 M out, no extra and just held on for 3rd.
Awkwardly away but soon settled 2Ls off pacesetters, travelled well 400 M out, led about 200 M out, comfortably.
Away well and prominent in a line of four at head of affairs through early stages, came under pressure 600 M out, dropping away and beaten well over 200 M out.
Raced about 4Ls off pace through to around 400 M marker, picked up well to go 2Ls off pace 200 M out, not follow through final stages.
Raced down centre of track alongside main body of field about 6Ls off speed through to 400 M out, 3Ls off 200 M out, one-paced closing stages.
Always about 5Ls off speed on stand's rail until 400 M out, 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Never closer than at least 7Ls off pace at any stage.
Driven early on, enjoyed run of race sat 2-wide 2Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, one-paced to line.
Never on terms at any stages, always about 7Ls off pace.
In rear early on about 9Ls off pace and 2-wide, never got any closer to lead than that.
Settled about 8Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, slightly better placed off home turn, 4Ls down 200 M out, kept on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Well placed on fence 2Ls off speed 1200 M out when crowded, soon lost position and backpedalled rapidly, tailed off round home turn.
About 6Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide 1000 M out, same distance off lead but 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly, almost got there.
Raced 3-wide 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, improved racing 4 and 5-wide to go 4Ls off lead turning in, kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
2Ls off pace and 3-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls off lead and hard pressed to stay in touch turning for home, dropped away quickly.
Upsides pacesetting DANEFACTOR 1200 M out, never worse than 1L off lead home straight when ridden to assume control, overhauled about 100 M out and no extra.
Always about 5Ls off pace on fence until stretch, rallied to go 2Ls down 200 M out, kept finding to lead close home.
Very wide (7-wide) round 1st bend, 4Ls off lead and 4-wide 1200 M out, 5Ls off and 3-wide turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace towards inside through to stretch when travelling well, 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't quite get to front.
Always about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and at least 3-wide until home straight, picked up well to go 2Ls off lead 200 M out, collared by front pair final 100 M.
Soon led on fence through never clear by more than 1L, overhauled entering home straight, faded out.
Always handy. Moved up in straight to take command 200 M out. Kept on strongly to win impressively.
About 8th or 9th rounding home bend. Stayed on under pressure to take 2nd close home.
Held narrow lead first bend before dropping to 5th 1200 M. Midfield into straight where he plugged on till giving ground final 150 M.
Rear till effort approaching home bend. Given reminders swinging into straight and kept on steadily. One-paced near finish.
Never a factor.
Was 4th before improving in back straight to take lead passing 1200 M. Held 1L clear into straight and faded gradually when headed approaching 200 M.
Well there before moving up to take charge approaching back straight. Lost lead passing 1200 M but was still close up into straight. Found little under pressure.
In rear to straight where he ran on quite well, doing best work at the finish.
About 10th into back straight and last on straightening. Ridden 300 M and kept on well closing stages.
Prominent to straight where he dropped out quickly.
About 8th 1200 M and similar place early in straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Midfield halfway and similar place home turn. Stayed on to reach 3rd 200 M but unable to sustain effort close home.
Worse than midfield 1200 M and about similar position into straight. Finished well after getting a clear run close home.
Midfield or behind. One-paced.
Tardy start, near rear. Made up a little ground middle stages. Made no show final 200 M.
Led. Held on when under pressure inside 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, soon in touch. Attempted to tackle winner passing 400 M but found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Steady progress to be 5th 600 M. Kept on quite well 300 M.
Midfield to halfway. Weakened.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd near 700 M. Kept on without quickening final 400 M.
Soon towards rear.
Behind midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Prominent to 250 M. One-paced until weakened close home.
Remained in similar position throughout.
Last. Moderate progress passing 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Never able to feature.
Checked at start, towards rear. Made up good ground from 400 M to snatch 3rd close home.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to claim 2nd late.
Prominent to straight. No clear passage on rails early on. Obtained split over 200 M out and kept on steadily to the line.
Midfield into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Ran on well under pressure down centre of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Never better than midfield.
Ridden for pace early. Raced in midfield to straight. Quickened to look place chance but could find no more closing stages.
Never far off. Quickened under pressure to take charge over 200 M out, then unchallenged.
Led to home bend. Dropped out.
Prominent. Quickened to challenge upon straightening holding some chance briefly then overhauled.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Hit front rounding home bend. Overhauled 300 M out.
Always in last few.
Never in contention.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Made up some ground early straight. Steadied 250 M. No extra.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on steadily 300 M to prevail close home. Just held on.
Towards rear. Made ground from 1300 M to be midfield far side. Weakened from final turn.
Prominent to 600 M. Dropped back steadily. (Hung out throughout.)
Midfield. Made progress far side to be 2nd 900 M. Joined lead 200 M. Kept on but unable to quicken close home.
Always there. Kept on well early straight to be close up 3rd 200 M, however effort not sustained.
Towards rear throughout.
Missed the start, soon recovered ground to be 5th. Dropped back to behind midfield far side. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Last. 2nd last final turn. Ran on well inside 250 M. Failed to prevail narrowly.
Rear. Last final turn. Made up good ground on outside, just failing to catch the winner.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. Kept on but unable quicken to challenge in straight. (Raced ungenerously.)
Settled behind midfield from widest draw. Effort rounding home bend to be 4-wide among leaders final turn. Found no extra close home.
Held 3rd on rail. Dropped to midfield near 1000 M. Found not much room from 300 M. Held on when in clear.
Led. Piped up at 200 M. Found no extra when beaten close home.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on but tight closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on one pace without threatening.
Prominent till weakened into straight.
Settled in midfield. Quickened to lead over 200 M out. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
In last few throughout.
Raced in forward of midfield. Took closer order turning in but soon weakened upon straightening.
Missed the start. Soon dropped to last.
Led far side. Headed coming out of back straight. Not much room behind runners in straight until too late inside final 150 M. (Distressed.)
Lost considerable ground at start. Recovered rapidly to forward of midfield before home bend. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to narrowly miss winner.
Broke well. Well there before taking slender lead home bend, but soon headed upon straightening when no extra.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Effort turning in. Found no extra over 250 M out.
Led or disputed lead until overhauled final 250 M.
Jumped a little awkwardly, then midfield or worse and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Wide into straight. Made no show thereafter.
Broke well and raced prominently. Kept on well in straight but found the quinella pair too strong.
At back. Shifted out gradually after straightening to find clear running. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Settled towards rear from a wide draw, always behind. Not much room to improve near 300 M and again 100 M, nearest at finish.
Broke best but then steadily dropped to midfield or worse. Wide rounding home bend and was taken to wider into straight. Ran past a few beaten runners close home.
Broke fairly, steadily moved forward from a good gate and led narrowly. Headed near the 200 M and then weakened gradually.
Ridden early to go forward but wide along the back straight and rounding the home turn. Kept on one paced after straightening until no extra passing 200 M.
Raced along the fence in midfield or worse. Shifted away from the fence to commence running just before straightening. Ran on steadily to snatch victory concluding stages.
Niggled along to maintain in midfield. Wide along the back straight and rounding the home bend. Weakened steadily passing the 300 M.
Slowly away, then steadily improved to 4th along the rail near the 800 M. Ran on after straightening to hit front approaching 200 M but was caught concluding stages. (Hung out in straight.)

Pushed early to be prominent until 900 M, then dropped back slightly to be behind leaders. Under pressure from 600 M but found nothing. Further weakened from 300 M. (Significant amount of blood in windpipe.)
Midfield or worse. Shifted to outside to commence running after straightening. Took a while to gain the momentum before making some ground final 200 M.
On fence 8Ls off speed down back straight, wider turning for home and hard ridden at top of stretch, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on to be nearest at finish.
About 8Ls behind and 2 or 3-wide through to home straight, never looked like troubling principals at any stage.
Ridden to lead passing 1200 M marker, soon 4Ls, maybe 5Ls clear through to home turn, weakened at top of straight, 1L clear 200 M out and soon swamped.
7Ls off pace on inside 1000 M out down back straight, 2-wide, under pressure and same distance off lead on straightening, stayed on at same pace to line.
10Ls off speed and 2-wide 1000 M out, widest of all (6-wide) into straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
3-wide and 7Ls off front from 1000 M out to home turn, 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off at even tempo.
Best away and soon racing 3-wide about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace from 1000 M out to stretch, 1L down 200 M out, 3rd best when checked 100 M out, not recover.
On fence about 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, slightly closer but 5-wide turning for home, stayed on at same pace to line.
In 4th place on fence 5Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, good speed to lead 180 M, hung out across EXPLOSIVE POWER late, just hung on.
Always about 4 or 5-wide and 6Ls or 7Ls off speed through to stretch when travelling well, kept finding all the way to line, went close.
Soon in 2nd place about 4Ls off speed racing 2-wide 1000 M out, rapidly lost position from 700 M out, finished down centre of course. (Bled.)
Settled 2-wide and 5Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, always a head behind winner before having ground taken by same horse final stages.
Placed 2-wide and about 6Ls off speed until home straight, improved to go about 2Ls off lead 200 M out, kept on well to go close at finish.
3-wide and 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, retained this fairly prominent position through to home straight, not quicken up and well beaten 300 M out.
4 or 5 wide in midfield going into 1st bend, advanced to a handy position entering back stretch, still 3 or 4 wide. One paced after straightening, dropped out 200 M out.
Settled towards rear on fence. Steadied and shifted in 400 M out. 5Ls adrift on straightening, ran on steadily from 200 M, no extra final stages.
2 or 3 wide in midfield. Made steady ground from 250 M, one paced final bit.
Slow to begin. Soon recovered and settled in midfield on rail turning out of straight first time. Under pressure passing 800 M, only kept on one paced.
Always at least 4 wide at rear. 2nd last turning in, ran past a couple of well beaten runners close home.
Very wide in midfield turning out of the straight the first time, moved a bit closer 1200 M out. No extra 800 M out, dropped out rapidly passing 600 M, tailed off from 300 M. (Hung in throughout.)

Jumped very awkwardly, soon recovered to dispute lead 3 wide going into first turn, clear advantage 1200 M out, then pinched rail 1100 M out. Challenged before straightening, run end 300 M out and dropped away steadily.
4-wide rear of mid-division going into first bend. Similarly placed turning for home, ran on passing beaten runners final 200 M.
Just forward of midfield, never less than 3 wide, struggled to keep up 500 M out, dropped away from 300 M.
Began well and up on pace early, eased to be at leader's quarters from 1200 M. Loomed up to join leader turning in, clear lead 250 M out, stayed on well when challenged closing stages.
Missed start, travelled at rear about 6 or 7Ls off lead. Made up some ground final 200 M without threatening the principals.
Equal lead on fence early, eased to sit 2Ls off pace 1100 M out. Niggled along rounding home bend to maintain position, ran on well under pressure final 250 M, just denied.
At the back throughout, never a factor.
Behind front runners, under pressure passing 600 M, unable to quicken, gave ground steadily soon after straightening.
Held rails position 1L off pace 1000 M out, narrowly in front turning for home, all out to stay in touch 200 M out, weakened closing stages.
Raced about 2Ls off pace and 2-wide through to stretch, soon outpaced and beaten well over 300 M out.
Very hard to settle with head up early on in rear out 3-wide and 5Ls off pace, still in rear detached from remainder of field 200 M out, eased down.
No speed early on and settled at least 5Ls off lead on fence, 4Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, never troubled leaders.
Handily placed about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight, could never get on terms and beaten 200 M out.
Led out 3-wide by a neck 900 M out, 2Ls off pace and 3-wide turning in when under strong pressure, not come on and dropped right out.
4-wide and 1L or 2Ls off pace through to stretch, 1L down 200 M out, not matching winner's pace when changed leads 100 M out, no extra.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 3Ls off through to stretch when under pressure to pick up, kept on evenly to line.
Away awkwardly but quickly recovered to be 3-wide and 3Ls off pace early on, same distance off lead but 4-wide turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out and one-paced to line.
Raced keenly with head up 2-wide and 3Ls off pace from 1000 M out until home straight, quickened up well to lead 100 M out, pushed out.
Kept from leading on fence by EL VIENTO and forced to lead out 2-wide, never more than 1/2L clear, all out grabbed by winner and runner-up 100 M out, no extra. (Saddle Shifted.)
Raced 3-wide and about 1/2L off pace 900 M out, steadily lost position round home turn, little chance in straight.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls off pace to 800 M, 2Ls down travelling well turning for home, led 300 M out and 1L clear 200 M out, all out to hang on at finish.
Not break well, about 4Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, closer on straightening, hemmed in on fence 250 M out without room, not recover.
On fence and 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along from 700 M out when 2 and 3-wde, 5Ls down turning in, driven through tight gap 300 M out, finished off very strongly, went close.
Slowest away, at least 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6Ls behind and 6-wide into straight, good pace to go 2Ls off lead 200 M out, no extra final stages.
Raced 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 3-wide turning in, 2Ls down 200 M out, beaten when squeezed for room about 100 M out.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering stretch, met with some trouble in running 250 M out, ran on well close home but too late.
Raced 6Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, never troubled leaders at any stage.
Led by 1/2L out 2-wide passing 1200 M marker, lost advantage 800 M out 1L down turning for home, dropped away tamely.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls down 2-wide and moving well entering straight, 1L down 200 M out, kept on finding, just missed.
Raced 3-wide 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along 700 M out and 5-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, short of room 200 M out, ran on well again once in clear final 100 M.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until 800 M out, loomed 1L off pace turning for home, brief lead 350 M out but passed by winner 300 M out, 1L down 200 M out, stuck on at one-pace to line.
Keen, 4-wide without cover about 5Ls off pace early on, 2Ls off pace and 4-wide turning for home, not match principals pace on run to post.
Best away, on fence about 1/2L off pacesetting RED DIAMOND 1200 M out, narrow lead 800 M out, 1L clear on straightening, overhauled 350 M out, faded away.
Pulled hard in midfield before making rapid headway 900 M. 2nd into straight where he held every chance 250 M. Found no extra.
About 9th halfway and was midfield into straight. Kept on steadily before doing best work close home.
Led into straight and was headed 200 M out. One-paced under pressure thereafter.
Towards rear of closely bunched field approaching home turn. Unable to get a clear run early in straight and was steadied passing 200 M. Kept on final 100 M.
Was prominent before losing ground steadily from home bend.
Made no show.
Headway from midfield before home bend and was 4th into straight. Ran on well to take command 200 M out. Kept on strongly to line.
In rear throughout.
Mostly 4th to 800 M and was hampered before the turn, losing ground. Renewed effort and stayed on inside 200 M.
Midfield approaching home bend and remained there into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Well there before failing to hold place passing 200 M.
Worse than midfield swinging into straight where he kept on without threatening.
Never in contention.
Worse than midfield rounding home bend. Improved to be 5th early in straight and kept on well under pressure to take 2nd close home.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 1000 M, gained lead passing 600 M and never headed.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Never a factor.
In touch. Ridden to 2nd turning in. Found no extra closing stages.
Jumped very awkwardly, last to final turn. Made up some ground when under pressure in straight.
Led early. Gradually dropped back from 1200 M to be 6th 500 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Improved to 3rd briefly 250 M. Soon found no extra. (Whip knocked 200 M.)
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from 7th early straight to take 2nd 100 M. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back a bit home bend. No progress in straight. (Hung in.)
Joined lead early. Took advantage passing 1200 M to 600 M. Remained 2nd until weakened badly soon after straightening.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made good progress from outside passing the Rock to be slightly better than midfield final turn. One-paced.
Wide throughout. Effort home bend and led field into straight. No extra when headed passing 200 M.
Rear into straight. Kept on past beaten horses.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Held slender lead 3-wide. Went some 1L clear and crossed to rail coming out of back straight but soon headed on home bend. Faded in straight.
Settled in midfield. Fought on resolutely down centre of straight to just get up on line.
Broke well. Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight. Produced good late impression.
Well back. Circled field home bend. Made up good ground down centre of straight, doing best work at finish.
Broke well. Prominent into straight. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M but caught close home.
Ridden early. Prominent to straight. Faded.
Well there on the fence. Lost ground behind fading leader home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Always in last few.
Always prominent. Kept on well on the rail but unable to reach the 1st pair.
