Mainly 4th or 5th to straight. Was hampered by carrying wide when running on from 300 M. Held narrow advantage 200 M but was just beaten. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Checked at start, never a factor.
Led field to 200 M. Found no extra.
Towards near throughout.
Mainly midfield. Made very moderate progress in straight.
Mainly 2nd. Shifted out when under pressure in straight and caused interference. Gained upper hand close to the line. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
Towards rear from a wide draw. Made improvement from 1200 M to be in touch far side. Dropped back final 400 M.
Rider found difficulties to settle early and middle stages. Never able to feature.
Started awkwardly, last to 1100 M. Made some advancement to 8th or 9th and no more.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear. Held for a run final turn, then made up some ground final 300 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Prominent. Hit front rounding home bend. Not match pace of winner upon straightening and overhauled passing 250 M.
Never better than midfield.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight.
Missed the start. Settled behind midfield. Soon faded after straightening.
Raced freely on outside in forward of midfield, widest runner turning in and weakened under pressure.
Midfield. Kept on same pace.
Never far off. Quickened to lead over 200 M out and soon went clear.
Led till narrowly headed at Rock. Weakened from prominent position into straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made swift progress passing Rock. Not far off but wide turning in. Found nothing.
Mostly in midfield before lost position into straight.
Jumped very awkwardly and shifted out, lost a lot of ground and got well back. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer to the rear of midfield rounding the home bend. Made up steady ground through field in straight, closest at finish.
Settled towards rear along the rails. Closer order rounding the home bend when saving ground near the rail. Made up little ground early in the straight until one paced final 200 M.
Outpaced despite hard ridden, maintained in midfield until 900 M where commenced to give ground steadily. Further detached after straightening.
Ridden early to take up running from good gate. Kept on well in straight, just pipped close to the line.
Steadied on jumping, then travelled worse than midfield. Made up steady ground near the rail after straightening to be nearest at finish.
Niggled early and soon travelled along the fence 3-4Ls behind pace better than midfield. Ran on steadily after straightening but always held off by the quinella pair.
Broke best and led briefly. Sat outside leader until weakened final 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly, then travelled 3-wide better than midfield. No extra in straight and weakened steadily.
Raced 2-wide 4-5Ls off speed around midfield. Shifted out to improve upon straightening, made up some ground passing the 200 M.
Soon at back, never a factor.
Niggled early to race 2-3Ls off speed in 3rd position, 3 wide until obtained a rail run before the home turn. Ran on steadily in straight to snatch victory close to the line.
Raced 3-wide, 4Ls or 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, similarly placed entering straight, very one-paced to line.
Raced 2-wide 1L off pace 1200 M out, held this position until about 200 M when unable to overhaul winner, weakened and lost 2nd place close home, just held on for 3rd.
Settled on fence about 5Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 4Ls off pace on fence turning for home, kept on very well late on to be nearest at finish.
4-wide 2Ls off pace 1300 M out but raced with cover 2Ls to 3Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1200 M out to final bend when hard ridden, emptied in straight.
Raced 4-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace from 900 M out to straight, no chance 300 M out.
Settled 2Ls off speed on fence 1200 M out, similarly placed entering straight, not quicken up and weakened 200 M out, eased down 100 M out.
Led on fence 1200 M out, always about 1L clear through to home straight, still on fence and 1L clear 200 M out, pulled further clear close home.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3-wide 800 M out, in rear 5Ls behind and 3-wide turning for home, ran on past a couple of tired rivals close home.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls to 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, dropped out very quickly.
Squeezed out at start, raced a bit freely 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls off pace and 4-wide turning in, kept on fairly well closing stages without threatening principals.
On fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and about 2Ls off speed from 1000 M out to stretch when largely one-paced and unable to close on winner, gained 2nd about 100 M out.
3Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M out to home turn, switched outside to challenge but made no headway whatsoever.
Hard ridden to secure position in middle of leading trio. Struggled to keep up just before straightening, dropped away from 200 M.
Well away from widest gate, up there out wide early then eased to be 3 wide 2Ls behind leaders. Quickened well from 250 M to hit front 100 M out, comfortably.
Broke fairly, pressed on to dispute lead 3 wide. Very brief lead passing 200 M but no answer to winner's finishing kick when challenged, lost 2nd spot final stages. Hung in throughout.
Slowly away, recovered some ground to be 5 or 6Ls adrift rear of midfield. Made the home turn awkwardly, shifted out and was 8Ls down towards rear on straightening, ran on a bit final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, 2 wide towards rear about 7 or 8Ls off speed. Made steady ground final 200 M.
In touch early from difficult gate, steadily dropped to midfield 2 wide. Dropped back further rounding home turn, not a factor in the straight.
Soon outpaced towards rear, hung in early stages. Ran past beaten runners concluding stages.
Niggled along a bit early to hold midfield position 3 or 4 wide. Took time to get motivated after straightening, made up some steady ground late.
Missed start, at rear despite ridden along. Last and 10Ls down turning in, ran past tired runners late.
Jumped only fairly, quickly improved to be amongst leading trio on rail. Slender advantage 500 M out, then well clear turning in. Run ended inside 200 M, swamped and dropped out.
Held up 3 or 4 wide better than mid-division. Shifted out, became unbalanced when steadied near 600 M. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish, though no real threat to winner.
Handy 5th on fence, 2Ls off lead. One paced in straight, began to tire close home.
Carried 4-wide about 1300 M out but got back inside to race 2-wide (shadowing winner) 3Ls off pace from 1200 M out to stretch, ran on well final 200 M but winner too strong close home.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 600 M out, went 3Ls off lead 200 M out, not follow through closing stages.
Bit slow into stride, 6Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, 7Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, no impression.
Head up racing keenly early on, 2Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 1L off lead 800 M out, niggled along to keep up 600 M out, still 1L off and 2-wide entering straight but soon weakened.
On fence 2Ls off lead 1200 M out, 1-1/2Ls off pace travelling well turning for home, narrow lead 250 M out, overhauled by quinella pair close home.
3Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M out to home straight when switched off rails to challenge, 1-1/2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well to lead 20 meters from line.
Immediately led on fence, never clear by more than a length, headed by ROUND THE WORLD 250 M out, no extra final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide and 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out, same distance off but 3-wide into straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, faded close home.
Not best away, 4Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls off pace on fence turning for home, finished off on inside and 2Ls down 200 M out, dropped away rapidly.
Slowest into stride, 5Ls off speed on fence 1100 M out, 6Ls down 600 M out and under pressure, faded.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1100 M out, closer entering straight, 2Ls off speed out wide 200 M out, stayed on at same pace to line.
Difficult to settle early stages when raced better than midfield. Dropped out 350 M.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Left very awkwardly. Soon tailed out.
Left awkwardly and was green early. Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 400 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Left very awkwardly, always at the back.
Led field to 100 M. Found no extra.
In front of midfield. Ran on from 5th early straight to take 2nd close home.
Midfield. Steady progress 900 M to be 3rd turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader 1000 M but unable to take over. Failed to quicken from 4th final turn.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground to midfield approaching 800 M. No further improvement in straight.
Always well there. 1-1/2Ls 2nd 250 M. Sustained effort to assert authority closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield before giving ground home bend.
Well there. Took up running stables bend and went clear far side. Came back to field rounding home bend and headed into straight. Faded gradually. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made no impression.
Held up behind pace. Quickened to lead upon straightening and fought on gamely under pressure to just fend off runner-up's strong late challenge.
Settled in midfield or behind. Commenced move home bend. Ran on well from close-up 3rd into straight to just fail to get up on line.
Led first 900 M. Dropped out after stables bend. (Heart irregularity.)
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear to straight. Stayed on for remote 3rd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled around mifield. Some 2Ls 4th turning in. One-paced.
Last. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Pushed along to soon be just behind midfield. Continued to make ground in straight to take 3rd close home.
Left very awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Last turning in. Made up good ground from outside to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or slightly better. Pulled to the front final turn. Held every chance early straight until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Soon led. Was joined passing 1000 M. Kept on well early straight until finding no extra when headed inside 200 M.
Midfield. Soon dropped back steadily to the rear group. Short-lived effort 250 M. Made no show thereafter.
Towards rear. Made very moderate progress early straight. Found no extra when steadied 150 M.
Settled better than midfield on rail. Improved steadily in straight to hit front 100 M out. Held on.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 5th home turn. Renewed effort 250 M but failed to catch the winner.
Prominent. Joined lead passing 1000 M to home bend. Failed to hold place from 3rd early straight.
Better than midfield. Lost touch soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield rounding home bend. Dropped out 250 M.
Never better than midfield.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight. No extra near finish.
Well back to straight. Kept on under pressure without threatening.
Jumped fairly then travelled in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never nearer.
Hard ridden to muster pace early. Raced 4-wide in forward of midfield to straight. Ran on to hold place chance early on but found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield to straight then weakened.
Led early. Headed coming out of back straight. Regained lead early in straight but caught close home.
Never far off. Close up in 3rd turning in. Held some chance early in straight. Fought on under pressure.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Took up running approaching home bend and led till headed over 300 M out, then gradually weakened.
Clipped heels and lost position early, then raced wide behind midfield. One-paced without quickening in straight.
Midfield to straight, then weakened.
Well back. Made up good ground down straight doing best work at finish.
Settled towards rear. Ran on through field down centre to snatch victory close to home.
Jumped awkwardly and then towards rear. Switched to the outside upon straightening to commence running. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Steadily dropped to the rear. Wide rounding the home bend and into straight. Made up little late ground.
Broke best, led field until headed near the 300 M. Plugged on until weakened steadily final 150 M.
Ridden hard to go forward and soon prominent. Accelerated well after straightening and took charge passing the 300 M but was unable to fend off winner late challenge.
Steadily dropped to the back. Remained last into straight, ran past a few beaten runners concluding stages.
Prominent early and then sat behind leader from 800 M. Weakened steadily from 300 M.
Tardy start, soon well there along the rails. Dropped to midfield upon straightening. Found nothing and weakened gradually final 250 M.
Worse than midfield, raced 4-wide. Crept closer rounding the home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to claim victory concluding stages.
Worse than midfield. Obtained a rail running near the 800 M. Steadied near the 200 M when making some ground. Kept on to the line.
Niggled early to maintain in midfield. Found it difficult to keep up rounding the bend, dropped towards rear upon straightening and not a factor thereafter.
Worse than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Travelled kindly in 4th or 5th, 2-wide. Ran on in straight but was outsprinted by the quinella pair final 100 M.

Smartest away and led from widest alley, gradually shifting across to be 2 wide 1200 M out. Surrendered lead near 1000 M when pinched rail, remained 1/2L off pace. Regained lead 300 M out until swamped inside 150 M.
Missed start and ridden to keep up to rear of field. Kept on one paced on fence in home straight.
Just forward of midfield on fence, 4Ls off lead. Steadied and shifted out on home turn. Ran on well from 400 M following the winner to grab 2nd close home.
3 or 4 wide behind midfield early, steadily dropped towards rear group into first bend. Stayed same in home straight.
Slow to begin from wide barrier, soon last. 2nd last into straight and was never in the race.
Ridden early but outpaced towards rear. Lost position 800 M out and tailed off on straightening.
3 or 4 wide in mid-division, without cover rounding home bend. Minor progress passing 200 M, soon no extra and one paced.
Settled 2 wide in mid-division, ran on well from 400 M and looked booked for 2nd before tiring and overhauled closing stages.
Never far off, a bit wide early stages. Unable to find another gear in straight, kept on one paced.
Pressed on to dispute lead out wide, shifted in to become 3 wide 1000 M out and assumed narrow lead. Joined swinging for home when 2 wide. Dropped away quickly from 300 M.
Settled within striking distance 3Ls off pace. Made sustained run after straightening to hit front 200 M out, all out and stayed on.
2 wide rear of midfield, 5 wide into straight when hanging in. Made steady ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled near rear towards fence. Switched out near 500 M but unable to do so and raced tight. Into the clear approaching 200 M but failed to find much thereafter.
Jumped well and prominent 3rd or 4th on fence. One paced when asked for effort in straight, tired concluding stages.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, niggled along from 800 M out, 4Ls off and under pressure turning for home, made little impression on leaders.
Slowest away, raced 4-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, advanced to go 1/2L off lead and 4-wide entering straight, 1L down 200 M out, no chance with winner but kept on well to line.
About 5Ls off pace and 4-wide 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down 600 M out, 2-1/2Ls down 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, improved to go 3-wide about 1/2L off speed 400 M out, 1-1/2Ls down 200 M out, no extra close home.
5Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, in rear 6Ls off pace and 2-wide turning for home, stayed on well from fair way off pace final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, same distance off pace 600 M out, never looked like reducing the deficit.
About 2-1/2Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 3Ls behind 600 M out on fence, under pressure to lie up turning for home, no response and well behind when eased down final 200 M.
Never worse than 1L off lead in 2nd through to 500 M out, led top of straight, 1L clear 200 M out but collared by winner about 80 M out, hung on for 2nd.
2nd slowest away, caught 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept finding to lead 80 M from line, pushed out.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls off and 3-wide with head up and hanging out markedly round home turn, 2Ls off pace 200 M out but one-paced closing stages.
Led early on but never clear by more than a length, ceded advantage turning for home, faded steadily.
Prominent early on about a neck off pace through to 400 M out, soon under pressure and dropped out very rapidly.
Severely checked upon exiting by WINNING PLEASURE and LASER GlORY and about 7Ls detached from main body of field 800 M out, never recovered.
2Ls off pace from 800 M out to 400 M out when outpaced by winner, kept on fairly well close home to nick 3rd on line.
About 3Ls off pace from 800 M out to 400 M when under pressure to pick up, responded to hard riding to be nearest at finish without seriously threatening winner.
Always at back of main group about 5Ls off pace through to 400 M out, became further detached thereafter.
Raced alone on far rail about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to final 400 M out, soon capitulated.
Shifted markedly left upon exiting, between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace through to 400 M out, soon under pressure and one-paced to line.
Nearest stand's rail down centre of course and 3Ls off pace from 800 M out to 400 M, not come on under pressure though impeded slightly closing stages by JUST WIN.
About 2-1/2Ls off pace from start to 400 M out when under pressure, weakened final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held neck or 1/2L lead from start to about 300 M out when headed by winner, 1-1/2Ls down 200 M out, faded out rapidly.
Between 1L and 2Ls off speed until 400 M out, led 300 M out and 2Ls clear passing 200 M marker, ridden out, readily.
Raced one off the far rail and about 3Ls off pace 800 M out through to 400 M, slightly closer 200 M out and challenging for 3rd place, no extra near line.
Fairly prominent early on about 2Ls off pace 800 M out, 3Ls down 400 M out, beat hasty retreat.
About 3Ls off pace through to 400 M out, found nothing under pressure, weakened.
Was 7th rounding home bend. Came under pressure passing 400 M to threaten 200 M. Doing best work at the finish.
In rear throughout.
Joint-leader from 1000 M to straight. Was headed 150 M and faded steadily.
Never better than midfield.
Mostly midfield to home bend. Unable to sustain effort coming into straight.
Shared lead from 1000 M to about 150 M. One-paced under pressure near finish.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
In touch to straight when he kept on till outpaced final 100 M.
Never far off to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Towards rear before making up some headway to the 150 M. Found no extra. (Bled.)
Towards rear into straight where he stayed on well to the 150 M. Unable quicken with first 2 near finish.
Well there before settling in midfield 1000 M and remained there home turn. Ran on well in straight to take charge 150 M and win readily.
Never on terms.
Well there before finding no extra final 150 M.
Behind midfield. Raced ungenerously and severely checked passing 500 M. Made up some ground final 400 M.
In touch. Found no extra closing stages.
Always there. Kept on for 3rd in straight.
2nd last to straight. Made very moderate progress.
Always 2nd. Kept on without threatening.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. 4-wide turning in. Weakened steadily.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back steadily passing 800 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Prominent early stages. Lost touch from 800 M to race in midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Left very awkwardly and was reluctant to stretch out. Last throughout.
Made all. Held on well.
Slowly away. Recovered to midfield stables bend. Took closer order rounding home bend, but soon faded from 4th into straight.
Rear. Improved position rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Never better than midfield. Faded into straight.
Rear. Came to challenge rounding home bend. One-paced without quickening in straight.
Rear early. Improved to midfield far side. Kept on same pace in straight.
Led till joined into straight. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Held up behind pace. Disputed lead turning in but shifted ground. No extra closing stages.
Jumped in air. Raced in midfield before dropping out home bend.
Rear. Snuck up on rails rounding home bend. Ran on from 5th into straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled mostly in 4th. Effort rounding home bend. Obtained split between leaders over 200 M out and claimed victory over 150 M out.
Prominent. Faded under pressure home bend.
Ridden to prominent position from widest draw. Struggled in midfield far side before dropping out past Rock. Pulled up before straight.
Flat-footed at start, losing ground. Behind midfield throughout.
Prominent to home turn. Dropped out.
In touch. Failed to quicken in straight.
Better than midfield on the rail. Advanced to 2nd final turn. Kept on without quickening final 200 M while hanging in.
Towards rear early, soon picked up to be in midfield or better. Ran on quite well 250 M but failed to catch the winner.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Last. Made up good ground final 150 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Held 7th to 400 M. Faded.
Sat outside winner to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Made all. Held on in straight.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made progress to midfield but widest turning in. Ran on steadily.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Threw his head jumping out. Remained in rear throughout.
Well back to straight. Made up good late ground.
In last few throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Slow out and travelled in last to straight. Made no impression.
Settled in 4th just better than midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Soon took running and held clear advantage until gradually eroded in straight. Caught closing stages.
Broke well and led briefly. Chased leader to straight. One-paced.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled in 3rd within striking distance. Quickened well in straight to take charge 150 M out. Readily.
Towards rear early. Effort going up Rock. Midfield rounding home bend and into straight. No extra.
At back early and then improved in worse than midfield 2 or 3 wide 7-8Ls off pace. Kept on the same pace until made some late ground passing 200 M.

Raced comfortably along the fence in midfield 6-7Ls off pace. Closer order along the back straight and shifted away from the fence to improve steadily rounding the home bend. Ding-dong battle final 150 M, just failed.

Niggled early to be prominent. Narrow advantage after straightening the first time until the 1200 M. Raced prominently until finding difficulty to keep up position rounding the home bend. Dropped out thereafter.
Gave reminders early to maintain in midfield or better. Wide until passing the winning post the first time to race along the fence 3Ls off pace. Plugged on in straight until no extra final 150 M.

Ridden to go forward, 3rd along the fence until switched to 3-wide running along the home straight first time. Moved up to site outside leader from 1000 M until headed on straightening. Steadily weakened.

Broke best, then travelled 4th or 5th, 4Ls behind lead. Improved to 3rd before making the home turn, could not sustain effort upon straightening, weakened steadily. (Rider dropped whip early in straight.)

Niggled early to lead along the fence until 1600 M out. Regained lead near 1200 M. Joined at 800 M until taking clear advantage after straightening. Fought on well final 150 M to fend off 2nd runner for a gamely victory.
Settled in midfield. Crept closer passing the rock and then wide rounding the home bend. No extra in straight.
Soon at back. Steadily improved to midfield rounding the stable bend but wide. Under pressure near the rock and wide again on the home bend. Dropped out steadily in straight.
Outpaced early despite ridden hard, raced 7-8Ls behind lead along the rails. Commenced run rounding the home bend, ran on in straight but no match the quinella pair.

Steadily dropped to the back, raced along the fence 8-9Ls behind the lead. Crept closer rounding the home bend when switching to 3-wide to improve. Made up steady ground in straight without threatening.
Steadily dropped towards rear. 4 wide rounding the home bend, made no improvement in straight.
Led on fence by 1-1/2Ls 1200 M out, never more than 2Ls clear, grabbed by winner about 300 M out, stayed on well to line.
About 2Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, forced out wider down back straight, 4Ls down turning for home, made no impression on principals.
About 6Ls or 7Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, same distance adrift 200 M out, ran on strongly close home to be nearest at finish.
Bit keen early on, always about 4Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, one-paced and never looked like reducing deficit.
Raced 2-wide between 1L and 2Ls off pace until about 500 M out when began to weaken considerably, eased down at top of home straight.
Keen out 2-wide 4Ls off pace 1200 M out to 600 M out when under pressure, never any threat.
About 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 5Ls down 800 M out, never got any closer to lead than that, very one-paced in stretch.
Raced 1 and 2-wide from 1000 M out to straight, about 1-3/4Ls down when checked by winner 200 M out, recovered to make only steady headway final stages.
5Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, through to 600 M out, 2-wide round final bend struggling entering straight when clipped heels, knuckled and almost fell, eased down.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off speed 1200 M out, forced 3-wide about 1000 M out, raced 4-wide round final bend to be about 4Ls down entering straight, no extra.
Keen early, always about 2Ls off pace on fence until final bend, led at top of home straight but hung in sharply 200 M out impeding STRONG SCOTCH, steadied and kept on well to line.
Slowest away, about 7L or 8Ls off pace on fence, 2-wide down back straight and wider turning for home when same distance off pace, no chance.
Settled at rear. Made moderate headway along fence late.
Dictated pace throughout, drew well clear final 200 M to score comfortably.
Pressed on from widest barrier but caught 5 or 6 wide behind midfield. Covered a lot of ground before dropping to tail 600 M out, stayed same in home stretch.
3 wide around midfield, hung out early and middle stages. Inconvenienced near 500 M and became 7Ls down on straightening, made no impression thereafter.
Settled just better than midfield on or one off fence. Kept on same pace in straight, posing no threat to the first two.
Held up last on rail. Crept closer rounding home turn to be 6Ls adrift rear of midfield turning in, made up some ground through beaten runners final 250 M.
5 wide in midfield going into first bend. Still at least 4 wide without cover along back straight, dropped away from top of straight.
Toward rear on fence, 4 or 5Ls off pace. Brushed rail near 600 M, kept on one pace in home straight.
2 wide near rear, 4 or 5Ls off lead. Unable to quicken in straight, tired closing stages.
Niggled early to be 3-wide behind leader, struggled to keep up 200 M out and commenced to hang out. Dropped out further from 400 M.
Never far off, tracked leader on fence 1100 M out before switching out to attempt to challenge near 500 M. Always safely held by winner though staying on quite well.
Midfield. Steady progress home bend to be 3rd early straight. Weakened close home.
Midfield early. Soon dropped back to around 10th. No improvement.
Slightly slowly away, always towards rear.
Behind midfield throughout.
Soon led. Held 1L advantage final turn. Won going away.
Jumped very awkwardly, never a factor.
Towards rear. Soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Continued to make steady progress home bend. Ran on steadily from 5th early straight for a remote 2nd.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to behind midfield approaching 800 M. Ran on final 200 M.
Tracked leader. Weakened closing stages.
Rear. Made up some ground from outside closing stages.
Midfield early. Soon dropped to the back.
Mostly 5th or 6th. Kept on without quickening.
Prominent. Weakened out of contention from 3rd final turn. Hung in throughout.
In touch before dropping to midfield or behind 800 M. Made no impression in straight.
Broke well and led, while shifting ground, until finding no extra inside final 200 M. (Lame.)
Tightened at start. Never better than midfield.
Never far off. One-paced closing stages.
Prominent till faded inside final 200 M.
Prominent till slightly inconvenienced when no extra inside final 200 M.
Never far off. Commenced move passing 400 M hitting front inside 200 M. Won readily.
Always in rear.
Never in contention.
Always well there niggling along but unable to match pace with winner closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled behind midfield. Made up late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Squeezed at start. Never in contention thereafter.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield home bend. No further progress.
Jumped awkwardly, soon moved along to be prominent. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered ground quickly to better than midfield, causing interference near 800 M. Weakened steadily final 250 M.
Never a factor.
Led field from 1200 M and never headed. Just held off runner-up's late challenges.
Prominent. Tracked winner 1000 M out. Faded badly soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Made steady progress from 800 M to be 5th home turn. Further improved to 3rd 200 M, soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Was checked approaching 800 M. Responded well from 8th 400 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Moved up from a wide draw to be prominent. Remained in touch until failing to hold position from 4th final turn.
Near rear. Switched to the outside final turn. Ran on well final 300 M.
At rear soon after start. No improvement.
Jumped well and was in the front early. Soon dropped back to midfield or behind. One-paced.
Midfield or behind. Modest progress in straight.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Made up a little ground inside 200 M.
Ridden to prominent position early, with brief lead far side. Weakened in straight.
Always in rear.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Travelled in midfield or better. Gained 2nd on rails turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening winner in straight.
Always in rear.
In rear of midfield. Kept on steadily down inner in straight to claim distant 3rd.
Broke well. Never far off before weakened upon straightening.
Well back into straight. Kept on past beaten runners down centre of straight.
Settled just behind midfield. Moved up to lead over 200 M out. Hung on well.
Held up towards rear. Kept on same pace early in straight.
Prominent. Lost ground into straight then faded under pressure.
Led mostly to 300 M then weakened.
Raced wide amongst leaders far side. Dropped out from approaching home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tailed off into straight. Picked up some late ground under pressure.
Niggled early to be in touch, 4th or 5th but wide in early and middle stages. Kept on quite well in straight but posing no threat to the first two.
Inside leader early. Disputed lead from 700 M until straightening, dropped out steadily from 300 M. (Lost off side hind plate.)
Well there, on the fence. Shifted away from rail to commence run upon straightening but only stayed on the same pace to the line.
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Unable to keep up before straightening. Dropped out steadily from 300 M.
Towards rear. Steadily dropped to the tail near the 600 M. Further detached entering the straight.
Hampered at start, steadily recovered to worse than midfield before the home bend. Made up a little ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Caught wide in midfield from a difficult gate. Under pressure from 600 M, found nothing in straight.
Bounded in the air, then ridden along to the front just behind leaders. Kept on after straightening until no extra final 100 M.

Soon at back. Wide along the back straight and rounding the home bend. Switched to the outer to commence run from 600 M, 3rd last into straight. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made up steady ground from 400 M until one paced concluding stages.
Niggled early to lead field until joined near 700 M, always 2-wide. Drew clear from 400 M to score comfortably.
About midfield along the fence. Some headway after straightening until no extra passing the 200 M.
Checked on exiting stalls, raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down off final bend, found nothing under pressure.
No speed early on, 4Ls off pace on fence from 1000 M out to stretch, 3rd and 3Ls off lead 200 M out, one-paced to line and caught for 2nd 50 M out.
Driven along 6Ls or 7Ls off pace when 2-wide 1000 M out, in rear and 7-wide entering home straight, 5Ls off winner in 6th place 200 M out, ran on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down and about two from rear turning for home, overhauled a few tired rivals on run-in.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1200 M out , driven along to maintain position when 3Ls down 800 M out, similarly placed and still struggling entering straight, stayed on at same pace to line.
Led about 1400 M out by 1/2L racing 2-wide and 1200 M out, under pressure once headed about 1000 M out, no chance at top of straight.
No speed early on and towards rear when ridden 1400 M out, 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down on inside and hard ridden 700 M out, well behind and eased down almost from top of straight.
Raced 3-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down and struggling off home turn, became further detached.
Enjoyed dream run on fence about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, quickened up well to lead 300 M out, shifted left through final 200 M, easily.
Deep on track (at least 4-wide) throughout and about 4Ls off pace until stretch, very one-paced final stages.
Bit keen early on, caught 4-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, weakened rapidly.
Raced 3-wide 1L off lead from 1200 M out to 600 m out, hard ridden when 2Ls down turning for home, 4Ls down in 4th place 200 M out, soon eased down.
On fence 1/2L off pace 1200 M out, narrow lead 1000 M out, 2Ls clear entering straight, not quicken up and grabbed by winner about 300 M out, weakened rapidly.
Ridden upon exiting gates, 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6Ls off pace and 6-wide entering straight, stayed on better than most to earn 4th place in a very strung out finish.
Not far away until struggling to hold position 1200 M out, under pressure 1000 M before dropping away quickly passing 800 M. Last 600 M out and not a factor thereafter.
Held up in rear. Moved closer rounding home turn to be 4Ls adrift on straightening, kept on well for a rather remote 3rd.
Soon set modest pace, taken on by IDOL 1600 m out and sat 2nd going into back stretch. Run ended 500 M out and dropped away steadily in home straight.
Pulled a bit early on fence forward of midfield. Got within 2-1/2Ls off leader 800 M out, then behind leader swinging into home stretch. Stayed on well though no match with winner.
Settled 3 or 4 wide in mid-division, got a bit closer 800 M out to be 3-1/2Ls off pace. 2Ls down turning in and responded well to hit front 250 M out, comfortably.
Around midfield on fence. Under strong pressure 700 M out to maintain position, found nothing after straightening and dropped away tamely. (Bled.)
Outside leader one off rail before taking over 1600 M out. Headed passing 250 M, steadily weakened.
Soon at rear, very keen early. Minor headway passing beaten runners after straightening, tired closing stages.
Settled 3 wide towards rear, advanced to midfield 1000 M out. Kept on quite well in home straight.
Travelled in mid-division before niggled along a bit to keep up 1200 M out. Under pressure 600 M out when dropped towards rear and 5 wide. Made no impression in home straight.
Bounded in air, then held up 2 wide at rear. 6 wide into straight, not come on.
Held rails position about 2-1/2Ls off speed through to home straight travelling well, held up on inside until 180 M out when switched into clear, finished off strongly but too late.
Led racing 4-wide and keenly 1000 M out, in 2nd place about 1/2L off pace and 3-wide until straight, regained advantage 300 M out but overhauled by winner 180 M out, no extra final stages.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, under pressure 600 M out, well beaten over 300 M out and eased down.
On fence about 1/2L off pace 1200 M out, same margin off lead when driven along entering straight, still 1/2L down 200 M out, weakened.
Raced 2-wide 1L to 2Ls off pace through to home straight when driven along to pick up, led about 180 M out, stayed on well.
Raced 3-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed until stretch, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on at same pace to snatch 3rd near line.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace through to home straight when hard ridden to lie up with pace, found nothing off bridle.
Bit keen and 3-wide about 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, soon beaten.
Led racing freely early on, travelled well about 1/2L up and 2-wide turning for home, soon under pressure and one-paced final 300 m.
Always trapped at least 6-wide entering home straight, 5Ls down and at least 6-wide entering home straight, eased down over 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls off pace down back straight, hard ridden 600 M out and never dangerous in home straight.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed 800 M out, 3Ls down entering straight, became further detached.
Always about 4-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, emptied out.
Caught 4 and 5-wide 1000 M out when 2Ls off pace, 3-wide 2-1/2Ls off pace and travelling well turning for home, found nothing off bridle.
Raced 2-wide leading by about 1L 1000 M out, disputed lead with TRUST ME through to home straight, grabbed by winner 300 M out and weakened quickly.
Caught 4 or 5-wide down back straight when about 4Ls off pace, driven along 700 M out when 5Ls adrift, soon tailed off, came home in own time.
1L off pace on fence 1000 M out, about 2-1/2Ls off lead through to home straight, soon dropped out.
Bit slowly away, caught 3-wide about 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 6Ls off and closer to fence turning in, 3Ls off lead, one-paced to line.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace 800 M out, 3Ls down entering straight, 2Ls down in 4th place 200 M out, no extra.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed, 2-wide entering straight, stayed on at same pace to line.
2-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace down back straight, slightly worse off turning for home when fanned out into centre of track, no chance 300 M out.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, steadily lost touch with principals.
Led very early on and disputed led out 2-wide with ALF through to home straight, passed by winner 300 M out and found nothing under pressure. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowest away and hard ridden very early on, raced 4 or 5-wide 800 M out, 7Ls down when tacked across to stand's rail off home turn, ran on well to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled well on fence about 4Ls off pace through to home stretch, quickened up well on rails to lead 300 M out and go 2Ls clear 200 M out, comfortably.
Rear till effort home bend and was alongside leaders 350 M. Unable quicken with winner and kept on same pace.
Prominent to straight where he kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Trailed field to straight where he made up considerable ground.
Prominent to home turn where he started to give ground.
Never far off to home bend. Found nothing on straightening.
Just behind leaders to home bend. Held some chance early in straight but did not sustain effort final 200 M.
Towards rear before making some improvement in straight. No extra towards finish.
In touch to straight where he stayed on steadily closing stages.
About 8th or 9th 1000 M and was 2nd last into straight. Made up some ground inside final 250 M.
In touch before dropping out of contention approaching home turn.
Was midfield rounding home bend before losing some ground turning into straight. Renewed effort and ran on a bit final 250 M.
Was worse than midfield before making steady headway coming into straight. Hit front and went clear 200 M out. Kept on strongly to line.
Never in the hunt.
Midfield to home turn. Found no extra on straightening.
In touch. Joint 3rd final turn. Weakened inside 200 M. (Bled.)
Towards rear. In the last pair final turn. Made up some ground from outside in straight.
Led field soon after start. Won joined 600 M. Kept on well along rail to regain advantage closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. No response when given reminders upon straightening.
Rushed along from a wide draw to join lead 600 M. Held on until headed inside 100 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back steadily from half-way.
Left awkwardly from widest draw, never a factor.
Left awkwardly, soon recovered ground to midfield. Kept on same pace from 5th 400 M.
Towards rear. Moderate progress 250 M.
Jumped well and led briefly. Dropped back steadily to be in midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Ridden along from a wide draw to be in touch. Kept on without threatening the 1st pair.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 6th turning in. Ran on moderately.
Chased leader disputing 3rd to home bend. Weakened.
Mostly in midfield. Fought on under pressure in straight to draw level over 100 M out but found winner too good.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped out. (Saddle shifted.)
Never in contention.
Mainly in rear of midfield to home bend. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Disputed lead. Hit front turning for home going 1L clear 200 M out but soon headed.
Well back to straight. Kept on one pace.
Behind midfield most of way. One-paced in straight.
Toward rear. Snuck up on rails turning in. Sustained effort down inner in straight to claim victory closing stages.
Never far off. Quickened to hold every chance past 200 M but had no more to give near finish.
Held slender lead most of way until coming under pressure approaching straight. Dropped away quickly.
Slowly away, never in contention.
In touch early, midfield from stable bend. Dropped out from home bend.
Slowly away, near rear. Very minor advancement in straight.
Behind midfield. Steady progress in straight.
Prominent. Took lead passing 1100 M. Maintained 3Ls advantage turning in. Held on until headed close home.
Better than midfield. Ran on well in straight.
Well there to 1100 M. Remained 4th on inside far side to early straight. Soon found no extra.
Prominent. Faded inside 200 M.
Behind the main bunch. Ran on steadily in straight to snatch victory close home.
Lost ground at start, near rear. Responded well final turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Dropped back slightly 1200 M to be 5th far side. One-paced.
Pushed along from a wide draw to reach 2nd 800 M out. Weakened final 200 M.
Never far off. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Well there. Hit front approaching Rock going clear rounding home bend. Unchallenged.
Held narrow lead early. Headed over 800 M out. Gradually weakened from home bend.
Never in contention.
Soon dropped to rear.
In rear of midfield to straight. Faded.
Towards rear to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Held up behind midfield. Gained some 4L 3rd turning in. One-paced without quickening.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses under pressure in straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Produced short-lived effort turning in. No extra in straight.
Raced wide in first few to straight then dropped out.
Niggled along to maintain in midfield or worse. Made no improvement in straight.

Niggled along to maintain in midfield along the fence. Saved ground on the rail to creep closer rounding the bend. Switched out to improve upon straightening but only kept on the same pace to the line.
Midfield or worse early. Under pressure from the Rock and steadily dropped to the rear while making the turn. Last into straight and then become further detached.

Missed the start and then was inconvenienced, soon dropped to the rear. Given some reminders and steadily improved along the fence to worse than midfield before the home bend. Ran on steadily in straight, just failed to run a place.
Raced wide in midfield, 5 or 6Ls behind pace. Switched to outer to commence run upon straightening but only kept on one pace to the line.
Raced prominently but 3 wide until straightening. Kept on until tiring out from 250 M.
Slow to begin and soon dropped to the back. Switched to 3-wide to commence run rounding the home bend but was still 2nd last into straight and over 10Ls behind lead. Made up good late ground.
Broke well, then niggled along to maintain at 4th along the rails 2-3Ls behind lead. Got its head on the side and eased back a bit near the 600 M. Ran on in straight but no match with the winner.
Well back. Ran past a few beaten runners concluding stages.
Broke best and then prominent. Kept on in straight and held on at the concluding stages for a minor placing.
Niggled along early to be in touch. Steadily dropped closer to rounding the home bend. Under pressure from 600 M and no extra in straight.
Jumped fairly, then steadily moved up along the rails to take running from the Rock. Drew well clear final 200 M to score comfortably.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1200 M out to home straight, moderate late headway to claim 4th place final 50 M.
About 4Ls off pace and 3-wide 1200 M out, 2-wide 1000 M out, under pressure from 600 M out and struggling turning for home, weakened rapidly.
Driven to lead on fence 1300 M out, never more than 2Ls clear until straight, neck clear of COMFORT 100 M out, kept on gamely.
Tried to lead on fence from gates but had to settle for racing upsides winner out 2-wide 1200 M out, 2Ls down 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, faded in straight.
Sat 2-wide about 4Ls off speed 1200 M out, on fence 1000 M out, in 5th place when hard ridden to pick up 500 M out, found nothing under pressure.
3-wide and about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, never got any closer to front than that.
Never travelled, 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, soon niggled along and hard ridden down back straight giving ground all the while, well beaten 600 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Very awkwardly into stride, raced 3-wide 1300 M out about 10Ls off pace, hung out down back straight, never a factor but ran on past a few beaten rivals close home.
About 6Ls or 7Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, driven along round final bend, one-paced to line.
4Ls off pace on fence about 1300 M out, 5Ls down 1000 M out, travelled well 6Ls off lead 500 M out, stayed on okay for 3rd but never any threat to front pair.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off lead 1200 M out, 3Ls down 800 M out, under pressure when on fence in 3rd place about 4Ls down 500 M out, very weak in stretch.
Had run of race about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed on fence, went 2nd 2Ls off pace 600 M out, got within a neck of winner 100 M out, couldn't follow through.
Not far away under pressure 600 M out. Not find much in home straight, one paced down centre of track.
Settled on fence rear of mid-division. Made no impression in home straight.
Soon slotted in on fence around midfield. Moved closer on home turn to be 3Ls down turning in, one paced in straight.
Didn't stand well in stall and missed start badly, well back on rails throughout, never a factor.
Slow to begin, pressed on from difficult barrier to go forward but was caught wide behind midfield, never on terms and was well beaten before turning for home.
Tracked leader 2 wide before taking over 200 M out, lengthened well to score comfortably.
3 wide at rear, last into straight, never on terms.
Slow to jump then reluctant to stretch out early and was detached from field. Improved to join rear of field 3 or 4 wide 600 M out, ran on marginally in straight towards outer.
Ridden early, then stayed in mid-division 2 wide. Under pressure 600 M out, not come on, dropped away from 200 M.
Soon led on rails, never more than 1L clear of eventual winner. Challenged on straightening, one-paced when headed near 200 M, plodded home for 3rd.
Ridden along early to secure prominent rails position 2Ls off lead. Right behind winner straightening up, ran on but never looked likely to pose too much of a threat.
Caught 4 wide in midfield going into first bend, move slightly closer entering back stretch. Struggled to keep up 600 M out, dropped out before straightening.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Picked up gradually passing 400 M. Gained 2nd near 100 M. No match with the winner.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily passing course proper.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield or behind. Improved from 600 M to be 2nd 400 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages. (Lame.)
Well there to half-way, dropped to midfield. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made up some ground inside 200 M, just missed a minor placing.
Soon prominent. Held 3rd until failing to hold place 200 M.
Made no show.
Slowly away, rear. Made moderate progress final 200 M.
In touch. Dropped to midfield course proper. Weakened.
Inconvenienced at start, towards rear throughout.
Made all. Went clear 200 M out.
Ridden early. Around midfield most of way. Kept on past beaten horses in straight.
Held up behind pace. Hit front rounding home bend. Hung on under pressure while shifting ground.
Never far off to straight then dropped out under pressure.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Trailed field most of way.
Always well there. Ran on steadily despite inconvenienced by winner in straight.
Among leaders early. Gained slender lead after first 400 M. Headed rounding home bend. No extra in straight.
Jumped best and well there briefly. Gave ground gradually from approaching home bend.
Towards rear. Effort rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Well back. Made no show in straight. Caught behind runners past 200 M.
Well back to straight. Finished strongly to snatch 2nd final strides.
Wide throughout. Prominent far side. Dropped out home bend.
Never in the hunt.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Made ground steadily in straight.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 600 M.
Left awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, never a threat.
Midfield. Behind midfield when unbalanced 800 M. Widest turning in. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Ridden along on inner to be in touch. Dropped back to midfield rounding home bend. Ran on final 200 M.
Prominent early. Dropped back to 4th 900 M. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
In touch early, soon taken back to behind midfield. Made good advancement from outside 800 M to take lead 600 M. Just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Soon tailed off. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch. Weakened inside 200 M.
Settled midfield. Progressed rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily to just miss narrowly.
Led briefly early, remained prominent to straight. Kept on but just lost 3rd near finish.
Soon led. Headed approaching 600 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Well there to 300 M, dropped out. (Lame.)
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Faded into straight.
Never a danger. Dropped out home bend. (Lame.)
Wide in midfield. Dropped out approaching home bend.
Rear. Took closer order home bend. Kept on steadily down straight without quickening.
Well there. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Made some progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. Headed inside final 200 M.
Settled within striking distance. Quickened in straight to hit front passing 200 M but caught by fast-finishing winner short of line. (Lame.)
Settled towards rear. Improving when checked over 250 M out. Finished well to snatch victory final stride.
Never better than midfield. Faded into straight.
Never far off. Held some chance early in straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Well there. Checked and became unbalanced about the 500 M. Dropped out from 300 M.
Missed the start and then was checked, at back. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Settled in 4th. Forward move from 800 M to lead narrowly until 200 M. Did not quicken when challenged by winner, further lost 2nd place near the line.
Remained last to straight. Made up little ground until no extra final 100 M.
Caught wide on the first turn, went forward to lead from 1400 M. Headed 300 M and then steadily dropped out.
Towards rear. Never in contention.
Bounded in the air, then travelled along midfield. Wide rounding the home bend, no improvement in straight.
Travelled comfortably along the fence around midfield. Switched away from the rail and crept closer rounding the home bend. Took charge from 200 M. Kept on.
Worse than midfield. Made up steady ground from 300 M, doing best work at finish.
Well there. Baulked behind leaders turning for home. Weakened steadily from 250 M.
About 10Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 6-wide entering straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out, comfortably.
Hampered badly at start, recovered to go 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, about 4Ls down 300 M out when shifted left, hampering eventual 3rd home. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.) (Sore.)
Awkwardly away, on fence 5Ls off lead 1000 M out, closer entering straight when every chance of at least a place, stayed on at same tempo.
2nd slowest away, about 11Ls off lead in rear 1000 M out, 7Ls down turning in, ran on well closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Very awkwardly away, raced 2-wide 5Ls off lead 1000 M out, about 4Ls down when hampered 300 M out, did not recover.
Best away and 2Ls clear on fence 1000 M out, 3Ls up 800 M out, led into home straight and just about in front 200 M out, no extra.
7Ls off speed 3-wide 1000 M out, 4Ls down seriously hampered 300 M out, ran on well again to be nearest at finish in 3rd place. (Placed 2nd.) (Sore.)
About 8Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, marginally closer and ridden entering straight, no impression.
Slowest into stride, about 9Ls or 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, in rear when driven along entering straight, soon beaten.
Awkwardly away, keen 4Ls off pace in 4th place racing 2 and 3-wide, closer and every chance at top of straight until about 200 M out when one-paced.
Keen early on, raced in 2nd place about 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, still second turning for home, found little under pressure.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, driven along 600 M out, 4Ls down and 5-wide entering straight, severely checked about 300 M out, did not recover.
No speed early on racing 2-wide 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, struggling at top of stretch and weakened rapidly.
Held 3rd place 2Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 1L off pace and with every chance off home turn, got head up and found nothing under pressure, well beaten 200 M out.
Niggled a bit early to stay in touch on fence about 2Ls off speed. Switched off rail straightening up to challenge, kept finding extra to prevail closing stages.
Midfield throughout, unable to quicken in straight.
Wide without cover towards rear throughout, hardly any improvement in straight.
Ridden along early from awkward barrier but outpaced at the back, covered a lot of ground and trailed field 600 M out.
Pushed along and was not far away early, soon outpaced and dropped to midfield. Under pressure 500 M out when dropping back further, made no impression in straight.
Wide at rear. Shifted in towards rail 600 M out and moved closer, 5Ls down turning in, made steady ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Smartest away, quickly pinched rail to make running. Joined near the 1000 M, stayed on well in straight and held every chance until overhauled by first pair close home.
Ridden along throughout the race but failed to muster speed and dropped steadily towards rear of midfield. Only headway in home straight passing beaten runners.
Soon outpaced towards rear. Never in contention.
Settled in mid-division on fence. Kept on same pace in home straight when drifting out.
Pushed along early to travel 3rd just behind leaders. Struggled to keep up after the 600 M, dropped away after straightening.
Jumped only fairly, worked forward to share lead one off rail passing 1000 M. Kept on well in home straight but found winner too strong concluding stages.
About 6Ls off pace and out 2-wide 1000 M out, steadied about 500 M out and carried wider to turn for home 6-wide, soon no chance.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls or 5Ls 1000 M out, towards rear and 5-wide turning for home, emptied.
3Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, driven along to stay in touch when 2-wide and 4Ls off pace 700 M out, no response and beaten turning for home.
Disputed lead on fence 1000 M out, 1L clear again 600 M out, overhauled by winner about 200 M out, hung on runners-up spot.
Raced 6Ls off pace racing 3 and 4-wide 1000 M out, never a factor at any stage.
Raced 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, worse off turning for home, well beaten 300 M out.
Slowest away, 4Ls off speed on fence 1000 M out, never got any closer to pace than that.
Raced 3-wde about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, did not take final bend well with head up, entered straight 5-wide and 5Ls off pace, ran on fairly final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
2nd slowest into stride, never better than 6Ls off pace through to home straight, moderate late headway in straight.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off pace in 4th place 1000 M out, similarly placed turning for home, kept on at same pace to line.
Driven along from gates to take up prominent position on fence 2Ls off pace, similarly positioned turning for home, failed to quicken up final stages.
Raced 2-wide disputing lead 1000 M out, soon settled about 1L off pace, picked up well in straight to lead about 200 M out, readily.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, under pressure rounding home bend, never a threat and one-paced to line.
Raced 4 and 5-wide about 4Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, no acceleration when required at top of stretch.
3Ls off pace towards centre of track 800 M out, kept on well to lead about 200 M out, driven out for smooth success.
About 6Ls off speed in rear 700 M out, never got competitive.
Awkwardly away, 2Ls off pace 700 M out, stuck on well final 200 M.
About 4Ls off pace towards stand's rail until about 400 M out, became further detached from then on.
Did not break well, drifted across to centre of track, always struggling.
Did not break that well, nearest to stand's rail about 4Ls off pace 600 M out, ran on quite well close home to be nearest at finish.
About 4Ls off pace 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, drifted across to stand's rail under pressure, never looked like getting involved.
Broke well and led on stand's rail, headed about 300 M out, weakened final 200 M.
About 2Ls off pace 800 M out, travelled well enough close to stand's rail until about 400 M out when came under pressure, not dangerous when short of room on fence concluding stages.
2Ls off pace 800 M out, under pressure from 400 M out, kept on at same pace.
4Ls off pace 800 M down centre of track, 3Ls down 500 M out, same pace to line.
5Ls off pace 700 M out, niggled along 600 M out, ran on well final stages to be nearest at finish.
1L off pace 800 M out, a neck down 500 M out, no match to winner's pace but did well to hang on for runners-up berth.
Always prominent. Cruised to lead 200 M out, easing down final strides.
Always at the back.
2nd to straight where he kept on under pressure. Found first 2 too strong.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Made no show on straightening.
About 7th halfway before improving to 4th early in straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Unable to hold winner 200 M out and lost minor placing near finish.
Last to straight where he ran on well until baulked 150 M. Finished strongly when clear near finish.
Never far off to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Mostly in midfield to straight where he made steady progress to line.
Jumped well before settling in midfield 1200 M. Dropped out of contention shortly on straightening.
In rear to straight where he failed to run on.
Prominent to straight. Unable to quicken final 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Weakened from 500 M.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield home bend. Steadied when weakening 300 M.
Near rear. Ran on well from outside in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Ridden from a wide draw to be in the front pair. Gained upper hand 250 M. Was beaten narrowly at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made up some ground 250 M.
Slowly away and was reluctant to stretch out. Last throughout.
Mainly 6th throughout.
Towards rear. Crowded approaching 800 M. Made up some ground on inside 400 M. One-paced when under pressure closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch, 2Ls 5th rounding home bend. Sustained effort in straight to just get up on the line.
Soon better than midfield. Progressed to 4th 850 M. Made no show in straight.
Led or joined lead to 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Soon behind midfield. One-paced.
Midfield. Made moderate progress early in straight but found no extra closing stages.
Restrained within striking distance. Quickened from 4th into straight to hit front 200 M out but caught by fast-finishing winner close home.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Improved towards rear rounding home bend. Ran on to be nearest at finish in straight.
Behind midfield. Faded into straight.
Ridden along from wide draw. Took charge approaching home bend. Joined into straight and swamped inside 200 M.
Led early. Settled just off the pace home bend. Joined leader upon straightening. Faded passing 200 M.
Never far off. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always well behind.
Settled behind midfield. Finished strongly inside 200 M to snatch victory short of line.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide behind midfield. Weakened into straight.
Always in last few.
Well there. No extra final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Improved steadily to 4th final turn. Kept on but was one-paced final 200 M.
Led briefly early, then dropped back gradually along inner. Out-paced soon after straightening.
Left awkwardly, at rear. Severely checked near 800 M. Widest turning in and ran past a few beaten horses.
Towards rear. Made some progress to just behind midfield home bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
Mainly midfield or behind.
Bounded in the air at start, towards rear. Soon recovered ground to be in touch. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Never able to feature.
Led briefly early until 850 M. Remained prominent to straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Always well there, 1L 2nd 400 M. Kept on but unable to match speed with the winner.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show inside 200 M.
Midfield from widest draw. Moved forward to take lead 850 M. Held on well to win impressively.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 800 M to be just behind midfield. Kept on in straight.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group 1000 M. Ran on quite well 300 M to snatch 3rd final strides.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Always in last few. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Effort on outer rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to miss narrowly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout. Found nothing in straight.
Stalked leading trio in remote 4th. Just over 2Ls behind turning in. One-paced in straight.
Well back to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Well back to straight. Ran on till no extra near finish.
Held up behind pace. Quickened to lead upon straightening kicking 2Ls clear over 200 M out. Flattered and caught in the shadows of the post.
Around mid-division before coming under pressure home bend. Faded into straight.
Never better than midfield. Weakened into straight.
Settled towards rear. Commenced to improve over 200 M out but severely baulked.
Led till no extra shortly after straightening.
Behind midfield early. Raced in midfield far side. Ran on steadily down straight to claim victory close to home.
Behind midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Ran on closing stages without threatening.
Soon took up running. Kept on well in straight until headed near 100 M, fought on for 2nd narrowly.
Well there 3rd or 4th, 3-wide. Unable to accelerate in straight but plugged on to the line.
Steadily dropped to worse than midfield, wide along the back straight and rounding the home turn. Kept on quite well in straight.
Travelled kindly in midfield 3-wide 4 or 5Ls off lead. Kept on well in straight, just missed a minor placing.
Travelled 3 wide worse than midfield, 6 or 7Ls behind pace. Ran on well when cleared 200 M out to dead heat for 3rd.
Better than midfield, travelled at 5th, 2-wide. Over the last 300 M was held up for running, unable to challenge.
Slowly away, then steadily picked up to the front and tracked leader. Kept on in straight until no extra final 150 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground through field final 250 M.
Outpaced at back despite pushing along. Remained last upon straightening. 7Ls behind lead and switched to the outer for running. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Soon midfield along the fence. Was awkwardly placed early in the straight and then steadily dropped to the last.
Steadily dropped towards rear, raced 2-wide. Shifted to 4-wide rounding the home bend to commence run, made up a little ground 300 M out until tiring final 100 M.
Raced handily behind leader on the fence. Failed to quicken in straight.
Raced 2 wide 6Ls off pace worse than midfield. Closer order rounding the home bend and switched to 4-wide into straight. Ran on steadily to take charge inside 100 M, held on.
Worse than midfield along the rails. Dropped towards the rear rounding the home bend. Made no improvement in straight.
Held up about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed through to 400 M, just over 2Ls down 200 M out, kept finding and prevailed on the nod.
Always about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace before weakening markedly final 200 M out, had been niggled since 700 M out and was hung in on by CROCKER about 500 M out.
Always about 3Ls off pace on or close to far rail until 400 M out, over 5Ls down 200 M out but rallied again close home to reduce margin a little.
3Ls off speed 800 M out, 4Ls off 400 M out, retreated gradually.
Outpaced early near far rail about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace 800 M out, still the same distance adrift and struggling until final 200 M when he drew slightly closer.
Broke well but about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 800 M to 400 M out, weakened steadily thereafter.
About 2-1/2Ls off pace 800 M out travelling okay, began hanging in on KENZAN about 500 M out, hard ridden 400 M out, little response. (Lame.)
Always right on the speed - a neck down 800 M out, a neck in front 400 M out, 1L clear nearest pursuers and over 2Ls ahead of winner 200 M out, kept on well but overhauled on line.
4Ls off pace 800 M out, niggled along 600 M out and responded to go 2-1/2Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra final stages.
Never saw which way they went - 7Ls adrift 800 M out, came home in own time.
Led by a neck 800 M out, a head down in 2nd place 400 M out, 1L down 200 M out, battled on well to line.
Covered up about 3Ls off pace 700 M out, soon under the whip and no chance 400 M out.
Bit slowly away out wide but recovered to be 1L off pace 800 M out, a neck off lead 400 M out when hard ridden, weakened passing 200 M marker and eased near line.
In touch early and caught wide, shifted across to track leader 2 wide 1000 M out. Kept on without quickening in home stretch, commenced to give ground close home.
Held up 2 wide in mid-division, gained split 350 M out and made sustained run to collect race readily concluding stage.
Knuckled at start, settled just behind mid-division 3 wide. No improvement in home straight.
Ridden early to hold position 2 wide just forward of midfield. Made no progress in straight, tired close home.
Handily placed on fence, about 3Ls off pace. Unable to find extra in straight, gave ground steadily from 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, worked forward to take up handy position but got close to heels and was checked 1400 M out. Remained 3 wide 2-1/2 off pace, one paced in straight, run ended inside final 150 M.
Tardy start, recovered to be 4 wide in midfield. Dropped away from 300 M.
Broke well and just off the pace, reached rail 1200 M out. Kept on well in straight before getting tired concluding stages and failed to claim a minor placing.
Pressed on to dictate pace, hugged rail from 1300 M. Stayed on well in straight when hanging out badly, no answer to winner's finishing kick when headed near home.
Began very awkwardly, towards rear on fence about 7Ls off lead. Brief effort near 200 M, soon no extra.
Travelled 2 or 3 wide rear of midfield or worse. 7 or 8Ls adrift upon straightening, made up good ground final 300 M until no extra last bit.
From awkward gate was taken back towards rear and closer to rail. 4 wide 7 or 8Ls down turning in, made significant progress down centre of track from 300 M till no extra closing stages.
Outpaced and trailed field before running past beaten runners final 200 M.
Niggled a bit to travel 3Ls off pace on rail just forward of midfield. Dropped back a bit near 1000 M. 5Ls down straightening up, ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Led field from 1400 M. Headed soon after turning in. Found no extra from 3rd 200 M.
Soon well there. 4th final turn. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to take 3rd closing stages.
Always prominent. Reached 2nd 200 M out. Kept on.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Made no show from home bend.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to midfield passing 1200 M. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Ran past a few weakening runners in straight.
Led field early stages, then remained prominent until re-gaining advantage 400 M. Won readily.
Midfield or behind. No significant progress.
Left very awkwardly, last. Modest progress early straight.
Better than midfield. Dropped out from 7th final turn.
Stumbled soon after start and was at rear. Made progress from outside 1000 M to be 5th home bend. Failed to quicken while hanging in final turn and in straight.
Better than midfield early. Dropped back to 8th or 9th first turn. Soon faded. (Hung out.)
Rear early. Improved to midfield home bend. Sustained progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Remained well back till commenced run home bend. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent briefly. Gave ground gradually dropping to midfield home bend. Lost further ground into straight.
Prominent to home bend and dropped out quickly.
Midfield. Improving when steadied for a run on rails inside 200 M. Renewed effort late.
Well there. Quickened to dispute lead upon straightening. No extra final 200 M.
Midfield to halfway. Faded.
Led or disputed lead to straight then gradually weakened.
Disputed lead. Gained slender advantage turning in. Hung on well under pressure.
Given reminders early. Never far off. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never seen with a chance.
Soon dropped to rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight. Under pressure 200 M to obtain a minor placing near finish.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to just better than midfield 800 M out. Pushed along 400 M to take lead 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from outside 200 M out.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader final turn. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or better. Faded 400 M.
Midfield or better. Progressed rounding home bend to be 4th turning in. Soon dropped out.
Left awkwardly, near rear. Made up steady ground on inside after straightening.
Better than midfield. Dropped a bit to midfield or behind far side. No significant progress in straight.
Left awkwardly, towards rear. Short-lived effort 1000 M to reach rear of midfield. Soon weakened.
Towards rear. Unbalanced 1200 M, losing ground. Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there from widest draw. Ran on steadily from 3rd early straight to gain upper hand closing stages.
Led field to 200 M. Lost 3rd close home.
Midfield most of way. One-paced in straight.
Wide throughout. Midfield before running on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Quickly picked up to rear of field. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Restrained in midfield. Just behind leaders turning in. Burst through runners to take charge closing stages.
Blundered badly jumping out and dropped to tail-end. Never a feature thereafter.
Well there to straight. Dropped away quickly.
Broke well. Held up in midfield. Very wide turning in. Kept on.
Took up running coming out of back straight and led till swamped over 150 M out.
Never far off. Quickened to hold some chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort.
Settled in midfield. Towards rear into straight. No clear run early on. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Broke well from poor draw. Raced some 3-wide just off the pace sharing pace into straight. Unable to quicken to match pace of winner inside 200 M.
Wide in midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure.
Wide in last few. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well there far side. Lost position rounding home bend. Dropped out passing 300 M.
Mainly midfield. Under pressure from 500 M. Dropped out steadily soon after straightening. (Bled.)
Soon sat outside leader. Kept on one pace in straight until no extra final stages to miss 3rd placing.
Mainly midfield and 3-wide. Kept on in straight, just claimed 3rd close home.
Jumped awkwardly and soon at back. Never a factor.
Soon behind leaders handily 3rd on the fence. Ran on well in straight but found the winner too strong.
Broke well and took up running. Extended the lead after straightening and kept on well to the line for a comfortable victory.
Outpaced early, towards rear. Ran past beaten runners after straightening and then kept on the same pace to the line.
Settled about 3Ls off pace on inner through to home straight when travelling well, every chance when improved to go 1L off lead 200 M out, no extra close home.
Raced about 8Ls off pace down back straight, travelling okay when 6Ls down entering straight, soon under pressure and found nothing, well beaten 300 M out.
No speed early on and raced 2-wide and 8Ls to 10Ls off pace through to stretch, 4Ls down on fence 200 M out, closed off fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1000 M out to stretch, about 2Ls down 200 M out, didn't quicken up through concluding 200 M.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 3Ls off pace through to stretch, all out when 2Ls down 200 M out, unable to get any closer.
Never on terms at any stage - at least 9Ls off pace down back straight, 8Ls down one from rear turning for home, soon left with no chance.
Always on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through to home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out and very one-paced from then on.
Led on fence 1000 M out from wide draw, never more than 1-1/2Ls clear through to straight, kept on gamely under strong pressure all the way to post.
Raced 2-wide about 1-1/2Ls off pacesetting winner through to straight when still travelling all right, soon under pressure and faded rapidly once headed about 300 M out.
5Ls off lead and 2-wide 1000 M out, niggled along 700 M out, improved to go about 1-1/2Ls off front 200 M out, one-paced final stages.
At least 2-wide and 8Ls off pace down back straight, 6Ls down and 4-wide off final bend, well beaten 300 M out.
Had run of the race on inside about 2Ls off pace until home turn, every chance when at winner's quarters 200 M out, kept on at same pace to line.
Travelled on and off the bridle throughout - about 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer and driven along turning in, steadied when short of room 200 M out and near line.
Broke well when steadily dropped towards rear of midfield. 5Ls down 400 M out, made steady ground on outer final 250 M to snatch race final stride.
Midfield throughout, unable to quicken.
Midfield before running on a bit concluding stages.
There or thereabouts throughout, just missed a minor placing. (Rider broke whip near the 400 M.)
In front of mid-division towards inside rail. Unable to keep up from 200 M, dropped away steadily.
Badly outpaced on jumping, under pressure but trailed field throughout.
Behind front runners to 300 M, dropped away tamely from 200 M.
Fractious and damaged rear gate. Did not jump well, quickly recovered to be just off pace. Ran on well to hit front inside final 100 M, just touched off by winner on the line.
Settled forward of midfield, came under pressure 400 M out, kept on same pace without quickening.
Jumped very awkwardly and was towards rear throughout, raced greenly final 200 M.
Began badly and lost ground, outpaced at rear racing greenly throughout.
Up with pace on inside rail, drifted out 500 M out to be four off rail. Stayed on well final stages.
Not far away before beginning to give ground 250 M out.
Always on firing line, stayed on well closing stages to hold every chance until overhauled by placegetters near finish.
About 9Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, managed to get within 6Ls of lead swinging for home but fell away again in straight.
About 4Ls off speed on fence 1600 M out, 7Ls off 800 M out and 4Ls down again entering straight, never looked like winning and only stayed on at same pace.
Missed start by about 2Ls, 14Ls off pace 1600 M out, never a factor, in rear throughout.
Caught 3-wide about 6Ls off pace 1600 M out, niggled along 800 M out when 8Ls off pace, 5Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, stayed on well to lead about 150 M out, pushed out.
Raced 2-wide 10Ls off pace 1600 M out, never out of last two in the field and in hopeless position on home turn.
Held up 8Ls off lead and 2-wide 1600 M out, 6Ls off lead and 5-wide into straight, soon beaten.
About 7Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, 9Ls down 800 M out and driven along to keep up, 6Ls down off final bend, posed little threat in home stretch.
Led or in 2nd place throughout - 4Ls or 5Ls off pacesetting GOOD MAN down back straight, led at top of straight and 2Ls clear 250 M out, no extra when grabbed by winner 150 M out.
No speed early on about 10Ls off pace and 2-wide 1600 M out, 6-wide and 7Ls off leader turning for home, never looked like reducing the deficit.
About 10Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, 7Ls down and 2-wide turning for home and travelling okay, found nothing off the bridle.
Raced 2-wide about 10Ls off pace early on, went 6Ls off speed but wider 1000 M out, 4-wide and 3Ls off lead turning for home, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, didn't come on.
