Led very early on but settled on fence 2Ls off pace 1600 M out, 7Ls down 800 M out and 3Ls off entering straight, all out to go 2Ls down 200 M out, faded rapidly.
Driven to lead on fence 1700 M out, skipped 4Ls or 5Ls clear down back straight, 1L clear off home turn but overhauled by KOH-I-NOOR rapidly and dropped right out.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1600 M out, about 6Ls behind leader in 3rd place 900 M out, hard ridden to go 3Ls down turning for home, nothing more to give in straight.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3-wide off home and joined leaders about 350 M out, headed about 250 M out and weakened quickly.
Raced 2 and 3-wide 8Ls or 9Ls off pace down back straight, 5Ls down at home turn and quickened up very well from top of straight to lead 200 M out, drew clear, impressive.
Failed to lead early on 3Ls and off pace 800 M out, hard ridden and beaten when 2-wide and 2Ls off pace entering straight.
Raced 2-wide about 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down going well off home turn, 1L off lead 200 M out, involved in three-way photo for placings.
Dwelt in gates and lost about 5Ls at start as a result, stuck in rear until home straight when about 8Ls off pace, no chance thereafter.
2nd slowest away, 5Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 3Ls off lead entering straight, bit short of room between tiring HALO KING PRAWN and THUNDER STORM final stages.
Raced 2-wide about 6Ls off pace down back straight, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace entering straight, 1L down 200 M out, no chance with winner but just nicked 2nd place on line.
About 8Ls off pace on inside 1000 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, never got within striking distance of leading bunch in stretch.
2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd from 1400 M out, 3Ls down in 3rd place 800 M out, travelling well 2Ls off lead at top of straight, soon challenged on all sides but did well to hang on for 3rd place.
Led passing 1400 M marker and 3Ls clear 800 M out, 2Ls up entering straight, headed 250 M out and one-paced through closing stages.
7Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, caught behind five or six rivals through full length of stretch though jockey never had to stop riding.
Always outpaced - raced one from rear about 10Ls off speed down back straight, no impression.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls off speed but 5-wide turning for home, 5Ls off lead 200 M out and soon eased down.
3-wide and 7Ls off lead 1000 M out, very wide (about 7 or 8 wide) and tracking winner into home straight, weakened right away.
Always prominent. Hit front approaching 250 M, holding on under pressure.
Never far off to straight where he kept on same pace.
Towards rear till staying on a bit in straight.
Shared pace before taking lead approaching home bend. Was headed 250 M out, keeping on well for 2nd.
Made no show.
Last into straight. Never in contention.
Never troubled leaders.
Worse than midfield to home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Well there before dropping to midfield 800 M. Ran on a bit inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
2nd last turning into straight where he made up some ground closing stages.
Well there before steadily losing ground coming into straight.
Never far away, pulling hard, to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Always well there. Kept on but not quite reach first two close home.
Midfield before dropping to the rear 1300 M. Ran past a few beaten runners in straight.
Towards rear. Hung out rounding home turn. No progress.
Jumped well and was in the front early, settling 4th. Better than midfield far side. Ran on steadily in straight and was just beaten narrowly.
Midfield. Crept closer order to 4th early straight. Responded well 200 M to just miss a minor placing.
Towards rear. Ran on well inside 250 M to gain upper hand near finish.
Towards rear. Unbalanced and dropped to the last passing 1400 M. Crept closer turning in but found not much room early. Ran on a bit when in clear closing stages.
Towards rear. Made progress from outside rounding home bend to be 4-wide midfield turning in. Soon weakened.
Prominent. Dropped back to 5th far side. Held up 350 M when in midfield. Recovered ground 200 M until one-paced close home.
Well there. Among the front runners passing 700 M. Held on but found no extra when headed inside 200 M.
Soon prominent. Led briefly 1400 M. Dropped back rapidly from 700 M. Tailed off.
Slowly away, last to stable bend. Remained in the rear group until making up good ground inside 300 M.
Midfield. Behind midfield 1000 M out. Kept on 200 M but found no extra close home.
Better than midfield. Ridden along to be 2nd 1000 M. Faded inside 250 M.
Midfield. Pushed along to be prominent 1200 M. Reached front runners 600 M. Held on until weakening out of contention 200 M.
Well there. Hit front upon straightening kicking 1L clear past 200 M. Caught in the shadows of the post.
Better than midfield to straight. Faded passing 300 M.
Waited with. Finished strongly down centre of straight to snatch victory short of line.
Raced wide and better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Broke well. Settled in rear. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Led till headed upon straightening. Swamped for placing close to home.
Prominent till found no extra final 200 M.
Never far off. Ran on steadily down straight to miss narrowly.
Well there to straight then faded under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield. Finished well final 200 M to narrowly to miss the placegetters.
Always in last few.
Towards rear to straight. Faded.
Reared and lost ground at start, always at the back.
Soon in touch. Took lead 600 M out. Held on well to the line.
Better than midfield. Unable quicken to progress from half-way.
Led briefly early, then remained prominent until fading out of contention 250 M.
Towards rear. Dropped out 400 M.
Midfield at best.
Always prominent. Kept on well 200 M but failed to catch the winner.
Midfield or better. Dropped back from course paper. No recovery.
Near rear. Made up good ground from 400 M, never nearer.
Bounded at start, midfield. Made progress from 600 M to reach 3rd 400 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily 250 M without threatening the first pair.
Around midfield to 500 M. Made no show.
Prominent. 4th 500 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Never nearer.
Well back. Took closer order home bend. Ran on well down straight.
Lost ground at start. Never a danger. (Lame.)
Midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish without threatening.
Wide in midfield far side. Dropped out home bend.
Prominent to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Around midfield before faded into straight.
Never far off till faded out closing stages. (Sore.)
Never nearer.
Attempted to make all. Found no extra when headed over 200 M out.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Midfield throughout.
Well there. Hit front soon after straightening and quickly drew clear.
Wide throughout. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.

Broke best and led briefly, eased to sit behind leaders rounding stable bend. Ran on after straightening and took lead 250 M, tired steadily final 100 M. (Rider momentarily lost near side stirrup iron 200 M.)
From a good gate steadily went to the lead. Was joined near the 700 M. Headed near the 250 M and weakened gradually thereafter.
Ridden along early to maintain position in midfield but 3-wide. Had difficulty to keep up running past 1000 M and steadily dropped to last at 600 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, then steadily recovered to midfield along the rails, 5Ls behind lead. Shifted away from the fence to commence run near 600 M. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch victory near finish.
Soon towards the rear. Under pressure from 600 M. Kept on the same pace in straight, ran past a few beaten runners final 200 M.
Ridden along to go forward from a bad gate, sat outside leader from 1400 M. Shared lead from 700 M until failing to keep up near the 350 M, dropped out steadily thereafter.

Inconvenienced on jumping, than raced 3-wide towards rear 10Ls off pace. Made some progress along the back straight but then caught wide rounding the home bend when under pressure. Unable to quicken in straight.

Unable to match speed early despite pushing, soon raced 8Ls off pace worse than midfield. Crept closer along the rail rounding the home bend. Kept on in straight until tired steadily inside the 200 M.
Soon travelled 4th, 2 wide and 3Ls off pace. Ran on steadily after straightening, held narrow advantage 100 M out but was unable to fend off winner's challenge closing stages.
Soon took up a rail run, travelled 5th about 4Ls behind lead. Plugged on in straight without any threat.
Raced better than midfield, 2-wide 4 or 5Ls off pace. Pressed on after the 600 M to make some steady progress. Kept on in straight until no extra final 150 M.
Outpaced despite niggled along early. Trapped 3-wide rounding the stable bend, worse than midfield. Under pressure from 600 M but unable to accelerate. Dropped out steadily from 250 M.

Outpaced early, towards rear, 8 or 9Ls behind lead along the rails. Made up good ground through field after straightening, closest at finish. (Was hit on the head by the whip of another rider about the 50 M.)
At the tail of the field, 12Ls behind pace. Made up some ground from 300 M despite having to steady and shift in to avoid another runner near 200 M.
Raced 3-wide a neck off pace 1000 M out, shot 5Ls clear of pack upsides PAOBRIDGE 900 M out, under pressure turning for home, dropped away rapidly.
Always about 3-wide and no closer than 8Ls off pace until home straight when moderate late headway was made.
Held narrow lead 1000 M out, stretched 5Ls clear along upsides CONJURING 800 M out, tired in straight and headed 200 M out, weakened.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and about 5Ls off pace 800 M out through to about 300 M out, kept on well final stages.
Very slowly away, 6Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 7Ls down turning and hard ridden off home turn, ran on fairly well in stretch but had too much to do. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in midfield - about 7Ls off pace towards inner 800 M out, hard ridden and 6Ls off pace entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on at same pace.
4Ls off pace 1000 M out and 2-wide, 7Ls down 800 M out, 6Ls down and outpaced turning for home, stayed on at same tempo to line.
No speed early on and at least 8Ls or 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, still well adrift and wide entering straight, about 7Ls off speed 200 M out, ran on very strongly final 150 M to be nearest at finish.
Away well to lead very early on, soon 5Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, about 3-1/2Ls off lead turning for home, 1L off pace 200 M out, no chance with winner.
Raced on fence about 1/2L off lead 1000 M out, 5Ls off by pacesetting CONJURING and PAOBRIDGE and niggled along 800 M out, 3Ls down on straightening, led 200 M out, readily.
Slowly into stride and at least 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, hopeless position turning for home, never a factor.
Never closer than 8Ls off pace at any stage, struggling a long way from home and eased down at top of stretch.
Niggled to secure position in midfield near rail. 5Ls down on straightening when switched off rail to challenge, responded well from 300 M to take charge 100 M out, comfortably.
Waited with at rear. Switched 4 wide before straightening, made gradual ground from 250 M, effort not sustained final stages.
Slow to begin, at rear until running past tired runners final 200 M.
Broke well then held up behind leaders on rail. One paced before beginning to give ground inside final 200 M.
2 or 3 wide just in front on midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight, tired close home.
Driven to find midfield position out wide. Could not keep up 1000 M out and dropped back towards rear. Last on straightening and no impression thereafter.
Tracked leader 2 wide before dropping away steadily from 250 M.
Settled 2 wide rear of midfield. Dropped to the back rounding home turn, no response in home straight.
In front of mid-division on fence, found nothing under pressure straightening up, dropped out tamely. (Heart irregularity.)
2 wide around midfield but never on terms, especially in early and middle stages when unbalanced and dipped. Dropped back a bit home turn when under pressure, ran on steadily final 200 M.
Not far away, pulled a bit early stages. 3 or 4Ls adrift turning in, unable to quicken to challenge.
Handy, never less than 3 wide. Made some progress in straight but soon one-paced.
Soon took up running, pinched rail 1400 M out, Drew 2Ls clear straightening up, every chance until overhauled near the 100 M, kept on quite well for 2nd.
Jumped very awkwardly then travelled toward rear on fence. Made up some ground from 300 M, one paced concluding stages.
Midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd 800 M. Found no extra inside 150 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily 400 M to just prevail close to home.
Towards rear. Moderate progress to be just behind midfield turning in. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Pushed along to take lead from 1000 M. Was joined home bend, regaining 1L advantage 400 M. Kept on same pace when headed 100 M.
Prominent. Held 4th to 300 M. Weakened.
Left awkwardly and was reluctant to stretch out early. Never a factor.
Behind midfield early, soon dropped to the rear.
Towards rear. Made minor advancement closing stages.
Well there. Joint lead rounding home bend. 1L 2nd early straight before running on to take over inside 100 M. Just beaten final strides.
Prominent. Held 3rd before dropping to 5th passing 800 M. One-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Midfield to home bend then gave ground gradually.
Very wide early. Improved to forward of midfield before fading rapidly rounding home bend.
Never far off. Chased leader into straight but failed to quicken to challenge.
Never a danger.
Always in last few.
Midfield to home bend then weakened. (Bled.)
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight then faded.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight.
Made all to win unchallenged.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight. One-paced. (Nasal discharge.)
Raced wide in midfield to home bend then faded.
Towards rear. Took closer order home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Never able to challenge.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on outside final 300 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Behind midfield. Dropped out in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Made no show in straight.
Checked soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Settled 4th on the rail. Improved to 3rd turning in. Sustained effort inside 200 M to hit front final 50 M.
Towards rear. Minor progress when under pressure final 200 M.
Mainly 5th throughout.
Left awkwardly, remained at rear. Made moderate progress inside 200 M.
Led field from widest draw. With 1L advantage turning in. Found no extra when headed inside 50 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to snatch 2nd near finish.
Sat outside leader. Held good chance inside 300 M but effort not sustained.
Held 3rd to 300 M. Unable quicken to challenge.
Always well behind.
Began well then travelled in prominent position to straight and gradually weakened.
Close up to straight then gradually faded.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Rear to straight. Ran on past beaten runners.
Not far off before hampered and lost position coming out of back straight. One-paced final stretch.
Towards rear most of way.
Broke well then held up mainly in 5th. Similar position turning in but failed to quicken to challenge. Faded close home.
Midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. Faded closing stages.
Soon took up running and virtually made all, but pipped at post when no extra.
Held up behind pace. Slightly inconvenienced 800 M out. Obtained split over 200 M out and quickened well to take charge short of post.
Rear far side. Gained ground wide rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Outpaced early despite being ridden along. Worse than midfield and wide without cover most of the way. Dropped to last entering straight. Not a factor afterwards.
At the back, wide around the home bend. Made up some late ground final 150 M.
From a difficult gate pushed forward and made all. Held on to the line.
Pushed along early to maintain in midfield position. Dropped to worse than midfield after 1400 M. Not a factor from 600 M.
At the back to 400 M. Made up a lot of ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly, at the back. Made up some late ground.
Midfield early. Progressed from 1300 M to be 3rd near 800 M. Weakened steadily from 300 M.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight without threatening. (Lost off side front plate.)
Behind to 700 M, improved around home bend. Ran on steadily but never looked likely to catch winner.
Sat behind leader. Shifted out on home turn to make challenge. Kept on well but failed to catch the winner and further lost 2nd place near the line.
Hard ridden with the whip from the start to maintain in midfield position. Under the whip again near 500 M and soon faded.
Midfield. Ran on a little in straight.
Broke well, around 3rd or 4th to 700 M, soon under pressure. No response thereafter.
Better than midfield. Crowded near the 800 M, then travelled to 3rd into straight. Gave ground from 200 M. (Significant amount of blood in windpipe.)
2Ls off lead on fence from 1200 M out through to stretch, led at about 150 M, driven out.
Soon led on fence but never clear by more than 1L, under pressure turning for home and soon overhauled, dropped out instantly. (See Racing Incidents.)
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence from 1300 M out to home straight, just about 3rd about 2-1/2Ls off pace 200 M out, just held on in blanket finish for 3rd.
Shuffled back exiting gates, about 8Ls off pace on fence 800 M out, marginally closer turning for home and 5Ls down 200 M out, staying on, no extra close home.
Disputed lead out 4-wide early on, 3-wide 1L off pace 800 M out, 2Ls down 4-wide and under pressure turning for home, weakened rapidly.
Raced 2-wide about 2-1/2Ls off pace until being checked severely 800 M out, lost all momentum thereafter and was beaten turning for home.
Raced 4-wide but had cover about 5Ls off speed 1200 M out, similarly positioned entering straight but didn't quicken up and soon beaten.
Raced 2 and 3-wide about 4Ls off speed through to stretch, about 3Ls down 200 M out, nicked 4th place in bob of heads.
Always raced 2-wide about 1L off winner before taking it up 400 M out, still 1L clear 200 M out but soon grabbed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
Hard driven from barriers, about 7Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, in rear entering straight and very weak through concluding stages.
Raced 2-wide and 5Ls off pace until 800 M out when hampered a couple of times, short of running about 350 M out, every chance of running a place 200 M out but was one-paced to line.
Raced about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace on fence through to stretch, challenged along fence and 3Ls off leader 200 M out, rather one-paced final stages.
Settled about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until 800 M out when it nearly fell after clipping heels, recovered to go 2Ls off pace and 2-wide turning in, stayed on at same pace, just denied 3rd place.
Bit keen early on racing 3 and 4-wide without cover and about 4Ls off pace, 6-wide into home straight and 3Ls off speed, didn't manage to overtake a single challenger, on run-in.
Held up 7 or 8Ls off speed towards rear. Not much room at top of home straight, made gradual ground final 300 M when into clear.
Held up at the back. Made steady headway final 300 M on outer passing beaten runners.
Broke fairly, steadily improved to be 2Ls off lead 1200 M out. Run ended soon after straightening and dropped away quickly. (Bled.)
Ridden to stay in mid-division 3 wide, unable to quicken on straightening when taken wider, gave ground from 150 M.
Hard driven from difficult barrier to travel just in front of midfield never less than 3 wide. Unable to find extra after straightening, gave ground steadily from the 300 M.

Worked forward to make running from wide gate, hugged rail 1200 M out. Soon ceded advantage to be 1L off lead, switched off rail 600 M to regain lead, kicked a few lengths clear 250 M out, impressively.
Settled 2 or 3 wide just forward of midfield. 3-1/2Ls adrift straightening up, kept on same pace before losing 3rd spot close home.
Midfield on fence before dropping back a bit 1000 M out. Under pressure 500 M out and switched to outer to commence run, made only moderate headway, soon one-paced.
Soon settled 6Ls off pace in rear of midfield. 4 or 5Ls down turning in, ran on steadily to claim a distant 2nd without ever looking likely to give winner a race.
Flew out of gates then niggled to maintain handy position on fence. 2Ls down on straightening and looked a chance until 250 M out when beginning to tire, swamped final stages.
Midfield on rail, came under pressure 500 M out, only very brief effort, soon one-paced and gave ground steadily final 200 M.
Bit keen then steadily dropped towards rear. Made some headway after straightening, no extra final 150 M.
Driven to go forward, clear advantage 1000 M out and pinched rail near the 900 M. Headed passing 600 M and was well beaten over 300 M out.
Waited with at rear, last into straight, ran past tired runners closing stages.
Raced about 4Ls off pace towards rear down back straight, under strong pressure turning for home, found nothing.
Raced 3-wide between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace through to home straight, weakened immediately and eased down 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to straight, switched wider and 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on fairly well but never a threat to principals.
Held up about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight, got its head up under pressure and found little from 300 M out.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace from 800 M out to straight, went 2nd 1L off COMPANION 200 M out, battled on well but unable to grab COMPANION and overhauled by winner late.
Led passing 1000 M marker and on fence 900 M out, never more than 1L clear and maintaining an advantage until final strides when winner swept past.
4-wide and 3Ls off pace 800 M out, similarly placed turning for home but failed to quicken up at top of straight and well beaten 200 M out.
Always prominent about 1L off pace and 2-wide through to stretch, never picked up on the heavy ground and beaten over 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
No speed about 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6-wide 800 M out but advanced to go 1L off pace and 4-wide entering straight, hung in under pressure about 300 M out, weakened rapidly.
Tracked main body of runners early on, raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 600 M out, under strong pressure and in rear turning for home, soon eased down. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along in rear 6Ls off pace 900 M out, 3rd last and unpromisingly placed 5Ls off pace entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on very strongly final 200 M to lead final strides.
On fence 2Ls off pace from 900 M out to straight, all out to remain within 1L of leader 200 M out, no extra to line.
Prominent early on 2-wide and 1/2L off speed 1600 M out, took narrow lead 1400 M out, 3-wide when driven along 600 M out to keep in touch, emptied at top of straight once tempo quickened again.
4Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, crept closer 2Ls down 800 M out and entering straight, quickened to go a neck clear 200 M out, joined by runner-up 50 M out, but battled back gamely to win.
Had run of the race early on about 3Ls off pace and on fence 1400 M out, 2-wide 1L off pace 800 M out, hard driven to remain in touch entering straight, faded away rapidly.
Held up in rear and 3-wide 1600 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down 800 M out, 6-wide entering straight and 4Ls off pace, briefly threatened when 2-1/2Ls down 200 M out but no extra final stages.
Sat about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1600 M out to 600 M when hard pressed to stay in touch, soon no chance and came home in own time.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3Ls down and driven along 800 M out, 5Ls off pace with margin widening rapidly entering straight.
Raced 3-wide about 5Ls off pace 1600 M out, improved to be 3-wide and 3Ls off pace 800 M out, forced 5-wide into straight, one-paced on run-in to line.
Always towards rear, about 5Ls off pace and 2-wide 1600 M out, 6Ls down and last entering straight, stayed on at same pace to pass a few stragglers 200 M out, never a factor.
Settled on fence about 5Ls off speed early on, 3Ls down entering straight but could never latch onto principals and beaten 200 M out.
Led on fence passing stands for 1st time, went 2nd 1400 M out, hard driven to lead again turning for home, soon weakened right out of contention.
Always wide and without cover - 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1600 M out, 2Ls down and 4-wide entering straight, a neck down 200 M out and joined winner 50 M out but couldn't follow through.
Held up in rear in fence early on, at least 6Ls down and last 800 M out, marginally better turning for home, never posed any threat to leaders.
About 6Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, improved from 1000 M out to go 3Ls off pace and 3-wide entering straight and quickened up to go a neck down 200 M out, battled well, unable to lead.
Settled about 6Ls off pace 1600 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down from 800 M out to straight, improved rapidly to threaten principals just 1L off pace 200 M out, couldn't follow through final 200 M.
Midfield 1000 M and about 6th into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
At back to straight. Never nearer.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never in contention.
In touch to straight where he held some chance 200 M out. Soon beaten.
Made no show.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on strongly to challenge inside final 200 M. Led close home.
Reared and lost a lot of ground at start. Never on terms thereafter.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Effort on straightening and kept on for a remote 3rd.
Midfield halfway. Moved up nicely on straightening to lead 200 M. Found winner too strong close home.
Prominent to straight where he soon gave ground on leaders.
Was prominent before dropping out of contention early in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Well there to straight. Kept on till finding no extra inside final 150 M.
Was prominent before taking narrow lead into home bend. Remained in front on straightening till headed and dropped out of contention 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made some advancement from 600 M to be 6th final turn. Kept on.
In the front early, then raced 6th from winning post first time. Improved to 4th rounding home bend but found no extra closing stages.
Soon behind midfield. One-paced.
Never a factor.
Soon 4-wide 5th until half-way. Faded badly from 600 M.
Sat outside leader. Came to challenge turning for home. Unable to match speed with the winner final 200 M.
Soon led and made all. Held on well final 200 M.
Towards rear. Improved to 7th near 1200 M. Made further progress to 5th home bend. Ran on steadily inside 200 M.
Mainly 4Ls behind lead in 3rd or 4th. Weakened inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort home turn. One-paced in straight.
Prominent early, then remained 4Ls behind lead in 3rd or 4th to 700 M. Dropped back steadily.
Soon last. Made moderate progress from 500 M.
Midfield briefly. Never seen with a chance. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led till headed upon straightening then dropped out.
Wide in midfield before weakened going up Rock.
Prominent. Quickened to hit front briefly upon straightening before finding no extra.
Towards rear. Loomed up to hold some chance early in straight. Soon found no extra.
Travelled in 4th or 5th. Close up behind leaders turning in. Kept on one pace under pressure for remote 3rd.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend hitting front briefly early in straight but soon outstayed by winner over 200 M out.
Prominent to home bend. Weakened.
Ridden to contest early lead from wide draw. Dropped out gradually far side.
Mainly in midfield. Quickened well to take charge over 200 M out. Won readily.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Better than midfield, improved to 4th near 1100 M. 4-wide turning in and soon weakened.
In touch. Dropped back steadily from 1200 M to be midfield far side. Tailed off in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground along rail in straight.
Took lead from 1300 M. Held on until headed final 50 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Made some progress inside 200 M.
Tardy start, rear. Very minor advancement in straight.
Better than midfield. Steady progress far side to be 5th home bend. Ran on to just miss 2nd narrowly.
Prominent until weakening out of contention 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. 1-1/2Ls 2nd turning in. Ran on to take over close home.
Mainly midfield. Ran on from final turn until one-paced closing stages.
Chased leader to straight and weakened.
Rear. Effort rounding home bend and early in straight but never able to reach 3rd placing.
Rear of midfield. Headway rounding home bend. Gone 3Ls 3rd turning in and kept on one pace.
Towards rear into straight. Kept on for 5th.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Better than midfield to straight and weakened.
Never better than midfield.
Wide in forward of midfield to straight, then faded.
Never in contention.
Virtually made all. Hung on well.
Broke well. Settled in prominent position. Hampered on rails 1000 M bend. Chased leader into straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Slowly away, towards the rear, then pushed along to travel closer to midfield. Made no improvement in straight.
Outpaced early, towards rear. Ran past a few beaten runners after straightening, made no improvement thereafter.
Raced wide 4Ls behind lead around midfield. Caught wider upon straightening, one paced to the line.

Jumped awkwardly, then travelled 4Ls off lead along the fence around midfield. Saved ground rounding the bend to creep closer on the rails. Ran on well after straightening and took command 150 M to score comfortably.
Sent to the front from wide out to cross over and lead. Headed near 150 M, then kept on the same pace and just held on for a minor placing.

Niggled along early and soon sat behind leader. Not much room to move forward after straightening and was steadied and shifted in to avoid another runner near 200 M. Ran on to grab 2nd on the line but no match with the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and lost a lot of ground. Well back. Never a factor.

Prominent but wide early. Eased back to be in midfield 4Ls off lead before making the home bend. Continued to travel wide into straight, unable to produce extra and kept on the same pace to the finish.
Niggled along in the early stages to be prominent from a difficult gate. Went more forward to sit outside leader before making the home bend. Plugged on in straight, just missed a place on the line.
Broke well, travelled kindly 3-wide 2-3Ls off lead prominently. Kept on one pace in straight without threatening.
Raced 2-wide 2-3Ls behind lead. Unable to quicken after straightening, dropped out steadily from 200 M.
Steadily dropped to the rear. Never in contention.
In rear about 9Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, hard pressed to go 7Ls off pace and 4-wide turning for home, faded instantly.
About 10Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, about 8Ls down entering straight, 6Ls down 200 M out, moderate late headway close home.
Soon led on fence, always about a neck clear from FLORAL DANCER through to 200 M out, weakened thereafter and lost 3rd place close home.
In midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and on fence from 1200 M out to home straight, never posed any threat thereafter.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 600 M out, soon under strong pressure and dropped right out off home turn.
Driven along early to hold prime spot on fence 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, always niggled along thereafter, 4Ls down entering straight, very one-paced to line.
No speed early on racing 2-wide and about 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, off the bridle 600 M out, never a factor.
Raced 2-wide and 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, struggling to keep up from 600 M out, dropped right out of contention in straight.
Held up 7Ls off speed on fence from 1200 M out to stretch, improved to be 4Ls down in 6th place 200 M out, grabbed 2nd final strides but no chance with winner.
Slowest away, raced 2-wide about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along 600 M out, struggling entering home straight and capitulated. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled about 4Ls or 5Ls off lead on fence through to home straight, improved to go 2Ls off pace 200 M out, led about 100 M out, drew clear.
Sent on from gates to be outside pacesetting MILLENNIUM LEGEND and 2-wide through to straight, grabbed by winner about 100 M out and caught for 2nd final strides.
Caught very wide from difficult draw and was never on terms. Steadily dropped towards rear 900 M out, last on straightening when checked.
Driven to dispute lead, unable to keep up passing the 600 M and dropped right out.
3Ls behind lead around midfield on fence. Improved rounding home bend to be 2Ls adrift straightening up, one paced before commencing to tire final stages.
Slowest and awkward on exiting and was well back. Crept closer on inner rounding home turn to be 5Ls down turning in, moderate late headway passing tired runners.
Ridden early but soon outpaced at rear, shifted across to fence after 1000 M. Crept closer along fence to be 3-1/2Ls down on straightening, kept running on final 200 M but no threat to winner.
Broke well and shared lead early, steadily eased to travel 3 wide in midfield 3 or 4Ls off pace 800 M out. Stayed same in straight before getting tired inside final 100 M.
Always on the pace, equal lead from 400 M before having difficulty to keep up with leader after straightening. Shifted out a bit 200 M out, no extra when losing 2nd spot near the line.
Ridden to contest lead 5 or 6 wide, run ended passing 600 M and dropped away tamely.
Began very awkwardly, nearly fell and lost a lot of ground. Remained last before running on a bit towards inner from 400 M passing well beaten runners.
Pushed forward to dispute lead in a line of 4 runners. Struggled to keep up 400 M out and dropped away steadily.
Niggled along early to hold rail spot amongst front runners. Shared lead 400 M out before drawing well clear 200 M out, comfortably.
Not far away early out wide, steadily eased and shifted inwards toward rear of midfield going into back stretch. Dropped back further before home bend, no impression in home straight.
Jumped well and led field to 1200 M. Dropped back gradually to midfield. No subsequent progress.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
Last from 1100 M. Ran past a few tiring horses 250 M.
Well there early. Dropped back a bit to 4th or 5th from 1000 M. Kept on similar position thereafter.
Left very awkwardly, towards rear. Very minor progress in straight.
Well there. Held 2nd from 1000 M. Took lead 350 M until headed 50 M. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Made some progress on outside to 5th rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Midfield early and was soon behind. Made up good ground inside 300 M to just miss a minor placing. Hung in and rider stopped riding final strides.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made steady ground from 1100 M to be 4th early straight. Ran on well along rail to take lead final 50 M.
Rear. Made ground along rail to 8th turning in. Ran on steadily to claim 3rd near finish.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Led field passing 1200 M. Held 2Ls advantage final turn. Faded rapidly when headed 350 M.
Mostly 3rd until failing to hold place closing stages.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group upon straightening.
Ridden early. Chased leader to straight. Kept on one pace.
Midfield most of way.
Always well behind.
Midfield far side. Took closer order home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always well behind.
Made all. Just held on under pressure.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Kept on past beaten runners in straight.
Wide in midfield. Lost position turning in. Recovered late ground past beaten horses in closing stages.
Forward of midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield early in straight. No extra closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on well down straight to just fail to get up on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Improved far side to midfield 800 M. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Took lead from widest draw. Headed 800 M. Faded upon straightening.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on outside final 250 M.
Midfield. Progressed to 5th final turn. Ran on steadily to take 2nd 100 M. No threat to the winner.
Trailed field throughout.
In touch. Dropped to midfield home bend. Weakened in straight.
Prominent, gained advantage from 800 M until headed 400 M. Kept on but was one-paced inside 150 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Better than midfield. Kept on in straight.
Better than midfield. Advanced to 3rd turning in. Sustained effort to take lead 200 M. Won well.
Prominent. Took lead 400 M to 200 M. Held on for a 3rd.
Towards rear. Moderate progress 400 M. One-paced closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Quickened well to snatch victory closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly then raced in rear. Made swift progress on outside coming out of back straight, but gradually dropped out from prominent position after straightening.
Travelled at the back. Saved ground on rails turning in. Failed quicken to threaten under pressure. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced keenly in prominent position far side. Gained slender lead home bend. Soon headed after straightening.
Always in last few.
Prominent. Fought on under pressure to claim 2nd place late.
Began well and led far side. Narrowly headed rounding home bend. Regained advantage early in straight but unable to sustain effort close home.
Never seen with a chance.
Broke well but faltered. Travelled behind midfield to straight then kept on steadily under pressure.
Midfield to straight, kept on one pace.
Rear early. Gained midfield into straight then kept on same pace.
Towards rear far side. Made short-lived effort coming out of back straight. Faded approaching home turn.
Prominent when forced to check 800 M out dropping to midfield. Faded further upon straightening.

Jumped well from a wide draw and led briefly. Ridden along to cross to the rail around 1000 M. Settled 1-1/2Ls to 2Ls off the leader through to straight. Under pressure around 400 M but kept on at same pace to line.
Outpaced at rear 4 wide 9Ls off pace. Switched 5 wide entering straight, when put under pressure, kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped very awkwardly and raced 8Ls off pace 5 to 6 wide through to straight, under pressure in the straight, was one paced before making up a little late ground. (Hung out badly throughout.)
Slowly away. Always trailed field about 14Ls off pace and raced 2 wide, ran past a couple of beaten runners midway through the straight.

Jumped awkwardly and was then inconvenienced. Ridden along in the early stages but outpaced at rear. 11Ls off pace on inner entering straight. Under pressure around 450 M and made up good ground final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and ridden along to be 2 wide 4Ls off pace through to 900 M. Around 850 M commence to drop back and raced 2 wide 7Ls off pace entering the straight, stayed one-paced.
Not break well, soon last. Recovered to be 4 wide about 8Ls off pace with little cover until entering turn, hung out badly and made the turn awkwardly, found nothing in the straight.

Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to take lead after the 1000 M. Soon moved across to take up the rail with no more than 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight, under pressure around 200 M when well clear, comfortably.
Broke well raced next to rail 2 to 4Ls through to straight, when put under pressure. Kept on same pace in the straight, no extra near finish.
Raced 2 wide, 3 to 4Ls off pace through to straight, all out 4Ls down 400 M out, unable to get any closer and weakened in the concluding stages.
Ridden to race 3 wide 3Ls off pace, commence to lose position 500 M out and soon became detached in home straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Broke fairly and ridden along 5Ls off pace 3 to 4 wide around mid-division through to straight. When put under pressure found nothing and faded 300 M out.

Missed the start slightly and niggled along to be 6Ls off pace on inner entering home turn. Under pressure after 600 M and moved closer turning in. Made steady ground in straight but was no match to first pair.
Jumped well but was outpaced and raced 10Ls off pace on inner through to straight, shifted out gradually in the run to the line and ran past several beaten runners.
Raced 4-wide about 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, worse off and struggling turning for home, managed to stay on at same pace instead of dropping out altogether.
Led on fence very early on before opting to take the box seat 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, soon under strong pressure and weakened from over 300 M out.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, lost position and 4Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on very strongly final 200 M and just failed.
Never worse off than 3Ls off pace on fence through to home straight when travelling well, hit front over 200 M out carrying head high and to one side, all out, just hung on.
Prominent, about 1/2L off pace 1200 M out, niggled along when 2-wide and 2Ls off pace 800 M out, slightly worse turning for home, very one-paced on run-in.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 600 M out, closer turning in and just 2Ls down 200 M with strong place chances, no extra final stages.
Checked on exiting and lost 4Ls immediately, 2-wide and 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, in rear and 8Ls down entering straight, 6Ls down 200 M out, weakened again. (See Racing Incidents.)
Caught 4-wide on terms with pacesetters 1200 M out, weakened steadily from 1000 M out, beaten when 6Ls down and wide entering straight.
Bit slow into stride but soon sent on out 6-wide from 1300 M out to lead on fence by 1L at 900 M, 1L clear turning for home, grabbed by winner about 250 M out and one-paced to line.
Didn't break well, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, headway approaching home turn, steadied about 300 M out, 2-1/2Ls down 200 M out and claimed 3rd place comfortably.
Caught 5-wide about 1L off pace 1200 M out, kept up to be 1/2L off pace and 3-wide 800 M out, 1L down entering straight, short of room and checked 250 M out, one-paced to line.
3Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, 5Ls off speed on fence 800 M out, showed absolutely no acceleration at any stage.
Always towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed until home straight, improved to go 3Ls down 200 M out but didn't follow through all the way to line.
Keen, racing 3-wide without cover on terms with leaders early, 2Ls off pace 800 M out, worse off and 5-wide turning for home, soon no chance.
Broke well then held up rear of midfield 3 or 4 wide. Crept closer rounding home turn to be 2-1/2Ls turning in, effort not sustained and just kept on same pace to the line.

From widest gate was taken to rear. Became 2 wide 1000 M out. Last and 8 or 9Ls adrift 400 M out, responded well and ran on steadily final 300 M to be nearest at finish, was steadied and shifted in near 200 M.
Began awkwardly, then niggled along to dispute lead 1200 M out. Headed after the 1000 M but still prominently placed on rail. Unable to keep up 700 M out, dropped out further in the straight.
Pushed along early to be in touch. Crowded when pulling near 800 M, checked severely off heels and dropped to midfield. One paced in straight.
Bumped on exiting, ridden but outpaced towards rear about 6Ls off speed. Crowded near 800 M and was checked, brief effort near 300 M, soon one paced.
In last few throughout, never seen with a chance.
Well there, pressed forward to take slender lead 900 M out, soon headed after 800 M and remained at leader's quarters on fence. Run ended near the 200 M and gave ground steadily.
Settled 3 wide in mid-division. Commenced run from 600 M, held every chance 300 M out before being worn down by winner over 100 M out, kept on quite well for 2nd spot.
Did not jump well from difficult barrier, then dropped to rear 3 or 4 wide. Ran past beaten runners final 300 M.
Tardy start, soon recovered to be in front of midfield two wide. Unable to quicken in home stretch, tired closing stages.
Handily placed in first few, lost running near 800 M, checked severely and became unbalanced. 1L down straightening up, kept finding extra to prevail 100 M out, readily.
Soon up there near pace 4 or 5 wide. Clear advantage one off rail 700 M out, challenged after straightening, overhauled 200 M out and no extra.
Settled on fence in midfield, switched off rail abruptly near 800 M to get out of trouble. Ran on steadily in home straight to claim 3rd closing stages.
Never much worse than 4Ls off pace and 2-wide, 3-wide and 3Ls down turning for home, didn't quicken up in straight.
Enjoyed run of race 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, 1L off pace 200 M out, weakened markedly final stages.
Caught 3-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to stretch when 4-wide, quickened up to go 1L off pace 200 M out, tried hard but could never reach winner.
Always handy racing 2-wide either 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to home straight, hung out under pressure but led over 200 M out and was always holding rivals at bay.
Raced 3 and 4-wide about 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, pressed on to be at leader's quarters turning for home, capitulated very quickly.
Awkwardly away and no speed early on racing 7Ls off pace on inner 1000 M out, about 4Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, stayed on at same pace to be nearest at finish.
Held up one from rear about 9Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, driven along entering straight when about 7Ls off speed and wider, soon no chance.
On fence 4Ls off pace until 600 M out, 3Ls down and travelling well turning in, short of room on inner 350 M out before being switched out to make good ground on principals close home.
Travelled in midfield 2-wide and about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, effort in straight but could only be 3Ls off lead 200 M out, no extra.
Bounded in air on exiting gates, 10Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 6Ls adrift entering straight, 3Ls down and still against fence 200 M out, kept on evenly to line.
Led early on fence though never clear by more than 2Ls, 1L clear on the swing, found nothing off the bridle and overhauled and beaten 300 M out.
Held up about 7Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 5-wide and 5Ls off into straight, one-paced to line.
3-wide without cover and about 3Ls off pace through to 600 M out, driven closer entering straight, upsides with winner 200 M out but no extra and lost 2nd close home.
Settled 6Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, hard ridden 600 M out to keep up and 5Ls down turning in and 4Ls down 200 M out.
Always very deep on the track, 4-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6-wide and 1/2L off pace turning in, still on terms with principals 200 M out, no extra, encouraging effort.

Widest of a wall of 6 horses disputing lead 1000 M out, dropped back slightly to enter straight 2-1/2Ls off pace but 5-wide and with cover, all out to go 1-1/2Ls off pace 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Held joint lead on fence 1000 M out, held narrow advantage from 800 M out to top of straight, swamped in a matter of strides.
Caught 4-wide 2Ls off pace from 1000 M out to stretch, quickened up well once in clear 350 M out to lead 200 M out, pushed out and always holding CENTURY STAR in 2nd.
Never travelled, 8Ls off pace and driven along 1000 M out, still hard pressed 800 M out and turning for home when at least 8Ls down, eased down in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3Ls off pace on fence 100 M out, 2Ls down and going well entering straight, got within a neck of winner 200 M out but couldn't get its head in front.
Very slowly away and driven long to lie up with field 1000 M out, finally tagged on to be 4-wide and 3Ls off pace on the turn for home, outpaced at top of straight, one-paced.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home but behind a wall of horses, switched wider and went 1/2L off pace 200 M out, no chance with front pair through concluding stages.
Joint lead early on out 3-wide 1000 M out, still right in touch 3-wide and 1/2L off pace entering straight, dropped away very quickly.
Very keen early on when right up with early pace racing 4-wide, 1/2L off speed and 4-wide off home turn, soon well outpaced.
Raced 3-wide about 2Ls off pace from 1000 M out to stretch, checked when short of running 300 M out, no chance thereafter.
Disputed early advantage when 2-wide, about 1/2L off pace and 2-wide on straightening, under strong pressure when short of room 300 M out, soon beaten.
Disputed early lead out 5-wide 1000 M out, 1/2L off speed and 2-wide entering straight, squeezed for room about 300 M out and soon beaten.
Towards rear before improving to midfield 1000 M. About 4th 350 M and could make no impression on leaders thereafter.
Towards rear of main group into straight where he ran on a bit.
About 5th halfway and similar place turning into straight. Soon beaten.
Worse than mid-division rounding home bend. Kept on steadily final 250 M.
Last to straight where he ran on strongly to be nearest to at finish.
Never troubled leaders.
2nd last home turn. Made up considerable ground final 300 M. Never nearer.
Took up running from 1200 M and kept on well in straight. Just caught final stride.
Was midfield before making swift headway from 1100 M to be 2nd from 900 M. Remained there into straight where he kept on till finding no extra close home.
Well there before starting to give ground coming into straight.
Led to 1200 M and was 3rd into straight. Unable quicken to threaten closing stages.
Soon in midfield. Made no show after.
Never far off to straight. Dropped out quickly on straightening.
Settled worse than midfield to home bend. Made up good ground in straight to snatch race short of line.
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th passing 1000 M. Disputed for 2nd in straight but lost a minor placing final strides.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made up some ground rounding home bend. Weakened 250 M. Hung in throughout.
Well there to home bend. Weakened from 4th at 400 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 200 M out. Never nearer.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on from 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Rear. Ran on well inside 250 M to miss marginally at finish. Hung in badly in straight.
Towards rear. Soon recovered some ground to be better than midfield. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Last at jump. Soon recovered some ground to be behind midfield. Ran on under pressure from 6th early straight to claim victory close home.
Always prominent. Kept on well to the line.
Pushed along soon after start to take the lead. Held 2Ls advantage until headed passing 200 M. No extra.
Never better than midfield.
In last few. Dropped to tail-end upon straightening.
Took up running approaching home bend and led till overhauled over 100 M out.
Gradually dropped to last few before home bend. Keeping on behind midfield when hampered on rails over 200 M out.
Brief lead early. Settled in close-up 2nd on rail. Faded gradually shortly after straightening.
Missed the break badly. Quickly recovered to midfield. Kept on steadily down straight till unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled at the back. Produced good late impression in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran on stoutly under pressure only to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Broke well. Settled behind midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Held up in rear. Produced moderate progress under pressure in straight.
Settled better than midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to hold some chance but unable to draw level the length of straight.
Close up. Disputed lead into straight hitting front briefly passing 200 M. Caught close home.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Niggled at early, settling in 4th some 2Ls off lead. Held up on rails upon straightening. Weakened approaching 200 M. (Thick mucus in trachea.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight final 250 M to get up on line.
Midfield. Effort rounding home bend to be 3-wide 3rd turning in. Ran on well but failed to catch the winner.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground soon after straightening.
Prominent. Tracked winner from 1200 M. Held on without quickening in straight.
Never in contention.
Towards rear throughout.
Near rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Ran on a bit in straight.
Soon towards rear. Ran on 200 M until one-paced close home.
Slightly slowly away. Soon moved up to be in touch. One-paced in straight.
Held 3rd to final turn. Faded.
Towards rear. Raced ungenerously and hung out passing 800 M. Made up a little ground 200 M.
Prominent early, soon raced 4th or 5th to home bend. Weakened.
Soon led and made all.
Slightly slowly away and was last early. Soon recovered some ground to be just behind midfield. Kept on 300 M.
Never nearer.
Held up just off the pace. Remained well there until swamped final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Mainly in midfield before faded close home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to hit front over 200 M out. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge closing stages.
Tailed off most of way.
Tracked leader. Took lead entering straight but had no answer to winner's challenge 200 M out.
Raced wide behind midfield. Effort turning for home. Came to challenge under pressure and finished well to miss by the narrowest of margins.
Never far off. Kept on under pressure to finish.
Settled in rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Effort around home turn. Raced tightly on rails early in straight. Sustained progress final stages to claim 4th close to home.
Led to straight then dropped out.
Well back into straight. Made moderate headway down centre of track.
Not break well and ridden along to be 2 wide 4 to 5Ls off pace entering home turn. Shifted out gradually entering straight and made up some ground final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and soon dropped to the rear and made up some late ground.
Broke fairly and ridden along 5 to 6Ls off pace on inner around worse than midfield through to straight. When put under pressure found nothing and stayed one-paced to the line.
Ridden along to be 1L off pace on rail through to straight. When asked found wanting and faded 350 M out.
Left the gates very awkwardly. Raced 4 wide 7Ls off pace. Commence to lose position 600 M out and soon became detached in home straight. (Significant inflammation in the horse's throat.)
Raced 4 wide to 5Ls off pace up to 850 M, commence to lose ground gradually at 700 M and found nothing in the straight.
Missed the start slightly and raced at rear on inner through to 600 M, advanced slightly entering straight when put under pressure kept on same pace to the line.

Missed the start slightly and raced towards the rear section 3 to 4 wide entering home turn. Advanced to worse than midfield entering straight. When asked 350 M out responded well but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Jumped fairly raced 3 wide 1-1/2 to 2Ls off pace through to straight, when put under pressure kept on same pace in the straight, no extra near finish.

Broke well from widest draw, gradually moved across to settle 1L off pace 2 to 3 wide entering the 800 M mark. Maintain similar position entering straight, disputed lead 300 M out and fought on gamely to grab victory on the line.
Broke fairly from wide draw and raced 4 to 5Ls off pace in midfield without cover through to straight, all out 250 M, but unable to get any closer to principals and weakened in the concluding stages.

Jumped fairly from wide draw, niggled along to take lead 1200 M. Soon moved across to take up rail within 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight, under pressure 250 M and responded well but overhauled on the line.
Untidy start but recovered to settle 2 wide 1-1/2 to 2Ls off pace entering straight, when put under pressure one-paced to the line.
Broke well and niggled along to be 3 to 4Ls off pace on inner through to straight, under pressure 350 M out but unable to find any extra and stayed one-paced to the line.
Disputed lead with OVATION out 2-wide from 900 M out to stretch, led again 300 M out, headed by PRIME WITNESS 200 M out, kept on well but no chance with front pair's pace.
Didn't break well and lost at least 4Ls at start, 6Ls off pace on fence from 800 M out to straight, about 2Ls down and finishing off well when squeezed for room 100 M out and steadied up.
Always 3-wide and between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace before switching into the clear 300 M out, quickened up well to grab lead over 100 M out, pushed out.
Soon led on fence, disputing running with CLIFFHANGER and then CHARMING CITY, 1L clear turning in but headed 300 M out, weakened rapidly.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until turning for home when hard pressed to quicken up, outpaced in straight.
Never better than midfield at any stage, always about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 2-wide, clearly outpaced in straight.
Bit keen early on racing 2Ls off pace and 3-wide 900 M out, still 2Ls down but 4-wide entering straight, weakened approaching 200 M marker, faded right out.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace until straightening up, outpaced from 350 M out.
Didn't break well, caught 5-wide about 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, 1L down and 3-wide turning for home, hard ridden to take narrow lead 200 M out, no extra inside final stages.
Raced 3-wide about 3Ls off pace 900 M out, still 3Ls off but 5-wide on straightening, stayed on fairly well in concluding stages but never a threat to principals.
No speed early on, 4-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 800 M out to turning in, good acceleration to go 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't sustain momentum final stages.
On terms racing 2-wide with pacesetting OVATION 1000 m out before opting to sit about 2Ls off speed through to stretch, stayed on at one-pace to line.
Settled on fence 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, niggled along 600 M out and hard driven at top of stretch, failed to pick up.
Held up in rear 6Ls off lead and 2-wide through to straight, 5Ls down when switched out wider 350 M out to challenge, hung in markedly while making strong late run, post came too soon.
Checked 1000 M out, travelled 4-wide 3Ls off speed 900 M out, similarly placed and driven along off the home turn, soon outpaced.
On fence about 5Ls off pace through to 600 M out, still in rear and 4-wide when switched out to challenge 350 M out, stayed on very strongly down centre of track to lead on line.
Sat 3Ls off pace on fence from 1000 M out to final bend when niggled along, stayed on well enough in straight but never looked liked landing a blow.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls off speed through to home straight, didn't quicken up and beaten passing 200 M marker.
Caught 3-wide about 4Ls off pace from 900 M out to straightening up racing slightly wider, one-paced on run-in to post.
Raced 2-wide between 2Ls and 3Ls off speed through to stretch when under pressure, stayed on at same pace to line.
Totally blew the start by at least 6Ls or 7Ls, never closer than 6Ls to main body of runners. (Lame.)
Sat 2-wide 1L off lead 900 M out, over-raced on the turn and restrained to be 2Ls down entering straight, didn't come on and was beaten 200 M out.
Raced 4Ls off pace out 4-wide 1000 M out, looped field racing 4-wide to lead turning for home, headed again and was beating a hasty retreat 300 M out. (Lame.)
On fence 2Ls off pace from 900 M out to 200 M out when under strong pressure, still with excellent place chances just 100 M out but collared final strides by winner and SPRING FOUNTAIN.
Led on fence racing a little keenly 900 M out, headed by EASTERN PURPLE entering straight, went 2Ls clear on bridle approaching 200 M marker, soon under pressure and caught on line.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until 600 M out, turned in racing widest of all (5-wide), stayed on strongly final stages to be nearest at finish, shifted in near line.
Fractious at start, travelled well about 1L or 2Ls off lead until 200 M out when hard ridden to pick up, no extra concluding stages.
Led passing 800 M out, never more than 3/4L clear at any stage and hard pressed 200 M out, grabbed about 100 M out and no extra close home.
3Ls off pace in midfield until 400 M out, dropped right out from 300 M out.
Raced 3Ls to 4Ls off pace on wide outside (down centre of track) until being outpaced 400 M out, stayed on at same pace and never dangerous.
Managed to keep within 4Ls of lead before coming under strong pressure 400 M out, soon cut adrift from main body of field.
Settled between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace until 400 M out when outpaced, soon no chance.
Awkward start, raced prominently 2Ls off lead 800 M out, travelled well to go 1/2L down 200 M out with every chance of winning, failed to match winner's pace closing stages.
Slightly tardy start, always 1L or 2Ls off pace until 200 M out when hard pressed to stay in touch, weakened.
Always about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on inside rail, clearly outpaced about 300 M out but stayed on fairly well again close home.
Settled in rear about 4Ls off pace until 400 M out, hard ridden to go 3Ls fown 200 M out, stayed on well final stages but much too late to be nearest at finish.
Very awkardly away, between 3Ls and 4Ls down until 200 M out, stayed on at same pace under pressure.
Tardy start, 3Ls down until about 500 M out, smooth progress towards outer to go half length off lead 200 M out, led 100 M out, comfortably.
Raced a neck off pace 800 M out, 3/4L down 400 M out when hard ridden, outpaced final 200 M.
Covered up in midfield 2Ls or 3Ls off lead until 250 M out, weakened rapidly thereafter. (Lame.)
Towards rear before making up some late ground closing stages.
Worse than midfield 800 M and remained there to home turn. Unable to obtain clear passage 200 M out. Kept on finish.
Slightly better than midfield to straight. Found little under pressure closing stages.
Made running to 100 M when blundered and lost balance. Soon beaten.
Mostly midfield to straight. Ran on final 200 M.
Last to straight where he ran on a bit closing stages.
Well there before settling in 5th or 6th 1000 M. Was about 7th on straightening before running on well passing 200 M to lead near finish.
Among rear group into straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader to straight and was still 2nd passing 200 M. One-paced close home.
Made no show.
Well there to straight where he was inconvenienced 250 M and checked 100 M. Soon beaten.
Mostly 4th or 5th to straight. Held every chance inside final 200 M but found winner too strong.
2nd last to home turn. Never in contention.
Was worse than midfield before improving from 800 M to be in touch approaching home turn. Did not sustain effort on straightening.
Rear. Made progress on outside home turn. Continued to make ground in straight to just miss a minor placing.
Led field to 200 M. No extra.
Sat outside leader. Hung out home turn and was 4-wide turning in. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Mainly 9th throughout.
Made no show.
Never better than midfield.
In touch. Mainly 4th to straight. Responded well to reach lead 200 M. Held on well.
Midfield or slightly better. Made no show in straight.
Never able to feature.
Better than midfield on inside. Ran on steadily from 5th early straight to take 2nd inside 100 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Held 3rd to 400 M. Kept on without quickening.
Wide behind midfield. Ridden around home bend. Kept on without approaching in straight.
Attempted to make all. Came under pressure to maintain advantage upon straightening but worn down close to home.
Rear. Dropped out into straight.
Raced 3 or 4-wide behind midfield. Took closer order far side. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled at the back. Made moderate headway past beaten horses in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Switched off rail turning for home but had nothing to give.
Restrained behind leader early. Found no extra to hold place shortly after straightening.
Midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Faded inside 200 M.
Never far off, racing freely around 1000 M bend. Disputed lead rounding home bend and early in straight but unable to sustain effort close home.
Prominent early. Gave ground gradually from halfway.
Settled in last few dropping to last halfway out. Commenced move approaching home turn and squeezed through gap inside 200 M. Fought on stoutly to assert authority close to line.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily to reach midfield half-way. Continued to make ground until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Severely checked passing 200 M. Never recovered.
Midfield to 650 M. Weakened.
Led early, soon settled 4th. 4-wide 5th turning in. One-paced final 200 M.
Soon in touch. Advanced to 2nd 800 M. Unable quicken to challenge final 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly and was near rear. Steady progress on the rail from 800 M to reach 5th or 6th final turn. Shifted out and caused interference 200 M, then one-paced.
Tardy start, last to 400 M. Crept closer order home turn. Was crowded 200 M out. Ran on.
Behind midfield. Made progress on outside to be 5th 600 M. Soon faded. (Hung out throughout.)
Took lead soon after start. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Towards rear. Was impeded 200 M. No progress.
In touch early, soon in midfield and behind. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent on the rail. Came under pressure to tackle leader 200 M. However effort not sustained.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well there to straight. Dropped out over 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to win readily.
Broke well and led to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well to hold some chance early in straight but unable to sustain progress closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Travelled better than midfield. Kept on.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield early. Prominent into straight. Dropped out.
Better than midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Never better than rear of midfield.
In last few. Ran on to claim 2nd place close to home.
Broke fairly and niggled along to be 3 to 4Ls off pace 1 to 2-wide entering straight. Shifted out for running near 200 M and make up some late ground.
Missed the start slightly and was outpaced at rear on rail 8 to 9Ls off pace through to straight. Ran past several beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped well from wide draw but outpaced to be in rear division 3 to 4-wide 7Ls off pace through to straight. When asked did not respond and stayed same pace to the line.

Jumped awkwardly and soon dropped to rear to be 7 to 8Ls off pace on rail entering home turn. Crept closer to rear of midfield entering straight. Under pressure 200 M out and made up steady ground to be closest at finish.
Best out from wide draw and soon moved across to rail to take lead with no more than 1L advantage entering straight. Grabbed by winner final 100 M and just hung on for 2nd.
Niggled along to be 3-wide 2 to 3Ls off pace. Wide into straight. When asked 200 M out found nothing and stayed same pace to the line.

Untidy start and soon raced 4Ls off pace on inner worse than midfield. Gradually improved going up Rock. 3-wide entering straight responded well when asked and took lead 100 M but soon overhauled on the line.
Jumped fairly and sat outside leader. Under pressure 250 M out but stayed one-paced to the line.
Jumped well and ridden along to be 1 to 2Ls off pace in prominent position through to straight. Came through inside AMITY at 200 M and kept finding extra to overhaul the placegetters on the line.
Missed the start slightly. Soon recovered to be 3-wide up with leaders. Commence to hang out badly 600 M out, continued to hang out in straight and faded in the concluding stages.
Broke fairly and niggled along 3 to 4Ls off pace 2-wide around mid-division through to 600 M. Commence to lose position 550 M out and found nothing in the straight.
Settled 4Ls to 5Ls off pace racing 2-wide 900 M out, 3Ls down on straightening, wasn't fully tested in straight owing to awkward position between horses from 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
No speed early on, never better than 4Ls to 5Ls off pace on fence through to home straight when under strong pressure, no impression.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, soon racing 2-wide and about 600 M out when still 2Ls off lead, soon under pressure and could only stay on at the same pace.
Slowest into stride and raced about 7Ls off pace in rear until final bend when about 5Ls down, stayed on okay in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early before taking slender lead out 2-wide passing 800 M marker, shared lead entering stretch but collared by winner 300 M out, weakened close home.
On fence 4Ls off pace 900 M out, slightly closer off home turn, never looked like getting competitive at any stage.

Raced a bit keenly on fence 2Ls off pace early stages, travelled better from 800 M marker, briefly caught in a pocket at top of straight, clear 250 M and ran on fairly well, no chance with winner, however.
Soon led on fence until being headed by MASTER YING 800 M out, sharing lead and with every chance off home turn, soon grabbed by winner and dropped right out final 200 M.
No speed early on and settled 2-wide and 5Ls off front from 800 M out to home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Broke well but soon restrained to sit 2Ls or 3Ls off lead on fence from 900 M out to home turn, still 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well without ever threatening the winner.
Caught 3-wide 4Ls off pace 800 M out, closer but 4-wide turning for home, all out to be 2.5Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Always travelling well racing 2-wide about 1L to 2Ls off pace through to home straight, quickened to lead over 200 M out, went clear.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down and hard driven 600 M out, stayed on again in home stretch without ever posing any threat to principals.
Caught 4-wide 1200 M out when 4Ls off speed, 6Ls down 900 M out, driven to make progress out wide to go 3Ls off leaders entering straight widest of all, stayed on at same pace to line.
Took immediate lead but only crossed to fence 1000 M out, went 2Ls clear 800 M out, 1L clear on straightening but overhauled by winner 300 M out, no extra and lost 3rd place close home.
Caught 4-wide 1300 M out and very awkward around bends passing stands and Football Club, 7Ls off pace in rear and on fence 800 M out, never a factor from then on.
Sat 2-wide 3Ls off pace from 1300 M out to final turn when slightly closer, stayed on gamely on straight but never looked like reeling in the winner.
Was on and off the bridle throughout, on fence 3Ls to 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home, stayed on evenly to be nearest at finish.
Settled on fence about 2Ls to 3Ls off pace throughout, good place prospects 200 M out but could only stay on at same pace.
Never closer than 4Ls to lead from 1200 M out, always at least 3-wide in the run and very one-paced in straight.
Caught 4-wide 2Ls off pace 1300 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls off lead when started to weaken 600 M out, soon tailed off. (Heart Irregularity.)
Always 2-wide and between 1L and 2Ls off pace through to home straight, led approaching 200 M marker, pushed out.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace 1300 M out, 7Ls behind 800 M out, still struggling entering home straight and became further detached.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off pace 1300 M out, similarly placed when driven along 600 M out, failed to quicken up.
Cruised to take lead from a wide draw. Held on until headed final 100 M.
Behind midfield along inner. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground rounding home bend. Widest turning in. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Made some progress rounding home bend to be 5th final turn. Found no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch early. Dropped back from 800 M while difficult to settle and hanging out. Kept on closing stages.
Always in touch. Ran on from 4th early straight to challenge 200 M out. Took lead inside 100 M, held on.
Jumped awkwardly. Never better than midfield.
Raced 2nd from 1000 M until fading out of contention final 300 M.
Midfield early before dropping back to the rear. Made up some ground 250 M but was one-paced closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Left awkwardly. Never seen with a chance. Hung in throughout.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made ground steadily in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved a bit home turn to be 3rd or 4th turning in. Dropped out final 300 M. (Lame.)
Midfield. Responded well along rail after turning in. Kept on to gain 2nd close home.
Close up early. Settled in forward of midfield home bend. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled at the back. Came wide into straight. Ran on steadily down centre of track without threatening.
Settled in midfield or behind. Finished well final 200 M.
Well there, pulling to lead inside runners approaching home bend. Held clear break around home bend. Tired badly and swamped close to home.
Ridden to show speed early. Chased leader around home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
Never nearer. Produced some late impression under pressure.
Settled mostly 4-wide in midfield. Moved up to lead under little pressure. Won confidently.
Wide in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Restrained in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Never far off. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always in last few. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up behind midfield. Produced late impression closing stages.
Midfield. Took closer order home bend. Weakened upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Made steady headway under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Was checked when giving ground from 300 M.
Midfield or behind. Made some progress early straight but soon found no extra.
Always thereabout. Kept on.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to midfield home bend. No progress.
Towards rear. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Never a factor.
Soon led and made all. Held on well to win readily.
Tardy start, towards rear. Soon recovered ground to be in the front pair. Faded rapidly soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Prominent. Found no extra final 200 M.
Midfield or better. Made progress final turn to be 4th turning in. Weakened 200 M.
Rear. Recovered ground gradually from 1000 M. Ran on from 8th early straight to be 2nd 150 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from 250 M, doing best work close home.
Towards rear. Stayed on in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Wide behind midfield to straight. Faded.
Rear. Finished off race well.
Held in rear of midfield. Switched out for a clear run upon straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Led till headed upon straightening. Weakened passing 200 M.
Midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Ridden before settling in midfield. Towards rear into straight then kept on steadily without quickening.
Towards rear. Finished well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Gradually improved down centre of back straight to join leaders turning for home. Soon gained 1/2L break 200 M out and hung on well to the line.
Held up behind leaders. Held some chance early in straight but always held by winner closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Ran on late to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Broke well. Dropped to midfield home bend. One-paced in straight.
Slow out. Always at the back.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure closing stages.
Prominent. Led narrowly at 250 M. Headed at 100 M when asked stayed same paced and was grabbed by 2nd placegetter on the line.
Jumped fairly and raced towards the rear. When asked 350 M out responded well and made up good ground only to miss the placings by a short margin.
Broke well and niggled along to lead on rail until 300 M. Soon unable to find an extra gear and was overhauled in the concluding stages.
Jumped fairly, never more than 2Ls off pace round about mid-division. Commenced to challenge for the lead 300 M out, hit the front around 200 M and won comfortably.
Broke fairly and raced in the rear section through to 400 M. When put under pressure found nothing and faded 300 M out.

On jumping was contacted and lost some ground. Niggled along but unable to keep up to be towards the rear. Over the concluding stages raced ungenerously, hung out and ran past couple of beaten runners.
Well there to 600 M failed to quicken in the final stages.
Jumped well and niggled along to be better than midfield. Improved from 400 M to be every chance but failed to find any extra and stayed same pace to the line.
Tardy start and raced at back. Never a factor.
Broke fairly. Raced fairly and soon in midfield. Under pressure around 350 M and made up good ground to grab 2nd place on the line but failed to catch the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and rider became momentarily unbalanced. Soon recovered to race in mid-division until 250 M out. Did not respond when asked and gradually weakened in the concluding stages.
Broke awkwardly. Soon raced better than midfield through to 400 M. Steadily dropped back from 300 M.
Jumped clearly and raced in mid-division but unable to quicken when asked and stayed one-paced to the line.
Jumped well and stayed in touch with leaders until 200 M. No extra and kept on one-paced to the line.
Settled 3Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, still 3Ls down on fence entering straight and didn't quicken up and beaten 200 M out, eased down when squeezed for room final 100 M.
Slowly away but soon raced in 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L off pace until home straight, weakened steadily final stages.

Unhurried early on and raced without cover (4-wide) and 4Ls off pace 800 M out, about 2Ls off lead off home turn, quickened up to lead 300 M out, 2Ls clear 200 M out, hung in whilst being driven out, drew well clear.
Travelled 3-wide down back straight towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until final turn, all out to go 4Ls off winner 200 M out, no extra and dropped away.
Raced 2-wide about 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down off home turn, soon outpaced and struggling over 200 M out.
Soon led, got to fence 1000 M out, never clear by more than 1L, headed by winner 300 M out, kept on one-pace to line and just about hung on for 3rd place.
Sluggish early on but soon covered up in midfield out 3-wide and 4Ls off pace 800 M out, under pressure off home turn, well beaten 300 M out.
Always tight to the fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off lead through to home straight when travelling well, short of running room on fence to line and was not fully extended in the run to the line.
