Moved up from midfield racing keenly to go about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 2-wide, turned for home with every chance, failed to pick up and weakened final 200 M.
Always towards rear, some progress 800 M out when 3-wide and 5Ls off lead, 3Ls off winner 200 M out, made some late headway past a couple of beaten rivals final 200 M.
Deep on track and never better than 6Ls off lead until home straight when he straightened up widest of all (6-wide), never in the hunt thereafter.
Travelled well on fence about 2Ls off pace until home straight, lacked immediate acceleration at top of straight but finally asserted close home to claim 2nd place.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off pace 800 M out, 3Ls down turning for home and short of racing room until being switched out wider 250 M out, stayed on fairly well through closing stages.
Always about 5Ls off speed and caught 4 and 5-wide from back straight to home straight, stayed on at same pace through to winning post.
Travelled 3-wide and 3Ls off speed until home straight, soon ridden and didn't find much, beaten 300 M out.
Sent on to race in 4th place out 2-wide and about 3Ls off speed 800 M out, 3-wide into the straight, found nothing under pressure.
Held up one from rear about 7Ls off lead until final bend, stayed on strongly from rear to be nearest at the finish.
Raced in 2nd place out 2-wide 1L or 2Ls off pace until straightening for home, hard ridden from top of straight but was rather one-paced and made no impression.
Always racing 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home turn, soon weakened right out of it.
No speed early on, always in rear at least 8Ls off lead until home straight, became further detached on the run to the post.
Always well placed on fence about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, soon picked up to lead about 300 M out, pushed out to score comfortably.
Didn't break well but soon crossed to fence and raced between 3Ls and 4Ls off pace until home straight, hung out under pressure and eased down a long way out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Didn't break well, soon on fence about 6Ls off pace 900 M out, a little closer turning for home, stayed on at the same pace to line.
Settled 5Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, 3-wide and niggled along turning for home, one-paced to line.
Broke well and soon led, never clear by much more than a length, hard ridden to maintain advantage at top of straight but headed by winner 300 M out, grabbed by MASTER MAGIC for 2nd 100 M out.
On fence about 3Ls off pace from 800 M out to home straight, shaken up to go 3rd about 2.5Ls off winner 200 M out, went 2nd with 100 M to race.
Always caught at least 3-wide and placed about 5Ls off front down back straight, 5-wide off the home turn, made no show from then on.
Covered up in midfield roughly 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until turning for home, dropped out tamely in straight.
Never far away about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace but was always 3-wide without cover until the turn for home, shaken up to be right on terms with every chance 350 M out, faded instantly.
Settled in midfield on the fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off lead until home straight, not extended for most of the straight in behind a wall of horses that were giving ground.
Raced 2-wide about 2.5Ls off pace from 1200 M out until home straight, stayed on at the same pace in the straight.
Settled 7Ls off pace 1200 M out and out 2-wide, improved racing 3-wide 600 M out, 5-wide on straightening up, joined leaders 300 M out, 1L clear 200 M out, driven out.
Settled in 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L to 2Ls off pace through to home straight, caught a little flatfooted 300 M out but stayed on well again final 200 M to secure 3rd place.

Checked just after breaking, soon 2-wide and at least 8Ls off pace early on, in rear and 6Ls behind on straightening, slightly closer but 5-wide turning for home, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.

Tracked leaders from afar, about 7Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, travelled well 4Ls down on fence on the turn for home, didn't have a clear run until inside 200 M marker, ran on strongly but found winner too good.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls, struggling at top of straight and beaten 300 M out.
Always travelled well on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed until home straight, quite one-paced to line from then on.
Always 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until 600 M out, closer turning in, soon outpaced.
Tardy start, at least 8Ls off speed down back straight on fence, 6Ls down and still in rear entering straight, didn't have much room on fence approaching 200 M marker, ran on again close home.
About 6th 1000 M, before making headway rounding home bend. 2Ls 4th early in straight where he kept on till one-paced closing stages.
About 8th and held wide into straight. Kept on steadily final 250 M.
Ran 2nd from 1200 M to straight where he soon dropped out of contention. Eased down 200 M.
Last into straight where he stayed on a bit closing stages.
Well there before failing to hold place approaching 200 M.
Midfield to straight where he improved along the rails. Doing best work at the finish.
6th or 7th to straight where he kept on well for 3rd.
Made all, going 2L clear passing 200 M. Held on under pressure.
Never a factor.
Never on terms despite making some late impression final 200 M.
Rear early and was 9th home turn. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Never far off to home turn. Make no show on straightening.
Well there early, soon raced 4th within 3Ls behind leader. Responded well soon after turning in. Took lead 200 M and never threatened.
Midfield early. Soon dropped back to the rear group. Tailed off in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up some good ground inside 200 M.
Never able to feature.
Led early, then sat outside leader to straight. Dropped to 4th 250 M, found no extra.
Left awkwardly, towards rear. Soon recovered some ground to be slightly better than midfield. Stayed on in straight.
Prominent. Took lead passing 1000 M. Held on until headed 200 M. Never able to fight back.
Towards rear. Stayed on closing stages.
Midfield from widest draw. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Last. Made up a little ground in straight.
Mainly 5th throughout.
Always there. Kept on but without threatening the winner.
Around midfield throughout.
Midfield or behind. Weakened 200 M out.
Settled at the back. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Badly baulked early in straight.
Well back. Baulked for a run upon straightening. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Midfield. Took closer order approaching home bend soon weakened upon straightening.
Never better than midfield. One-paced under pressure.
Wide throughout. Ridden early. Around midfield to straight. Weakened.
Broke well. Led till narrowly headed passing 200 M. Fought on under pressure.
Mostly in midfield. Moved up to gain slender lead about 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped final strides.
Well there to 250 M. Dropped out.
Settled behind leader. Gradually weakened shortly after straightening.
Held up behind pace. Dropped away quickly upon straightening.
Settled in last few. Produced moderate progress down centre of straight.
Mostly in midfield. Wide turning in. Found nothing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up on rails in rear of midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Quickened well to assert authority close to home.
Around midfield. Kept on same pace final 400 M.
Made all. Won unchallenged.
Near rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Always thereabout. Just failed to obtain a minor placing.
Towards rear throughout.
Made no show.
In the leading pair on the rail, dropped out 250 M. (Lame.)
In the leading pair on the rail. Faded 300 M out.
Prominent. Kept on but lost a minor placing closing stages.
Midfield. Ridden along to be prominent course proper. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made up a little ground halfway. No further progress.
Left awkwardly, soon moved forward to be in touch. Fought on well under pressure 200 M out.
Never far away in midfield. Kept on well final 200 M without ever reaching the winner.
Midfield most of way.
Tracked leader. Gained narrow advantage briefly upon straightening. Weakened steadily.
Always in last few.
Settled at the back. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Dropped out rounding home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off. Came to tackle leaders turning for home gaining lead over 200 M out. Just held on to the line.
Midfield. Faded gradually from home bend.
Prominent. Switched out to challenge upon straightening holding some chance. Unable to sustain progress closing stages.
Always at the back.
Led till narrowly headed into straight. Weakened 300 M out.
In last few. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Made moderate progress early in straight before one-paced closing stages.
Rear. Ran on well down centre straight but the post came too soon.
Prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Did not break well and niggled along to be on inner worse than midfield. Gradually shifted 4 wide entering straight 4Ls down, when under pressure to pick up, kept on well to line.

Missed the start slightly and pushed along to be 2 wide 3Ls off pace in midfield. Inclined to pull a little when making the turn. Around 3-1/2Ls off pace on fence 300 M out, when asked made up some ground to be closest at finish.
Jumped well from wide draw but outpaced to be around rear section out wide. Around the 700 M was inconvenienced, found nothing in the straight and dropped out.
Tardy start and raced in the rear section on rail through to straight. Responded well to pressure from 200 M and made up some late ground to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and niggled along to race 3 wide 3Ls off pace in mid-division. Remained in similar position 300 M out, finished final 200 M strongly and just missed the first two by a short margin.
Jumped well and prominent briefly. Steadily dropped to midfield 800 M out. Weakened entering straight and faded 350 M out.

Broke well from wide draw and pushed along to take up running. Soon moved across to the rail and lead narrowly through to straight. Kept finding in straight to fend off repeated efforts by runner-up to score a close victory.
Jumped well from wide draw and was obliged to race wide without cover in mid-division. Stayed in similar position entering straight, under pressure 300 M but stayed one-paced to the line.
Soon raced outside leader through to 500 M. Commenced to lose position 450 M out and found nothing 300 M out.

Niggled along to be 3 wide 1-1/2Ls off pace in prominent position. Around 600 M raced side by side with eventual winner to straight. When asked kept on well but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon raced towards the rear section 3 wide 5Ls off pace. Made the turn near the 700 M awkwardly and hung out. Made up some late ground in the concluding stages.
Jumped very awkwardly from wide draw and raced at back around wide most of the way. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Dropped in midfield about 4Ls off pace and 2-wide from 800 M out to home turn, went 1L off pace 150 M out when with every chance, didn't follow through and lost 2nd place on line.
Settled on fence about 4Ls off pace about 900 M out, driven along 600 M out to stay in touch, beaten at top of home straight.
Held up 6Ls off pace on fence down backstretch, niggled along entering stretch, very one-paced on run-in to line.
Caught wide early before going 1L off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, 2.5Ls down in 2nd place turning in, kept on at same pace and beaten 200 M out.
Always niggled along down backstretch racing 2-wide and about 6Ls off pace, hard ridden entering straight but never looked like tacking onto main body of field.
Travelled well 2-wide about 2Ls off pace until 800 M, squeezed for room from 300 M to 200 M out, failed to pick up once clear through final stages.
Always at least 3-wide and about 5Ls off speed from back straight to home turn, hard ridden to be 4Ls off pace 200 M out, no chance with winner but kept on well to nail 2nd place on line.
Awkwardly away, soon about 7Ls off lead and 2-wide, one from rear and struggling turning for home, made no further impression.
Held rails spot 2Ls off pace about 900 M out, 3Ls down off home bend, stayed on at the same pace.
Unhurried early on in rear and about 7Ls off pace and 3-wide, turned for home racing 5-wide, ran on quite well in straight.
Never better than 4-wide through to 600 M out when about 6Ls off pace, turned for home racing 5-wide, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 800 M out, about 3.5Ls and 3-wide on straightening, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on gamely to lead 100 M out and draw clear.
Crossed to lead on fence passing 1000 M, skipped 2.5Ls clear when travelling well off home turn, all out but still 2Ls up 200 M out, soon tired and edged out of the money on line.
Raced 3-wide and about 6Ls off pace about 800 M out, soon hard ridden, became further detached.
Soon led unchallenged, skipped 5Ls clear 700 M out, hung out and under pressure turning for home, headed 250 M out, faded rapidly.
In midfield racing 3-wide 7Ls off pace about 900 M out, 5-wide and same distance off pace on the turn, 2Ls down 200 M out, didn't follow through.
At least 8Ls off pace on fence from backstretch until turning for home when hard ridden, dug deep to be 2Ls off pace on fence 200 M out, kept on well although no chance with winner.
Slowest away and already 10Ls off pace at 1000 M pole, sat 5-wide and still 10Ls off pace on straightening, picked up well to be 3Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra final stages.
Didn't break well, settled 8Ls off pace on fence 800 M out, 7Ls down and 4-wide on the turn, short of room and became unbalanced 300 M out, soon beaten.
Sat 3-wide 5Ls or 6Ls off pace from 800 M out until home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, faded quickly thereafter.
Dropped in racing 4-wide 7Ls off pace about 800 M out, 6-wide turning for home, improved to go 2Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Settled 2-wide 6Ls off pace 800 M out, travelled well when 3-wide and 7Ls behind turning in, clear run 300 M out and hit front 180 M out, readily.
Went 2nd passing 1000 M and 4Ls off pace out 2-wide from 800 M out to home turn, led about 250 M out, soon headed by winner, kept on at same pace.
Held 2nd early on but restrained to be about 5Ls off pace on inside in 4th from 800 M out to stretch, hard pressed to be on terms with leaders 200 M out, faded near line.
Awkwardly away, soon looped field to race at least 4-wide 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide into straight and niggled along, very one-paced to line.
Driven along from the off and already 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, 20Ls adrift turning for home, finished in own time.
Dropped out one from rear about 6Ls off lead and 2-wide until home turn, challenged down centre of track and improved to be 4Ls down 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Awkwardly away, always about 2-wide and 4Ls off pace towards rear until straight, soon under pressure and never looked like finishing better than midfield.
Settled on fence in rear about 7Ls off speed through to stretch, stayed on at same pace, never nearer.
Disputed lead out 5-wide 1000 M out, soon 3-wide 1L off pace, still on pace and travelling well turning for home, led about 300 M out before being grabbed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
Never really on terms, always towards rear about 5Ls off lead, outpaced at top of straight and no chance.
3-wide 3Ls off pace down backstretch to homestretch, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well to line.
Held rails spot about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to home straight, 2Ls down and every chance of a place 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Raced against fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until being niggled along over 600 M out, never posed any threat to leaders in stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
At least 3-wide down backstretch and about 5Ls off pace, slightly closer but 5-wide turning in, 2Ls off pace 200 M out, stayed on well without threatening front pair.
2-wide holding narrow lead 1000 M out, still in front off home turn but failed to quicken up and beaten over 300 M out.
3-wide 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 2Ls down and niggled turning for home, could only stay on at the same pace.
On fence passing 1000 M disputing lead, 1L off pace on the swing, didn't pick up and beaten over 200 M out.
Caught 4-wide 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 1L off pace on straightening, quickened up to lead about 150 M out, kept on well.
Always covered up in midfield (racing keenly) 2-wide and about 3Ls off pace through to home straight, still in touch 200 M out but weakened closing stages.
Soon in rear and was last and wide home turn, made up considerable ground final 250 M to take charge near finish.
Well there before failing to hold place shortly on straightening.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground at start. Never nearer.
Well there briefly. Soon dropped out of contention.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Looked winner 200 M but did not sustain effort close home.
Never a factor.
Never far away to straight where he dropped out quickly.
Never on terms and was denied a run 300 M.
Prominent to straight where he chased leader unavailingly. Kept on same pace towards finish.
Was 6th home bend and same position into straight. Kept on quite well despite not reaching first 2.
Made no show.
Was midfield before improving from 1100 M to be 3rd or 4th into straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
Worse than midfield into straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Was worse than midfield before losing ground home bend. Renewed effort on straightening and kept on to the 250 M. Found no extra.
Always there. Kept on quite well 200 M to snatch 2nd place at finish.
Left awkwardly, soon moved up to be in midfield. Made slight progress turning in. One-paced closing stages.
Last to home bend. Responded well turning into straight. Ran on strongly 250 M to assert authority closing stages.
Jumped well from a wide draw, but was soon towards the rear. No improvement in straight.
Sat outside leader to straight. Attempted to challenge near 200 M but effort not sustained.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Dropped to the rear final turn.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon led. Held on but unable to withstand the strong finishing winner closing stages. Lost a minor placing near finish.
Jumped very awkwardly, remained in the rear group. Crept closer order turning in but failed to quicken final 200 M.
Better than midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Always in touch. Lacked of galloping room on inside from 250 M. Kept on.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Settled behind leaders. Switched off the rail upon straightening and ran on under pressure to get up final strides.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Midfield throughout.
Mostly in midfield. Ran on strongly final 200 M, doing best work at finish.
Sluggish at start. Towards rear before gaining midfield turning for home on inside. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Made modest progress early in straight without threatening.
Well there. Lost some ground rounding home bend. Kicked back in straight to produce late impression closing stages.
Towards rear most of way.
Well there. Gained slender lead entering straight but caught in the shadows of the post.
Held slender lead to straight. Found no extra to hold placing closing stages.
Always in last few.
Never in the hunt.
Midfield or better. Ran on from outside in straight, just failed to catch the winner.
In touch to 400 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
In touch. Dropped back to the midfield far side. Made some progress turning for home but was one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Slight progress to behind midfield 900 M out. Unbalanced passing 800 M. Widest turning in. Faded.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Led soon after start, settled 3rd or 4th far side. Sustained effort turning in to take lead passing 200 M. Held on.
Mainly in the front pair. Failed to quicken when headed near 200 M.
Behind midfield early. Moved up to be in the front pair 900 M. Kept on same pace when headed near 200 M.
In touch early. Dropped to the rear group when unbalanced near 1000 M. Remained similar until making up good ground on outside final 300 M.
Rear from widest draw. Moved up along to be 3rd rounding home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Set slow pace. Challenged by eventual winner the length of straight and pipped at post.
Towards rear to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Held up in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Made no show.
Towards rear. Made only modest progress in straight.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in midfield in straight.
Tracked leader. Came to tackle leader upon straightening. Gained upper hand short of line.
Settled behind leaders. Only one-paced under pressure.
Towards rear. Raced tightly between runners throughout straight and only kept on at the same pace.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Wide throughout. Improved to midfield far side. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well and rider soon lost the use of his left side iron lead through to closing stages and was caught by the winner in the concluding stages.
Jumped well and prominent briefly. Soon raced mainly in midfield through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out unable to find any extra and stayed one-paced to the line.

Broke briefly and niggled along to sit behind leader on fence. Near the 1000 M was checked when crowded, soon 2nd to tear away leader. Commenced to make ground 200 M out and overhauled the 2nd placegetter in the concluding stages.
Slowly away from wide. Soon dropped to rear section through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and closed off quite strongly but was inconvenienced near the winning post.
Did not break well and soon raced in rear section on inner. Gradually improved to midfield on inner in the latter part of the home turn and made up some late ground.
Raced on rail 4 to 5Ls off pace through to straight, all out 3Ls down 250 M out and made up some ground but was caught on the line by 3rd placegetter.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and raced in mid-division briefly. Soon dropped to worse than midfield 3 to 4-wide entering straight. Responded well to pressure and ran on well to grabbed 3rd place on the line.
Missed the start and raced wide most of the way towards the rear. Did not respond well to pressure in straight and only able to run past couple of beaten runners.
Broke briefly then came together with another runner. Niggled along to be 3 to 4-wide better than midfield. Rounding the home turn and in the straight hung out, no impression in straight.
Jumped fairly and came together with another runner. Midfield briefly. Steadily dropped to rear section 2-wide 600 M out. Found nothing in the straight.
Jumped well raced 4 to 5-wide in midfield and was bumped around 1000 M. Kept in similar position. Same paced in the straight.
On jumping bounded in the air and became unbalanced. Soon raced in the rear position through to straight. About the 200 M checked when disappointed for running and found nothing after that.
2-wide and about 4Ls off leaders over 1200 M out, niggled along from 800 M out, hard ridden final bend, beaten over 300 M out.
Settled in midfield 2-wide 4Ls off pace over 1200 M out, challenged out 3-wide 0.5L off pace turning for home, led 300 M out, kept on well.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along final bend, very one-paced in straight.
Bit slow to break and soon settled in rear 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, still in rear and under pressure round final bend, kept on one-paced towards inside.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 4th place early on, still well placed when niggled along 600 M, at winner's quarters 200 M out, stayed on at the same pace.
Towards rear racing 2-wide about 5Ls off pace through to home straight, turned in racing 5-wide, 4Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well final stages.
Awkwardly away, caught 3-wide without cover 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and under pressure turning in, found nothing.
Always 3-wide in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace, driven along over 400 M out, never seriously threatened principals.
Unhurried at least 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down and 3-wide off home turn, didn't come on.
Raced in 2nd place out 2-wide early on, led 600 M out, headed by winner about 300 M out, no extra.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L, headed about 600 M out but still on terms on straightening, faded from 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, 4Ls off speed on fence 1200 M out, similarly placed and travelling well final bend, didn't quicken up.

Jumped awkwardly then shifted in abruptly. Soon recovered to race in midfield through to 650 M. Gradually moved up from 600 M to be prominent into straight. Found no extra from 200 M. (Saddle Shifted.)
Jumped fairly and settled in mid-division on fence. Under pressure 300 M out but failed to up a gear and stayed one-paced to the line.
Missed the start and settled in the tail on fence through to home straight. Shifted out entering straight ran on steadily doing best work towards the finish.
Slow to begin and ridden along but outpaced to be in rear section on inner. Stayed in similar position. Kept on same pace in straight.
Settled in worse than midfield. Crept up to midfield after 600 M. Shifted 4-wide entering straight and make up some late ground only to miss the 3rd place by a short margin.
Jumped well. Ridden along to take lead through to closing stages, but unable to fend off the effort from winner and was caught on the line.
Jumped fairly and raced 2-wide in mid-division through to home straight. Around 2Ls down 250 M out, all out 200 M out and made up good ground to grab victory on the line.
Missed the start and raced in rear position. Never a factor.
Untidy start and niggled along to be in prominent position. Commenced to lose ground 400 M out and became detached half way up the straight.
Jumped well and niggled along to raced on fence behind leader. Found nothing in straight and soon faded after 200 M.
Soon raced wide with some cover in rear section. Gradually improved from 700 M when wide to be prominent into straight. When asked 300 M out ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield on rail. Inclined to pull 450 M out. Crept closer on home turn. Steadied and shifted out after 200 M. Plugged on evenly to the line.
One from rear and 2-wide about 6Ls off pace, forced to course very wide (at least 6-wide) entering straight, stayed on well closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Always travelled smoothly about 4Ls off pace on fence until final bend, waited gap to appear towards inside, led about 100 M out, readily.
Soon led on fence but headed and checked by FRENCH CONNECTION 1200 M out, under pressure 500 M out, faded from top of straight.
Held up in rear on fence about 6Ls of 7Ls off pace, became further detached from 400 M out. (Bled.)
Awkward start, raced 4-wide round field to lead on fence 1200 M out, a neck to the good turning for home, headed over 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Always deep on track, 3-wide 3Ls off pace 800 M out, under pressure turning for home, soon faded out of contention.
Didn't break well and settled 6Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, driven along and 5-wide 4Ls off pace turning in, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 4-wide from midfield to track FRENCH CONNECTION out 2-wide, upsides turning for home and held narrow lead over 200 M out, no extra close home.
Settled in mid-division about 4Ls off pace and 2-wide, closer turning for home, failed to pick up in straight.
3-wide in midfield about 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, closer but 4-wide entering straight, finished off well to be nearest at the finish.
Driven from gates to race keenly 2-wide on pace 1400 M out, 2Ls off speed 400 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Held up racing 2-wide 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 5-wide into straight when 4Ls down, kept on at same pace to line.
In touch early, soon dropped back to midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Mainly 5th to home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to take 3rd closing stages.
Rear. Ran past a few runners final 400 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
In touch on rail. 2Ls 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily 300 M to join the lead final 50 M. Just prevailed final strides.
Midfield or slightly better. Made steady progress from 450 M.
Behind midfield. No advancement in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to soon be prominent. Hung out badly home turn. Faded.
Lost ground at start. Made ground from last to be 8th home bend. Kept on in straight.
Never a factor.
Soon led. Tackled by the winner inside 100 M. Was beaten narrowly near finish.
In touch. Soon moved up to 2nd along inner. Kept on well early straight but unable quicken to threaten closing stages.
Made steady headway under reminders far side to be prominent home bend. Found nothing in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along behind midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Midfield throughout. Kept on in straight.
Always in last few.
Made all virtually to win unchallenged.
Around midfield. Some progress turning in. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Given reminders to muster pace early. Forward of midfield rounding home bend and into straight. Soon faded.
Stalked leader to straight. Lost 2nd late.
Raced wide behind midfield. Ran on well down straight to grab 2nd place final strides.
Jumped best and hard ridden but dropped to tail-end before home turn.
Wide in midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside final 250 M.
Checked soon after start. Never in contention.
Mainly 9th or 10th throughout.
Midfield. One-paced.
Moved up to be in touch soon after start. Raced awkwardly final turn and hung out. Faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to early straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Steadied when crowded near 600 M. Made up some ground in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly better than midfield. No progress in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to take the lead. Maintained slender advantage until headed 150 M. Kept on.
Prominent early from a wide draw, dropped back gradually to midfield. Ran on steadily to take 2nd final 100 M.
In touch. Came to tackle leader first turn. Joint lead turning in. Kept on until finding no extra 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning for home. Weakened 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made gradual progress on the rail to be 3rd passing 400 M. Ran on to take control 150 M out. Held on well.
Well there till faded inside 200 M.
Well there. Led around home bend. Swamped over 200 M out.
Well back. Took closer order rounding home bend. No clear passage early in straight before finishing strongly to grab placing near line.
Very sluggish at start. Soon recovered to join rear of field. Made no impression in straight.
Always thereabouts. Jostled turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Towards rear. Finished well down centre of straight to grab victory final strides.
Well there. Hit front over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort and swamped near finish.
Never far off to straight. Gradually faded.
Never nearer.
Towards rear. Commenced move turning in. Ran on to hit front briefly passing 200 M by outsprinted close to home.
Wide in forward of midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Ridden to lead early. Headed approaching home bend. Faded in straight.
Well there far side. Gave ground gradually from around home bend. (Distressed.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or better to straight. No extra.
Raced in prominent position. All out about 400 M and ran on steadily but was never going to trouble the 1st pair.
On jumping was checked and crowded. Soon raced in rear division. Steadily made up ground from 400 M and was slightly hampered last 100 M.
Slowly away. Soon at rear and tailed off from 500 M.
Slowly away. Soon recovered to be in midfield. Under pressure at 500 M and dropped out.
Jumped clearly. Prominent and niggled along to maintain position. No extra from 600 M and further tired from 300 M.
Broke well and prominent up to 500 M. Under pressure and weakened.
Well there briefly. Pushed along to stay in midfield. Weakened from 300 M.
On jumping bounded in the air. Soon recovered to race in prominent position when asked 500 M out. Kept on same pace and weakened final 100 M.
Jumped fairly and raced in mid-division. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Broke fairly but soon dropped to rear division. Under pressure 400 M made up good ground in the concluding stages to be closest at finish.
Soon prominent and failed to respond 300 M out.
Jumped fairly. Soon pulled to be prominent on stands rail. Gradually faded from 200 M.

Jumped well. Soon raced in prominent position. Gradually moved up to race side by side with the leaders 400 M out. Took lead around 350 M out and kept on well but was no match for the winner in the concluding stages.
Did not jump well and raced in worse than midfield. Gradually improved to better than midfield 500 M out. When asked 300 M out responded very well, hit the front around 100 M and won comfortably.
Held up towards rear racing 3-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace before entering home straight 5-wide, over 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but never looked like winning.
Always prominent but caught wide until about 800 M out when 2-wide in 2nd, 1L off pace, similarly placed turning for home, led 300 M out, held on gamely.
Always on fence around midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to 600 M out when driven along, beaten at top of straight.
Out 4-deep and 5Ls off lead 1000 M out, still wide but just 3Ls down (and hard ridden) entering homestretch, outpaced but stayed on well again to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls off speed through to home straight when niggled along, one-paced to line.
Slow into stride, always in rear about 6Ls off pace through to home straight, never looked like getting competitive thereafter.
At least 3-wide and about 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home, a neck down and with every chance 200 M out, did not follow through.
4Ls off lead and 3-wide down back straight, about 2Ls down turning for home, every chance when 1L off pace 200 M out, no extra.
Covered up in midfield about 4Ls off lead though tended to race freely, still in mid-division on the swing, stayed on same pace though was slightly impeded near line.
Trapped at least 3-wide early on until before sliding across to fence at 1000 M when 2Ls off pace, bit short of room at top of straight but beaten 200 M out.
Always travelled well at least 4-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace down backstretch, closer turning in, picked up well to go 1L off pace 200 M out, kept on very well but just missed.
Led from gates and soon on fence clear by no more than 1L, headed about 300 M out, soon swamped and eased down close home.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, staying on but non-threatening when impeded inside final 200 M, eased down.
Dropped in midfield racing 3-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to home straight, found a gap 200 M out when over 2Ls down, finished off very well but just missed.
Never worse than 3Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide, 2Ls off pace turning for home, led over 200 M out, all out to hold on.
Led very early on before settling 3Ls off pace on fence until homestretch, soon faded right out.
8Ls off pace 800 M out, hard pressed to be a little closer turning for home, back-pedalled quickly.
Slowest away, driven along 1400 M out and 3-wide, still 10Ls down on the swing, 7Ls off 200 M out, kept on at the same pace.
Always on and off the bridle about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace through to home straight, one-paced from then on.
Led 1200 M out racing 3-wide but ceded advantage to TAMBORA STAR 900 M out, led again 400 M out, headed by winner over 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Gave leaders at least 10Ls down back straight, 7Ls down 400 M out, staying on well 200 M out when 3Ls off pace, didn't follow through closing stages.
Hard ridden to go 5-wide 1400 M out, led 900 M out and on fence at 800 M out, went clear by 2.5Ls, 1L clear turning for home, soon swamped and with no chance.
Missed the start, no better than 4-wide and 8Ls off pace 800 M out, always struggling thereafter.
Travelled okay in midfield about 2-wide and 7Ls off lead down backstretch, driven along 600 M out, no real threat from 400 M out. (Lame.)
Never in the hunt, never got within 10Ls off the pace.
Settled 2-wide at least 6Ls or 7Ls off pace down back straight, 4Ls down and travelled okay about 600 M out, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Always about 4Ls off pace and 2-wide until 600 M out when ridden along to pick up, 3Ls down turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well final stages to miss by a neck.
Always at least 10Ls off speed and never really in the race until 600 M out, 6Ls down and driven along on the home turn, stayed on very well, went close.
Led very early before opting to sit about 1L off pace through to 400 M out, was hanging in all the while, soon under pressure and beaten over 200 M out.
3Ls off speed towards far rail early on, loomed up to join leaders 200 M out, didn't follow through final 100 M.
Outpaced from the off and already about 7Ls adrift 600 M out, no chance thereafter.
Awkwardly away, always scrubbed along through early stages, at least 4Ls down 400 M out, staying on well enough when impeded about 200 M out, ran on again.
Covered up in midfield about 3Ls off the pace until creeping closer 200 M out, led about 30 M from line before being grabbed by the winner on the line.
Awkwardly away and in rear early on, 5Ls off pace towards stand's rail 600 M out, never dangerous.
Travelled 1L off pace hard against stand's rail through to 400 M out, soon outpaced and eased down close home.
Sent on to settle half a length off pacesetting VICTORY WARRIOR through to 400 M out, soon under pressure and beat hasty retreat.
Tracked leaders by 1L until 500 M out when hard driven, faded rapidly.
Never better than 4Ls off pace until about 200 M out towards centre of track, stayed on well again close home.
Soon led, racing a bit too freely, never clear by more than half a length, still narrowly in front 200 M out but folded rather quickly once headed.
Always between 1L and 2Ls off pace towards stand's rail until about 400 M out when hard ridden to lie up with principals, beaten 300 M out.
Sat about 3Ls off pacesetters towards stand's rail until about 300 M out, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on finding to lead on line.
Bit slow to start but soon recovered to be 2Ls off pace before taking up a joint lead 200 M out, no answer to quinella pair's late drive.
Held up 6Ls off pace racing 2-wide, 3Ls down and on fence turning in, every chance when a neck down 200 M out, no extra concluding stages.
Raced 2-wide on pace 1200 M out, soon between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide until home turn, never picked up and beaten passing 200 M.
Tardy start, sent on to race 3-wide 4Ls off pace but with cover 1000 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace entering straight, soon one-paced and beaten over 200 M out.
Led on fence 1200 M out, never clear by more than 0.5L, headed at top of straight and faded approaching 200 M marker.
9Ls down and 2-wide 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide 500 M out, 3-wide entering straight and switched out wider to challenge down centre of track, didn't come on.
Not the best away, settled on fence 6Ls off speed 1000 M out, 5Ls down and driven along turning for home, one-paced thereafter.
In rear when dropped out about 12Ls off pace passing 1000 M marker, driven along when 7Ls or 8Ls off pace turning for home, failed to quicken up.
Caught at least 4-deep and without cover for much of back straight when about 5Ls off pace, 3-wide and 3Ls of pace on the turn, soon under pressure and beaten over 200 M out.
No speed early on and over 10Ls off leaders and 2-wide down back straight, 8Ls off lead and 3-wide on straightening, kept on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Trapped 3-wide 1000 M out when 6Ls off speed, 5Ls down 500 M out, 4-wide on the swing, one-paced and no chance 200 M out.
3-wide and on pace 1200 M out, kept on to be 0.5L off leader at 800 M, travelled well turning in and led 350 M out, hung out slightly over final stages and was collared final three strides.
Settled 7Ls off pace and at least 4-wide 1000 M out, 3-wide and about 6Ls down on the swing, kept on at same pace down centre of track to be nearest at the finish.
Very keen early on, out 3-wide 10Ls off speed 1000 M out, on fence 6Ls down and driven on the turn, quickened up along fence to go 1L down 200 M out, kept on to lead final strides.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1000 M to 600 M out, driven and closer entering straight, never looked like taking a hand in finish thereafter.
Midfield to straight where he kept on steadily under pressure.
Towards rear, travelling well into straight, where he quickened under hands and heels to take command passing 200 M. Won impressively.
Ran 3rd to home turn before hitting front 300 M. Unable to hold advantage passing 200 M and found no extra.
Ridden to lead soon after start. Was headed 600 M and tired rapidly on straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 8th or 9th to home bend. Ran on a bit from 300 M. Found no extra close home.
Never on terms.
Was last before making his move approaching 600 M. Worse than midfield and held wide swinging into straight where he hung in and proved difficult to ride out.
Never far off to straight where he failed to hold place.
Was 6th 1200 M and similar position into straight. Could make no impression on leaders.
Effort from rear before home turn. Kept on well in straight to challenge 200 M. Found winner too strong.
Mostly in 5th to home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Last and wide into straight. Kept on well to hold some chance 200 M. Found one-paced near finish.
Mostly worse than midfield to home turn. Made up some ground under pressure final 300 M.
Ran 2nd to 700 M before taking lead into straight. Did not sustain effort and dropped out quickly 300 M.
Slowly away, last to 400 M. Made up some ground on outside in straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Pushed forward from 1100 M to be 2nd far side. Faded 600 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield. Failed to quicken while hanging in in straight.
Mainly midfield. Crept closer along inside after turning in. Ran on quite well in straight.
Left awkwardly, remained at rear. Made progress from outside near 500 M. Ran on under vigorous ride 300 M but failed to catch the winner.
Soon led. Was headed final turn. Maintained 2nd until finding no extra closing stages.
Well there. Sat outside leader before taking over final turn. Held on under pressure in straight.
Towards rear on inside. Struck heels and nearly fell near 600 M. No progress.
Better than midfield. Maintained similar position until finding no extra inside 300 M.
Mainly 3rd or 4th. Kept on. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made advancement to midfield 1000 M. Dropped back from 600 M.
Towards rear. Progressed from outside rounding home bend to be 4th upon straightening. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear far side.
Settled around midfield. Not clear run early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Always well back. Checked and lost ground about 500 M out.
Held slender lead on rail. Fought on under pressure in straight but pipped at post.
Not far off till faded under pressure in straight.
Never far off. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out upon straightening.
Wide in first few. Went off the track turning for home. Never recovered.
Contested early lead but had to settle behind leaders. Fought on bravely final 200 M to get up on line.
Rear early. Improved steadily down centre of back straight. Midfield rounding home bend. Sustained progress in home stretch to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Commenced move turning in but obtained no room the length of straight despite full of running.
Well there but 3-wide most of way. Gradually faded inside final 100 M.
Near rear. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Made steady ground on inside soon after turning in.
Pushed along from a wide draw to soon be 2nd. Badly unbalanced 300 M. Never recovered.
Never in contention.
Jumped well and took the lead. Shifted ground to cause interference while weakening early straight.
Better than midfield. Made some progress 1100 M to be 3rd far side. Gave ground rounding the home bend.
Settled 4th on the rail. Sustained effort in straight to gain slender advantage near 150 M. Just held on to win narrowly.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Ran on until one-paced closing stages.
Lost ground at start, shifted to the inside at rear. Made progress rounding home bend. Hampered 300 M. Recovered good ground to just miss marginally.
In touch. Was severely checked near 300 M. Never recovered.
Midfield. Moved up final turn to the front but was badly unbalanced early straight. Renewed effort to look like winner 200 M. However effort not sustained.
Midfield. Hampered 300 M. One-paced thereafter.
Always in last few.
Well there to straight. No extra.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Made modest progress in straight.
Midfield. Giving ground when tightened and clipped heels final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily for placing.
Well back to straight. Never nearer.
Well back. Took closer order leaving Rock. Made modest progress in straight.
Never far off. Swamped for 2nd final 100 M.
Last into straight. Finished well to snatch 2nd close to home.
Made all. Broke clear in straight to win unchallenged.
Jumped well from wide draw and raced in better than midfield out wide. Under pressure around 1000 M to maintain position. No extra in the straight and gradually faded after 200 M.
Jumped fairly. Niggled along and soon lead narrowly on rail. When asked 250 M out, plugged on well to win readily.
Tardy start and raced wide most of the way towards the rear. Did not respond well when asked and only ran past couple of beaten runners.
Jumped fairly. Pushed along but outpaced and soon dropped to the rear section. Continued to be hard ridden to straight. No extra and ran past some beaten runners in the concluding stages.
Jumped well from wide and lead briefly out wide. Soon moved across to sit outside the leader at 600 M. Unable to quicken in straight and faded in the final 100 M.
Soon outpaced at rear section on inner. Remained in similar position entering straight. Under pressure 300 M and made up good ground in the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to be behind leader on fence through to straight. When put under pressure inclined to lay out and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped early awkwardly and bumped another runner. Soon recovered and niggled along to race behind midfield. Did not respond to pressure and stayed one-paced to the post.
Raced on rail in mid-division through to straight. When asked found nothing and faded. Throughout the race hung in.
Did not break well and soon dropped to the rear on inner. Round the home turn was awkwardly placed and in the straight made up some ground in the final stages.
Broke fairly and pushed along to raced in better than midfield through to straight. Unable to get any closer and weakened in the concluding stages.
Missed the start slightly and raced 3-wide in mid-division. 5Ls down entering straight, shifted out and finished strongly to be closest at finish.
Raced 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight, hard ridden but still the same distance off pace 200 M out, no extra.
5Ls off lead and on fence through to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Settled 2-wide and 7Ls off speed from early on to about 500 M out when 3-wide, turned for home racing 4-wide 6Ls off pace, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Restless in gates and exited awkwardly, always about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, stayed on well final 100 M nick 3rd place close home.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off lead until straight when under pressure, found nothing, emptied.
Travelled well 2-wide and 3Ls off pace through to home straight, didn't quicken up and nudged out a place final 20 M.
Never better than 10Ls off leader until final bend, turned for home 8Ls down, ran on strongly final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Led on fence 1400 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls at any stage, travelled well 1L up on straightening, skipped 2Ls clear 200 M out, comfortably.
Always about 6Ls or 7Ls off the front until home straight, beaten 300 M out.
Settled 2-wide and 5Ls off pace until home straight, never posed any kind of threat.
Raced in 2nd place throughout, raced 2-wide 2Ls off pacesetting winner 1200 M out, 1Ls down turning for home, outpaced and 2Ls down again at 200 M, got no closer.
Never closer than 7Ls off pace at any stage, always 2-wide in the run, never a factor.
Niggled along to raced in better than midfield. Around 800 M commenced to ride along to maintain position. Found nothing in the straight and faded after 200 M.

Soon raced in prominent position on rail. Steadily dropped to midfield after 1000 M, checked slightly about 800 M and soon recovered to be in worse than midfield. Found nothing in straight and faded after 200 M.
Best out and lead briefly. Soon raced in better than midfield through to straight. Unable to up a gear and stayed one-paced to the line.
Soon raced in worse than midfield and wide throughout. No impression in straight.
Jumped fairly and raced towards worse than midfield through to straight, all out 4Ls down 300 M out and made up good ground to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to be prominent but wide. Gradually moved closer to rail to sit beside 800 M out and maintained similar position through to straight. No extra and soon faded after 200 M.
Just after the start was checked and dropped to the rail of the field on fence. Remained in similar position through to straight. Ran on fairly and made up some ground in the concluding stages.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in the rear section 2-wide around 6-7Ls off leader through to straight. Made up steady ground in straight but was unable to trouble the 1st pair.
Jumped fairly and soon lead narrowly on fence through to straight. When asked 250 M out ran on strongly to win comfortably.
Broke fairly and raced in mid-division. Gradually shifted out entering straight. Ran on fairly and made up some ground in straight but was unable to fend off the 3rd placegetter near the post.
On jumping was bumped and lost ground. Soon recovered and pushed along to race in prominent position out wide through to straight. Unable to quicken and weakened 100 M out.

Soon raced in worse than midfield around 2-3 wide. Steadily moved up to mid-division entering home turn. Did not quicken in straight and ran on evenly to the line. (About 100 M rider dropped his whip.)
Didn't break well and soon 8Ls off pace in rear, slightly closer turning for home, still 6Ls down 200 M out, ran on well close home to nearest at finish.
Prominent when checked 1000 M out but sill remained 2-wide and about 2Ls off pace through to home straight when hard ridden, quickly faded out.
Vying for prominent spot 1000 M out when seriously checked and forced to race about 5Ls off speed on fence from 800 M out, closer turning in, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on same pace.
Disputed early lead out 3-wide, about half a length off pacesetting SENSIBLE WAY on straightening, under strong pressure 300 M out, weakened concluding stages.
Slowest into stride, 6Ls off pace on fence 800 M out, about 4Ls down on the turn, off the fence and 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off very strongly and just missed.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace through to home straight, switched off rail to lead over 200 M out, driven out and just hung on.
Raced 4-wide without cover 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2Ls down and 4-wide through to home straight from 800 M to home turn, half a length down and every chance 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 4-wide on pace early on, 3-wide and 2Ls off pace from 800 M out, under pressure 500 M out, beaten soon after turning for home.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, dropped back to be 3Ls and 4Ls down off home pace until final bend when ridden along and hanging in, no threat in straight.
6Ls off lead and 2-wide 800 M out, similarly placed entering straight, didn't come on.
Always leading or sharing lead on fence until home turn when about 1L clear, headed by winner over 200 M out, no extra.
Settled about 5Ls off lead and 2-wide early, turned into home straight racing 4-wide, never got any closer.
Jumped very awkwardly, towards rear. Steadied 300 M when attempting to make up some ground. One-paced thereafter.
Was in front early from the widest draw. Soon raced in 5th and was wide without cover throughout.
Trailed field most of the way.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Better than midfield. Failed to quicken in straight.
Towards rear early. Pushed along to track leader along inside. Found no extra while failing to hold place 200 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Ran on under pressure inside 300 M. Never nearer.
In touch, was 3rd approaching 1200 M. Ran on steadily final turn to assert authority 250 M. Held on well.
Midfield. Kept on well from home turn to take 3rd 200 M. No match with the first two.
Never able to feature.
Near rear. Made up good ground in straight without threatening the winner.
Midfield or slightly behind. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Soon led. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Held clear advantage until overhauled final 150 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Produced good late impression final stages.
In last few. Ran on late.
Midfield onto course proper. Weakened.
Never far off to 200 M. Weakened.
Chased leader to 200 M. Weakened.
Never on terms.
Midfield early. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Just over 2Ls off pace mostly final 400 M. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Well back. Responded well final 200 M, doing best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well to grab lead final 400 M.
Prominent to 400 M then weakened.
Jumped well from widest draw and led early, settling 5th. Progressed rounding home bend to be 3rd 600 M. Made no show soon after straightening.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield. 4-wide turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield early. Ridden along on inner to soon be in touch. Weakened from 4th when turning into straight.
Midfield early, pushed along to take lead approaching 1000 M. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Towards rear. Kept on in straight.
Made no show.
Midfield. Steadied 400 M. Made ground final 250 M without threatening.
In touch. Raced 5th rounding home bend. Ran on.
Jumped awkwardly, at rear early. Soon made steady ground to be behind midfield. Maintained similar position until running on well inside 200 M, never nearer.
Prominent. Tracked leader before taking over 250 M. Kept on when headed 100 M out.
Midfield or slightly behind. Ran on solidly in straight to take control 100 M out. Won convincingly.
Slowly away, last to first turn. Remained in the rear group until running on a bit closing stages.
Very slowly away. Remained rear before running past beaten horses in straight.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Never in contention.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Led to 300 M. Dropped out.
Well there. Hit front briefly about 200 m out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled better than midfield. Quickened well to take charge over 150 M out.
Well back. Ran on steadily in straight.
Broke well. Settled towards rear. Ran on well shortly after straightening to hold some chance 200 M out.
Mostly in rear of midfield after a sluggish start. Faded out of contention into straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Jumped well and steadily dropped to towards the rear. Never a factor.
Mainly better than midfield. Under pressure from 400 M. Unable to quicken and further weaken 250 M out.
Settled at back towards the outside through to straight. Made a move from 300 M and ran through the field, doing best work at concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly, steadily moved up to dispute lead or lead narrowly. Headed 250 M weakened steadily.
Better than midfield on outside and was unable to get cover. Steadily dropped out from 300 M.
Ridden to lead to 1000 M then sat 2nd inside leader. Disputed lead entering straight. Tired from 250 M out.
Jumped fairly. Well there. Under pressure 300 M out and ran home strongly and won readily.
Towards the rear and ran on steadily from 300 M when shifted to the clear.
At back early and soon in midfield. Crowded at 300 M, then kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon niggled along to maintain mid-position. Not quite clear room to improve 1st half of the straight on inside. Did not find much when in the clear.
Threw head up jumping out. At back early improved a little from 1200 M to be worse than midfield. Unable to shift out early straight made up some ground when clear after 200 M.
Best out then settled at the back. Wide in early and middle stages. Last into straight and ran past tired horses final 200 M. Never nearer.
Settled in midfield towards the outside. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Jumped well. Well there. Under pressure around 400 M responded well but was unable to match the winner.
Broke well and made the running though never clear by more than 2Ls, came under pressure at top of straight, found nothing and emptied.
Never much better than 3-wide and 8Ls off speed down backstretch, 6-wide and 5Ls down turning in, kept on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
6Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, closer but driven along on straightening, dropped away rapidly.
Caught 4 and 5-wide without cover down backstretch, 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, closer turning for home, soon faded right out.
Sent on to take 2nd place out 2-wide 1L off pace from 1400 M out, only 2Ls down on straightening but virtually stopped to a walk in the straight. (Bled.)
Prominent racing 3-wide 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along to maintain this position from 800 M out to stretch, very one-paced from then on.
Settled 2-wide about 6Ls off pace down back straight, 4Ls down on the swing and under 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on strongly to lead final strides.
Never closer than 6Ls off pace and 3-wide in the run to homestretch, faded out tamely.
Enjoyed the run of the race about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence through to home straight when 1L in 2nd place, shifted out 200 M out under pressure, faded rapidly.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, still on close terms on straightening, always a shade one-paced on run-in.
Never better than 8Ls off pace in rear through to home striaght when driven along, never a threat.
Always 2-wide, niggled along and about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through to home straight, made no impression thereafter.
Steadied from gates to race in rear or one from rear about 10Ls off leaders, travelled smoothly when 7Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, stayed on very well to be nearest at finish.
Dropped in about 7Ls off speed early on and on fence, improved to go 3Ls down turning in, quickened up well to lead over 200 M out, caught by winner final strides.
Never better than 7Ls off pace towards inner at any stage, showed little in straight.
Slowly away, never better than 8Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide through to home straight when hard ridden, stayed on well on the run-in to be nearest at the finish.
Always better than midfield about 4Ls off pace out 3-wide, turned for home 4-wide and 3Ls off speed, very one-paced and beaten over 300 M out.
On fence 4Ls off pace until being tightened slightly 800 M out, closer on the swing but soon outpaced and weakened through final stages.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off speed through to 600 M out, closer and travelling well on the turn, 1.5Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but lost 2nd place on line.
Raced 2-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace down backstretch, 3Ls down turning for home, 1.5Ls off pace 200 M out, just hung on for runners-up spot.
Soon led narrowly on fence, ceded lead to NOBLE HERO 800 M out, sharing lead turning in, went 1L clear on the bridle 200 M out, drew clear though hung out slightly on run-in.
Bounded as stalls opened and began at least 6Ls adrift of nearest rival, about 12Ls off pace in rear 800 M out, 8Ls down on fence turning in, stayed on quite well to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 7Ls off pace through to home straight while hanging in, didn't come on.
Out 2-wide disputing early lead with winner, held narrow advantage 800 M out, all out and 1.5Ls down 200 M out, faded through concluding stages.
Raced 3-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off lead until home straight, under strong pressure and similarly placed 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 3 and 4-wide without cover and always 5Ls down until homestretch, stayed on at same pace to line while making up a little late ground.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, soon weakened right out.
2-wide and at least 7Ls off pace until being niggled along to lie up with pace about 600 M out, never a factor thereafter.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off lead through to stretch but always tended to over-race a bit, disputing lead and with every chance 300 M out, no extra final stages.
Led on fence by 1L 1200 M out, still leading by half a length on straightening, very quickly swamped and beaten over 300 M out.
Tracked leading pair out 3-wide and about 2Ls behind, under pressure on straightening and quickly dropped right out of it.
Always about 4-wide and 5Ls off leaders and one from rear down backstretch, 7-wide into homestretch, 3Ls down 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Awkwardly away and forced to race without cover out 6-wide down the back and 6Ls off pace, extremely wide (8-wide) turning for home, no hope thereafter.
Caught 4-wide without cover about 3Ls off speed 800 M out, turned for home racing 5-wide, 1L off pace 200 M out and kept on at same pace to line.
Covered up 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off lead through to home straight, picked up well to lead approaching 200 M, grabbed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
Travelled well 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence until home turn, finished off along inisde but never looked like threatening principals.
Checked on exiting gates, remained 3-wide and 4Ls off pace until homestretch, rather one-paced on run-in.
Never worse than 3-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to home straight, right there and with every chance 300 M out, 1L down 200 M out, weakened further.
Held up towards rear about 5Ls off pace and 3-wide before being steadied 800 M out, travelled well turning for home, no clear run until 200 M out when switched out wider, too late.
2-wide 1L off leader in 2nd position from 1200 M out to top of stretch, swamped and beaten well over 300 M out.
Always 4 and 5-wide without cover down backstretch and 4Ls off pace, 6-wide turning for home but quickened up to be a neck 200 M out, led about 100 M out and asserted close home.
Tucked in 2-wide and about 3Ls off pace through to home straight when travelling well, didn't have a clear run until 200 M out, finished off fairly well but too late.
7Ls off pace and 4-wide without cover down back straight before being carried wider 500 M out, 6-wide and still about 7Ls down entering straight, didn't come on.
Raced 3-wide about 5Ls off speed until 600 M out when driven along to keep up, struggling at top of stretch and faded right on.
Enjoyed a good sit on the fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until home straight, 1L down 200 M out, no chance with winner and just hung on for 2nd place.
Settled 5Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off strongly and just missed 2nd place.
Settled on fence about 5Ls off pace down back straight, driven along 500 M out, 3Ls down from top of stretch to 200 M out before fading away.
Slowly away and checked on exiting, always towards rear about 7Ls off pace and 3-wide until home straight, no chance in stretch.
2-wide and about 4Ls off pace through to 600 M out when driven along to take closer order, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra in concluding stages.
Raced 3-wide down backstretch about 6Ls off pace, got head up 800 M out and became unbalanced, 5-wide and 6Ls down on the swing, made no impression.
Never better than 2-wide and about 7Ls off leaders at any stage.
Very quickly away, led by about a length through to 500 M marker, headed at top of stretch and weakening when checked 200 M out, eased.
Never closer to pace than 6Ls and 2-wide, never able to get competitive.
Held 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L off pace through to 500 M out, led at top of stretch but headed by winner 250 M out, hung in under pressure and weakened final 200 M.
Dropped in about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide down the back, 2Ls down and travelling well rounding home turn, shaken up to lead 250 M out, comfortably.
On fence about 7Ls off pace down the back, slightly closer turning for home and could only stay on at the same pace on run-in.
Jumped best before settling to midfield 1200 M. Among rear group swinging into straight where he kept on quite well from the 300 M. Found one-paced close home.
Last into straight where he ran on strongly closing stages, doing best work at the finish.
Worse than midfield to straight. Was steadied 300 M before running on a bit final 200 M.
Well there before dropping to midfield home bend. Not in contention thereafter.
Close up before taking charge passing 800 M. Joint-leader into straight where he kept on till headed 200 M. Found no extra.
In rear to home bend. Never on terms.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Towards rear till running on a bit in straight.
In touch before steadily losing ground from home bend.
Pulled hard in 5th or 6th 1000 M and remained similar position into straight. Kept on to hold some chance 200 M. Found winner too strong.
Ridden along early and was never far off to home turn. Kept on to dispute lead 300 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Improved in straight to take lead passing 200 M, holding on well under hands and heels to line.
In rear to straight where he made up good ground to take 2nd near finish.
Always first 2 from 1200 M to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M.
Midfield to straight where he plugged on final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Never a factor.
Ran 4th to straight where he showed great turn of foot to take command passing 200 M. Won readily.
Always first 2 to striaght. Was in front 300 M till headed 200 M. Faded quickly.
In rear to home turn. Kept on steadily closing stages.
In touch to straight. Unable to hold place approaching 250 M.
Among rear group into straight where he kept on quite well for 3rd.
Led before 1000 M, then shared lead into straight. Found no extra and faded 250 M.
2nd last to straight. Switched out 300 M and ran on strongly to take 2nd placing near finish.
Mostly 5th to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Midfield to straight where he dropped out from 300 M.
At back to straight. Never nearer.
Never on terms.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Came to tackle leader final turn. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Prominent until fading out of contention upon straightening.
Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear. Made slight progress rounding home bend. Made no show in straight. (Hung out.)
Soon in touch and was 4th 1100 M. Dropped to 7th when hampered 850 M, regaining 4th rounding home bend. Responded well in straight to take brief lead 150 M. Kept on when headed close home.
Led field from widest draw. Held on until headed inside 150 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Near rear, 2nd last turning in. Ran on very well in straight to take command close home.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield final turn. Stayed on.
Behind midfield, slightly improved to 7th early straight. Continued to make progress to claim 2nd closing stages.
Behind midfield. Checked 900 M. Dropped to the rear group turning in. Stayed on final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened inside 200 M.
Midfield. Behind midfield rounding home bend. Kept on moderately in straight.
In touch on the rails. Improved to 3rd briefly early straight. Failed to hold place 250 M out.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well to take charge 100 M out for comfortable victory.
Rider lost iron early. Took up running rounding home bend. Swamped closing stages.
Prominent early. Dropped back quickly around home bend. Produced strong late run closing stages.
In front early. Held up in 5th some 3Ls off the pace. Kept on steadily down straight without quickening.
Steadied early. Last before taking closer order around home bend. Sustained good progress down straight despite not much room early on.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled at the back. Gained midfield upon straightening. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon in rear.
Prominent to 200 M, then weakened.
Led briefly far side. 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Wide in last few. Last into straight. Made no impression.
Wide in midfield to straight. Faded.
Never better than midfield.
Mostly better than midfield to straight. Faded.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Held 4th to straight. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground from outside in straight. One-paced close home.
Last. Made up considerable ground in straight, doing best work closing stages.
Midfield or better from widest draw. Faded from 250 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well final 200 M.
Midfield. Held up on the rail rounding home bend. Steadied 300 M. Ran on when clear closing stages.
Disputed lead from a wide draw. 1L 2nd 400 M. Weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on well 300 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Behind midfield early. Made steady progress far side and was 5th early straight. One-paced thereafter.
In touch, 1-1/2Ls off the leading pair. Dropped back a bit back straight. Faded rounding home bend. (Heart irregularity.)
Left awkwardly, behind midfield. Crept closer order final turn. Improved along rail to be 2nd briefly 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Slowly away, never a factor.
In touch and was difficult to settle early. Raced 3rd far side before improving to 2nd early straight. Soon found no extra.
Settled in midfield or better. Ran on to lead about 100 M out but caught approaching the line.
Never far off to 600 M then gradually weakened.
Very sluggish at start. Trailed field to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Well there. Hit front upon straightening kicking 2Ls clear 200 M out before quickly overhauled.
Never seen with a chance.
Broke well. Settled in rear of midfield. Met with interferences in straight. Improving well when baulked for a run closing stages.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Mostly 4-wide in prominent position to straight then weakened.
Settled in last few. Responded well under pressure shortly after straightening to get up near finish.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Gained 4th position into straight. Made no further impression.
Led to 400 M. Dropped out.
Raced wide behind midfield. Hung wider around home bend. Made up late ground in straight.
Missed the start slightly from wide draw and raced in rear section. Improved a little after 1000 M. When asked 350 M out found nothing and stayed one-paced to the line.
Settled at back through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out stayed one-paced and further weakened near the line.
Raced keenly in mid-division on rail through to straight. Found nothing in straight and further weakened after 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield. Hung out around home turn. No extra in straight and stayed same paced to the line.
Soon raced in mid-division towards the outside through to straight. Soon weakened from 350 M.
Did not break well and raced at back. Commenced to lose position 600 M out and found nothing in the straight.

Untidy start from wide draw and soon settled in worse than midfield section through to straight. Did not respond well to pressure 300 M out and only made moderate late ground in the concluding stages.

Best out from wide draw. Steadily moved in to be 2 to 3 wide in prominent position after 1200 M mark and kept in similar position through to straight. Ran home fairly from 350 M out but was no match for the winner.
Jumped well and soon settled in mid-division. Under pressure 400 M out unable to quicken and stayed one-paced to the line. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Slow away and soon recovered to be in mid-division through to straight. Switched out and commenced challenge 300 M out, took lead 150 M out and ran home strongly to win readily.
On jumping bounded in the air. Soon raced in worse than midfield out wide without cover through to straight. When asked 300 M out made up steady ground to be closest at finish.
Raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but unable to find an extra gear and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke well and raced no more than 1L behind leader through to straight. Took lead after 400 M but unable to fend off challenge from winner and surrendered lead 150 M. Kept on fairly to the line.
Broke fairly and soon took lead on rail through to straight. Headed after 400 M and did not respond when asked. Soon faded after 200 M.
Prominent in 3rd place and 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1400 M out, 2Ls off pace in 2nd place and hanging out off home bend, led from 350 M out to 150 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Settled about 9Ls off pace and 3-wide, 6Ls down and 4-wide on the swing, quickened up to be just 1L down 200 M out, led inside final 100 M, cleverly.
Sluggish and ridden along early on, 2-wide 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, just over 1L down and with place chances 200 M out, found no more.
Held rails spot 8Ls off speed 1200 M out, momentarily unbalanced 900 M out, niggled along 800 M out, very one-paced and non-threatening from final bend.
Dropped out last 12Ls behind and 2-wide 1200 M out, niggled along 600 M out, 7Ls off pace entering straight, plugged on at the one pace to line.
Driven from gates to lead on fence, 5Ls clear 1200 M out, 2Ls clear 400 M out, headed at top of straight, eased down final 200 M out.
Took first bend out 4-wide, 3-wide but with cover and 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down off home turn, beaten well over 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off leader 1200 M out, 3Ls down turning in, vying for lead and every chance 200 M out, overpowered by winner closing stages.
Bungled the start losing 5Ls, 12Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, 8Ls off speed and 6-wide, soon faded out.
Kept 10Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 6Ls down on straightening, stayed on at the same pace to be nearest at the finish.
In 2nd or 3rd place about 5Ls off pacesetting GOOD MAN down back stretch, closer turning for home, disputed lead from 350 M out to 150 M out when overhauled by front pair.
Always 3-wide without cover and between 5Ls and 7Ls off speed until home straight when slightly closer (and wider), place chances 200 M out, faded out.
About 6Ls off pace and on fence 1200 M out, driven along to hold position from 600 M out to homestretch, beaten 300 M out.
On fence 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, 7Ls down off home turn, never in the front half of the field.
Obliged to race widest of all down centre of course and about 3Ls off speed until 400 M out, beaten over 200 M out.
Keen early on racing right on the speed, half a length off pace 400 M out, under pressure and fading out at the 200 M.
Awkwardly away, covered up 4Ls off pace 600 M out, kept on at the same pace through final stages.
Missed the break by at least 2Ls, 3Ls down 600 M out, shared lead 200 M out, couldn't overhaul winner.
Always close to far rail and about a length off the pace until about 400 M out, sharing lead a little over 200 M out, stayed on well.
Right on pace early on, 1L down 400 M out and checked about 300 M out, soon left with no chance.
Always hung in, narrow lead about 800 M out, 1L off pace 400 M out, faded rapidly.
Raced freely through first 500 M on leaders' heels, steadied about 400 M out, never had much that room but never looked a threat either.
Went all right about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until 400 M pole, cracked as soon as the tempo quickened.
Away well and disputing lead 800 M out, 1L to the good 400 M out, headed over 200 M out, no extra.
Travelled easily between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace until about 400 M out, soon outpaced.
Slowly away, hard ridden and 8Ls off pace after just 200 M raced, never a factor.
Covered up 4Ls off pace 600 M out, smooth progress to be 1L off speed 200 M out, kept on well but couldn't live with Quinella pair.
Flew the start and soon disputing lead out 2-wide until home straight, asserted and 2Ls clear 200 M out, readily.
Never closer than 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, driven along from 600 M out and 6Ls down on the swing, soon no chance.
Always at least 8Ls off the speed, not remotely competitive at any stage.
Driven along 1000 M out when 5Ls down and 3-wide, 8Ls down and 4-wide 700 M out, hung out and with no chance rounding home turn.
Driven to hold rails position and disputing lead early on, tended to over-race, still in front on straightening, faded very rapidly.
On fence 2Ls off pace through to 600 M out when under pressure, switched wider turning for home, kept on fairly well but never going to grab winner.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace about 800 M out, no better off turning for home, picked up steadily to be 4Ls down 200 M out and nearest at finish.
Didn't break well, always caught 3-wide without cover 3Ls or 4Ls off speed through to home straight, never in the hunt during final stages.
Awkwardly away, always laying out about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace on fence until homestretch, one-paced to line, bled.
2-wide and 6Ls 800 M out, never managed to get any closer to pace than that.
Never much worse than 1L off pace but always 3-wide through to home straight, briefly threatened winner 300 M out but emptied quickly.
Raced 3-wide 8Ls off pace 800 M out, further adrift and 6-wide into home straight, finished in own time.
2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed until home turn, 1L down 200 M out, no extra and one-paced to line.
Keen early on racing 3-wide about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace, better off turning for home but was very one-paced on run-in and beaten over 300 M out.
On fence 5Ls off speed 1200 M out, became unbalanced about 500 M out when about 6Ls adrift, recovered to finish off quite well without threatening principals.
Settled about 4Ls off pace on fence before losing position between 800 M and 600 M out, 6Ls down turning in, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Always in rear, never closer than 6Ls off pace, 10Ls off speed 1000 M out, 5-wide entering stretch, beaten 350 M out.
4-wide without cover and 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5-wide and still 5Ls down on straightening, no threat thereafter.
