Awkwardly away, very keen early on raced 4-wide 7Ls off pace 1100 m out, still 7Ls down but 6-wide into straight, made some good late headway down centre of track.
Raced 3-wide about half a length off early pace, disputing lead out 2-wide upsides winner into home straight, 1L down 200 M out, dropped away rapidly.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1300 M out, bit closer turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but didn't quite get there.
Never really competitive at any stage, 2-wide and 7Ls off speed down backstretch to homestretch, 5Ls down and struggling 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Half a length off early speed on fence, 3Ls down 800 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, didn't come on.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide 1300 M out, 5Ls down and under pressure turning in, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Away well, led by no more than a half length out 2-wide and on fence from 1000 M out, went 1L clear 300 M out, stayed on well.
About 6th halfway. Came under pressure shortly on straightening, having every chance 200 M. Did not sustain effort close home.
Towards rear before making steady headway approaching home turn. Continued to make ground in straight to hold every chance 200 M. Found winner too strong close home.
Ridden to be in touch and was well there in 4th on straightening. Unable to secure a clear passage approaching 200 M.
Never a factor.
Was midfield before fading rapidly from 300 M.
Was 3rd going into home bend and close up 300 M. Weakened final 150 M.
Last turning into straight where he ran on a bit. No extra close home.
Well there till dropping to 8th 1000 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Led or shared pace with DANRIVA to 200 M when overhauled.
Settled in rear to straight where he made up considerable ground to lead inside final 200 M. Won going away.
Well there before failing to hold place inside final 150 M.
Mostly 2nd or shared lead inside DANEFACTOR to 200 M where he could find no more.
Was midfield when tightened home bend, losing some ground. Renewed effort and kept on steadily for a remote 3rd.
Left awkwardly from a wide draw and was in rear. Recovered a little ground far side. Hung out badly home turn and faded.
Pushed along from outside draw to soon prominent. Joined lead 600 M out. Found no extra inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Unable to obtain clear run early straight. Ran on when in clear.
Jumped well but was soon near the rear. Very little shift in straight.
Jumped well and was prominent. Dropped to 4th 600 M out. Kept on until weakened passing 200 M.
Midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Led soon after start and was difficult to settle. Was joined 600 M out. Held on but unable to quicken when headed 150 M.
Never in contention.
Mainly 4th till 600 M where he improved a bit to 3rd. Ran on along rail in straight to gain slender advantage very briefly 150 M. Kept on.
Mostly 8th to passing 200 M where he made up some ground to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Gradual progress from 600 M to be 4th 200 M. Held for a run before running on well to take command near 100 M and never threatened.
Midfield. 3-wide rounding home bend. Improved steadily inside 250 M to obtain a minor placing.
Raced wide throughout. Midfield early improving to prominent position far side. Sustained progress to hit front briefly inside 200 M but quickly headed.
Never seen with a chance.
Mostly in midfield. Continued to make ground on leaders in straight.
Always in last few.
Well there 3-wide to straight then weakened under pressure.
Around midfield. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Ran on steadily despite not much room behind leaders.
Forward of midfield. Produced good late impression under pressure in straight.
Disputed lead most of way. Unable to sustain effort near finish.
Held slender lead before joined into straight. Fought on doggedly till swamped near finish.
Wide and around midfield. Found nothing final 400 M.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening to gain upper hand final strides.
Always in last few.
Midfield early, was last passing winning post first time. Made some progress final turn. Continued to improve in straight to take lead close home. Shifted in near finish.
Midfield. Crept closer final turn. Ran on to gain advantage 100 M. Just caught while bumped near the winning post.
Midfield to 400 M. No improvement.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
In touch. Improved to 3rd passing 800 M. Dropped back steadily final turn.
Took lead soon after start until 1000 M. Raced in 4th far side. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled 4th from widest draw. Moved up to take lead passing 1000 M. Kept on when headed near 100 M.
Towards rear. Kept on moderately 250 M.
Raced 2nd from a wide draw. Kept on but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Rear. Made up good ground from final turn to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early. Dropped to midfield near 1000 M. Further dropped to the rear group far side. Crept closer final turn but soon weakened.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground 600 M. Was bumped final turn. Faded.
Raced wide behind midfield. Took closer order home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened after straightening.
Midfield when badly hampered and lost ground approaching home bend. Never recovered.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Niggled along behind midfield. Sustained steady headway down straight to just miss placing.
Never in contention.
Broke well. Prominent most of way to straight. No extra.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in rear of midfield. Stormed home final 200 M to win readily.
Close up behind leaders before losing some ground approaching home bend. Fought on doggedly under pressure in straight.
Began awkwardly losing considerable ground. Took closer order rounding home bend and continued to impress in straight. Improving well when badly baulked inside 200 M.
Around midfield when hampered and lost ground approaching home bend. Never recovered.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon dropped to rear section. Shifted out in the latter stage of home turn. Did not respond well to pressure 400 M out and only ran past couple of beaten runners.
Broke fairly and soon raced no more than 2Ls behind leader. Commenced to lose position 400 M out and soon faded 250 M out.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to take lead on rail around 1250 M with no more than 2Ls advantage through to straight. Unable to quicken and was headed 200 M out. Further weakened in the concluding stages.
Outpaced at rear on fence about 8Ls off pace. Shifted wide entering straight, when asked did not respond. (Lame.)

Midfield briefly and soon settled in worse than midfield section. Switched out in the latter part of home turn and ran home steadily from 300 M out but was never in position to trouble the first pair.
Niggled along to raced in mid-division and took rail running after 1200 M mark. Around 700 M commenced to pushed along to maintain position, no extra in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Did not break well. Soon raced in rear section on fence. Steadily improved from 600 M, responded well to pressure in straight but was checked 100 M out and was then unable to obtain running to the line.
Untidy start and soon settled in midfield out wide without cover throughout. Under pressure to maintain position going up Rock. Found nothing in the straight and kept on same pace to the line.

Broke fairly and raced wide going into the first turn. Steadily moved in to be 2 to 3-wide after 1200 M in mid-division. Under pressure around 400 M but unable to quicken and stayed one-paced to the line.

Broke awkwardly and soon settled in midfield towards the outside. From 1000 M gradually improved to race 1-1/2Ls behind leader. Under pressure 300 M out and ran on well but was unable overhaul the winner.

Niggled along to lead on rail before being headed going into the first turn, never more than 2Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Responded well 300 M out to fend off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Jumped awkwardly and was then checked. Near the winning post first time became unbalanced. After that became detached and was never a factor. (Lame.)
No speed from gates and switched across to fence, raced 3-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls down 800 M out to straight, checked 200 M out, switched out wider, finished strongly.
Always about 3Ls off speed and on fence through to home straight when travelling well, every chance 200 M out, no extra through final 100 M.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace through to home straight, struggling 200 M out, faded right out.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls, headed 200 M out, faded.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 7Ls off speed 800 M out, became further detached.
Never better than 5Ls off pace on fence, niggled along over 600 M out, found nothing on run-in.
Unbalanced when 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, took closer out 3-wide order 600 M out, turned for home widest of all (5-wide) and 3Ls down, led 150 M out, kept on.
Caught 3-wide without cover about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, hemmed in and never fully extended thereafter, checked 100 M out, unlucky.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls behind leader and 2-wide until home stretch, switched off heels to challenge 300 M out, ran on well once clear but much too late.
Settled out 2-wide about 1L or 2Ls off pace until home straight, joined leader 300 M out, faded through final 150 M.
Raced keenly 3-wide with cover when 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down and 4-wide entering stretch, soon with every chance but flattened out close home.
Had the box seat run on fence 2Ls off pace through to 200 M out, weakened.
Fractions and broke through, not much speed early on, niggled to find position forward of midfield 2-wide, hugged rail from 600 M. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Not far off early but steadily dropped towards rear 800 M out, not a factor thereafter.
Driven to track leader. Ran out of steam straightening up and dropped away tamely.
Brief lead then sat 3-wide 1-1/2Ls off speed. Challenged for lead 600 M out and held 1L advantage one off fence until no extra and headed concluding stages.
4 or 5-wide in mid-division, brief effort near 200 M, soon one-paced.
Slow out, detached last until getting within 8 or 9Ls off lead on straightening. Ran on well final 200 M though never looked likely to obtain a minor placing.
On rail in midfield through to straightening when attempting to shift out and go forward, was disappointed for a run 200 M out, steadied and shifted back in, only plugged on.
No early speed and soon dropped to the rear despite ridden along most of the way, ran past a couple of tired runners close home.
Jumped only fairly, driven to take lead 1000 M out. Ceded advantage near 600 M, under pressure 350 M out, kept on at same pace.
Away smartly from widest alley but was never on the track and had no cover throughout around midfield. Tired soon after straightening. Hung in throughout.
3-wide towards rear, 6 or 7Ls off lead 600 M out. 4Ls down straightening up, made sustained run from 200 M to score comfortably closing stages.
4 or 5 wide around midfield early, niggled along from 900 M 3 wide rear of mid-division. Crept closer rounding home bend to be 4Ls down on straightening, ran on well though no threat to winner.
4Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, loomed up with every chance 200 M out, no extra close home.
Always towards rear out 3-wide, never a factor.
Slowly away, tailing after just 200 M raced, not sighted thereafter.
No speed early on racing and always at least 8Ls of 9Ls off pace through to home straight.
2-wide and 1L or 2Ls off speed early on through to home straight, every chance 300 M out, weakened final 200 M.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide from 800 M marker to home straight, very weak final 300 M.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls, headed about 100 M out, no extra.
Appeared to fly-jump occasionally down back straight, never travelling, beaten a long way out.
Never better than 6Ls off pace at any point.
Slowly away and at least 10Ls off pace through to home straight, improved to be 5Ls off leaders 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Always 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, led 100 M out, ran on well.
Very awkwardly away but soon 5Ls off pace on fence, never improved position.
Led field until joined early straight. One-paced when headed 250 M.
Towards rear. Slightly improved rounding home bend to be 9th turning in. Kept on early straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Soon 5th. Progressed to 4th final turn. Weakened 200 M out.
Midfield. Ran on a bit early straight to reach 4th 250 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Pushed along early to race in 4th. Kept on without quickening final 400 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Made steady ground early straight. Ran on final 200 M but never able to threaten.
Jumped well, settling towards rear. Very minor progress final 200 M.
Prominent. Kept on but lost 3rd place close home.
Behind midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra 250 M.
Last. 2nd last 450 M. Made up good ground inside 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention.
Prominent from widest draw and soon sat outside leader. Joint lead after turning in before taking over 250 M. Held on well to the line.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Rear of midfield. Made modest progress in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight then weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Held up behind leaders in slow pace. Stumbled badly rounding home bend and never recovered.
Led early. Well there to home bend then gradually weakened.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Not far off. Improved to 2nd rounding home bend but had nothing to give in straight.
Towards rear. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield. Took closer order entering straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Forward of midfield when hampered and lost position coming out of back straight, then severely checked to avoid runner rounding home bend and never recovered.
Led far side setting slow pace. Headed around home bend. One-paced in straight.
Behind midfield. Loomed up around home bend to hold 3Ls break into straight. Held on.
Well back. Kept on past beaten runners in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, last at start. Recovered some ground but was still in rear group. Crept closer to midfield turning in but soon found no extra.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on a bit 300 M but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Made up good ground 400 M, doing best work final 200 M.
In touch and mostly 4th. Came to tackle leader 300 M, gaining slender advantage 200 M. However effort not sustained.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M.
Midfield or slightly behind. Crept closer order final turn. Ran on but steadied for a run near 200 M. Renewed effort to grab lead close home.
Led field until joined 650 M. Kept on when headed 200 M.
Behind midfield early. Soon recovered some ground to be 5th or 6th. Kept on but found no extra final 200 M.
Bounded at start, towards rear. Ran on well from outside in straight.
Last to final turn. Ran on well in straight.
Tracked leader before joining the lead near 650 M. Kept on when headed 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily far side. Faded on straightening.
Prominent. Failed to hold place when 4th final turn. Dropped out 200 M.
Broke well to lead. Joined rounding home bend. Soon dropped out of contention after straightening.
Never better than midfield. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the break but soon in midfield. Made some impression early in straight but found nothing closing stages.
Well there. Quickened well upon straightening to hold some 1-1/2L break 200 M out only to be caught final stride.
Last few most of way.
Prominent to straight. No clear passage early on. Faded gradually.
Well there disputing the lead rounding home bend and into straight, then soon weakened.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent and wide into straight. One-paced.
Well back. Ran on under pressure in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on.
Wide in midfield. Shared lead into straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled in last few. Ran on down centre of straight to just get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to hold every chance 200 M out.
Untidy start and pushed along to be 3Ls off pace around 3 to 4 wide. Hung out when making the turn and soon dropped to the rear section. Made no impression in the straight.
Jumped well from outside draw. Ridden along to be in mid-division towards the outside. All out 300 M out but found nothing and stayed same paced to the finish.
Soon settled at back 7 to 8Ls off leader. From 600 M steadily made up ground and shifted out. Under pressure around 400 M and ran home strongly but never troubled the winner.

Broke well and raced 2Ls off leader on fence. Commenced to niggle along to maintain position after 1000 M mark. All out about 300 M and ran on fairly but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Ridden along to lead on fence through to straight. Did not quicken in straight, headed 300 M out and checked. Further weakened after that.

Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to race in mid-division around 3Ls off pace through to straight. When asked 350 M out did not quicken and kept on evenly to the line. (After the race was found to be a "roarer".)
Best out but soon dropped to worse than midfield section out wide. Under pressure around 600 M to maintain position and found nothing in the straight.
Tardy start and niggled along to race 1 to 2Ls behind leader through to straight. When asked 350 M out ran on strongly, hit the front after 300 M and won comfortably.
Ridden along but outpaced at tail. Shifted wide entering straight, when asked found nothing in the straight.
Broke well from wide draw and soon shifted inwards to be 3 wide 2Ls off leader through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but stayed one-paced to the line.
Steadied after start. Ridden along to race in worse than midfield section. In the middle stages hung out and commenced to lose position. No extra in straight and further weakened after 200 M.

Missed the start and pushed along to be 4Ls off leader on inner. Continued to be ridden along and stayed in similar position entering turn. Made up steady ground in the straight and grabbed 3rd place on the line.
2 and 3-wide about 10Ls off speed 1000 M out, 4-wide without cover 800 M out when 6Ls down, 3Ls off leader 200 M out, stayed on at the same pace.
Driven along from gates to race on pace out 2-wide, clear lead from 700 M out to 300 M out when headed by winner, faded rapidly. (Lame.)
Raced 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out, back on bridle 2Ls off pace and 2-wide entering straight, led 300 M out, stayed on strongly.
Crossed to rails on exiting, soon driven along in rear about 10Ls off pace, 6Ls down entering straight, no room along inside 300 M out, switched wider, ran on through beaten rivals.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, similarly placed but driven along on the swing into home straight, no impression thereafter.
Never really competitive at any stage, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down off home turn and 200 M out, never dangerous.
3-wide and 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down and 2-wide and travelling well turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra concluding stages.
Hard driven to lead on fence 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out to maintain lead, headed 700 M out, beaten at top of straight.
7Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, driven along and 5Ls down turning in, didn't come on.
At least 8Ls off speed and 2-wide 1000 M out, took closer order from 800 M out, 4Ls down and 6-wide on straightening, at winner's girth 200 M out, tried hard but couldn't get any closer.
Awkwardly away, always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M out to home straight, never really looked like improving on this position.
Had the run of the race 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to home straight, soon weakened right out.
4-wide 1400 M out, progressed to 3-wide and about 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5-wide entering straight and 3Ls off pace, soon beaten.
Very wide (6-wide) passing stands, pressed on to be 3-wide and on pace 1200 M out, under pressure to lie up 700 M out, beaten entering home straight.
Raced 3-wide on pace 1400 M out, 2-wide a neck off lead from 600 M out, brief lead at top of straight before being swamped over 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, recovered and never much worse than 2Ls off pace though always 3-wide until home straight, very one-paced on run-in to post.
On fence about 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls down travelling turning for home, about 1L off lead 200 M out, kept on well without threatening principal pair.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace entering straight, led 200 M out, headed by runner-up 100 M out but battled on well to assert again close home.
Raced 2-wide 1L off pace 1400 M out, never worse than 2Ls off pace until straight, every chance when 1L down 200 M out, weakened steadily.
No speed early on and raced in rear 10Ls off pace 1400 M out, 7Ls down and 5-wide into stretch, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Settled on fence about 7Ls off pace down backstretch, 4Ls down entering homestretch, suffered rough passage to get within 1L off lead 200 M out, didn't come on final stages.
Didn't break well, settled 3Ls or 4Ls off speed and 2-wide through to home straight, failed to quicken up and beaten 300 M out.
Soon led on fence, headed 1300 m out and left with box seat position 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, always outpaced from 350 M out.
Bit keen early on and assumed lead 1300 M out, narrow lead on fence from 600 M out to straight, soon headed, dropped away rapidly through final 200 M.
Never worse than 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, tended to carry head awkwardly, severely checked about 350 M out, no chance thereafter.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls or 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, about 5Ls off lead and 5-wide into straight, 1L down 200 M out, led 100 M out but no extra once headed again by winner close home.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, similarly placed and struggling 600 M out, beaten at top of homestretch.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide 3Ls down turning for home, 1L down and with place chances at least 200 M out, didn't follow through.
No speed early on and settled 8Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 5Ls down 200 M out, ran on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide without cover about 5Ls off pace until about 800 M out, 4-wide 3Ls down turning in, 2Ls down and beaten 200 M out, fly jumped about 30 M from post.
Awkwardly away, checked 1200 M out, raced very keenly 3Ls off pace through to home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Fractious in stalls beforehand, sent on to race about half a length off pace out 2-wide, led at top of home straight, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Always 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th place and 2-wide through to home straight, half a length back in 2nd place 200 M out, no answer to winner's finishing kick.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off pace, every chance 300 M out but never looked like sticking his head in front.
3-wide and about 6Ls off speed towards rear down back straight, 5Ls off pace turning for home, never competitive in homestretch. (Lame.)
Settled in rear and on fence between 6Ls and 8Ls off pace down back straight, 5Ls down entering straight, never landed a blow.
Bit keen early on racing 2-wide about 5Ls off pace, 4Ls down off the home turn, 1L down 200 M out, led 100 M out and kept on well.
Led on fence 1000 M out, held narrow advantage until home straight, soon headed and weakened.
Inconvenienced a couple of times on run to home straight when always about 2-wide and 4Ls off pace, 2Ls down 200 M out, didn't come on.
Always towards rear about 6Ls off pace and towards inside rail, 2-wide and 5Ls down entering home straight, no further impression.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he kept on to dispute 3rd 300 M. Found one-paced near finish.
Always prominent. Ridden to lead 250 M, holding on well till being caught final stride.
Last to straight when he ran on a bit closing stages.
Towards rear before making up considerable ground inside final 200 M, full of running at the finish.
Well there to 300 M where he could find no extra.
Settled in rear and was worse than midfield into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Soon worse than midfield and remained there to home turn. Kept on final 200 M.
Among rear group to straight. Kept on without threatening final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Towards rear into home bend. Never nearer.
Soon led and made running to 250 M when headed. Dropped out of contention steadily.
Midfield to straight. Came with strong run inside final 200 M to snatch race short of line.
In touch before failing to hold position halfway down the home straight.
Midfield to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Prominent. Held 3rd until failing to hold place upon straightening.
Last. Ran past a couple of weakening horses in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on well from 7th early straight to assert authority final 50 M.
Near rear. Made up good ground from 10th 200 M.
Mostly 5th. Ran on quite well 200 M out.
Towards rear. Hung out home turn. Made ground steadily inside 250 M, never nearer.
Soon behind midfield. Faded from home bend.
Slowly away. Recovered some ground to be just behind midfield. Weakened in straight.
Prominent. Remained 4th after being checked 1000 M out. Kept on well 400 M to take advantage 150 M. Unable to resist winner's late challenge.
Midfield from widest draw. 3-wide turning in. Kept on same pace until finding no extra close home.
In touch. Pulled to the front 900 M out. Lost advantage final turn to be 2nd until 150 M. No extra.
Led field to 900 M. Regained advantage final turn until headed 150 M. One-paced thereafter.
Disputed lead until no extra over 200 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Midfield, drifting gradually to stand's side. Kept on one pace.
Trailed field most of way. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily final 200 M without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Faded from 200 M out.
Always well there. Kept on without quickening.
Well back. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily for remote 4th.
Jumped fairly and prominent briefly. Faded from midfield from 200 M.
Midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure closing stages.
Made virtually all to win easily.
Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made ground steadily to just miss 2nd at finish.
Always in touch. Kept on.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside final 300 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, remained at rear. Made moderate progress in straight.
Better than midfield. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Never able to feature.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made ground steadily on inside final 450 M.
Always there. Kept on.
Better than midfield. Ran on well 300 M to take control 150 M. Won readily.
Around midfield throughout.
Led field to final turn. Soon weakened.
Well there from a wide draw. Came to tackle leader final turn. Took lead 300 M to 150 M. Kept on.
Made no show.
Never better than midfield. No progress in straight.
Settled in midfield. Loomed up to hold every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Led till headed into straight. Dropped out.
Midfield far side before losing position coming onto home bend. Renewed effort turning in and ran on steadily under pressure.
Wide in midfield. Faded into straight.
Midfield. Ran on along rails upon straightening but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Soon in rear.
Slightly slowly away. Soon picked up to midfield before home bend. Ran on down straight to do best work at finish but denied by a narrowest margin.
Towards rear. Finished off race well.
Settled well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind leaders. Came to tackle for lead upon straightening. Fought on resolutely to claim victory in bob of heads.
Never better than midfield despite producing late impression closing stages.
Behind midfield. Wide into straight and soon faded.
Disputed lead. Gained narrow advantage into straight. Overhauled over 200 M out.
Never too far off the leaders in 4th. Improved to gain slender lead over 200 M out but pipped at post.
Unable to muster early speed to settle in midfield. Was placed under pressure after 600 M failed to make ground on the leaders on the home straight.
Broke fairly and raced in mid-division out wide. From 1000 M steadily dropped back to rear section. Responded fairly in straight and made up some ground to be closest at finish.
Failed to show any early speed and soon at the rear. Then raced wide throughout at the rear and never made any ground in the straight.
Pushed hard early and only managed midfield, ridden along from 700 M but never quicken and only one-paced in the straight.

Jumped well but raced awkwardly in the early stages. Soon recovered and pushed along to race 3-wide 3Ls off leader through to stretch. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground and grabbed 3rd place on the line.
Soon settled at rear section on fence. Gradually shifted 4-wide going into straight around 7Ls down. Under pressure from 400 M and made up steady ground to be closest at the finish.
Showed usual early pace from wide gate to be just behind leaders but 3-wide without cover. Pushed hard from 600 M but soon commenced to weaken and dropped out in the straight.
Began well but unable to match early pace to midfield on the rail. Pushed along from 700 M to go forward and had clear running in straight but stayed one-paced to the line.

Best out from wide draw and ridden along to lead. Steadily shifted in to be 2-wide and was headed around 700 M. Responded well to pressure in straight and held off late lunged from 2nd placegetter to win by a narrow margin.

Broke fairly from wide gate. Soon raced 1/2L off leader and steadily shifted in to take rail running. Took lead around 700 M and laid out when making the turn. Stayed one-paced when asked 300 M out and further weakened in final stages.
Jumped well and niggled along to be 2 to 3-wide 4Ls off pace through to straight. All out 350 M and ran on strongly but was unable find any extra to overhaul the winner.
Began well and raced in forward position just behind leaders. Remained there until placed under pressure on straightening never quicken and weakened in the closing stages.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, still on terms but 3-wide entering straight, found little under pressure.
1Ls off pace out 2-wide 1200 M out, assumed lead 800 M out, poached 2Ls advantage entering straight, still 1L to the good 200 M out, headed about 100 M out, tired.
Slowest away and 4-wide without cover throughout, wide and 5Ls down 1200 M out, bit closer but still wide entering stretch, flattened out.
Severely checked 1600 M out, never a factor thereafter.
Never better than 4Ls off pace, always 4 and 5-wide, never a threat.
Jumped awkwardly, 6Ls off lead and 3-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide 800 M out, shuffled back turning for home, ran on well through final stages to grab 3rd place on line.
Settled 2-wide about 5Ls off speed 1400 M out through to home straight (driven along from 800 M out), 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off strongly to snatch 2nd on line.
Raced 3-wide without cover 1200 M out when 3Ls off pace, struggling fully 600 M out, beaten at top of straight.
Made the running on fence, never clear by much more than a length, headed by TAMBORA STAR 800 M out, 2Ls down on straightening, 1L down 200 M out, no extra.
Checked about 1600 M out, raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace until 700 M out when disappointed for running, 8Ls down entering straight, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Enjoyed soft run 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence through to 600 M when pulled 2-wide to challenge, found little off bridle and swamped over 200 M out.
Inconvenienced 1600 M out, raced 3-wide 8Ls off pace 1200 M, about 6Ls of 7Ls off pace and short of room off home turn, made some moderate late headway through beaten rivals.
On fence 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down on straightening, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, half a length up in 2nd place just 50 M out, relegated to 4th place final stages.
Covered up in mid-division about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace and 3-wide through to home straight, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, led 100 M out, ran on.
Caught 4-wide early on before being allowed to lead on fence 1200 M out, headed by QUICK STEP 800 M out, 2Ls down entering stretch, weakened rapidly.
Over-raced a little on the fence when 5Ls off speed down back stretch, lacked any kind of acceleration in home stretch.
Always 4-wide down the back straight about 6Ls off pace, 6-wide into home stretch and 6Ls off pace, soon beaten.
Ridden quietly out 2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home straight, driven along to be closer 200 M out, kept closing final stages, encouraging.
Keen racing 3-wide on terms 1200 M before taking up running passing 800 M out 2-wide, 2Ls clear on the turn, swamped 200 M out, faded.
Caught wide early and allowed to drift back to rear of field about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace down the back, similarly positioned and hard ridden 500 M out, found nothing.
Reluctantly led very early on, snagged back to be 1L off pace 1100 M out on fence, 3Ls down on straightening, good turn of foot to lead 200 M out, headed again 100 M, no extra.
Raced a little freely out 3-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off lead until home straight, quickened up well to be a neck down 200 M out, kept on well but had no answer to winner's pace.
Covered up racing 3-wide about 4Ls off lead until 600 M out, 4-wide in home straight and labouring, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide on pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, all out to be half a length off lead 200 M out, stayed on at same pace to line.
Settled 3-wide towards rear about 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5-wide and 5Ls off pace turning for home, stayed on strongly final stages but post came too soon.
Fairly well placed 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off lead until home straight, soon outpaced, struggling 200 M out, eased down close home.
Always 3 and 4-wide in mid-division and 3Ls and 4Ls off pace through to home straight, strong run to be 1L off pace 200 M out, kept on well to line.
Tucked away on fence 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to straight, switched wider to challenge 300 M out, 1.5Ls down 200 M out, led 100 M, driven out.
Midfield. Ran on steadily from 6th early straight to gain slender advantage inside 150 M. Just held off 2nd's late challenge.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield final turn. Ran on well in straight but failed quicken to challenge close home.
Led field soon after start. Was joined 600 M, regaining advantage briefly 250 M. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Lost ground at start, then ridden along to be better than midfield. Dropped back from home turn and faded in straight.
Behind midfield throughout.
Better than midfield. Moved up from outside 1000 M out to join the leader 600 M. Held on until weakening out of contention 200 M.
Unbalanced after start, towards rear. Made ground from outside final 250 M, never nearer. (Hung in.)
Prominent, 4th from 900 M. Ran on well under pressure 200 M, just missed.
Jumped very awkwardly and jockey hurt his leg, towards rear. Made up some ground 200 M out.
In touch to 300 M. Weakened.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made slight progress far side and was midfield on outside turning in. Made up good ground to challenge passing 200 M but was one-paced near finish.
Midfield or slightly better. Unable to quicken in straight.
Rear. Steadied for a run near 500 M. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and led briefly early. Soon dropped to the rear and never able to feature.
Improved steadily to take up running halfway down back straight. Headed into home straight and soon weakened.
Well back before producing good late headway closing stages.
Wide in midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Among leaders turning in but soon weakened.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Well there. Hit front upon straightening and not match pace of winner closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Led early. Travelled in close-up 2nd on rails far side.
Midfield before losing position quickly rounding home bend.
Midfield early. Towards rear into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear. Improving when baulked for a run 200 M out. No further impression.
Very wide behind midfield. Effort rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind leaders. Shifted off rails for a run upon straightening. Responded well to win comfortably.
Behind midfield. Checked approaching 1400 M. Made slight progress to midfield far side. Ran on in straight but never able to reach the winner.
Behind midfield. Crept closer to 6th on inside final turn. Continued to make ground to snatch 3rd near finish.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield far side. Faded from final turn.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight, just lost a minor placing near finish.
Last. Made ground steadily from outside in straight.
Near rear. Crept closer turning for home. No further advancement.
Jumped well from widest draw and was in the front early. Soon in midfield before progressing to 4th passing 1200 M. Kept on until weakened badly inside 200 M.
Prominent. Held 3rd before advancing to 2nd early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Badly unbalanced near 1400 M, soon raced slightly better than midfield. One-paced.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up some ground to midfield far side. Soon found no extra.
Prominent. Led field from 1400 M. Held 5Ls advantage early straight. Held on.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Moved up to 2nd passing 1400 M. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
In touch. Severely checked approaching 1400 M. Never recovered.
Settled in rear. Took a while to obtain run after straightening and finished well to grab lead final stride.
Prominent to straight. One-paced before fading gradually final 200 M.
Soon in rear. Tailed off into straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on stoutly down straight to hold every chance closing stages. Just failed.
Prominent and wide to straight. Weakened.
Prominent till faded inside 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily to produce good late impression closing stages.
Well there. Took slender lead rounding home bend and went 1L clear 200 M out. Swamped over 100 M out.
Led field till headed around home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Held up in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never better than midfield. No extra into straight.
Settled just off midfield on rails. Quickened up well upon straightening to hit front over 100 M out. Pipped at post.
Began awkwardly. Remained in last few throughout.
Began awkwardly and soon recovered to be in mid-division on rail. Around 800 M was severely crowded. Found no extra in the straight.
Began well and raced in forward position just behind leader on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
Broke well from wide draw but soon dropped to the rear section out wide. Made slight improvement before making the turn. Did not respond well to pressure 250 M out and stayed on evenly to the line.

Began fairly and ridden along to claim lead around 1000 M. Soon shifted in to take rail with no more than 1L advantage. When asked 250 M out ran on steadily but was no match for the winners and held on for 3rd place.
Broke fairly and soon raced keenly in mid-division. Around 800 M was severely crowded and soon dropped to rear section. Did not quicken and soon faded after 200 M.
Untidy start and soon settled. 3-wide around 3 to 4Ls off pace through to straight. When asked 300 M out showed good turn of foot and claimed lead at 200 M, kept on well to the line.
Soon raced in rear section towards the outside through to straight. No extra in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and soon settled 6Ls off pace in rear section. Gradually shifted out when entering the straight but was one-paced when asked before making up a little late ground.
At back through to straight. Made no impression in straight.

Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to settle 1L off from rail. 2 to 3Ls off leader. Only able to obtain clear running from 200 M and ran on strongly in the concluding stages to force a share of the win.
Broke well. Steadily shifted inwards to race 1 wide around 1L behind leader. Unable to find an extra gear when asked 350 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Did not jump well from wide draw. Soon raced in rear section out wide. At 1000 M mark quickly moved up to race 1-1/2Ls behind leader. Ran home steadily and missed the 3rd placing by a short margin.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, weakened.
Raced 5Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, never able to get any closer to lead than that.
Always about 3-wide and 4Ls off pace until straight, quickened up well down centre of course to be 1L down in 2nd place 100 M out, couldn't follow through.
Caught 4-wide without cover through early stages when about 2Ls off pace, still tracking leaders entering straight when under pressure, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide about 1L or 2Ls off pace from backstretch to homestretch, all out to be 1L off winner 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 6Ls off pace on fence down back straight, slightly closer on straightening, soon faded right out.
Raced freely early on, caught 3-wide 7Ls off pace from 900 M out to home straight, finished off very well along stand's rail to be nearest at finish.
Very keen early on, snagged back to be 4-wide and 2Ls off pace 1200 M out before being right on speed 600 M out, swamped 200 M out and eased down final stages.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace until home straight, led 200 M out, kept on well.
Held rails position 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down on the turn, stayed on well without threatening.
2-wide 4Ls off speed 1000 M out, struggling to stay in touch on straightening, dropped away rapidly.
Slowest into stride, held up in rear about 6Ls off pace and 2-wide, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
Led out 2-wide when 1L off pace 1200 M out, never clear by much more than a length through to straight, headed 250 M out, faded.
Caught 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, slightly worse off on the swing, ran on well nearer stand's rail but much too late.
No speed early on, detached 3Ls from main body of field 800 M out, ran on through some beaten rivals in straight, but never closer than 8Ls off pace.
4 or 5Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, bit closer 200 M out, nearest at finish.
Settled 3-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off leaders down the back, 5-wide into the straight, 8Ls off pace 200 M out, no chance.
Raced 3-wide and roughly 4Ls off pace from barriers until home straight, struggling a long way out.
3-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide into the home straight, soon struggling and beaten over 300 M out.
Away well and advanced from wide gate to be vying for lead out 2-wide 800 M out, clear lead 350 M out, half a length to the good 200 M out, drew further clear.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence down the back, 2-wide on the turn, half a length down 200 M out, no extra.
Led on fence before disputing lead with winner through to home straight, headed at top of straight and faded right out.
Covered up 2 and 3-wide about 3Ls off pace through to home straight, 2.5Ls down 200 M out, kept on quite well closing stages.
Fractious in the gates, soon settled 2-wide 2Ls off pace, 3-wide into the straight, all out to be 1.5Ls down 200 M out, just hung on for 3rd.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace 800 M out, still 4Ls down but 5-wide into stretch, one-paced to line.
Always quite well placed about 3Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, already back-pedalling 200 M out, eased down.
Never much worse than 2Ls off pace until advancing to leader's quarters 200 M out, kept on gamely to lead 50 M out.
Travelled well on outside about 2Ls to 3Ls off pace until 200 M out when rider dropped whip, stayed on at same pace.
Settled 3Ls off early speed, all out to be about 2.5Ls down 200 M out, retreated.
Away well and led by 1L 800 M out, still about a length to the good 200 M out, headed 50 M from line.
Between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace until 400 M out when struggling to stay in touch, dropped right out very quickly.
About 2Ls off speed until 300 M out, half a length down 200 M out, stuck to task well but couldn't poke his head in front.
1L off pace in 2nd position against stand's rail until 400 M out, outpaced from then on.
3Ls off speed towards far rail early on, steady progress to be 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra and weakened.
Never better than 6Ls off pace at any stages, off the bridle 500 M out, no progress.
5Ls off pace early on, steadily became further detached.
4Ls off pace until 400 M out when hard ridden to stay in touch, didn't succeed.
Never went a yard, lame.
Never better than 6Ls off pace early on, faded right out when the tempo quickened again about 400 M out.
Always about 2Ls off pace, came under pressure 400 M out but kept on fairly well without threatening principals.
Slowly away and checked on exiting gates, never better than 3-wide and 7Ls off pace until home straight, very one-paced on run-in.
Over-raced a little when covered up 3-wide and 4Ls off pace down the back, 3Ls off pace turning for home, good acceleration to lead 200 M out, drew clear.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along 600 M out, 5-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, made no impression.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off speed 1200 M out, closer turning for home, led 300 M out before being headed by winner 200 M out, no extra closing stages and beaten for 2nd place close home.
Always prominent and disputing lead from 1200 M out on fence, still right on pace entering straight, one-paced and tired markedly though final 200 M.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along 500 M out and closer turning for home, could only stay on at same pace to line.
Settled 6Ls off pace out 2-wide 1000 M out, travelled well 3-wide 4Ls off pace on the turn, kept on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence down the backstretch and still well placed on straightening, soon outpaced and well beaten 200 M out.
Ridden quietly 2-wide and about 7Ls off pace until straightening, over 4Ls down 200 M out, closed a little further to be nearest at the finish.
Always travelling well on inner 6Ls off pace down back straight and 4Ls down entering straight, switched inside to challenge and stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Led out 2-wide by half a length early on, still 2-wide and disputing lead entering straight, found nothing under pressure.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off speed and 3-wide down backstretch, bit closer turning for home, picked up well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, tried hard but couldn't get closer.
Caught 4-wide without cover racing very keenly early on before pressing on to dispute lead out 3-wide 800 M out, headed 300 M out and weakening when bumped about 200 M out.
Dropped in 5th position 2-wide and 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down off home turn, could only stay on at the same pace to line.
Worse than midfield into home bend. Improved along rails on straightening, finding only one-pace near finish.
Shared pace into straight and kept on till finding no extra inside 150 M.
Ridden soon after start and was among leaders from 1200 M to straight. Unable to hold place approaching 200 M.
Towards rear before making headway from 900 M and was upsides leaders approaching home turn. Faded steadily under pressure inside 150 M.
In touch before losing ground from 250 M.
Worse than midfield when checked 800 M, losing ground. Never recovered.
Prominent to straight and held every chance 250 M. Could find no extra and soon dropped out of contention.
Settled in rear to straight. Ran on strongly to challenge closing stages. Just failed to get up on line.
Never far away to home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Slightly better than midfield to straight where he ran on well to take lead 150 M. Just held on under pressure when challenged.
About 12th 800 M and was last of closely bunched field 400 M. Made up considerable ground closing stages, doing best work at the finish.
Made no show.
Towards rear before improving steadily rounding home bend. Came under pressure 250 M and kept on but found first two too strong.
Never far off to straight. Unable quicken when asked.
Tardy start, towards rear. Improved slightly rounding home bend to be 7th. One-paced thereafter.
Raced 8th to home turn where he hung out. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped towards the rear when hanging out from 600 M. Never recovered.
Better than midfield. Kept on well early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Made ground steadily 250 M to claim 3rd close home.
Jumped well and led field to 700 M. Raced 3rd until dropped back steadily from home turn.
Towards rear. Dropped to last 500 M out. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Took lead from 700 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
In touch on the rail. Improved to 2nd 400 M. Ran on steadily to take lead 200 M. Held on.
Prominent early, soon dropped to 4th. Kept on to take 3rd final turn until losing the minor placing closing stages.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Moderate progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 8th early straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Began slowly. Never seen with a chance.
Held up in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. No clear run early in straight despite steady improvement. Finished well between runners but tightened short of line.
Jumped best. Disputed lead outside leader before slender lead into straight. Drifted out upon straightening and fought on only to be denied short of line.
Tailed off most of way.
Towards rear. Gained midfield on inner into straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Wide in midfield. No extra into straight.
Never better than midfield despite moderate late impression.
Led or disputed lead. Fought on resolutely down straight to gain upper hand in the shadows of the post.
Prominent to straight. Faded gradually.
Behind leaders. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Settled better than midfield and 5th into straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced 2nd soon after start. Came to tackle leader early straight, gaining slender advantage 200 M. Kept on when headed inside 100 M.
Led field to 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Near rear. Made up some ground on rail passing 200 M. Was steadied when finding no clear run inside 100 M.
Midfield or slightly better from widest draw. Dropped back steadily passing 600 M. No cover throughout.
Never a factor.
Mostly 4th before improving to 3rd near 100 M. Kept on.
Midfield on the rail. Moved up gradually to be 5th stable bend. No answer when under pressure home turn. Weakened inside 200 M.
Held 3rd until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Mainly midfield to 200 M. Ran on but was checked 100 M. Renewed effort to share a minor placing at finish.
Settled towards rear. Crept closer to 8th final turn. Ran on well final 200 M to assert authority inside 100 M.
Behind midfield to straight. No improvement.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Gained 5th some 2Ls off pace into straight. One-paced.
Wide throughout. Rear before making swift progress far side but dropped out from prominent position home bend.
Rear. Gained midfield into straight. Shifted out for a run inside 200 M but only kept on at the one pace.
Prominent. Quickened upon straightening to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages
Settled in rear. Made swift headway between runners home bend. Sustained effort to take charge inside 200 M.
Disputed lead. Took up running far side. Ridden to hold place rounding home bend but overhauled soon after straightening.
Prominent before fading home bend.
Prominent. Steadied to midfield coming off Rock. Towards rear into straight. Produced moderate late headway.
Always prominent. Quickened to challenge upon straightening holding every chance 200 M out but soon swamped.
Well back. Took closer order going up Rock. One-paced in straight.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Jumped badly and raced in the rear section on rail through to straight. On straightening shifted out and placed under pressure but found nothing and stayed same pace to the line.

Broke fairly and niggled along to lead briefly and was headed at 1000 M mark. Soon raced 1-1/2 to 2Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Under pressure after 350 M and made up steady ground but was no match for the first pair.
Missed the start slightly and race 3-wide around 3Ls off leader. Only one-paced in the straight and ran past some beaten runners.
Missed the start slightly from wide draw. Soon dropped to the tail and shifted in closer to the rail. Shifted out for clear running turning for home but made no impression.
Jumped well and pushed hard early but only managed midfield 2-wide. Unable to quicken in the straight and further weakened in the closing stages.

On jumping became badly unbalanced and soon dropped to rear position towards the outside. From 800 M steadily improved to midfield. Under pressure 300 M out but found no extra and stayed one-paced to the line.
Pushed hard early to claim lead after the 1000 M mark and took rail running at 800 M with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Unable to quicken and soon faded after 200 M.
Niggled along to race 6Ls off pace on rail. Commenced to push along to hold position at about 900 M and eased off around 700 M. Was one-paced when asked at 300 M before making up little late ground.
Unable to muster early speed to settle in worse than midfield 2-wide. Gradually shifted out in straight and was put under pressure after 350 M ran on fairly to be closest at finish.

Best out from wide draw and raced 1-1/2Ls off leader and steadily shifted in to be 2 to 3-wide. Stayed in similar position through to straight. All out 300 M out and ran on steadily but unable to fend off challenge from winner.
Began well and raced in the better than midfield section on fence. About the 700 M commenced to lost position steadily. Found nothing in the straight and further weakened after 200 M.
Began well and settled in mid-division around 3Ls off leader 2-wide turning for home. Steadily shifted out in the latter part of the turn and ran home strongly when asked 350 M out to win readily.
Always had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off pace from 1200 M out to straight, quickened up well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Always on inside rail about 6Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home turn, very one-paced final stages.
Dwelt and very slowly away, keen and on fence 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, still well behind and 5-wide into home straight, no impression.
Settled 5Ls or 6Ls off speed and 2-wide until 600 M out when niggled on to keep up, found nothing.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off speed in 4th place from gates to home turn when driving along, never picked up.
On fence about 4Ls off pace virtually from start to finish, came under pressure 500 M out but only stayed on at same pace.
Slowly away, always rear and never better than 7Ls or 8Ls off lead at any point.
Always 2-wide in 2nd place about 1L or 2Ls off pace until home straight, vying for lead and with every chance 200 M out, didn't follow through.
6Ls of 7Ls off lead and 2-wide from 1200 M out to home turn when 4-wide, one-paced to line.
Caught 3-wide without cover from 1400 M out to turning for home 4-wide, always about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed until then, moderate late headway in straight.
Led on fence 1200 M out through to home turn, all out and headed by winner 100 M out, held on well for 2nd place.
Held up 2-wide 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, still well adrift 600 M out when switched 3-wide, entered straight racing 6-wide, no chance.
Missed start, hard ridden and soon recovered to midfield. One-paced before some moderate headway late.
3-wide rear of midfield, niggled along passing the 900 M but stayed same before making up steady headway on outer final 200 M.
Always at rear and hurried along, dropped to last 400 M out and stayed there.
Jumped satisfactorily but was soon outpaced from difficult gate. Trailed field throughout.

Best away, hampered and severely checked when making first turn in middle of a line of three. Lost 3Ls to be just in front of midfield. Crept closer 3 or 4-wide home turn, one-paced in straight. (Lame.)
Ridden to be prominent, 2-wide and 2Ls off lead 900 M out. Shifted out latter part of home turn to launch challenge but very much one-paced throughout the straight.
Jumped very awkwardly then worked gradually forward to 4-wide 1000 M out, shifted in to pinch rail near the 800 M. Never in doubt thereafter and stayed on well to fend off challengers.
In front of mid-division on rail, about 3Ls off pace. Made run after straightening and got within 2Ls or slightly closer of leader, kept on one-paced final bit.
3-wide near rear, shifted in towards rail passing Rock. No significant progress in home straight.
Niggled to hold brief lead, then taken back to sit 2 or 3Ls off lead 900 M out. Bit short of room 250 M out, when gap came finished well to just miss 2nd spot near the line.
Pushed along from outside alley to be 3 or 4-wide just forward of midfield. Made sustained run after straightening down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Niggled to be just off speed on fence. Under pressure from 400 M, one-paced before dropping out steadily from the 150 M.
Settled 3Ls or 4Ls off speed from 1200 M out to final bend when 2Ls down, challenged along inside rail and every chance 200 M out, couldn't go with winner.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 2Ls, still a length up on straightening, headed by winner over 200 M out, faded.
Fractious in gates, never really travelled well, 2-wide 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out, 6Ls down in rear on straightening, emptied.
3-wide without cover 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, improved to 4Ls down but still wide from 800 M out to home straight, dropped away tamely.
Bit slowly away, 7Ls off speed on fence 1200 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Sat 2Ls off lead in 2nd from 1400 M out, down the back straight, 1L down turning for home, led over 200 M out, readily.
Always on rails about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed through to home straight, bit closer 200 M out, very one-paced.
Awkwardly into stride, always 2-wide and between 4Ls and 6Ls off speed through to home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 3-wide 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, still wide and 6Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down and 4-wide into straight, stuck on well to be nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 4Ls off speed 400 M out, 2Ls down on the swing for home, all out to be a neck down 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
10Ls off speed on fence 1200 M out, 7Ls off pace down back straight and into home straight, ran on at same pace concluding stages, never got into it.
In touch. Held 3rd passing 900 M. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground while hanging in in the straight.
Towards rear from widest draw. Moved up far side to be better than midfield home bend. Faded in straight.
Led field to 850 M. Tracked leader before regaining slender advantage 200 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Behind midfield. Made up good ground from outside 300 M without threatening the first pair.
Soon midfield. Moved up a bit along rail to be 5th final turn. Shifted out and caused interference early straight. Ran on well to take lead 100 M. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
Well there early. Dropped back steadily far side to be behind midfield 600 M. Remained similar thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never in contention.
Prominent early, settling 6th. Steady progress home bend to be 4th turning in. Ran on well while being bumped and carried away early straight. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead at 800 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Towards rear. Unbalanced on inside 400 M. No significant improvement in straight.
Near rear throughout.
Held up in midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Fought on stoutly down straight only to fail narrowly.
Well back. Produced some late headway in straight.
Broke well. Held up behind leaders. Quickened well to hit front inside 200 M. Hung on well to the line.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Rear early. Improved steadily down centre of far side to be prominent around home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Rear of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Well there to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Attempted to make all. Swamped final 200 M.
In the last pair. Made up good ground along inside 250 M to take 2nd closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Made ground from 3-wide far side to become 4th 600 M out. Kept on early straight but was soon one-paced.
Mostly 4th or 5th before dropping slightly to midfield home bend. Made up good ground in straight but just lost a minor placing near finish.
Lost ground at start, remained at rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Midfield. No response when under pressure in straight.
Prominent. 2Ls behind lead final turn. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 100 M.
Made all. Stayed on well and never threatened.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on outside final 200 M.
Moved up from widest draw to be 2nd or 3rd. Dropped out soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Ran on well final 200 M to snatch 3rd close home.
Better than midfield to early straight. One-paced.
Well there. Improving when slightly tightened by loose horse 200 M out. Sustained effort closing stages to win readily.
Led till headed about 100 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Well there till dropped out home bend.
Mostly in midfield. Weakened under pressure in straight.
Lost rider jumping out.
Never far off. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer.
Well back. Finished off race well.
Prominment. Gave ground steadily from 500 M.
Went forward from wide draw to be behind leaders. Ridden along from 600 M but never quicken then one-paced in the straight.
Ridden hard from wide gate to take up front running role, there until turning in commenced to weaken shortly after and only one-paced in the straight.
Ridden along but no early speed to be midfield. Shifted out on home bend to be wide turning in and only made moderate ground in straight.
Restrained early to be in worse than midfield and wide. Ridden along before 600 M, never quickened and weakened badly in the straight.
Unable to show early speed and trapped wide worse than midfield. Raced very wide throughout and gave ground turning in.
Jumped awkwardly and dropped to the rear section. Remained there till home bend when crowded and made steady ground in home straight.
Began fairly and niggled along to race 3Ls off leader on rail. From 400 M was pushed along to improve and gradually shifted out. All out 350 M out and ran on steadily but was no match for the winner.
Untidy start and soon settled 7Ls off leader 2 wide. Steadily improved to 3Ls off leader on straightening. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground to grab 3rd place on the line.
Ridden along from wide draw to race in forward position just behind leader. Commenced to lose position 450 M out and faded after 200 M.
Broke fairly and raced around 4Ls off leader on fence. Commenced to make a move at 400 M and took lead around 300 M. Ran home strongly to win comfortably.
Began awkwardly and ridden hard but rear of midfield at stable bend. In some position throughout, ridden hard on home bend but never quickened.

Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in forward position about 1-1/2Ls off leader on rail. Under pressure 500 M out and made up little turning for home. No extra in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Enjoyed run of race 2Ls off pace on fence until turning for home 2-wide and quickly taking command, 1L clear 200 M out, just hung on.
3-wide without cover 1400 M out, soon went 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 1200 M to 800 M out, 3-wide into the straight, rather one-paced to line.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, similarly placed turning for home, failed to quicken up.
Vying for lead on fence from 1400 M out to taking clear lead from 800 M out to final bend when 1L clear, headed at top of straight and could only stay on at same pace.
Awkwardly away, checked and snatched back 1300 M out, 6Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M out to home straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, finished off strongly and just failed.
8Ls off speed and 2-wide from 1200 M to 800 M when sent on out 3-wide to be 5Ls off pace 600 M out, 4-wide into straight and 4Ls down 200 M out, nearest at finish.
Always tended to lay in, raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace from 1200 M out, niggled along 600 M out, still 6Ls down 200 M out, finished off strongly laying in all the while.
Raced ungenerously out 2-wide vying for early lead, restrained to be 1L down in 2nd place from 800 M out, 3Ls down on straightening, weakened right out.
8Ls off lead on fence 1200 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace 600 M out, unbalanced at top of straight, 5Ls down and staying on when short of room and steadied about 150 M out, not extended.
Settled on fence 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out, closer turning for home and just 1L down 200 M out, kept on at same pace to line.
10Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M out, 8Ls down on the swing, 6Ls down 200 M out and staying on strongly when disappointed for running along inside rail, ran on again but too late.
Away well and crossed from widest gate to be 2Ls clear on fence about 1350 M out, still 2Ls clear entering straight, headed by winner over 100 M out, no extra.
4Ls off speed on fence from 900 M out until straight, ran on well up centre of track to be nearest at finish.
3-wide 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 4-wide into straight and 5Ls off lead, found nothing.
Awkwardly away, on fence and 5Ls or 6Ls off pace 800 M out, worse off turning for home, soon with no chance.
Never really travelled well, 2-wide 2Ls off speed 800 M out, niggled along from 700 M out, 3-wide 5Ls down on the swing, found nothing.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off speed 800 M out, steadied off heels 600 M out, travelled well 6Ls off speed in rear entering straight, one-paced and never a threat thereafter.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, led over 100 M out, driven out.
4-wide without cover and towards rear 1300 M out, 4Ls or 5Ls behind 800 M out, sent on to go 2nd out 3-wide 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight, beaten well over 200 M out.
Never out of rear group at any stage, 3-wide and 6Ls off lead 800 M out, similarly placed entering straight, no impression.
Never much better than 4Ls or 5Ls off pace and 2-wide at any stage, found wanting when asked to quicken up through final 200 M.
3-wide on speed round 1st on bend, 1L down and 3-wide 800 M out, struggling from 700 M out and tailing off at the top of the straight.
4-wide round 1st bend and sent on to track pacesetting BOBO DUCK out 2-wide from 1000 M out, struggling to lie up from over 600 M out, beaten before home turn.
Settled 3Ls or 4Ls and 2-wide off early speed down the backstretch, closer turning for home, led about 180 M out, ran on strongly.
Couldn't lead and raced 2-wide 1L off pacesetting GOLDEN FARM early on, still 1L off pace and with every chance 300 M out, no chance with winner and weakened close home.
Caught 4-deep and 3Ls off pace about 800 M out, 5-wide and at least 4Ls down entering straight, no impression.
Driven along 9Ls off pace on fence 700 M out, still well behind on point of home turn when hitting fence and becoming badly unbalanced, finished in own time.
With plenty of cover about 2Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide 3Ls down off home turn, all out to be 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra and weakened.
Dropped out 10Ls off speed 700 M out, 8Ls down and 3-wide turning in, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
Scrubbed along to be 1L off pace on rail 600 M out, 3Ls down and struggling to go the pace entering straight, weakened rapidly.
Broke well, led but out 3-wide early on, crossed to fence only about 500 M out, headed by winner about 180 M out, no extra but held on okay for 3rd.
Settled on fence about 4Ls off pace down backstretch, switched 2-wide entering straight, 2Ls off speed 200 M out, couldn't close gap on winner.
3-wide 3Ls off pace 700 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down off home turn, found nothing in straight.
4Ls or 5Ls off speed and 3-wide down back straight, driven along on straightening, picked up to 3Ls down 200 M out, stuck to task well.
Soon 2-wide and 8Ls off leaders, managed to go about 6Ls down 200 M out, never got any closer than that.
Checked exiting gates, 10Ls off speed in rear 1200 M out, 8Ls down but 4-wide 800 M out, 6Ls down and 6-wide into home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Covered up 2-wide about 4Ls off lead from early on to final bend when switched out wider to challenge, 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well without grabbing quinella pair.
On fence 4Ls off front 800 M out, driven along to maintain this position entering homestretch, could only stay on at same pace.
Driven along to dispute lead on fence from gates, all out to maintain prominent position turning for home, weakened rapidly.
Had the box seat on fence 2Ls off pace until home straight, 1L down 200 M out, finished off well but couldn't get head in front.
Disputed lead out 2-wide from 1300 M out to final bend, went 1L clear at top of home straight, hung on well.
4-wide without cover round first bend, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace 800 M out, under strong pressure on straightening, faded out.
Caught 3-wide early on before slotting onto fence 6Ls off pace 800 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, stayed on at the same pace to line.
Never travelled well, always niggled along between 5Ls and 7Ls off speed until home straight, hard pressed to be 4Ls down 200 M out, kept on well final stages but too late.
Never much worse than 1L or 2Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight, failed to quicken up at top of straight and beaten over 200 M out.
Bit keen early on out 3-wide 1L off early speed, similarly placed off final bend, soon dropped out.
One from rear 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, bit closer 800 M out, niggled along over 500 M out and 3-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, didn't find anything.
About 5th going up the Rock before making steady headway rounding home bend. Kept on to hold some chance 150 M but found first 2 too strong near finish.
About 6th into straight. Ran on strongly closing stages despite not reaching winner.
Well there. Close up into straight where he held every chance. No extra final 100 M.
Led approaching Winning Post first time and held narrow advantage into straight. Unable to hold place final 150 M.
Never troubled leaders. (Saddle shifted.)
Towards rear till effort home bend and was under pressure turning into straight. Could find no extra from 300 M.
Well there to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Never in contention.
Mostly midfield to straight where he kept on well to lead inside 150 M.
Always at the back.
Was 4th 800 M and 5th into straight. Kept on till outpaced close home.
Towards rear before staying on quite well final 250 M.
Prominent early, soon raced in 5th. Ran on a bit final 200 M for a remote 3rd.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear and hung in badly early. Very minor progress while continuing to hang in in straight.
In touch. Improved rounding home bend to be 2nd final turn. Kept on but failed to catch the winner.
Prominent. Dropped out soon after straightening. (Bled.)
Soon 2nd. Raced greenly final turn and in straight. Weakened from 3rd inside 150 M.
Towards rear early. Moved up to 6th 700 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Crept a bit closer home bend, then one-paced.
Slowly away, near rear. Very brief progress 400 M but soon found no extra.
Never in contention.
Made all. Held on well.
Slowly away, made no show.
Led to straight. Weakened.
Midfield till faded 500 M out.
Prominent to 400 M then weakened.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Behind midfield. Improving when hampered and lost momentum after Rock. Soon renewed effort and ran on to hit front inside 100 M. Collared final strides.
Midfield before dropping out abruptly at Rock.
Well back. Rapid progress far side, hitting front turning into straight. Caught closing stages.
Well there to Rock. Dropped away quickly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Waited with. Commenced run on rails rounding home bend. Sustained effort down straight to snatch victory in the shadows of post.
Led briefly then restrained behind leaders. Remained same and looked a danger 200 M out. Soon found no extra.
Held up behind midfield. Found no response under pressure rounding home bend.
Well back. Made swift headway down back stretch halfway out, but only kept on at same pace under pressure in the straight.
Jumped well and was in the front after start. Soon dropped to the midfield and remained there throughout.
Midfield or better. Failed to quicken final 200 M.
Made no show.
Tracked leader until gaining brief advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
In touch. Ran on from 4th early straight to take over 200 M. Held on.
Always there. One-paced closing stages.
Moved up to the front at 1000 M. Held on until headed early straight. Soon weakened.
Prominent briefly, soon dropped to the rear group and was wide without cover.
Missed start badly and was last early. Made ground steadily in straight to take 3rd close home.
Behind midfield. Towards rear far side. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Never a factor.
2nd last early. Made ground steadily to midfield half-way. Slightly inconvenienced final turn and steadied 250 M. Ran on without threatening.
Behind midfield most of way. Faded.
Well back. Took closer order home bend. No further progress in straight.
Prominent. Quickened to lead shortly after straightening but swamped near finish.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield to home bend. Faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Quickened from 3rd into straight to gain upper hand near finish.
Last few throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Better than midfield in 5th. Found nothing in straight.
Always well back.
Never better than midfield.
Always well back.
Well back until running past tired runners closing stages.
Rear of midfield early, soon dropped to the rear, never in contention.
Not far off from difficult alley, unable to keep up rounding the home turn, 5Ls down turning in, just plodded on.
Broke well from wide gate, quickly sent on to dispute lead. Pinched rail 800 M out drawing 2Ls clear. Challenged by runner-up the length of home straight but stayed on well to register solid win.
Broke only fairly, driven hard but only managed position just in front of midfield without cover 4Ls off speed. 4-wide and struggling straightening up, dropped out tamely in straight.
Ridden to contest lead along fence, outpaced and sat 2Ls off leader going into back straight. Kept on without threatening the first pair in home straight.
3-wide in midfield, dropped back a bit going into final turn, never troubled the principles.
Jumped very awkwardly, at rear and wide throughout, never on terms.
Jumped only fairly, driven and looped field to chase leader 600 M out. Had every chance final 250 M but never quite showed enough determination to get head in front.
Jumped awkwardly and outpaced at rear, driven and recovered a little ground 900 M out to be 8Ls off pace on rail. 5Ls down straightening up, minor progress late.
Hard driven to find midfield position on rail 4 or 5Ls off pace. One-paced in home straight.
4Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out and hard pressed to be closer entering home straight, very one-paced through concluding stages.
Checked passing winning post for first time and was on fence 7Ls off lead 1200 M out, driven along 600 M out and a little closer on the swing, weakened rapidly.
Led on fence 1300m out and took good hold early on, never more than 2Ls clear into home straight when travelling well, shot 4Ls clear 200 M out, very easily.
10Ls off speed in rear 1000 M out, still last on fence but just 6Ls behind off home turn, ran through some very tired rivals on run-in.
Raced 4Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, travelled okay 600 M out when 3-wide and still 4Ls off pace entering straight, soon wilted.
Awkwardly away, raced 3-wide without cover 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, always on and off the bridle and sometimes 4-wide down back straight, in trouble entering straight, faded.
Couldn't set early pace and sat 1L outside pacesetting winner 1200 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down turning for home, no extra.
Had the run of the race in 2nd or 3rd place on fence about 2Ls off speed from 1200 M out, still well placed when niggled along 600 M out, no chance with winner in stretch.
7Ls off leader and 2-wide 1200 M out, slightly better placed but struggling over 500 M out, finished in own time.
Settled 5Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, 4Ls down and on the bridle 500 M out, no chance with winner and unable to reel in runner-up in straight, stayed on dourly nevertheless.
Settled 5Ls off early speed and 2-wide and similarly positioned entering straight, quickly came off the bridle and found nothing.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out, still on terms entering stretch but dropped away in a matter of strides.
Hard ridden early to find position near rear on fence. Steady progress through field from 800 M to be 4Ls down and 4-wide swinging into straight, effort not sustained and tired closing stages.
Endeavoured to find position towards rail until crowded and steadied near winning post first time. 7Ls down on fence through to 200 M where it ran on well to be nearest at finish.
From widest gate went forward and caught 3 or 4-wide amongst first few. Dropped away quickly approaching Rock and was eased down in straight.
Driven and caught 4-wide around midfield, dropped towards rear reaching back straight, not a factor thereafter.
2-wide with cover just in front midfield 4 or 5Ls off lead. Moved closer from 600 M to be 2Ls down on straightening, unable to sustain effort, tired close home.
Always in firing line tracking leader 2-wide, became unbalanced near the 600 M and dipped. Almost levelled up with leader turning in, soon unable to find extra and only plodded on.
Prominent 3rd 3Ls off lead on rail. Looked a threat from the 200 M, shifted out running to the line, lost 2nd spot when no extra near the line.
