Bumped heavily on jumping and was towards rear throughout, never travelled.
Ridden but only managed position just back of midfield 3-wide. Not much response when asked on straightening, ran past beaten runners late.
Went across by hug rail and dictate pace passing winning post first time. Always in command from then on and stayed on well to score.
Jumped very awkwardly and shifted in abruptly, at back throughout.
Niggled to hug rail just forward of midfield 4 or 5Ls off pace. Made a little progress straightening up, soon one-paced.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls of 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and further off speed on straightening, plugged on wearily.
Led on fence 1400 M out, always about 3Ls clear from 800 M out to 200 M out, kept on well, never looked like being headed.
Raced prominently in 3rd place 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, struggling to keep up passing the Rock, 8Ls down entering straight, became further detached.
Crowded leaving stalls, 3-wide rounding stable bend, never remotely on terms at any stage, finished in own time.
2-wide and 4Ls and 5Ls off lead 1200 M out, still 2-wide and 6Ls down in 3rd place on straightening, weakened right out of it.
Slowly away and hampered exiting barriers, 5-wide rounding first bend, never closer than 10Ls off speed at any stage.
Held up about 9Ls off pace on fence down the back straight, still some way adrift when steadied to avoid trouble turning for home, no chance thereafter.
Raced 2-wide about 6Ls behind leaders passing 1200 M pole, niggled along 700 M out, 3-wide and 8Ls down on the swing, very one-paced to line.
Never travelled well, on fence 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along down the back straight, 7Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, found nothing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held 2nd place from start to finish, never closer than 2Ls off pacesetting winner, all out to be 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on at same pace.
Crowded exiting gates and caught 4-wide rounding stable bend, always towards rear, wide without cover thereafter, 8Ls down and 6-wide into straight, stayed on fairly well through beaten rivals.
6Ls off speed and on fence 1200 M out, niggled along 600 M out and 2-wide and 8Ls down turning for home, no impression.
On fence about 5Ls off pace down back straight, slightly closer but niggled along entering home straight, never any kind of threat.
In rear on fence about 9Ls off lead early on, still rear and marginally closer on the turn, 6Ls down 200 M out, never got into it.
Always 2-wide and about 1L off pace through to home straight, all out to remain in touch 200 M out, faded.
2-wide and about 7Ls off pace, closer but forced 5-wide into home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Awkwardly away, never travelled well at any stage, driven along on rails 6Ls off pace entering straight, soon no chance.
Never closer than 5Ls off speed at any point, 2-wide and 10Ls down back straight, never a factor.
Settled 2-wide and 5Ls off speed before being impeded 800 M out, 3-wide into home stretch, 4Ls down 200 M out, kept on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, 1L down turning for home, led 300 M out and 1L clear passing 200 M, driven out.
Always towards inner and no worse than 2Ls off speed through to home straight, looked like a winner 300 M out, didn't follow through and weakened close home.
Bit keen having the run of the race on fence 2Ls off leader through to home straight, quickly came under pressure and found nothing.
Raced 3-wide and without cover about 5Ls off speed down back straight, 2Ls behind on the swing, 1L off lead and with strong place prospects 200 M out, didn't follow through.
2-wide and about 5Ls off lead down back straight, 3-wide and 4Ls down on straightening, all out to be 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on at same pace.
Very keen racing 2-wide and about 4Ls off speed until about 800 M out, travelled better turning into straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, couldn't get any closer.
Prominent and 4-wide early on, led on fence about 1100 M out, under siege and driven along entering straight, soon swamped.
Settled 3Ls or 4Ls off speed and 2-wide from 1000 M out to home straight when travelling well, 2Ls down in 3rd spot 200 M out, stayed on well without grabbing front pair.
Awkwardly into stride, 3-wide 6Ls off speed 1000 M out, closer but still wide turning in, stayed on at same pace to line.
2-wide 7Ls off speed 1000 M out, 6Ls down on the turn, 4Ls down in 4th approaching 200 M pole, kept on fairly well.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer entering straight, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, stayed on well but couldn't reel in winner.
Wide early on about 9Ls off pace, 7Ls down entering straight, switched inside 350 M out, no chance 200 M out, eased down near line.
Always driven along through early stages, 2-wide 6Ls off speed 1000 M out, bit closer turning for home, couldn't get any closer.
Swerved right exiting gates, keen early on, 3-wide without cover 1L off pace 1100 m out, led out 3-wide 600 M out, 1L clear 300 M out, kept on well.
Ridden quietly on fence about 10Ls off speed until home straight, soon under pressure, grew further detached.
Raced right on speed out 2-wide down back straight, still disputing lead on straightening, faded quickly.
Led by no more than a length down back straight, headed 800 M out, 1L down on the turn, weakened badly.
Checked at the start, 6Ls off pace towards inner 900 M out, closer off home turn, one-paced to line.
Slowest away, held up in rear about 10Ls off speed down back straight, still well behind off home bend, never a factor.
Enjoyed the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence through to 600 M out, 2-wide into straight, beaten over 200 M out.
6Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, niggled along 600 M out, 4Ls down at top of stretch, no extra.
Settled down 6Ls out 2-wide 1000 M out, niggled along 600 M out and 5Ls down on the turn, 4Ls behind 200 M out, finished off very strongly down centre of course to lead final strides.
At least 4-wide and 3Ls to 4Ls until 800 M out, closer entering straight, soon outpaced.
Slowly away, 4Ls down and off bridle 600 M out, emptied in straight.
Keen down back straight, never much worse than 2Ls off speed, neck down on turn for home, 1L down and outpaced 200 M out, no extra.
4Ls off speed and 2-wide 1000 M out, closer but 3-wide into straight, beaten over 300 M out.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls off speed 1000 M out, still well placed and with every chance 200 M out, kept on all but never looked like heading principals.
Had a bad trip without cover 5Ls off speed and about 5Ls back down back straight, widest (6-wide) entering straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, nearest at finish.
Fractious in gates, in rear not travelling well and 8Ls off speed 600 M out, no pick-up whatsoever.
Raced 3-wide 1L off speed from 1000 M out until straight, found nothing.
Awkward break and checked early, 3-wide 6Ls off lead 1000 M out, 5-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, didn't quicken up.
Covered up about 5Ls off speed from gates to home straight, tried to challenge up inner but still 5Ls down 200 M out, nearest at finish.
About 6Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, 3Ls down from 600 M out to 200 M out, kept on very well, just missed.
Away well and soon led on fence, 2Ls clear 1000 M out, half a length clear on turn for home, 1L clear and looking good 200 M out, headed 15 M out.
Raced 2 and 3-wide 3Ls off speed 900 M out, bit closer on straightening, outpaced 300 M out, same pace to line.
Didn't break well but soon led on fence, half a length up on straightening, soon under pressure and beaten.
2-wide and about 7Ls off leaders until straight, worse off on straightening, couldn't get much closer.
About 5Ls off speed and 3-wide until home turn, 1L down 200 M out, kept on well concluding stages without grabbing winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always about 4-wide or worse and 4Ls off speed until home straight, 3Ls down and all out 200 M out, no extra.
About 5Ls off pace and on fence until straight, found nothing under pressure.
Raced 3-wide and on speed down back straight, 2Ls down entering straight, soon swamped.
Never much better than 6Ls off speed on fence until straight, no impression.
Disputed lead out 2-wide until straight, outpaced over 300 M out, weakened.
Raced 3 or 4-wide and 3Ls off speed from 1000 M out until straight, 200 M out and 1L down, got up gamely final strides.
Always travelled well about 3Ls off pace until straight, led 300 M out and 1L clear 200 M out, headed about 20 M from line.
2-wide about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace until home straight, weakened steadily thereafter.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace and on fence until straight, soon wilted.
Never better than 3-wide and 6Ls off speed until straight, 3Ls down and all out 200 M out, no extra.
Rear until home straight about 8Ls off pace and at least 2 or 3-wide, managed to get no better than 5Ls off lead in stretch.
Took a while to muster speed to find handy position 4 wide without cover. Lay in middle stages and struggled to keep up 600 M out. 7 or 8Ls down on straightening, not a threat thereafter.
Jumped clearly but quickly outpaced and dropped to tail despite reminders. Never in the race.
Ridden along but outpaced towards rear. 3 wide, 2nd last and under pressure turning in when rider dropped his whip. Only ran past tired runners late.
Jumped fairly from wide alley then drifted back steadily towards rear, 4 wide 7 or 8Ls off pace. Under pressure 600 M out, no progress in home straight.
Outpaced and soon last, gradually recovered a little ground to be 3 from rear on fence. Never on terms.
Jumped fairly, sent on to sit behind leader 2 wide. Hung out middle stages, 2-1/2Ls down straightening up, soon emptied out and dropped away tamely. (Mucus in trachea after race.)
Always in command, shifted across to hug rail 800 M out. Immediately shot clear of nearest rival upon straightening to collect race pillar to post in record time.

Jumped awkwardly, knuckled and nearly fell. Quickly recovered to chase leader 3 wide, kept on well in straight and looked like keeping a distant minor placing until run ended and swamped inside 100 M.
2 wide just back of midfield, 5 or 6Ls off speed. Under strong pressure from 500 M and ran on steadily to snatch 3rd spot closing stages.
Wide in midfield, without cover early. Crept closer 3 wide rounding home turn to be 4Ls down swinging into straight, ran on well to take distant 2nd.
Driven along fence to secure position in midfield. Kept on one paced in home straight, just missed 3rd place near the line.
Ridden but only managed midfield position 2 wide. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Settled in forward of midfield. No clear passage early in straight before producing some late headway closing stages.
Well back. Ran on well late to be nearest at finish.
Always last few.
Settled in rear. Went widest into straight. Ran on to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort.
Raced wide around midfield before making good progress halfway out to join leader home bend, then dropped out quickly.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure early in straight.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in rear. Made steady headway coming out of back straight. Quickened up to take charge 200 M out, then never threatened.
Midfield. Baulked for a run about 200 M out.
Slightly slowly away, in rear. 12th on the outside turning in. Ran on well but unable to reach the winner closing stages.
Slowly away, last to home turn. Made up some ground in straight.
Never far off until dropping out final 300 M.
Prominent. Was 2nd from 700 M to 250 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Recovered good ground final 200 M. (Bled.)
Well there. Failed to hold place when 3rd upon straightening.
In touch early, settling midfield. Ran on strongly in straight to take command passing 200 M. Never threatened.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Slight progress to be just behind midfield final turn. Made ground solidly to claim 3rd inside 150 M.
Soon led. Held 2Ls advantage early straight. Weakened out of contention when headed 200 M.
Better than midfield. Made progress home bend to be 4th turning in. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Mainly midfield. Steadied approaching 200 M. Kept on same pace to the line.
Towards rear. Kept on quite well final 250 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Kept on well down home straight.
Led or disputing lead. Kicked 1L clear upon straightening but swamped 200 M out.
Well there. No extra final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Led or disputed lead to 400 M. Dropped out.
Around midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Never better than midfield. Weakened into straight.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Settled well back. Quickened well to take charge 200 M out.
Midfield. Improved steadily down straight without threatening.
Midfield. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Held up in rear. Last into straight. Ran on well late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield before losing position home bend.
Midfield and wide. Kept on same pace in straight.
Mainly 4Ls 3rd to straight. Crept closer near 200 M but was one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Led field to 950 M. Held 2nd until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Tailed off in straight.
Midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. Weakened inside 300 M.
Rear. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to obtain a minor placing near finish.
Mostly 3-wide 5th or 6th to straight. Responded well final 300 M to assert authority inside 150 M. Held on.
Near rear. Shifted to the outside 300 M but was hanging in. Made up good ground final 250 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Took lead from 950 M, with 3Ls advantage early straight. Weakened when headed inside 150 M.
Held 4th until failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made ground steadily final 300 M, never nearer.
About midfield entering straight before running on a bit closing stages.
In rear to straight where he ran on strongly inside final 200 M, doing best work at the finish.
Never better than mid-division.
Worse than midfield rounding home bend. Never nearer.
Was midfield before improving home bend. About 5th into straight where he ran on to take 2nd inside 200 M without threatening winner.
Always at the back.
Always well there. Ran on to lead 200 M out. Won readily.
Prominent to straight where he held every chance 250 M. Found no extra close home.
Prominent. Hit front before home bend and led field to straight. Headed and faded approaching 200 M.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit closing stages.
About 5th rounding home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Never in contention.
Never far off to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
About 11th 1000 M and similar place swinging into straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well, led briefly early. Was in touch before dropping to midfield 1000 M out. Towards rear rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Moved to the outside final turn. Ran on well to lead briefly 100 M out. Just beaten narrowly close home.
Rear. Made up good ground on outside inside 250 M. Just prevailed near finish.
Led briefly early, then raced 2nd before dropping to 4th far side. Further dropped to midfield home bend. One-paced thereafter.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit to behind midfield from 600 M. Steadied 400 M. Recovered some ground closing stages.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Advanced from outside near 700 M to reach 4th home bend. Faded soon after straightening.
Prominent. Progressed slightly to 2nd 500 M. Gained slender advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Behind midfield. Made good progress home bend to be 3rd turning in. Failed to hold place passing 200 M.
Led field from 1400 M to passing 900 M. Held 2nd until home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight, doing best work while tightened final strides.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Pushed along 1200 M to take lead passing 900 M. Kept on when headed early straight. Weakened final 100 M.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Midfield. Went wide and lost position into straight. Improving when bumped 200 M out but sustained progress to miss 3rd narrowly.
Well back. Ran on steadily in straight.
Well back. Snuck up on rails turning in. Sustained effort down straight to assert authority closing stages.
Broke best. Made most to straight. Weakened.
Well there with brief lead early on. Regained 1L advantage upon straightening but swamped closing stages.
Never in contention.
Around midfield. Dropped out from 400 M.
Never far off. Ran on to hold some chance early in straight but unable to draw level.
Midfield. Ran on steadily along rails to be nearest finish.
Midfield. Made steady headway down straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Around midfield. Made ground steadily in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made slight progress rounding home bend. No more improvement in straight.
Midfield or behind. Kept on same pace throughout.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Held 4th to straight. Soon found no extra.
Held 3rd before taking over passing 200 M. Won steadily.
Pushed to lead from the widest draw. Was joined 600 M. Unable to fight back when headed 150 M.
Prominent. Joined the lead 600 M. No match with the winner when headed 150 M.
Mainly midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled last few. Finished fast down centre of track doing best work at finish.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Very slowly away. Remained in rear. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses late.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Prominent to straight. Found no extra.
Midfield to home straight. Faded.
Attempted to make all but caught by fast-finishing winner in the shadows of the post.
Midfield. Found nothing under pressure home bend.
Settled in forward of midfield. Shifted out for a run entering straight but only kept on same pace.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well down straight to snatch victory final strides.
Worked forward to make running and get to the fence approaching the 1000 M, never more than 1L clear. Challenged and headed near the 150 M, kept on before losing 3rd spot near finish.
Not far away early, steadily dropped towards rear 900 M out. Stayed same straightening up, moderate late headway.
Niggled to find midfield position along inner. Kept on same pace in home straight.
Very deep on track 3Ls off lead in front of midfield. Unable to keep up 400 M out and dropped out in home straight.
Driven along early to track leader 2-wide, at leader's hindquarters turning in. Hit the front 150 M and stayed on well to defy challenger final stages.
Prominent early then dropped towards midfield with cover 3 or 4Ls off pace. Under pressure 450 M out, one-paced in straight.
Up rear pace out wide, soon eased to be 2Ls off speed from 800 M. Quickened to mount challenge 200 M out but failed to find another gear last bit.
Outpaced at the back, ran past tired runners closing stages.
Very wide and without cover early around midfield. 3-wide and 5Ls off pace from 900 M. Took some time to get motivated, then made up good ground final 150 M.
Soon found handy spot on fence, 2-1/2Ls off speed. Kept on a little one-paced to gain 3rd place close home.
Jumped awkwardly and always near rear. Never a factor.
Jumped only fairly and was driven hard to be amongst first few 1000 M out. Off the bit 500 M out and dropped away steadily.
On fence 6Ls off speed 1400 M out, hemmed in on rails about 4Ls off lead from 800 M out to 200 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
8Ls off pace on fence 1400 M out, closer from 800 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down on home turn, never a treat.
Settled 2-wide 8Ls off pace 1400 M out, improving but 4-wide 4Ls off lead from 600 M out to 200 M out, drew closer on run-in but too late.
On fence 9Ls off pace 1400 M out, about 5Ls down from home bend to 200 M pole, stayed on okay concluding stages.
Raced keenly out 2-wide early on, raced 5Ls off pace in 2nd place 1400 M out, under pressure 600 M out, beaten entering home straight.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3 or 4Ls down from 800 M out to home straight, very one-paced on run-in to line.
Very awkward and pecked exiting gates, about 12Ls off pace in rear 1600 M out, still towards rear but 2-wide 5Ls down entering straight, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3 and 4-wide without cover throughout, 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and wide 1400 M out, all out to be 3Ls off pace 600 M out, weakened rapidly in home stretch.
Keen early on in lead, soon anchored to sit 5Ls off pace out 2-wide in 3rd place 1400 M out, led again 600 M out, 1L clear off home bend, 2Ls clear 200 M, held on well.
Hard driven to race prominently early on, led on fence 1650 M out, 5Ls clear 1200 M out, headed 600 M out, weakened right out.
Never really got into it, 7Ls off speed and 2-wide 1400 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down off home turn, weak in straight.
Settled 7Ls off early pace out 3-wide 1400 M out, improved from 800 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide 700 M out, 1L down in 2nd place off home turn, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on grimly.
3-wide forward of midfield, about 3Ls off pace. Not far away swing into straight, dropped away tamely 250 M out. (Bled.)
Settled in midfield on fence, unable to quicken in home straight before dropping out inside final 200 M.
Never better than 3-wide 3rd from rear 7 or 8Ls off speed through to straight. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Fast out but caught wide behind leaders going into first bend, 4-wide forward of midfield 900 M out. Began to give ground rounding home turn, 7 or 8Ls down going into straight, not a factor thereafter.
Jumped well then waited with in midfield 3 or 4-wide. Commenced run 500 M out when 4Ls adrift, made up good ground in straight though not likely to pose too serious a treat to winner.
Very brief lead then eased to a handy position 2-wide 3 or 4Ls off pace. Kept on same pace in straight before tiring closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, ridden but outpaced trailing the field, never in the hunt.
Driven early to hold position just rear of mid-division 5 or 6Ls off speed. Under pressure 400 M out, responded fairly and made steady ground final 250 M.
Not best away, soon went forward along fence to lead passing the 1000 M. Held 2-1/2Ls advantage from 800 M to 200 M out, headed 100 M out and swamped by placegetters final stages.
Broke very awkwardly, ridden along on rail and quickly recovered to back of midfield before first bend, about 6Ls behind leader. Similarly placed turning in, very much one-paced in straight.
At rear towards inner before responding well to pressure inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Sent on to lead early, then eased to track leader 2-wide from 1000 M. 2-1/2Ls down straightening up, ran on well to score comfortably closing stages.
Looped field to dispute lead out 2-wide 1200 M out, 1Ls off pace from 1000 M to final bend, led top of home straight, headed over 100 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5-wide and 5Ls off pace into straight, didn't come on.
Niggled along on fence 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, soon picked up bit and 2-wide 4Ls off pace entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, worse off turning for home, found nothing.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down on fence off home turn, 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace 1200 M out and a bit keen, similarly placed but driven along on home turn, stayed on at same pace to line.
Disputed early lead on fence 1200 M out, 1L clear from 1000 m out to about 500 M out, headed at top of home straight, faded.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, closer but hard driven to keep up 600 M out, stayed on at same pace in straight.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence, 2-wide into straight in 3rd place, half a length down 200 M out, led over 100 M out, tidily.
Raced 3-wide 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down into straight, one-paced to line.
Raced 4-wide 8Ls or 9Ls off pace 1200 M out, took closer order out wide from 800 M out to be 3Ls off pace and 5-wide into stretch, couldn't follow through.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, steadily lost position from 800 M out, tailed off entering straight.
Towards rear. Improved slightly to just behind midfield home bend. Kept on without quickening thereafter.
Never far off. Improved to 3rd final turn. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M, doing best work closing stages.
Behind midfield throughout.
Knuckled at start, last to home bend. Made ground from outside in straight, never nearer.
Raced 2nd before joining with the winner to take over 600 M. Was headed 200 M. Lost a minor placing when finding no extra close home.
In touch. Ran on steadily from 5th early straight, just missed 2nd near finish.
Soon led until headed 600 M. Weakened steadily.
Towards rear throughout.
Given reminders early to be in touch. Improved to 3rd near 1000 M. Came to join the lead passing 600 M. Took over 200 M and never headed.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Crept closer final turn. Kept on same pace in straight.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group when severely checked passing 500 M. Never recovered.
Behind midfield. Slight progress to 6th early straight. Soon found no extra.
Behind midfield, racing freely early. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Improved to prominent position on coming out of back straight. Soon weakened passing 400 M.
Well back. Steadied for a stride early in straight before responding well under pressure closing stages.
Never in the hunt.
Attempted to make all. Hung on under pressure upon straightening until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Never nearer.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Around midfield to straight, then soon weakened.
Tracked leader. Disputed lead turning in but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Raced wide around midfield. Kept on one-paced without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to win convincingly.
Always at the back.
Behind midfield on outside. Ran on in straight, doing best work final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Joined lead 600 M, gaining slender advantage final turn. Found no extra closing stages.
Near rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on a bit passing 300 M but found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Slight progress to midfield turning in. Kept on well inside 250 M.
Towards rear. Kept on moderately in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Unable to quicken after turning in.
Prominent early, soon dropped to behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Soon last. Never a factor. (Lame.)
Prominent. Ran on well inside 200 M to just prevail on the line.
Led field from 1200 M. Was joined 600 M. Disputed for lead in the straight, just beaten narrowly.
Missed the start badly, soon recovered some ground to behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend. Ran on well 200 M. Missed narrowly in a 4-horse pipeline at finish.
Midfield or better. Weakened inside 200 M.
Led briefly early, soon remained in touch. Weakened from 4th upon straightening.
Midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Weakened from prominent position into straight.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Prominent far side. Lost position around home bend. Dropped further back upon straightening.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Raced freely in midfield. Took closer order coming into home straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Around midfield. Kept on steadily for remote 4th.
Well back. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Never better than midfield.
Always thereabouts. Held every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Better than midfield to straight. No extra.
In last few. Made up some late ground in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Made all. Hung on gamely to resist runner-up's strong late challenge.
Soon settled at the tail around 6 to 7Ls off leader on fence. Gradually shifted out at the latter part of the turn and made up steady ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Raced towards the rear section through to straight. Did not quicken when asked 250 M out.
Began fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in prominent position out wide through to straight. Found nothing in straight and weakened badly 300 M out.
Best out from wide draw and led briefly. Soon shifted in to race just off the leader and remained there through to straight. One-paced in straight, further tired 150 M out.

Raced keenly in the early stages to be 1L off pace on fence. Made the turn awkwardly and did not obtain clear running in he early part of the straight. When clear ran home well but was no match for the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away and soon recovered to race 5Ls off leader on fence through to straight. When asked 250 M out responded very strongly to win convincingly.
Began well and soon dropped to mid-division and shifted in to obtain rail running. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground to grab 3rd place on the line.

Began well and niggled along to be 2-wide around 2Ls off pace. On straightening was bumped on several occasions, after that when put under pressure did not respond and further weakened over the concluding stages.

Broke well and soon led on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Responded fairly in straight but was overhauled by 1st pair 150 M out and was then grabbed by the 3rd placegetter on the line.
Raced towards the outside near the tail of the field. Hung out badly when turning for straight and found nothing in straight.
Pushed along to race 2 to 3 wide around 3Ls off leader through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but stayed one-paced and ran past couple of beaten runners over the concluding stages.
Broke fairly but unable to muster early speed to settle at worse than midfield section through to straight. Did not respond to pressure in straight.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls behind and at least 4-wide on straightening, didn't come on.
Held up in rear about 10Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, 8Ls down entering straight, switched out off heels 300 M out, stayed on okay close home.
Never better than 8Ls off pace at any stage, under pressure and beaten before turning for home.
Always 4-wide without cover, 6Ls off pace 1200 M out but 3Ls down 800 M out, wide into home straight but hanging on to 2nd place 200 M out, soon faded.
Tucked in 2-wide 2Ls off pace from about 1200 M out to home straight, didn't find much under pressure.
Very awkwardly into stride, raced 7Ls or 8Ls off pace and 1 or 2-wide until 1000 M out, 4-wide into straight and 5Ls behind, ran on okay but was too late.
On fence 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down and 2-wide in stretch, short of room 200 M out and only clear 100 M out, claimed 3rd place final strides.
Very keen early on, still pulling racing 2-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, emptied.
Raced 2-wide on fence and 1L off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, soon under pressure and beaten about 250 M out.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than a length, skipped a length a half clear 300 M out, kept on well.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 2Ls off pace for most of back straight, still 2Ls adrift but under strong pressure 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls behind and 3-wide into home straight, kept on evenly to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off lead 1200 M out, slightly wider into home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, tried hard but couldn't bridge the gap.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace until straight, failed to quicken up.
Always in rear and never competitive.
Close to early speed, niggled along to lie up 500 M out, grew further detached.
Never closer than 4Ls off speed at any stage, briefly threatened 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Away well and right on the pace up until 500 M out, came under pressure quickly and folded tamely.
Never competitive at any point, never better than 5Ls off pace.
Settled about 1L off pace until about 400 M out, on terms over 200 M out and led about 100 M out, headed by winner final strides.
Didn't break well, 5Ls off speed 400 M out, finished off very strongly to be the nearest at the finish.
Disputed lead until 200 M out, no extra through final stages.
Always about 3Ls off leaders until about 400 M out, 1L down 200 M out, bravely burst through gap about 100 M out to lead final strides.
Right on the speed from start to 400 M out, soon under pressure, weakened steadily.
Good speed to vie for early lead on fence, lost touch from around 200 M out.
Led narrowly from about 800 M out to 200 M out, soon faded.
On fence 5Ls off speed 1200 M out, 4Ls down entering stretch, without running room until 200 M out, ran on but much too late.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 1300 M out to home straight when under pressure, soon petered out.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, was niggled along from 600 M out, weakened from 300 M out.
Bit keen racing 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, similarly placed into home straight, soon under pressure and faded.
Settled about 9Ls or 10Ls off pace on fence down the back straight, 5Ls down off home turn, switched out wider to challenge in straight, nearest at finish.
Settled about 4Ls or 5Ls and 3-wide with cover from 1200 M out to home turn, led about 300 M out, headed over 100 M out, just hung on for 3rd place.
Raced 4Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1200 M out to home straight, didn't quicken up, beaten 200 M out.
3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down on straightening, 1L down and with every chance 200 M out, couldn't quicken up.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, widest into straight when 4Ls off pace, one-paced to line and never dangerous.
In rear 10Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace on the swing, stayed on okay to be nearest at finish.
Settled about 5Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight, 3Ls down on straightening, clear 300 M out and gained narrow lead over 100 M out, hung on gamely.
On fence 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 600 M out, closer on the turn, clear run 300 M out and every chance over 100 M out, couldn't overhaul winner.
Dropped out 7Ls off pace down back straight, about 4Ls down into home straight, stayed on fairly well but couldn't get any closer.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls, still in front at top of straight, swamped 300 M out.
Keen to lead on fence 1200 M out by half a length, soon settled half a length off speed in 2nd place through to straight, headed over 200 M out, stayed on at one pace.
2 or 3-wide and about 2Ls off pace from 1000 M out through to home straight, couldn't quicken up under pressure.
Led by half a length out 2-wide 1000 M out, narrow lead at top of straight, headed over 300 M out and steadily weakened.
2-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls and 3-wide into home straight, closer 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Awkwardly away, raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls down at best in straight, never dangerous.
Raced 4Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, weakened right out of it once tempo was upped.
Always 3-wide in the run and 1L or 2Ls off pace from 1000 M out, led 300 M out, grabbed by winner 150 M out, stuck to task well.
Enjoyed run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence from back straight to about 300 M out, no acceleration.
Raced 4-wide with cover and about 4Ls off speed from back straight to home straight, switched out wider to challenge 300 M out, no chance with leaders.
Raced 6Ls or 7Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1000 M out, 5Ls down into home straight, about 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, similarly placed into home straight, very one-paced to line.
Raced 4-wide often without cover and about 3Ls off pace from 1000 M out until home straight, beaten 300 M out.
Dropped out 5Ls off pace on inner down back straight, 2-wide into home straight and closer, burst through to lead about 150 M out, ran on well.
Didn't break well, soon 6Ls or 7Ls off pace on inside, in rear 5Ls off pace entering straight, making moderate late headway when checked 100 M out, not extended thereafter.
Close up early and was 6th rounding home bend. Stayed on well to hold every chance close home.
Well there early and was in rear home bend. Renewed effort and ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Among rear group into straight where he stayed on a bit close home.
Towards rear before making good headway from 1300 M to be 2nd rounding home bend. Took lead into straight where he kept on till headed inside 150 M. Found no extra.
Midfield halfway and 6th on straightening. Kept on to threaten 200 M out. Found no extra close home.
Led to 900 M and was sharing 3rd into straight. Ran on well to lead inside 150 M. Found winner too strong near finish.
Towards rear before making steady headway from 1000 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Last to home bend. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there before severely checked 800 M, losing ground. Worse than midfield into straight where he switched out passing 200 M and showed good turn of foot to lead final strides.
Never better than midfield.
Was midfield 1000 M and shared 3rd approaching home turn. Kept on well to challenge under pressure closing stages.
Never far off to home turn. Made no show on straightening.
In touch before taking lead from 900 M. Was headed into straight and soon dropped out of contention.
Towards rear 1000 M. Unable to obtain a clear passage on straightening till passing 200 M. Kept on.
Midfield to half-way. Weakened.
Towards rear. Made steady headway to midfield 300 M. No further progress.
Soon led. Held on very well though hanging out. Just lost marginally at finish.
Towards rear. Moderate progress to midfield near 300 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Never able to feature.
Rear. Ran past a few weakening horses final 200 M.
Always there. Improved slightly to be 2nd or 3rd passing course proper. Kept on but lost a minor placing at finish.
Slightly slowly away, pushed along to be better than midfield. Further advanced to 2nd briefly 450 M. Soon one-paced.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily passing course proper.
Led very briefly after start. Remained in prominent position throughout. Unable to match speed with the quinella pair.
Left awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
In touch. Steady progress half-way to be 2nd 300 M. Ran on well to snatch victory narrowly final stride.
Midfield to 300 M out. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Kept on moderately final 400 M.
Well there. Giving ground when tightened 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Obtained clear run inside 200 M and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Away slowly. Towards rear before dropping out 300 M out.
Shared pace. Broke half length clear inside 200 M. Just held on.
Well there. No extra final 200 M.
Around midfield to 200 M. Weakened.
Joint leader early. Fought on dourly to just fail to peg back winner.
Well there to 200 M. Dropped out.
Always in last few.
Settled behind leaders. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced in better than midfield before losing position over 300 M out. Produced some late impression under pressure.
Jumped very awkwardly. Never in contention.
Well back. Shifted in for a run over 300 M out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Missed start and was towards the rear. Made ground steadily inside 300 M to obtain a minor placing close home.
Behind midfield. Weakened further from home bend.
Moved along from outside to be prominent. Reached the front 1000 M. Remained prominent but failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Pulled to the front early stages. Raced 3rd passing 1000 M until fading out of contention in straight.
In touch early, soon dropped back to midfield. steady progress along rail in straight to reach 3rd 300 M. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Dropped further to the rear and was widest turning in. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Started fairly. Steady progress to reach lead 800 M out. Maintained advantage until finding no extra when headed 100 M out.
Towards rear. Crept closer order final turn. Was checked when lacked galloping space 300 M. Never recovered.
Prominent early, then raced in better than midfield position. Kept on without quickening in straight.
At rear throughout.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Improved slightly to midfield 600 M. Weakened closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Kept on moderately in straight.
In touch early from a wide draw, settling midfield. 6-wide final turn. Responded well under pressure to take 2nd closing stages.
Midfield. Steady progress far side, reaching 2nd turning in. Ran on quite well to assert authority 100 M out.
Midfield rounding home bend. Effort early in straight before coming one-paced.
Prominent. Hit front upon straightening and soon drew clear.
Wide throughout. Rear early. Ran past some past runners in straight.
Midfield early. Lost position coming out of home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Raced wide in prominent position. Took lead coming out of back straight. Headed by winner shortly after straightening.
Prominent. Lost position coming out of back straight. Produced good late progress closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never a feature. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent into straight. Faded.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Broke well. Raced in prominent position most of way. One-paced in straight.
Raced in last few. Produced some late impression down home straight.

Best out from wide draw and niggled along to lead narrowly. took outright lead at 1000 M mark and gradually shifted in to take rail running. Responded well to pressure 350 M to fend off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Missed the start and unable to muster early speed to settle at the tail on fence through to straight. Never a factor and ran past couple of beaten horses.
Began fairly and settled in mid-division on rail through to straight. When asked 400 M out found nothing and further weakened after 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly and raced in worse than midfield section around 3-wide. When asked 400 M out did not quicken and stayed one-paced to the line.
Began awkwardly from wide draw. Soon raced in rear section and steadily shifted in to be 2-wide. 5 to 6Ls down entering straight and ran home strongly from 200 M out to be closest at finish.
Began well but was unable to match early pace to settle in rear section on rail. Hard ridden to maintain position from 600 M and soon faded after the 400 M mark.

Jumped fairly and pushed along to lead briefly. Soon settled in 2nd place around on rail after the 1000 M mark through to straight. When asked 350 M out ran on well but was unable to hunt down the winner.
Ridden hard but was unable to match early speed to settle in midfield 3-wide through to straight. When asked 350 M out unable to quicken and stayed on evenly to the line.
Slowly away. In the early stages raced very keenly to be in mid-division. Ridden along from 500 M out but never quicken then one-paced in the straight.

Began well from wide draw, ridden along and steadily shifted in to race 2-wide around 2Ls off leader through to straight. When asked 350 M out made up steady ground but was never going to trouble the 1st three.
Broke fairly and soon settled towards the tail and wide. Closer to the rail from 800 M. Made up steady ground in straight and doing best work over the concluding stages.
Niggled along to race in forward position one off from rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to quicken and further weakened after 200 M.

Slowly away and steadily recovered to race 3-wide 4 to 5Ls off leader through to straight. All out 350 M and ran home strongly. Over the concluding stages raced greenly, shifted ground and missed 2nd placegetter by a short margin.
Broke well and ridden along to be in midfield towards the outside. Commenced to weaken in the latter part of the turn and weakened badly in the straight.
Had a tough trip, never any better than 4-wide without cover and no better than 5Ls off pace from start until entering home straight, stuck on fairly well on run-in to line.
Always on fence about 4Ls off pace until home straight, stayed on at the same pace and never any threat.
Always 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight, driven along 600 M out, weakened steadily.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from gates to home straight, made no impression.
Caught 3-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until about 500 M out, steadied when disappointed for running entering straight, no chance thereafter.
In rear on fence at least 5Ls or 6Ls off speed early, slightly worse turning for home, soon no chance.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, sent on to be 2Ls off pace at 800 M and still wide, 3Ls down entering straight, no extra latter stages.
Awkwardly into stride, towards rear and very wide (5-wide) round first bend, never closer than 5Ls off pace, beaten off the home turn.
Never worse off than 1L off pace early on, in 2nd place out 2-wide about 1200 M out, led 800 M out, 1L clear turning for home, held on well.
Never much worse than 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide until home straight, soon beaten.
Had a nice trip on fence 2Ls off pace through to 800 M out, 1L down and 2-wide into home straight, stayed on well but couldn't overhaul winner.
Prominent but 4-wide round first bend, 3-wide 4Ls off speed 1000 M out, closer entering home straight but soon weakened.
Led by a length 1200 M out, headed by winner 800 M out, 2Ls down 200 M out, faded rapidly.
Never competitive at any stage, never better than 6Ls off pace at any point.
Pushed hard early and only managed midfield 5Ls behind pace 700 M. 3-wide and 4Ls behind leader at turn. Found no extra in home straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped fairly and near mid-field early. Soon dropped back a bit. Raced ungenerously and hung out across heels near 700 M. Lost interest and faded thereafter.
Jumped only fairly gradually moved up to 3Ls behind leader at 700 M. 4-wide entering straight. Stayed one-paced in the straight.
Broke well and enjoyed run on fence behind leader. Struggled to keep up 450 M out when pace quickened. Very one-paced in the straight.
Failed to show any speed and soon trailed field despite niggled along. At rear throughout and never made any ground in the straight.
Dipped on jumping. Ridden along and recovered to midfield on fence. 2-wide and 3Ls off pace rounding turn when hanging out. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Best out from wide draw and ridden along to lead. Steady shifted in to take rail at 800 M. Overtaken by winner at 250 M, stayed on well to keep 2nd well clear of the rest.
3 or 4-wide. Near midfield 800 M out. 8Ls down when tempo quickened on straightening. No impression thereafter.
Broke fairly but unable to match early pace and settled in midfield about 6Ls off pace. Ran on well through final stages overtaking weakening runners and just held on for 3rd place on the line.
Slowly away and unable to muster early speed, settled near the rear out wide. Shifted out to obtain clear running on straightening. Under pressure from 400 M and made up steady ground final 250 M.

Jumped well from inside draw and ridden along to be 2-wide 1-1/2Ls off pace. On leader's girth from 700 M and disputed lead turning for home. Responded well in straight and was going away final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw but outpaced towards rear 4-wide. 3-wide on turn. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Sent on to dispute early lead out 2-wide, under pressure to lie up 600 M out, beaten at the top of the straight.
On fence about 4Ls off pace early on, similarly placed but driven along 600 M out, no acceleration.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide about 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, 2Ls down and with chances 200 M wide, one-paced final stages.
4-wide without cover 800 M out, struggling and about 7Ls off pace and 5-wide turning for home, became further detached.
Raced 4Ls off pace and 3-wide 800 M out, 4-wide entering straight when still 4Ls behind, didn't pick up. (See Racing Incidents.)
4Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls turning for home, outpaced from 250 M out.
Slowest away, 6Ls off pace on fence down the back, on fence and 4Ls behind turning for home, brief chance about 250 M out when 2Ls down, didn't sustain run.
Bumped repeatedly, unbalanced and lost ground and start, 8Ls off pace on fence 800 M out, 5Ls down on the home turn, ran on strongly in straight but just found winner too strong.
Settled in rear early on about 8Ls off pace and 2-wide, 6Ls down and 3-wide into straight, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
Soon disputing lead on fence 900 M out, went 2Ls clear turning for home, 1L clear at the 200 M out, headed about 50 M out and no extra.
2Ls off pace and 2-wide down the back straight, 2Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, every chance and 1L down 300 M out, no extra and weakened from 200 M.
3-wide and 7Ls adrift 800 M out, 6Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, stayed on strongly down centre of course to lead 50 M out.
Last early. Recovered ground gradually to be just behind midfield turning in. Responded well in straight to take lead closing stages.
In touch early. Dropped back approaching 1000 M to be behind midfield. Ran on well from 4-wide midfield final turn to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Came to tackle leader final turn, gaining slender advantage 300 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. No clear run early straight. Made up some ground when in clear inside 300 M.
Well there. Failed to hold place from 2nd 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Unable to quicken in straight.
Better than midfield. Dropped gradually to behind midfield when steadied 800 M. Steadied again at 300 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Never able to feature.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
In touch early, soon dropped back to the rear. Ran on well in straight, never nearer.
Led to 1100 M. Remained prominent to straight. Kept on well 250 M to hold every chance 100 M. Unable to match speed with the first pair close home.
Midfield. Advanced to 5th passing 1000 M. Weakened steadily inside 300 M.
Behind midfield from a wide draw. Improved from outside rounding home bend to be 4th early straight. Weakened 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Soon prominent. Reached lead from 1000 M and held on to final turn. Faded rapidly 300 M. (Mucus in windpipe.)
Well there. Hit front over 200 M out. Hung on well.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Wide in midfield. Ran on determinedly down straight to miss narrowly.
Niggled at early stages. Held up in midfield home bend. Weakened in straight.
Never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled behind leaders. Boxed in on rails early in straight. Switched out for a run inside 300 M and ran on without pegging back winner.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced wide behind midfield. Kept on well past beaten runners in straight.
Always in last few.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Led to 200 M. Weakened.
Prominent. Dropped out under pressure upon straightening.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield or behind. Kept on same pace final 200 M.
Towards rear. Dropped out 200 M. (Bled.)
Last. Ran past a few beaten horses 200 M out.
Prominent to 200 M. No extra.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground to be in touch course proper. Ran on well inside 150 M, just failed.
Midfield or slightly better. Unable to quicken final 400 M.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
In touch. Weakened steadily inside 250 M.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily inside 300 M.
Was there until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Always there. Was 2nd 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground 200 M out, just failing to obtain a minor placing.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily 250 M but unable to match speed with the quinella pair closing stages.
Midfield to course proper. Faded.
Towards rear. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Faded from midfield past 400 M.
Well back. Produced good late progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Began very awkwardly losing considerable ground. Never in contention.
Well back. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Towards rear. Wide rounding home bend. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Commenced move upon straightening and ran on dourly to assert authority closing stages.
Well there. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front inside 200 M but found winner too good.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Always in last few.
Settled better than midfield. Took closer order home turn. Soon found no extra in straight.
Ridden hard to maintain prominent position through to straight. Gave ground from 300 M.
Pushed along to maintain prominent position on rail. Led narrowly entering straight, headed 200 M and could not match speed with winner.
Bumped at start and soon raced towards the rear towards the outside. Never a factor.
Began fairly and pushed along to maintain better than midfield position. At 400 M shifted out for running and ran on strongly. Took charge 200 M out and won comfortably.
Slowly away and raced towards the rear. Never in contention.
Knuckled at start. Prominent and towards the outside through to straight. Weakened badly from 300 M.
Mainly midfield but wide through to straight. One-paced in straight.
Pushed to maintain narrow lead to straightening. 2nd from 400 M no more to give from 200 M.
Ridden hard but was outpaced. Soon at back. Never a factor.
Jumped fairly and soon settled at back. Last into straight and switched out for uninterupted running, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Best out and steadily dropped back to worse than midfield despite being ridden along. (Bled.)
Soon settled in midfield on fence through to straight. Kept on well in straight.
Awkwardly into stride, settled 2-wide 7Ls off pace at 1400 M, closer but driven along to keep up 600 M out, no threat in straight.
3-wide 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, couldn't go with principals when pace picked up from 800 M out, beaten over 300 M out.
3-wide 7Ls off pace 1400 M out, driven along out 4-wide to dispute lead 800 M out, held narrow lead until about 100 M out, no extra.
Caught 4-wide 3Ls off pace 1600 M out, 1L off speed and 2-wide 800 M out, disputed lead from 600 M to 200 M, no extra.
Led 1600 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls, joined 800 M out, under pressure entering straight, dropped away rapidly.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace from 800 M out to home straight, beaten 300 M out.
7Ls off speed on fence 1400 M out, 5Ls down on fence 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight, stayed on well without grabbing front pair.
6Ls off lead on fence from 1400 M out, closer 1000 M out, outpaced once tempo picked up 800 M out.
2-wide 4Ls off pace from 1400 M out to home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well but had no answer to winner's late kick.
Never got into it, 3-wide 8Ls behind leaders 1400 M out, 6-wide and driven along into home straight, one-paced.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, disputing lead and with every chance 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Raced 5-wide in rear round first bend, 9Ls off pace and 2-wide 1400 M out, quietly ridden but 6Ls down 600 M out, weaved through field in straight to lead final strides.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home, stayed on at same pace.
Raced 1 and 2-wide 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 1400 M out to home straight, stayed on fairly well down centre of course to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off pace 900 M out, hard ridden to be slightly closer turning for home, soon beaten.
3-wide 5Ls off pace from 1000 m out to home straight when niggled along to keep up, soon wilted.
Disputed lead at the 1200 M out 3-wide, 1L off pace and 3-wide from 800 M to top of home stretch, soon outpaced.
Had the run of the race on fence until home straight, led about 300 M out, collared by winner 200 M out, stayed on well but winner was too good.
Raced 4-wide 6Ls off speed 800 M out, 5-wide into home straight, no impression.
Slowly away, 2-wide and about 6Ls off speed in rear bunch 900 M out, 5-wide into home straight and still rear, posed no threat.
Bit keen early on disputing lead out 2-wide, driven to stay within 2Ls of leader on straightening, beaten 300 M out.
Reluctant from the outset and was being driven along from the jump, 4Ls off pace and 1-wide from 1200 M out to straight, grew more and more detached.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2Ls down into home straight and 1L down passing 200 M, no extra.
Always travelled well, 2-wide 4Ls off pace at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight, produced to lead passing 200 M pole, drew clear, easily.
Disputing lead out 4-wide 1200 M out, led on fence 800 M out by 1L, headed over 300 M out, weakened.
Slowly away, about 6Ls off pace and 3-wide down the back straight, hard pressed to be a little closer turning for home, kept on at same pace.
Settled on fence about 5Ls off pace through to home straight, kept on steadily through final stages.
3Ls or 4Ls off pace and racing 3 and 4-wide, sometimes without cover, down back straight, 2Ls down into home straight, 1L down 200 M out, kept on evenly to line.
On fence between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace down back straight, driven along to keep up 600 M out, never looked like winning therafter.
3-wide with cover 7Ls off pace 1400 M out, similarly positioned but driven along 600 M out, 5-wide into the home straight, no impression.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace down the back, in 3rd place and 3Ls down on the swing, could only stay on the same pace.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 2nd place until home straight, swamped 300 M out and soon beaten.
Settled in rear about 9Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, no chance with principals but stayed on okay through beaten rivals in latter stages.
Raced 2-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace down back straight, driven along 800 M out, 4Ls down on straightening, one-paced to line.
Ridden quietly on fence 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, travelled well 2-wide and 4Ls off pace entering home straight, quickened up well to lead 150 M out, hung on gamely.
Raced a bit freely 2-wide 8Ls off pace 1400 M out, travelled well 5Ls off pace and 3-wide off home turn, picked up well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on strongly but post came too soon.
Settled about 6Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1400 M to 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, 4-wide and 3Ls down turning for home, 1L down 200 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, never really travelled that well, never better than 8Ls off pace in rear, became further detached in straight.
Always towards rear, never closer than 5Ls off pace at any stage, stayed on at the one pace in straight and beaten about 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, hard pressed to take closer order 600 M out, about 3Ls down turning for home, weakened steadily.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 3Ls down back straight, 2Ls up entering straight, grabbed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
On fence 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, had a nice spot 2Ls off pace towards inner entering straight, weakening when inconvenienced 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 600 M, stayed on well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, hung in through final 100 M out, went close.
Settled on fence 5Ls off pace from 1200 M to 800 M out, closing and switched off fence to challenge at top of home straight, bravely burst through gap to lead final strides.
Awkwardly into stride, keen early on, on fence 8Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, never better than 5Ls off pace in rear from then on.
Disputed early running, 2Ls clear on fence 1000 M out, headed at top of straight, weakened.
3-wide 3Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, one-paced to line.
Caught 4-deep without cover 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, closer turning for home, quickened up well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on and just missed.
On fence 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, disappointed for running about 300 M out along inner, didn't recover.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off speed 1200 M out, improved from 600 M marker out 4-wide, widest (5-wide) into home straight and 4Ls down, 2Ls behind 200 M out, kept on well.
Disputed early running out 2-wide, 2Ls off pace in 2nd 1000 M out, half a length down entering straight, a neck down 200 M out, swamped 50 M out.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 800 M, staying at the same pace in straight when checked 100 M out.
Settled 1L or 2Ls off pace out 2-wide from back to home straight, led over 200 M out, still in front 30 M out before being caught by chasing pack.
2-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, stayed on very well to be nearest at the finish.
Didn't break well, raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, lost place and driven along when 7Ls in arrears 600 M out, no threat in home stretch.
Midfield into straight where he kept on well before finding only one-paced near finish.
About 5th turning into straight. Soon beaten.
About 8th approaching 800 M and similar position early in straight. Ran on well from the 300 M despite not reaching winner.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Among rear group into straight where he stayed on well to claim 3rd near finish.
Towards rear before running on promisingly in straight for a pleasing debut.
Soon in touch and remained there to straight. Could make no impression on leaders.
Never in contention.
At back to straight where he ran on a bit from the 300 M.
Never on terms.
Always well there. Ran on to lead passing 200 M, holding on to retain advantage at the finish.
Never troubled leaders.
Never far off to home bend. Was steadied 300 M and made no show thereafter.
Was prominent before taking command rounding home bend. Found no extra after being headed 200 M.
Always wide in midfield or better position. Improved steadily far side to 3rd or 4th home bend. Faded upon straightening.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M. Held 2Ls advantage final turn. Held on.
Led field to 1200 M. 2Ls 2nd upon straightening. Soon found no extra.
Rear. Made up good ground early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Bounded at start, towards rear. Crept closer order along rail turning in. Kept on under pressure in straight.
Midfield or better. Kept on steadily final 300 M.
Slightly slowly away, behind midfield. No improvement.
Rear. Crept closer order final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened badly.
Lost ground at start, last to 800 M. Remained in the rear group and was check soon after tuning in. Made up a little ground 200 M.
In touch. Dropped back just better than midfield far side. Made progress home bend to be 3rd passing 400 M. Ran on steadily.
Behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Mace modest progress down straight without threatening.
Around midfield. Ran on past beaten horses in straight without threatening.
Never far off to straight. Failed to quicken to challenge.
Raced wide in prominent position. Quickened well to take charge 150 M out. Won well.
Midfield at best. Kept on one pace in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Rear. Produced good late impression and ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Raced very wide in rear of midfield. Made no show in straight.
Mostly in forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield. Faded shortly after straightening.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled final 150 M.
Broke well. Settled behind leaders. Kept on without quickening.
Pushed along early to take lead from 1400 M. Faded from final turn.
Last. Made some progress 600 M out. Kept on moderately on outside in straight.
Midfield. Dropped to behind midfield when tightened near 600 M. Recovered some late ground in straight.
In touch early. Soon raced in midfield or slightly better. Dropped back steadily from home bend.
Midfield. Behind midfield passing 1000 M. Held up home turn. Ran on well when in clear in straight. Just missed a minor placing.
In touch to 250 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Made progress far side and came to challenge the leader final turn. Took lead early straight. Headed inside final 50 M.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear. Improved steadily far side to be prominent in straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Near rear on the rail. Shifted to the outside turning in. Ran on steadily in straight, doing best work final 200 M to just miss marginally.
Prominent. Moved to the front briefly final turn. Soon dropped out.
Led field to 1400 M. Raced 3rd to 600 M where he dropped back a bit to 6th. Kept on until one-paced inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Given reminders to be midfield final turn. Ran on under pressure from outside to gain narrow victory close home.
Settled in midfield. Responded well in straight. Just failed to peg back winner.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Raced behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Rear. Saved ground on inside turning in. One-paced.
Midfield and wide. Soon quickened under pressure to lead over 200 M out. Hung on well.
Always prominent. Held every chance early in straight but failed to sustain effort.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Led or disputed lead to straight. Dropped out.
Towards rear. Came with good late run final stages to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Inconvenienced for a run over 200 M out. Kept on steadily.
Well there. Led far side and into straight. Weakened.
Raced prominently 3 or 4-wide. Soon found no extra after straightening.
Began well and soon settled 3 to 4Ls off pace 4-wide without cover through to straight. Made up steady ground in straight but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Soon raced 2-wide in prominent position through to straight. Found nothing in the straight and faded after 200 M. (Hung in throughout.)
Broke fairly and soon raced 2Ls off leader on fence. 1L down entering straight and when asked 300 M out made up steady ground but was unable to overhaul the winner.
Soon settled at rear section on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and only ran past couple of beaten runners.
Began well and niggled along to race 2-wide 1L behind leader. Remained there until placed under pressure on straightening unable to quicken and stayed on evenly to the line.
Began fairly and soon settled in mid-division on inner through to straight. When asked 300 M did not quicken and stayed one-paced to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to maintain position in rear section around 3-wide. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground from 200 M but no extra over the concluding stages.
Began fairly from wide draw. Soon eased to the tail and shifted across onto rail. Under pressure from 400 M and switched wide, made up some ground in straight.

Began well. Ridden along to lead and steadily shifted inwards to be on fence with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Responded well in straight to fend off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Missed the start slightly and soon recovered to be in midfield around 3-wide. Did not quicken in straight and further weakened after 200 M.
Jumped fairly and soon eased to rear section around 2 to 3-wide. When asked 300 M out ran home fairly to be closest at finish.
Jumped very awkwardly. Soon recovered to race in worse than midfield section around 2-wide through to straight. Did not respond to pressure in straight.
Missed the start, raced 2 and 3-wide in midfield about 4Ls off speed throughout, never a threat in the stretch.
3-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, always had cover though 3-wide and 4Ls off pace from 800 M to home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on at the same pace.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 1400 M out to home straight, every chance 200 M out but couldn't follow through.
On fence 4L or 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home stretch, battled on along inside rail to nick 3rd close home.
Always 4-wide and 3-wide without cover throughout, 4Ls off pace 1200 M and improved to be 2Ls down 600 M out, driven along entering straight, soon weakened.
Awkwardly into stride, always in rear 6Ls of 7Ls behind leader through to home straight, no impression.
Settled 8Ls off early pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, 3-wide but with cover and 6Ls off pace from 1000 M to 600 M, 6-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, led 200 M out, drew clear, impressive.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, never competitive.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, soon moved to inner, 4Ls down turning for home, very one-paced on run-in to line.
3Ls off speed and 3-wide without cover 1200 M out, sent on to be 2-wide at leader's girth from 1000 M to home straight, no extra from 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, every chance 300 M out, no extra.
Led on fence 1400 M out, no more than a length clear from 1000 M to home straight, headed 200 M out, battled on gamely to reclaim 2nd place on line.
Jumped awkwardly and settled in rear. Starting to give ground 600 M out and became detached. Never a factor.
Bounded in air at start then travelled at the rear throughout and became detached from the field 600 M onwards.
Ridden early to keep position on fence in midfield, crowded near 1200 M and dipped towards rear 100 M out. Pressure from 500 M out, made minor progress late.
Caught 4-wide near rear on first turn. Remained 3-wide and 7 or 8Ls off lead thereafter.
Settled handily 2Ls behind pace on rail. Grabbed lead momentarily at 200 M. Kept on quite well but was overtaken inside 50 M.
Shifted to middle from inside draw and settled 4Ls off speed near fence from 800 M until 350 M out. Shifted out and commenced to make sustained effort from 300 M and gained upper hand final stages.
Near midfield at 1200 M. Settled 6Ls off pace 800 M out. Commenced run 3-wide 400 M out. Vying for lead with every chance from 100 M out, just missed and had to settle for 3rd spot.
Broke well. Ridden along to track leader 2-wide 2 or 3Ls down 1000 M out. Ridden hard in straight, finished off well but couldn't get head in front.

Midfield early then near rear at 1200 M. Steadily moved towards midfield 600 M out. Under pressure from 400 M but was awkward on heels early straight and had to be shifted out. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Near midfield 4 or 5Ls off pace when struggling to keep up. Not a factor in the straight.
Fractious in stall. Caught 4-wide near midfield making first turn. Ridden hard to dispute lead from 1100 M. Under pressure to keep up passing 600 M, run ended when 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Worked forward to lead field soon after start. Was joined from 1100 M and regained slender advantage near 600 M. Headed 200 M out and kept on one-paced.
Had a nice run on the fence 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace from gates to home straight, led 200 M out, drew clear, easily.
6Ls or 7Ls off pace and 2-wide from 800 M out to home straight, 4Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly into stride, soon driven along, never a factor.
5Ls off pace and caught 4-wide 800 M out, got cover racing 2-wide 600 M out, never got any closer.
Awkwardly into stride, didn't travel that well down back straight, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace from 700 M out to home turn, one-paced from there on.
Away well and led on fence 800 M out, headed 200 M out, weakened.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace at 700 M, similarly placed but carried head awkwardly, one-paced on run-in to line.
Never had any cover, always 3 or 4-wide and 4Ls off pace before hanging out on the circle, didn't pick-up in the straight.
Away well and sat half a length off early pace out 2-wide, similarly placed turning for home but driven along, soon dropped away.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off speed 700 M out, 5-wide into home straight, no impression.
Didn't get away well, never better than 7Ls or 8Ls off pace at any stage.
Always about 5Ls off speed towards inner through to home straight, plugged on well to be nearest at the finish.
Midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend to hit front upon straightening. Weakened when headed 200 M out.
Always there. Moved up from 400 M to reach front briefly 250 M. Kept on for a remote 3rd closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Kept on under pressure from 5th early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield early. Soon dropped back towards the rear. Kept on moderately in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last when checked 750 M. No progress.
In touch. Improved to 2nd approaching 1000 M. Took lead 650 M to 400 M. Faded inside 300 M.
Towards rear from a wide draw. Held up with no clear run after turning in. Recovered some ground when in clear final 200 M.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside 350 M. Unable to match with the winner inside 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Weakened inside 150 M.
Towards rear along inner. Made some progress 350 M until one-paced 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on through runners early straight to take control 200 M. Held on well.
Led field to 650 M. Dropped out when 3rd early straight.
Settled behind leaders. Boxed in on rails early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Led far side. Joined rounding home bend. Gradually weakened in straight.
Midfield. Not far off in 6th some 3Ls off pace turning in. Found nothing under pressure.
Soon dropped to rear.
Jumped well but held up in better than midfield. Hung out rounding home bend and dropped away quickly in straight.
Wide throughout. Midfield until no extra into straight.
Well there. Inconvenienced for a stride turning in. Ran on to hold every chance early in straight but found winner too good.
Broke well. Settled steadily in midfield. Renewed effort turning into home straight and soon asserted authority over 200 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled in rear of midfield. Produced some late headway closing stages.
Began slowly. Well back until running past beaten horses in straight.
Close up, joining lead rounding home bend. Gained slender advantage upon straightening but swamped over 200 M out.
Prominent early. Dropped to midfield home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Prominent briefly early, then remained in midfield. Weakened steadily inside 250 M.
In the rear group to straight. Made up some ground 200 M.
Always at the back.
Towards the rear. Only minor progress in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to take lead from 1000 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Always there. Kept on under pressure in straight.
Left awkwardly, towards rear throughout. (Lame.)
Prominent early. Soon dropped back to forward midfield. Kept on well final 250 M.
Led briefly early, then remained in prominent position. Weakened from 4th 200 M.
Well there. Chased the leader 800 M out. 1L 2nd turning in. Held on until finding no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on strongly inside 250 M to assert authority close home.
Better than midfield. Progressed to 4th 650 M. Responded well early straight to take lead 200 M. Unable to hold the winner closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Always well back.
Midfield into straight. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and responded well under pressure to grab victory late.
Around midfield. Quickened well to hit front inside but caught final strides.
Made no show.
Always in last few.
Always in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader. Hit front shortly after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and swamped closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Always well there. Kept on same pace in straight and lost 3rd late.
Held up in midfield. Weakened into straight.
Wide and in similar position behind midfield throughout.
Rear. Took closer order home bend. Kept on well from midfield into straight.
Best out steadily settled in worse than midfield position. Near the 400 M, clipped heels and nearly fell. Not a factor afterwards.
Eased to rear and difficult to settle early. Made some late progress.
Well there briefly, soon settled in better than midfield. Shifted out entering straight and ran on moderately in straight.
Jumped well and steadily eased to race behind leader. Shifted out to the clear 250 M out and ran on well until weakened over the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly then clipped heels and knuckled. Towards the rear on inner. Closer order turning for home, ran home strongly from final 250 M. Nearest at finish.
Midfield early towards the outside. Progress from 1000 M to be nearer to the rail but still 4 wide behind leaders. Weakened badly from 300 M.
Settled in mid-division through to straight. Near the 400 M held up for a run, ran on steadily from 300 M.
Midfield or better 3 to 4 wide through to straight. One-paced to the line.
Ridden to go forward. Led narrowly to 200 M. No extra.
Tardy start soon moved up to race behind leader through to straight. Asked for an effort from 400 M. Kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped well. Sat outside leader through to straight. Tired after 200 M.
Jumped well. Dropped to last and did not settle in the early stages. Inconvenienced at 400 M. Made up some ground until no extra final 150 M.
Began well steadily dropped to the back. Hampered near 400 M and found nothing afterwards. (Bled and lame.)
Began slowly and soon recovered to race 4Ls off pace on inner. Around 2Ls down entering straight and steadily shifted out. Battled home strongly from 350 M to win convincingly.
Didn't break that well, settled about 3Ls off pace in midfield until 400 M out when driven along, one-paced to line.
Raced 2Ls off pace until about 600 M out, under pressure from 400 M out, weakened steadily.
Prominent about 2Ls off pace until 400 M out, faded rapidly.
Soon in front, never clear by more than half a length but hung in all the while, headed over 200 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, never better than 4Ls off pace, beaten from over 200 M out.
Never much worse than half a length off pace towards far rail for most of race, no extra through final 200 M.
2Ls off pace down centre of track until 400 M, 1L down and with every chance 200 M out, didn't quicken up.
