Prominent about 1L or 2Ls off pace up against far rail until about 600 M out, grew further detached, eased down close home.
Always prominent, 1L off pace at 400 M, led at 200 M, driven out.
Very awkwardly away, 3Ls off lead until about 600 M out, soon under pressure and made no impression.
Travelled well about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until 400 M out, didn't quicken up and soon beaten.
Settled in last about 4Ls off pace until 400 M, about 3Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
On speed 1L off pace 800 M out, 2Ls down 400 M out and hard pressed, weakened.
No worse than 2Ls off speed until 200 M, stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 6Ls down from 1200 M to 600 M, travelled well 3Ls down and 3-wide into straight, disputing lead at 200 M, no extra close home.
Led from the gates, on fence but never clear by more than 2Ls, headed by GOOD MAN 600 M out, weakened from the top of the straight.
On fence 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4Ls down towards inner off home turn, checked 300 M out and no running room on fence, eased down from 200 M.
Settled in 3rd place about 2Ls to 5Ls off pace down the back straight, under pressure from 600 M out, beaten at the top of the straight.
5Ls or 6Ls off speed on fence from 1300 M out to about 600 M out, 2-wide 3Ls down into straight, 3Ls down 200 M out and one-paced to line.
Driven from gates, couldn't lead early on and settled on 2Ls off pace on fence, led out 2-wide 600 M out, weakened rapidly upon straightening.
Well behind and 2-wide 1100 M out, 6-wide and about 6Ls down entering straight, no impression.
6Ls to 8Ls off pace on fence from back straight to about 600 M out, travelled well entering straight when 4Ls down, stuck on at the same pace to line.
3-wide 8Ls off pace with cover about 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, stayed on at the same pace.
Raced 3-wide without cover and 6Ls off speed 1200 M out, drew closer round the circle and 1L down at top of straight, one-paced when short of room over 200 M out, weakened.
About 9Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover 1000 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, every chance 200 M out, found quinella pair too strong.
10Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, travelled well 5Ls off pace on straightening, 1L down 200 M out, couldn't quicken up.
Raced 2-wide in 4th place 3Ls off pace 1200 M out and 5Ls down 800 M out, disputed lead entering straight out 3-wide, stayed on well and asserted close home.
Settled 10Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, 6Ls down on straightening, switched out wider to challenge 300 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Led briefly out 3-wide 1400 M out, soon disputing lead out 2-wide with RUN AND WIN, faded right out at the top of the straight, well beaten 300 M out.
Settled 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 3rd place down the back straight, 2Ls down entering straight, led 300 M out, soon headed and only stuck on at the one pace.
On fence 7Ls off speed 1200 M out, 4Ls down on inner entering straight, didn't threaten.
About 5Ls or 6Ls on fence until 600 M, travelled smoothly 3Ls off pace entering straight, led over 200 M out, quickened away.
On fence about 8Ls or 9Ls behind leader 1200 M out, marginally closer turning for home, outpaced and eased down from 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, disputed early lead on fence with ARROGANCE, half-a-length clear 600 M out, faded rapidly from the top of the home straight.
Slowly away, 2-wide 10Ls down 1200 M out, not much better off and hard ridden off home turn, soon no chance.
Raced 3-wide about 6Ls or 7Ls off lead until home straight, no impression.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, about 4Ls down and 3-wide turning for home and travelling well, every chance 200 M out, winner was too strong.
2-wide 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 7Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide 5Ls down and with clear running on straightening, one-paced to line.
On fence about 10Ls off speed 1200 M out, 2-wide 8Ls down turning for home, moderate late headway in straight.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along when 5Ls down on the swing, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
Dropped out 8Ls to 10Ls off pace and 2-wide down the back straight racing on and off the bridle, 5-wide into home straight and 6Ls down, 3Ls down 200 M out, didn't quicken up.
Raced 2Ls to 4Ls off pace and 2-wide from back straight to home straight, failed to quicken up.
2Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M out until home straight, weakened steadily thereafter.
Settled in rear about 10Ls off pace and 2-wide, 8Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, 5Ls down 200 M out down centre of track, no extra.
Raced 2 and 3-wide with cover about 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide entering straight and 5Ls down, one-paced to line.
9Ls or 10Ls on fence 1000 M out, 7Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, 5Ls down 200 M out, no closer.
Awkwardly away, 4Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M to 800 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 4-wide without cover down the back straight and about 8Ls or 10Ls off pace, 5-wide into home straight, never looked like landing a blow.
6Ls down on fence from 1200 M to 600 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out then weakened again.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 4Ls down 800 M out and 3Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, led over 200 M out, stayed on strongly.
7Ls or 8Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, 5Ls down on the swing and 3-wide, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide 1100 M out, 5Ls down 800 M out, 3Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, half a length down in 2nd place 200 M out, couldn't peg back winner.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 1L down and 2-wide 800 M out, led at the top of the straight, headed over 200 M out, no extra.
Led on fence 1300 M out, never more than 2Ls clear, held narrow lead entering straight, faded right out.
Well there and was 2nd rounding home bend. Hit front briefly 250 M. Soon beaten.
Well there before being checked 250 M. Not in contention thereafter.
In touch to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
In rear to straight where he stayed on strongly closing stages despite not catching winner.
Mostly midfield to straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield 1000 M and remained there to straight. Ran on to hit front briefly passing 200 M before being outpaced near finish.
Towards rear when baulked for running 300 M. Kept on close home.
Last into straight. Never nearer.
Led field to 250 M where he could find no more.
Never far off to straight where he was checked 200 M out. Made no show after.
Always well there. Challenged under pressure passing 200 M. Found winner too strong and lost 2nd placing final strides.
Worse than midfield home turn. Was steadied 200 M out before staying on well close home.
Never in contention.
Soon in midfield and was among rear group swinging into straight. Ran on resolutely from 300 M to lead close home.
Pushed along from widest draw to take the lead. Held on until headed 100 M. No extra.
Slightly better than midfield. Made ground steadily along inside to take 2nd close home.
Towards rear. Moved to the inside on straightening. Made up some ground until one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Raced 2nd to early straight. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Jumped well, remained prominent before weakened out of contention inside 150 M.
In touch. Raced 4th from 900 M. Ran on from 4-wide in straight to assert authority 100 M. Won going away.
Knuckled at start, remained at rear to final turn. Made ground steadily final 250 M, never nearer.
Midfield or behind. Dropped steadily to the rear group when steadied 700 M. No significant progress.
Never a factor.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Clipped heels and lost momentum 500 M out. Made no show in straight.
Well there. Led briefly into straight but soon found no extra.
Midfield when checked passing 600 M. Found nothing in straight.
Well there. Tight between runners turning in. Hit front over 200 M out despite shifting ground.
Broke well and led to 200 M. No extra.
Held up wide in midfield. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Rear when badly checked and lost ground over 500 M out. Never recovered.
Held up in rear of midfield. Made steady headway upon straightening before closing off race strongly.
Well back. Good effort on outside around 500 M. Carried very wide turning in. Never a danger.
Midfield. Raced freely 600 M out causing interference. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Never nearer.
Midfield. Lost position passing Rock. Kept on steadily under pressure past beaten horses from rear into straight.
Crowded after start, last or second last to straight. Ran on.
Left awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
In touch. Raced 3rd passing 1200 M. Ran on steadily in straight to just prevail at finish.
Mainly 4th to 200 M. No extra.
In touch early, soon dropped to 5th. Given reminders from 600 M, no response. Tailed off in straight. (Lame.)
Behind midfield on inside. Responded quite well when under pressure final 200 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Made some progress 800 M to be midfield home bend. Made ground on outside in straight.
Sat outside leader before taking the lead 600 M. Held on but was caught narrowly final stride.
Raced 6th to final turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Led field to 600 M. Dropped back steadily.
Slowly away, never able to feature.
Midfield. Lost position halfway out but recovered a lot of ground in home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Jumped best. Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Always well there. Fought on dourly down straight but denied by the narrowest of margins.
Well back. Made up good ground in straight.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield. Ran on steadily down home straight doing best work at finish.
Prominent early. Steadied and lost position 1200 M out. Dropped out home bend.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Trailed field. Improving when tightened badly on rails 200 M out.
Made all. Hung on well to defy runner-up's challenge close to home.
Soon raced 4 to 5Ls off pace 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed on evenly to the line.
Soon raced in prominent position 2-wide. Commenced to lose ground at 600 M and became detached in straight. (Heart Irregularity.)

Soon eased to the tail and shifted inwards. Around 6 to 7Ls off leader entering back straight, gradually shifted out and made steady progress from 400 M. Around 5Ls down 300 M out, all out 250 M and rattled home to win convincingly.
Settled in rear section on inner through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and only ran past several beaten runners after the 200 M mark.
Broke well and soon raced 1 to 2Ls off leader on rail. Remained there until straightening. When asked 250 M out made up steady ground and missed the 2nd placegetter by a short margin.

Untidy start and niggled along to maintain position around 4 to 5Ls off pace on inner. Switched out and made a mone 450 M out, around 3Ls down 300 M out and made up ground from 200 M to be closest at finish.
Best out from wide draw. Niggled along to sit outside leader and steadily shifted inwards. When asked 300 M out stayed one-paced and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Began well and settled in mid-division around 2-wide. Near the 500 M was checked and shifted out. Made no impression in straight.
Soon settled at rear section and shifted in closer to rail. Switched out and put under pressure from 450 M out. Made up some ground over the final 150 M to be closest at finish.

Began fairly and niggled along to take up running on fence with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Responded well to pressure in straight but unable to fend off challenge from winner and just held on for 2nd place.
Jumped fairly and raced in mid-division towards the outside. Made some progress from 600 M to be 1-1/2Ls off leader turning for home. Did not quicken in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Slow to begin, crowded after the start. Soon recovered to race 3 to 4Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Plugged on evenly in straight and further weakened over the final stages.
Disputed lead out 2-wide with SNIPPETYIYEA from gates until 250 M out, no extra.
Always 3-wide and no further than 2Ls off pace in 3rd pace from 1000 M to home straight, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, drew clear.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace on fence 800 M out, always outpaced.
Had a nice position on the fence about 2Ls off lead on fence, short of running room entering straight, staying on at the same pace when he shifted in 200 M out, didn't improve.
Vied for lead with SENSIBLE WAY on fence from gates until being headed over 200 M out, no extra.
Bit keen early on racing 2-wide 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 3Ls down entering home straight, no acceleration.
Always about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence until home straight, checked on inner 200 M out, didn't recover.
About 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out and niggled along, 5Ls down on fence entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out when inconvenienced, ran on at same pace.
Wasn't best away, raced 3-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace down back straight, 5Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, never looked like breaching gap.
Always 3-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide into home straight, didn't pick up.
Raced 2-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until about 600 M out when severely checked, worse off entering straight, didn't recover.
Totally blew the start and lost at least 6Ls, 8Ls off pace and 3-wide 800 M out, 4Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
Settled 4Ls off pace on rails. Ridden at 600 M. Kept on a bit one-paced to finish.
Was checked before first turn and settled behind midfield. 2-wide and 5 or 6Ls off lead. Made steady ground in home straight.
Ridden hard to lead at 1300 M out. Held 1L advantage until headed inside 200 M, kept on well and just missed 2nd place near the line.
Very slowly away. Near rear on fence until home straight. Shifted out at 200 M to obtain running. Unable to quicken much.
Caught 4-wide and 5Ls off pace making first turn. Raced 3-wide and near midfield in back straight. Taken wider rounding home turn. Minimal progress in straight, tired near home.
Sat 2Ls behind leader on rail from 1200 M out. 1L down going into straight. Responded well under pressure, grabbed lead at 200 M and won going away.
Led briefly after jump then settled 1-1/2Ls outside leader from 1300 M. Under pressure 400 M out, found no more and faded quickly final 250 M.
2-wide and 2 or 3Ls behind leader. Ridden hard from 400 M out. Shifted out to find running after straightening. Unable to steadied at the 100 M when crowded.
3-wide and 2 or 3Ls behind leader. Under pressure from 600 M out. Still 3-wide rounding home. One-paced in straight, weakened closing stages.
Slow after jump and was at rear throughout the race. Found nothing in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Settled 3-wide near rear until 600 M out. Did not respond when ridden at 600 M. Last into straight, made some late ground towards outer final 100 M.

Found position rear of midfield along rails shortly after start. Settled 2-wide and 4 or 5Ls off pace 1000 M out. Unable to obtain clear running on straightening until 200 M out. Finished well but was unable to gain ground on winner.
Flew the gates and led on fence 800 M out, never clear by much more than a length until home straight, kicked on and was always holding pursuers.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, couldn't go with principals.
Raced 3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 3-wide until home straight, soon one-paced.
Always racing 4-wide without cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed, 5-wide into home straight, found nothing.
Had the run of the race on the fence about 2Ls off pace from start to finish, couldn't head quinella pair in the straight.
Raced a bit freely early on, about 4Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight, didn't quicken up.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until 600 M out, wider round the circle and 4-wide into home straight, flattened out.
Never much better than 5Ls off pace in rear and 3-wide at any stage, 4-wide into home straight, emptied.
Always 2-wide and about 3Ls off pace until 600 M out, soon driven along to lie up, weakened in straight.
Settled 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence until home straight, no acceleration.
Missed the start and settled 5Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, similarly placed entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide and about a length and a half off the winner from start to finish, couldn't overhaul hit in the straight.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped back steadily.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Recovered some ground 200 M but failed to quicken closing stages.
Prominent. Weakened from 4th 300 M.
Towards rear. Midfield rounding home bend. Weakened final 200 M.
Pushed along to take lead passing 1400 M. Weakened out of contention when headed 300 M.
Bounded at start, soon last. Recovered good ground inside 300 M to gain 3rd close home.
Mainly 5th before dropping to midfield halfway. Renewed effort in straight to be 2nd 200 M. No threat to the winner.
Missed the start and was at the rear. Crept closer order turning in. Improved to 4th when under pressure 250 M. Found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to midfield when raced awkwardly 600 M. Kept on but unable to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside inside 200 M.
Midfield from widest draw. Gradual progress from 1000 M to be 3rd rounding home bend. Responded well to take control 300 M. Won readily.
Missed the start and was in the rear. Very moderate progress inside 200 M.
Led early, then sat outside leader passing 1200 M. Kept on but lost a minor placing close home.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent. Only one-paced under pressure final stages.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Prominent to halfway. Weakened.
Midfield early. Weakened after halfway mark.
Always in rear.
Behind midfield. Produced late progress to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to 250 M. No extra.
Well back. Ran on steadily.
Soon in rear.
Never far off. Ran on steadily but never able to threaten.
Well there early. Gradually shifting to grandstand side halfway out. Never able to quicken inside 300 M.
Made all to win easily.
Midfield or worse. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Behind midfield. Crept closer on inside turning in. Ran on steadily final 250 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 1100 M. Raced wide without cover throughout.
Led field soon after start. Held on well until headed final 30 M.
Soon in touch. Made progress to 3rd 1000 M out. Sustained effort final 200 M to snatch victory final strides.
Crowded at start, last early. Soon recovered ground to be midfield far side. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Made moderate progress inside final 200 M.
Rear. Ran on well inside 350 M. Reached front briefly 30 M, just lost narrowly.
Led very briefly early. Raced 4th from 1000 M. Held on until weakened steadily inside 250 M.
Left awkwardly, never a factor.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Recovered good ground from 300 M until one-paced close home.
Prominent. Remained 2nd 1100 M out until failing to hold place 200 M.
Midfield or slightly better. Weakened closing stages.
Towards rear. Very minor advancement closing stages.
Midfield or behind. No progress in straight.
Held up in rear. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield and raced wide throughout. Produced some late headway closing stages.
Never far off. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Midfield into straight. Weakened.
Well there. Hit front shortly after straightening but swamped close to home.
Well back to straight. Finished well down centre of track.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled in 4th or 5th. Quickened well to assert authority final stages.
Very sluggish at start. Always well behind.
Well there. Held every chance in straight but denied near finish.
Began well and pushed along to race in mid-division on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken and stayed on one pace to the line.
Jumped fairly and soon eased to rear section around 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out, did not quicken and plugged on evenly to the line.
Niggled along to race 2 wide in midfield section through to straight. When asked 300 M out stayed same paced and further weakened inside final 100 M.
On jumping bounded in the air and lost a lot of ground. Hard ridden to recover some ground but still at rear on inner. Found nothing in straight and weakened badly after 200 M.
Niggled along but outpaced to be in rear section around 2 to 3 wide. From 600 M steadily shifted out wide and made up some ground after the 200 M mark.
Soon eased to the back and shifted in closer to rail. Remain there until straightening, made no impression in straight.
Broke fairly and soon settled 3 to 4Ls off pace 2 wide. Switched out entering straight and made up steady ground after 200 M but was never in position to trouble the first three.
Began well from wide draw and soon settled in mid-division towards the outside. Hung out badly when making the turn. Unable to respond to pressure in straight and further weakened after 200 M.
Best out but soon eased to race 4Ls off leader 3 wide. Hung out when making the home turn. Made up some ground early part of the straight but unable to go on after 200 M. (Lame.)

Began well from wide draw and soon raced 1L off pace out wide. From 900 M gradually shifted in to be 1 off from rail 1L off pace. Responded well to pressure in straight but found winner too strong in concluding stages.
Niggled along to race next to the leader. After the 1000 M steadily shifted in onto rail and dropped to 1 to 2Ls off leader. All out 300 M out and hit front inside final 100 M, stayed on well.

Began well from wide draw and pushed along to lead narrowly. Steadily shifted onto rail and took outright lead after 1000 M. Remain there through to straight. Ran on well in straight but was overhauled by 1st pair in final 100 M.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 1200 M until 600 M, 3-wide 1L off pace entering straight, led 300 M out but headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Settled 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence from back straight until 600 M out, raced 2-wide entering straight, a length and a half down 200 M out, kept on to lead 100 M out, readily.
Keen early on, always racing 4 and 5-wide without cover and 1L or 2Ls off pace until home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Didn't break well, raced 4-wide with cover 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5Ls or 6Ls down and driven along 600 M out, no chance with principals but stayed on fairly well close home, bled.
3-wide and about 1L off pace from 1000 M to 600 M out, weakening 3Ls off pace and wider entering straight, dropped away.
Raced 2 or 3-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls 1000 M out, struggling in rear about 6Ls off pace and 4-wide off home turn, became further detached.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace towards rear 1000 M out, similarly placed but 5-wide entering home straight, no acceleration.
On fence 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls down entering straight, no further impression.
Held up in rear about 7Ls off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, plugged on at one pace.
Raced 2-wide 1L off speed from 1000 M out until home straight, all out 200 M out, weakened closing stages.
Led on fence passing 1000 M, never clear by more than a length, headed about 300 M out, weakened.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, slightly wider and 4Ls down turning for home, weakened rapidly.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, 5Ls down on fence entering straight, one-paced to line.
Keen early on, raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls down and 4-wide on the swing, could only stay on at the same pace.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 5Ls down and driven along disputing 3rd place off home turn, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
About 6Ls or 7Ls off pace and 2-wide down the back straight, 4-wide into home straight and 8Ls down, moderate late headway nearer winning post.
Raced 2 or 3-wide and about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace down the back straight, no impression in stretch.
Always in 3rd or 4th place 3-wide and between 4Ls and 6Ls off pace until home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but found winner just too strong.
Disputed early lead out 3 and 4-wide, assumed lead 1000 M out, shot 4Ls clear 600 M out, 3Ls in front 300 M out, headed over 50 M out, no extra.
No speed early on, raced 3-wide about 8Ls off pace in rear 1000 M out, widest of all (7-wide) into home straight when at least 7Ls off pace, stayed on at the same pace.
Keen early on, raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace about 900 M out, worse off turning for home, dropped right out.
Slowly away, raced 4-wide without cover and about 4Ls off pace until about 1000 M out, weakening and 8Ls down entering straight, faded right out.
Raced 6Ls or 7Ls off pace and 3 and 4-wide sometimes without cover until home straight, kept on well to be nearest at finish, crossed line nearer stand's rail.
2-wide about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until turning for home, over 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on fairly well but never posed a serious threat.
Never much better off than 7Ls or 8Ls off speed towards inside rail until home straight, picked up well to be 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on strongly, post came too soon.
6Ls off pace on fence down the back straight, struggling when about 7Ls down entering straight, no extra.
No speed early on, raced 2-wide about 8Ls off pace in rear early on, 6-wide into home straight when about 7Ls off pace, nearest at the finish.
Disputed early lead, soon restrained to sit in 2nd place from 1000 M between 2Ls and 4Ls off pace until 200 M out, kept on finding and led over 50 M out, ran on.
Raced 4-wide 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, similarly placed and niggled along 600 M out, winding up to challenge over 200 M out when checked, ran on again close home.
Checked exiting barriers, raced on fence or 2-wide about 7Ls off pace down the back straight, bit closer turning for home, soon beaten.
Checked exiting stalls, 3-wide 7Ls off pace 800 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, ran on well through beaten rivals to be nearest at finish.
Didn't break well, half a length off pace on fence 1200 M out, soon settled 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, no acceleration.
Raced 2 and 3-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls from 1200 M out to home straight, half a length down 200 M out, stuck on at the one pace.
Awkwardly into stride, disputed early running out 2 and 3-wide, settled 2-wide half a length off pace 600 M out, outpaced at top of home straight and soon with no chance.
Checked exiting gates, settled about 8Ls off pace in rear and 2-wide, 5-wide into home straight and 5Ls off pace, half a length down in 2nd place 200 M out, led about 150 M out, kept on well.
Caught 2-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1200 M to 600 M, 2Ls down 200 M out when awkwardly placed between runners, kept on at same pace.
Raced a bit freely early on, about 5Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight, ran on strongly towards inside rail but winner was too strong.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls down back straight, driven along 600 M out to keep up, no chance from top of home straight.
Disputed early lead on fence, narrow lead from 800 M out, 1L clear turning for home, headed about 300 M out, faded rapidly.
4Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering home straight, 2Ls down and unbalanced, checking SMART CHIEF about 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off speed from 1000 M to 600 M, 4-wide and 2Ls down off the home turn, led about 300 M out, headed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
Caught 3 and 4-wide disputing lead 1200 M out, led narrowly about 900 M, soon headed again, 1L down and 3-wide off final bend, beaten well over 200 M out.
On fence always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from about 1400 M out to 600 M out, 3Ls down turning for home, half a length down 200 M out, got up close home.
Led by 2Ls on fence 1600 M out, 1L clear from 800 M to home straight, half a length up 200 M out, grabbed by winner close home.
Awkwardly away, raced about 4Ls off pace and 2 or 3-wide from 1600 M to home stretch, stayed on at the same pace.
Never closer than 8Ls off the pace at any stage.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace 1400 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls down entering home straight, ran on very strongly near stand's rail to be nearest at finish.
Dropped out 8Ls off pace and 3-wide 1400 M out, 5-wide into the home straight and still well adrift, never a factor.
On fence 6Ls off pace 1400 M out, travelled well 5Ls off speed 500 M out, stayed on at the same pace in the home straight.
Keen early on, raced 2-wide 9Ls off pace near rear 1400 M out, slightly closer but hard driven entering straight, found nothing.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th place from 1600 M to 1000 M, worse off and hard-pressed to keep up at top of straight, no impression.
Flew the start, always a little bit keen, settled 2Ls off pace and 2-wide 1600 M out, 1L off pace and 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, weakened from 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off pace 1400 M out, never got any closer to leaders than that.
Bit keen early on, advanced from being 5Ls off pace and 3-wide 1400 M out to 1L down and 3-wide at the 1000 M, under pressure to keep up 600 M out, beaten at top of straight.
Settled 3Ls off pace on fence from 1600 M out to 600 M out, still there and 2-wide into home straight, always outpaced thereafter.
5-wide round the 1st bend, 3-wide and 6Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide without cover 600 M out, ran on at the same pace in straight.
Midfield into straight and was about 2L off lead 250 M. Found no extra.
Lost considerable ground at start and was last to straight. Ran on well to claim 4th near finish.
Took up running approaching 1200 M and led field to 250 M where he could find no more.
Well there before dropping to 7th or 8th 1200 M and was among rear group on straightening. Ran on a bit from 250 M, found one-paced near finish.
Prominent to 250 M. Soon dropped out of contention.
Midfield into straight where he moved up to challenge 250 M out. Found winner too strong close home.
Mostly midfield to straight. Kept on till outpaced final 150 M.
Never far off to straight where he hit front approaching 250 M. Unable to hold first 2 final 100 M.
Ran well to 300 M where he dropped out quickly.
Close up before failing to hold place from the 300 M.
Well there to straight where he made no show.
Mostly in rear of main group to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on strongly to take command inside final 150 M.
Never on terms.
Jumped awkwardly, moved up to recover ground to midfield or behind. One-paced in straight.
Never a factor.
Soon prominent. Pushed forward to take lead 900 M. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent early, gradually dropped back to 5th or 6th. Made no show in straight.
In touch. Steady progress home bend to be 2nd final turn. Hit front 250 M out. Won unchallenged.
Never better than midfield. Hung in.
Slightly missed the start, soon recovered ground to be in midfield or better. Kept on quite well under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Ran past a couple of tiring horses closing stages.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped well and led field to 900 M. Remained prominent to straight. Took 2nd 200 M out but no match with the winner.
Left awkwardly, last to 600 M. Recovered ground steadily along rail until one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Hung wide into straight and never recovered.
Soon in rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear around home bend.
Well there. Led into straight but soon headed narrowly. Fought on well but unable to peg back winner.
Towards rear. Took closer order entering straight. Kept on well without quickening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped beat. Held up wide in prominent position. Gained slender lead shortly after straightening and hung on gamely to the line.
Never nearer.
Well back. Ran on to be nearest at finish for remote 4th.
Always towards rear.
Led briefly. Joined rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Commenced run turning in. Ran on well to miss narrowly.
Towards rear on inside. No improvement in straight. (Lame.)
Led field from widest draw. Dropped out of contention when headed final turn.
Towards rear throughout.
Left awkwardly, near rear. Recovered a little ground in straight.
Restrained to rear from the widest draw. Improved on outside rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to claim victory final 50 M.
Never worse than 6th. Kept on but without threatening in straight.
Soon sat outside leader. Took over final turn. Held on until headed final 50 M.
Towards rear. Dropped to last final turn. Made up a little ground in straight.
Midfield. Hung in badly from 800 M while racing wide without cover. Last turning in. No progress.
Prominent early. Dropped back upon straightening.
In touch early, then raced in midfield from 1300 M. 4-wide final turn and soon improved to 3rd. Kept on.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd 800 M, and further progressed to 2nd early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made steady progress 300 M.
Always towards rear.
Never better than midfield.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield. (Bled.)
Around midfield to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Behind midfield. Dropped out home bend.
Raced in forward of midfield. Baulked behind runners upon straightening before running on to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Held lead to 400 M then weakened.
Never far off to straight then weakened.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Joint leader early. Settled just off the pace far side. Regained lead entering straight then never looked back.
Very sluggish at start. Well back to straight. Ran on without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Broke fairly and soon settled in mid-division around 2 to 3-wide. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Unable to show early speed and trapped wide in mid-division. Did not respond to pressure in straight.
Ridden along but no early pace to be worse than midfield. Hard ridden from 700 M to maintain position but unable to make up ground.
Began well but outpaced to be 7 to 8Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Ran home strongly inside the final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well and niggled along to take lead. Took rail running after 800 M with around 1L advantage through to straight. All out 200 M and ran home strongly to win comfortably.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race 1L off leader 2-wide. Remained there until straightening. Only ran on evenly in straight further weakened over the concluding stages.
Niggled along to race round 2-1/2Ls off leader through to straight. Responded well to pressure 300 M out but was unable to fend off challenge from 2nd placegetter to be overhauled on the line.
Ridden along to race 1-1/2 to 2Ls off leader on inner through to straight. One-paced in straight and further weakened in the final stages.
Unable to muster early speed to settle in rear section towards the outside. Was placed under pressure after 600 M but failed to make any impression.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon settled in midfield around 3-wide. Ridden hard on the latter part of home bend but never quickened and further weakened after 200 M.
Soon settled around 5 to 6Ls off leader on fence. Switched out and made some improvement at home turn. 4Ls down in straight and ran home strongly from 200 M to grab 2nd place on the line.
Niggled along to race in midfield on fence. Commenced to lose position from 600 M and dropped out after 300 M.
Bit too keen early on fence though well-paced about 1L or 2Ls off pace, under strong pressure 600 M out, dropped away.
Raced 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, clipped heels and nearly fell about 700 M out, didn't recover.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace down the back straight, hard pressed to lie up turning for home, faded.
Didn't break well, raced 3-wide 2Ls off lead 1400 M out, 2-wide and 1L off pace 800 M out, had every chance 200 M out, kept on battling but winner's late effort was too good.
No speed early on, raced 2-wide 8Ls off pace in rear about 1000 M out, sent on to be about 4Ls down and 4-wide turning for home, stayed on at same pace to be nearest at finish.
Raced 4-wide 2Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3-wide and on the pace until home straight when driven along, couldn't keep up.
Awkwardly away, on fence 8Ls off pace towards rear 1100 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, staying on and 5Ls down 200 M out, kept on strongly to lead final strides.
Travelled well in midfield 2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, stayed on at the same pace and never threatened principals.
On fence 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, about 4Ls off speed and niggled along 600 M out, very one-paced in home straight.
Prominent early on out 2-wide and 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down turning for home and under pressure, very weak in home stretch.
Led on fence about 1300 M out, never clear by more than a length, looked like winning when half a length up 150 M out, weakened final strides.
Caught 5-wide 1400 M out, raced 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, clipped heels about 700 M out and nearly fell, didn't recover.
Caught 3-wide about 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, sent on to be 4Ls off pace but 5-wide 800 M out, widest of all (5-wide) into home straight, weakened quickly.
On fence 6Ls off speed 1000 M out, driven along 600 M out, made only a little late ground.
Settled 2-wide near rear from 1400 M out to 600 M out. 5-wide on turn. Made a little progress in the straight.
Settled near rear on rails until entering home turn. 2-wide and 5 or 6Ls off leader entering straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish. Just missed 2nd place. (Bled.)
In midfield on rails until 500 M out. 2-wide and 2Ls behind leader entering straight. Ridden hard from 350 M out, not match pace of winner, just held on for 2nd place.
On rails 8 to 9Ls off pace from 1200 M out. Unable to quicken in straight and only ran past a couple of beaten runners.
3-wide behind midfield without cover from 1400 M out to 800 M. Moved up steadily out 4-wide on home turn. Run ended 200 M out and dropped away steadily.
Slowly tardy start and caught 4-wide on first turn, then went forward to take lead at 1300 M. Maintained 1L to 2L lead on rails until 400 M out. Faded quickly in straight.
Waited with at rear, under pressure 500 M out. 4-wide turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M.
Ridden for lead at 1400 M. Settled 1-1/2Ls off pace from 1200 M out. 2-wide turning for home and led momentarily early in the straight. Soon faded.
Settled 2-wide and 5 to 6Ls off leader 1200 M out to 600 M out. Caught 3-wide rounding home turn. Kept on well before tiring near home.
Led briefly after start. Settled 3 or 4Ls near rails behind leader in back straight. Ridden hard from 350 M out but unable to find extra and faded from 200 M.
Left the gate very slowly and awkwardly and soon last. Widest rounding home turn and made ground steadily near final 300 M.
2-wide 1L behind leader entering first turn. Remained 2-wide and settled 4 to 5Ls off pace in back straight. Rounding home turn 4-wide. Responded well to pressure in straight, led 300 M out, ran on.
Broke well and settled 2-wide behind midfield throughout back straight. 4-wide turning for home when held up. Kept on one-paced to finish when into clear inside 200 M.

Disputed lead before entering first turn. Raced 2Ls and 2-wide behind leader from 1200 M out. Caught 3-wide with leaders rounding home bend. Every chance 350 M out and failed to keep a minor placing inside final 100 M.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, weakening when wide without cover 800 M out, beaten 600 M out and came home in own time.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off speed through to home straight, stayed on at the same pace.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 m out, 4Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, drew clear.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, similarly placed but hard ridden to keep up entering straight, dropped right away.
Led on fence 1400 M out, headed by MASTER YING about 1100 M out and was half a length down until top of home straight, weakened rapidly.
Awkwardly away, 4Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 3Ls down and driven along turning for home, every chance 300 M out, stayed on okay but no chance with winner.
Severely hampered exiting stalls and at least 12Ls off pace 1400 M out, 8Ls down entering home straight, running on quite well when forced to change course about 100 M out.
Slowly away and was 9Ls off pace and on fence about 1000 M out, about 5Ls down turning for home, never posed any threat.
Prominent out 2-wide early before leading about 1100 M out, never much more than half a length clear, headed by winner over 200 M out, kept on well and lost 2nd close home.
Always at least 4-wide, raced 5-wide without cover about 3Ls off pace 1100 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, kept on at same pace to line.
Slowly away, on fence 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, never a factor.
Raced 2-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, every chance 300 m out, no extra and faded rapidly.
Held 6th on inner. Improved a bit rounding home bend. Advanced to 3rd early straight. Kept on.
Led briefly early. Remained prominent until dropped to 4th 650 M. Renewed effort 450 M to be 2nd final turn. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. 4-wide turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Moved to the inner in straight. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Well there. Held 2nd before taking over 400 M out. Kept on well.
Led field from 1000 M to final turn. Faded.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Advanced to 3rd 650 M. Widest turning in. Weakened steadily. (Hung out.)
Well there early, soon raced 4th. Further dropped back to midfield halfway. One-paced.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made minor progress in straight.
Never in contention.
Behind midfield into straight. No extra.
Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off in 5th. Kept on one pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily to claim 3rd final strides.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear into straight. Kept on steadily past beaten horses.
Well there. Checked and lost position about 500 M out. Prominent behind leaders turning in and switched off rails 200 M out. Fought on but lost placing late.
Settled just off the pace. Commenced move rounding home bend and hit front shortly after straightening. Soon went clear.
Soon took up running and led until shortly after straightening. Kept on one pace.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on under pressure in straight, never nearer.
Left very awkwardly, settled slightly better than midfield. Gave ground steadily rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Made ground final turn to be midfield upon straightening. Kept on steadily to just miss a minor placing.
In the last pair. Widest turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Maintained 2Ls 3rd from far side. Ran on under pressure in straight, gaining slender advantage 150 M. Just held on.
Pushed along from widest draw to be in touch. Remained 4th to near 400 M. Dropped out in straight.
Midfield. Made progress 450 M to be 4-wide 3rd turning in. Came to challenge 200 M but effort not sustained.
Prominent. Raced 2nd far side. Weakened inside 250 M.
Led field to 150 M. Unable to peg back the winner.
Made all despite poor draw. Went clear upon straightening.
Prominent to halfway, then gradually weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield. Gained 4th coming out of back straight. Kept on one pace.
Began slowly. Soon in rear of midfield. Made modest progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Dropped out under pressure.
Midfield. Tightened and lost some ground about 1000 M out. Hampered again rounding home bend and into straight. Never recovered.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to claim 2nd late.
Midfield. Ridden rounding home bend but weakened in straight.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses early in straight.
Prominent to 200 M. Faded.
Never nearer.
Ridden hard in the early stages to race around 3Ls off pace on rail. Switched out and come under pressure at 400 M, made up some ground in straight.
Soon raced outside leader. Under pressure from 600 M but stayed one-paced and weakened badly after 250 M.
Broke fairly and ridden along to take lead on fence with no more than 2Ls advantage through to straight. Stayed one-paced in straight and headed at 250 M, further weakened over the concluding stages.
Niggled along to race about 4Ls off leader. Hard ridden from 500 M out to hold position and steadily shifted out at the latter part of the turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon settled 4Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Pushed along from 450 M out to stay in position, did not respond well to pressure in straight and stayed same pace to the line.
On jumping, struck heels and dropped to the tail of the field. Remained there until straightening. Unable to quicken and only ran past several beaten runners in the early part of the straight.
Soon raced 1-1/2Ls 2Ls off leader on fence. Made move around 450 M out and hit front around 250 M and rider had his whip knocked out around 200 M but still ran home strongly to win comfortably.
Began well from wide draw but soon eased to the rear section and wide along the back straight and around home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Soon settled at rear section on rail and made some improvement turning for home. Only plugged on evenly in straight.
Ridden hard in the early stages to be in better than midfield position towards the outside. From 600 M commenced to lose position steadily and dropped out after straightening.
Began well but eased to race 7Ls off leader on inner. Commenced to make ground going up rock and switched out turning for home. Made up good ground in straight but never trouble the winner.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide without cover and about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 800 M out to home straight, every chance over 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Led on fence 1450 M out, headed about 1200 M out and settled to take the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace until home straight when hard ridden, one-paced to line.
Raced 2-wide and on pace 1200 M out, lost position steadily from 600 M out, dropped out tamely.
Caught 3-wide and 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, caught 5-wide (widest of all) and about 5Ls off pace down the back, 8Ls down entering straight, moderate late headway through beaten rivals.
Keen early on, on fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide from 800 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, no impression.
Had a tough trip, 5-wide 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along and 3-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, hard ridden to lead final strides.
Never in the hunt, never better than 6Ls off pace at any stage.
On fence 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, held up turning for home when 4Ls down, had to switch out wide to challenge, ran on strongly, was closing but line came too soon.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along 600 M out to hold position, no extra.
Slowly into stride, raced 8Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from back straight to home straight (turned in 4-wide), one-paced thereafter.
Led out 3-wide 1200 M out, on fence and 1L clear about 1000 M out, still 1L clear 200 M out, headed about 80 M from line, faded.
On fence 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, travelled well 5Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Was 2Ls clear passing 800 M until top of home straight, grabbed about 180 M out, no extra.
Never better than 7Ls off pace at any stage.
Deep on track and 6Ls off pace 800 M out, worse off and struggling off the home turn, no impression.
On fence about 5Ls off pace from gates to home straight, weakened further final 200 M.
2Ls to 3Ls off pace on fence until home straight when hard ridden, never really looked like troubling front pair.
Caught 5-wide about 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and about 2Ls down entering stretch, weakened markedly final 200 M.
Very slowly into stride and quickly 8Ls adrift, 5Ls down on the fence turning for home, stayed on at the same pace.
Settled 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 4th place through to home straight, never a threat in the straight.
Managed to stay within 6Ls off leaders until about 600 M out, no chance thereafter.
Awkwardly away, never much better than 3-wide and about 5Ls off pace at any stage.
Raced 2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to home straight, led about 180 M out, kept on well.
4-wide and 6Ls off pace about 800 M out, weakened steadily, no chance turning for home.
Bumped exiting gates and got back 3-wide 6Ls off pace 800 M out, 5-wide into home straight and 4Ls down, ran on okay but had no chance with winner.
Led early on fence, headed 1000 M out and had the run of the race until home straight when travelling okay, weakened extremely quickly.
On fence or 2-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straightl didn't pick up under pressure.
On fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight and struggling, no impression.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down off the home turn, no acceleration. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence about 6Ls off pace towards rear through to 700 M out, steadied off heels 600 M out, ran on steadily from there to be nearest at the finish.
Prominent early on, led out 2-wide 800 M out, 2Ls clear on fence turning for home, 3Ls ahead 200 M out, stayed on well.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 1L down on the home turn, petered out quickly.
Bit keen early on, 2-wide 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home and travelling well, stayed on at same pace.
Never in the hunt about 10Ls off pace until 600 M out, very green in home straight, found nothing.
5-wide round first bend, sent on to lead out 3-wide 1000 M out, in 2nd place racing 2-wide and half a length down 600 M out, quickly capitulated.
3-wide and 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, still well adrift and 6-wide into home straight, no chance.
Travelled well in midfield about 3Ls off pace until about 600 M out, soon under pressure and very weak in straight.
Always at least 4-wide early on and about 3Ls off pace, no threat in stretch.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence, led about 150 M out, ran on well.
Never much better than 3-wide and 4Ls off pace through to home straight, didn't find much.
Raced 3-wide about 1L off pace through to home straight, every chance and disputing lead 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace through to home straight, picked up to be just 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra and faded.
Soon led, never clear by much more than a length on fence, headed by winner about 150 M out, no extra.
Always about 3Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, stayed on at same pace to line.
Slowly away, always at least 4-wide and 4Ls off pace through to 600 M out, 6-wide into home straight, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Prominent 2-wide and about 2Ls off pace through until straightening, every chance 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Never much better than about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence at any stage.
Awkwardly away, in rear 5Ls off pace 800 M out, closer turning for home, 3Ls down 200 M out and kept on evenly.
4th or 5th into home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Made no show.
Always there. Ran on well to lead inside final 200 M.
Among rear group to straight. Switched in 250 M and stayed on strongly but late.
Never far off to straight. Kept on without quickening.
Soon led and made running to straight. Found no extra when headed inside final 200 M.
Last into straight. Never a factor.
Was 6th at Rock and similar place into straight. Could make no impression on leaders.
Prominent to straight where he held every chance 200 M out. Unable quicken with first two near finish.
Settled in rear to straight. Never nearer.
Was midfield going up the Rock and could make no improvement on straightening.
Well there before dropping to 8th early back straight. Not in contention thereafter.
Led briefly early. Remained prominent until failing to maintain position inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
In touch early, soon behind midfield. Kept on moderately in straight.
Rear from widest draw. Made ground steadily inside 250 M, never nearer.
Never a factor.
Soon 2nd. Kept on but lost 3rd place marginally at finish.
Soon led and made all. Just held off runner-up's challenge to score narrowly.
Midfield at start. Soon moved up to 4th passing 800 M. Ran on well in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Around midfield throughout.
Tardy start, towards rear. Crept clear order on inside final turn. Kept on while hanging out badly in straight.
Midfield or behind. Widest turning in. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Wide in midfield to straight. Faded.
Forward of midfield into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never in the hunt.
Led till headed coming out of back straight. Weakened further into straight.
Towards rear. Made modest progress in straight.
Broke well and raced close up. Hit front rounding home bend but unable to sustain effort and caught near finish.
Broke well then held up behind leaders. Shared 5th some 3Ls off pace turning in. No extra.
Jumped slightly slow but quickly into position behind leaders. Switched out to challenge over 200 M out and soon asserted authority.
Never nearer.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Rear. Made up good ground in straight.
Last from widest draw. Made moderate progress in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Sat outside leader from 1400 M before taking over soon after turning in. Unable to match speed with the winner when headed 100 M.
Led field till entering straight. Found no extra.
Midfield. Ran on from 5th early straight to take command final 100 M. Won readily.
Left very awkwardly, losing ground. Mainly behind midfield until making up some ground early straight. Weakened close home.
Better than midfield. Improved gradually far side to be 3rd final turn. Weakened in straight.
Jumped well and was prominent. Kept on but was one-paced closing stages.
Left awkwardly, behind midfield. Towards rear final turn. Recovered a little late ground closing stages.
In touch early. Dropped back a little to 5th passing 800 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Midfield and was 3-wide far side. Remained similar until running on a bit inside 200 M.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Nearly made all. Caught near finish.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well into straight to take charge closing stages.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield to straight. Ran on without threatening.
Towards rear. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well back. Commenced move passing 400 M gaining 5th into home straight. One-paced.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Wide in midfield. Made some headway home bend but soon weakened after straightening.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Improved under pressure turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.

Prominent on fence in the early stages. Settled in outright 2nd after passing winning post the 1st time. Improved to race beside leader going up Rock. When asked 300 M stayed one-paced and further weakened in the final stages.

Began well but eased to race around 6 to 7Ls off pace. Wide in middle stages. Ridden along to improve position. Around 3Ls down entering straight, when asked ran on steadily and just held on for 2nd place.

Pushed along but outpaced in the early stages to race in worse than midfield section on rail through to home straight. Only obtained clear running at 200 M and ran on well to miss 2nd placegetter by a short margin.
Unable to match early speed to race in midfield section towards the outside. Ridden hard to go forward going up Rock but soon weakened after 600 M. Dropped out in straight.
Soon settled in mid-division on inner. Around 500 M out switched out and commenced to go forward. Hit front on straightening and ran home strongly to win convincingly.
Ridden hard in the early stages to contest lead towards the outside. Obtain outright lead around 1400 M and shifted onto rail. Headed around 300 M out and faded after 200 M.
Did not jump well from wide draw and raced in rear section but shifted in closer to rail. Remain there until turning for home, made no impression in straight.
Niggled along to race mid-division on inner through to home straight. When asked 300 M out unable to quicken and stayed same paced to the line.
Began fairly but outpaced to race at back on fence, remain there until turning for home. Did not respond well to pressure and only ran past several beaten runners in the concluding stages.
Ridden hard in the early stages to dispute lead but soon settled in 3rd place around 1400 M. Commenced to lose position at 600 M and faded in straight.
Soon raced in worse than midfield section 2-wide through to home straight. Held up for running near 400 M. Ran fairly in straight.
Raced in better than midfield section on rail. Around 400 M steadily shifted out to obtain clear running, when asked 300 M out stayed one-paced and further weakened in the final stages.
Settled in 4th place on fence about 7Ls off pace from 1000 M out, 2Ls down turning for home, had to change course twice through final stages, post came too soon.
Sent on to race in 3rd place out 2-wide and about 6Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide into home stretch and 1L down, soon beaten.
Bit keen early on, raced 3-wide about 9Ls or 10Ls off pace in midfield 700 M out, 5-wide into home straight when about 4Ls down, couldn't come on.
Never really in the hunt, 2-wide and 10Ls off pace when driven along 700 M out, 4Ls down on the turn for home, was rather one-paced.
Away well and soon settled in 2nd place on fence, 5Ls or 6Ls down in 2nd place about 700 M out, soon picked up to lead at top of the straight, kept on well, just about hung on.
Led on fence 1200 M out, 5Ls or 6Ls clear 800 M out, came back to field rounding home turn and headed at the top of the straight, inconvenienced when fading about 200 M out.
In midfield early on, improving when caught 3-wide 6Ls off pace at 700 M, 5-wide and 3-wide into home straight, about 1L won at the 200 M, no extra.
6-wide 1300 M out, dropped in towards the rear and closer to the fence, 2-wide 9Ls off pace 700 M out, 4-wide entering straight, stayed on at same pace.
Bit slowly away, on fence about 9Ls off pace in 5th position 800 M out, 3Ls down on the inner, couldn't get any closer.
Raced 4-wide (without cover) 9Ls off the speed about 900 M out, struggling turning for home, no chance.
Bumped exiting gates, raced 2-wide about 8Ls off pace in 4th position 900 M out, 2-wide and over 2Ls down on the swing, one-paced to line.
Bumped exiting stalls, 5-wide round the first bend, raced 4 and 5-wide (without cover) and at least 10Ls off pace through to 600 M out when struggling, soon beaten.
Settled towards rear 8Ls or 9Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) and 5Ls down turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace from about 1000 M out until home straight, had every chance 200 M out, no extra.
On fence 7Ls off pace 1100 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, no acceleration.
Fractious in gates and awkwardly away, raced 2 and 3-wide from 1200 M about 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, improved to be 5Ls down 600 M out, kept on to lead 100 M out, ran on strongly.
On fence 3Ls off pace from 1000 M to 600 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, very weak in straight.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off pace 1100 M out through to about 500 M out when ridden along, weakening and beaten entering straight.
On fence off pace from 1000 M out through to home straight, ran on fairly well in final stages to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, never closer than 8Ls off pace at any stage.
Ridden to lead on fence about 1200 M out, never more than 2Ls clear, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Raced 3-wide without cover and 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 2Ls down into home straight, beaten 200 M out.
On fence 2Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, all out when swamped passing 200 M marker.
Covered up in midfield racing 2-wide 5Ls off speed 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, stayed on at same pace.
Made no show.
Missed the start, always at the back.
Slightly behind midfield. Made very minor progress in straight.
Mostly 2nd. Kept on well but unable to match speed with the winner closing stages.
Behind midfield on the rail. Made no show in straight.
Pushed along early to be better than midfield. Dropped back a bit 500 M. No progress in straight.
Midfield. Steady progress home bend to be 3 wide 5th turning in. Made up further ground final 250 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Recovered some ground inside 250 M.
Never a factor.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Led. Held 1L advantage early straight. Headed 150 M out. Kept on for a minor placing.
Prominent. Was 3Ls 3rd final turn. Ran on steadily to claim victory passing 200 M. Held on well.
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th approaching 1000 M. Weakened inside 250 M.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort near 300 M. Soon found no extra.
Never far off. Baulked for a run early in straight. Produced late impression to claim 2nd close home.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage rounding home bend. Unable to sustain effort and swamped 200 M out.
Never in the hunt.
Prominent to straight then soon weakened.
Midfield to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Led till narrowly headed home bend. Weakened out of contention 200 M out.
Midfield to straight. No progress.
Midfield when hampered home bend. No response thereafter.
Always in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield when checked and lost position home bend. Never recovered.
Held up behind midfield. Ran on quite well down straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight doing best work at finish.
Settled wide towards rear from poor draw early. Improved to race within striking distance home bend. Quickened well to take charge 200 M out to win readily.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Was hampered approaching 200 M while making ground. Failed to recover thereafter.
Left very awkwardly, never able to feature.
Towards rear. Dropped out passing 400 M.
Midfield early. Soon dropped to the rear group. No progress.
Stumbled at jump. Remained in midfield throughout.
Always there. Kept on same pace throughout.
In touch early. Gave a little ground halfway. Weakened closing stages.
Midfield. Made progress halfway to be 3rd 400 M. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Moderate progress from 400 M but found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield course proper. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Settled 5th. Responded well passing 400 M to take charge 100 M out. Never threatened.
Mainly 2nd before taking over passing 200 M. Unable to resist winner's challenge when headed approaching 100 M.
Led field to 200 M. Failed to quicken closing stages. (Lame.) (Bled.)
Well back. Kept on well to be nearest at finish in straight.
Midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Sluggish at start. Raced in rear and baulked for a run early in straight before running on between runners final 250 M.
Raced wide behind midfield. Ran on to hold every chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to finish.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position to straight. Weakened.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Rear to straight. Made modest progress.
Around midfield. Found no room in middle of pack until running on late final 200 M.
Mostly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Around midfield to straight. Weakened.
Disputed lead to straight. Weakened.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M then overhauled.
Restrained behind leaders. Ran on to hit front inside 200 M and hung on gamely under pressure.
Began well steadily eased to be in midfield on the rail. Around 600 M moved out a little, 2 wide 3Ls down entering straight. Doing best work over the concluding stages.
Began awkwardly. Settled at the back, under pressure from 500 M, kept on same pace.
Jumped well and well there. Under pressure from 500 M, found nothing and further weakened from 300 M.
Settled towards the rear. Never in the hunt.
Soon settled in behind midfield. Made up a lot of ground in straight on the inner. Nearest at finish.
On jumping bounded in the air. Steadily taken across to the inside in midfield. Under pressure from 500 M kept on evenly to the line.
Handy early then settled in better than midfield through to straight. Ran on strongly from 250 M, took charge from 100 M out and won comfortably.
Midfield or better on the outer to straight. Weakened badly from 400 M.
Well there to 200 M and one-paced afterwards.
Led from 2200 M until 100 M out. No extra.
Raced in worse than midfield 3 to 4 wide. Never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at back. Ridden from 400 M and no response.
Led briefly settled behind lead coming to first turn. Weakened from 200 M.
Last to straight. Never a factor.
Very deep on the track throughout - about 5-wide and 6-wide and about 6Ls down through to home straight, never competitive.
Led on fence 1600 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls, headed about 250 M out, faded.
Always 1L or 2Ls off the pace and 2-wide until the home straight when hard ridden to keep up with the pace, swamped 200 M out and weakened.
3-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, never any closer to the lead than that.
About 6Ls off pace when checked 1200 M out, 4Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, picked up well to lead about 180 M out, ran on strongly.
Always on fence about 4Ls off pace from 1600 M to 600 M when driven along, 2-wide into home straight, every chance passing 200 M pole, ran on well but found winner too good.
Very slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, fanned out towards centre of track, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on at same pace.
3-wide without cover and about 2Ls off the pace through to home straight when ridden along, beaten 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off the pace at the 1400 M, 4-wide into home straight, stayed on at same pace and never threatened leaders.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, closer and 3-wide into home straight, soon outpaced and beaten over 200 M out.
Quite keen early on, 5Ls down and 4-wide 800 M out, 5-wide entering straight, fanned out widest of all down centre of track and 4Ls down 200 M out, petered out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced freely when 2 and 3-wide and 8Ls off the pace for much of the back straight until home turn, 5Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
On fence about 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and on fence through to home straight, led about 250 M out, headed by winner about 180 M out, no extra.
On the fence about 4Ls off the lead until home straight, never posed any kind of threat.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off the pace from 1000 M out to home straight, a neck down and in with every chance 200 M out, no extra latter stages.
Led on fence 1200 M out, never clear by much more than 1L, still 1L to the good turning for home, swamped 200 M out and faded.
Broke a fraction slowly, 3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide and 5Ls behind into the home straight, soon outpaced.
Crossed to rails upon exiting wide gate, 7Ls off the pace in rear down the home straight, 5Ls down turning for home, already beaten when checked about 100 M out.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the pace through to home straight, every chance when a neck down 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
On and off the bridle down back straight on fence and 6Ls off pace, 4-wide and 5Ls down turning for home, picked up well to be 1L down 200 M out, couldn't grab winner.
Disputing lead with GRAND DELIGHT out 2-wide 1000 M out, driven along to stay in touch entering straight, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide when 3Ls off the lead 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down swinging for home, outpaced by principals from the top of the straight, stayed on at same pace.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the speed 1000 M out, slightly closer turning for home, 2Ls down 200 M out, ran on well though short of room near winning post.
3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1000 m out, 4-wide into the home straight when 4Ls down, quickened up very well to lead 200 M out, ran on gamely, held on.
Raced keenly 3-wide without cover and 2Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 1L down in 2nd place out 3-wide turning for home, quickly passed by principals and faded.
Never travelled well, keen and carried head awkwardly when 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, caught in a pocket off the home turn, hindered twice by EISHIN PRESTON on run-in to line.
Led on fence 1800 M out and went a dawdling pace before ceding advantage to CELLINI 1200 M out, had the run of the race until home straight, one-paced to line.
Keen early on fence 4Ls off the pace, 2-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, 2Ls down in 4th place 200 M out, kept on okay without quickening.
Keen and inconvenienced by slow early pace out 3-wide in midfield, assumed lead 1200 M out, headed before turning for home, faded out.
Raced 3-wide when 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 1L off the pace and with place prospects at top of the straight, no acceleration and beaten 300 M out.
Held up 7Ls off the pace in rear and 2-wide until about 800 M out, 5Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, blocked for a run and barged out in straight, nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, kept on at the same pace.
Bit keen, racing with head up early on, always about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight, led about 150 M out, headed by winner final strides.
Race 2-wide 1L off pace before leading at 600 M, went 1L clear off the home turn, grabbed by quinella pair at about the 200 M, no extra but stayed on well.
Keen about 5Ls off pace on fence until home straight, could never land a blow.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover through first half of race and about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace, 3Ls turning for home, half a length down in 3rd place at 200 M, kept finding and led final strides.
Tracked leader from 900 M before disputing for lead 250 M. Found no extra.
Never on terms.
Mostly in 4th to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
At back to straight where he kept on to be nearest at finish.
Led field to 250 M when challenged. Soon headed and dropped out quickly.
Effort from 1200 M to be 5th 1000 M. Gave ground quickly on straightening.
In rear to straight where he ran on quite well for 3rd.
Never better than midfield.
Was last rounding home bend. Made up some good ground final 250 M.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on a bit final 300 M.
Always well there. Ran on to lead 200 M, quickening clear close home to win impressively.
5th or 6th approaching 800 M and similar position into striaght here he made no show.
Towards rear and held wide turning for home. Kept on till finding no extra final 100 M.
Never a factor.
Near rear. Remained 2nd last when steadied passing 800 M. Ran on under pressure in straight to snatch victory near finish.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Crept closer order turning for home. Shifted in early straight to be 2nd briefly 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Led field to 1000 M. Dropped back gradually far side to be 4th near 400 M. Weakened when hampered 250 M.
Prominent. Moved forward far side to join the lead home bend. Was beaten in straight.
In touch early, soon mainly in midfield along rail. Was crowded approaching 200 M. One-paced.
Tardy start, at rear. Stayed on well from final turn to obtain a minor placing closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
In touch early, settling midfield. Responded well on outside early straight to hit front near 200 M. Just lost narrowly final strides.
In touch before dropping to midfield 1200 M. Lost touch 400 M to be last turning in. Recovered some ground inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Pushed along from outside 800 M out to join the lead 500 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Well there. Took lead from 1000 M. Was joined home bend. Faded 300 M.
Remained 4th or 5th throughout.
Raced 3 or 4-wide in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Behind midfield. Tight between runners early in straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well. Settled outside leader. Weakened into straight.
Made all to win readily.
Raced wide in midfield early. Towards rear rounding home bend. Finished well from 3rd last into straight to snatch 2nd final stride.
Settled in last few. Ran on well to do best work at finish.
Always prominent. Carried wide into straight. Ran on without quickening.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight, then soon weakened.
Prominent to straight and faded gradually.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch on the rail. Gave a little ground to be 5th far side. Weakened inside 150 M.
Midfield or behind. Ran on steadily in straight to grab 2nd close home.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily from the Rock.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily 400 M. Never nearer.
In touch, soon in midfield or better. Weakened steadily from 400 M.
Well there. Led field from 1000 M. Headed 200 M. Kept on but lost 2nd near finish.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Made up good ground in straight, just missed a minor placing.
Midfield. No response when given reminders final turn. Dropped out in straight.
Towards rear. Made steady progress 800 M out and was soon in midfield. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Led field to 1000 M. Held 3rd far side before improving to 2nd final turn. Hit front 200 M and held on well to the line.
Pushed along from widest draw to be prominent. Held 2nd from 1000 M to 400 M. Remained prominent until finding no extra final 150 M.
Always prominent. Fought on dourly under pressure to gain upper hand short of line.
Never better than midfield.
Held narrow advantage out 3-wide far side till dropping out of contention home bend.
Sluggish at start. Finished strongly down straight.
Always struggling at the back. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Giving ground when checked 500 M out. One-paced in straight.
Never rearer. Made some late impression in straight.
Rear. Produced shortlived effort passing 600 M. Never a danger.
Midfield. Took closer order approaching home turn. Kept on steadily without quickening any further in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well. Always well there. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always there hugging inside rail. Took up lead rounding home bend holding 1L break turning in. Pipped at post.
Began awkwardly and soon raced at back about 2-wide through to straight. Made up some ground in closing stages.
Began well and raced 2-wide just behind leader. Remained there until straightening, responded well to pressure and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Began well from wide draw and soon raced in better than midfield position around 2-wide. All out around 350 M out but stayed one-paced and further weakened in the final stages.
Raced in rear section towards the outside. At 600 M hard ridden to maintain position and weakened badly after 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced in rear section around 2-wide through to straight. Did not respond to pressure in straight and only ran past couple of beaten runners in the final stages.
Soon raced in mid-division but caught wide without cover. Stayed in similar position through to straight, stayed one-paced when put under pressure at 300 M and weakened in final stages.
Pushed along but outpaced to race 2 to 3Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Under pressure around 400 M ran on fairly and missed the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.

Slowly away but soon recovered to race in mid-division around 2-wide. Around 5Ls down and shifted out when entering straight, all out at 200 M and made up steady ground never troubled the placegetters.
Began fairly and eased to race in rear section on fence. Under pressure 350 M out but did not respond and stayed same pace to the line.
Broke well and niggled along to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Headed around 300 M but stayed on well to keep 3rd place.
Raced in worse than midfield section on rail through to straight. Stayed on evenly to the line.

Jumped well and soon shifted onto rail to race behind leader. At 1200 M dropped to outright 3rd around 1L off leader and stayed there till straightening when asked 300 M out ran on strongly but unable to match speed.
Very awkwardly away, 10Ls off the speed in rear 1000 M out, not much better off when disappointed for running about 600 M out, no chance thereafter.
Awkwardly away, caught 4-wide without cover down the back straight when about 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace, 4-wide into the straight, no chance.
About 6Ls or 7Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, 3Ls down and with place chances at least when staying on 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Awkwardly away, no better off than 7Ls off the pace until the home straight, 5Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Stumbled exiting gates, about 5Ls off the speed on fence in 2nd place 600 M out, 3Ls down turning for home very weak in straight.
6Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 5th place from 800 M out until home straight, staying on well and with a chance when 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Led on fence at 1000 M, clear by 5Ls 600 M out, faltering but still 2Ls up 200 M out, headed 100 M out, faded.
