3-wide and 8Ls off the pace 700 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, stuck on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
Checked 1000 M out when worse than midfield, 8Ls down when 2-wide 800 M out and racing keenly, similarly placed entering straight, unbalanced 200 M out, no threat at all.
10Ls off the pace and 2-wide at the 1000 M, hardly sighted at all.
In 3rd place and 2-wide between 4Ls and 6Ls off the speed until the home straight, picked up well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, led at the 100 M, ran on well.
Not pressed early, about 7Ls off the pace on fence through to home straight, stayed on okay to be nearest at finish.
Seemed crossed over to hold soft lead on rail. Headed before Rock and steadied near the 600 M, off bridle and chased along. Renewed effort 200 M out and stayed on well but couldn't catch winner.
Eased back to midfield after start. 4 to 5-wide turning for home and weakened in straight.
3 to 4Ls on fence behind pace 1000 M out. Caught flat-footed when pace quickened 700 M out and was near rear at 450 M. Ridden hard in straight but was one-paced.
Ridden hard to keep pace in mid-section before entering first turn. Out-paced and dropped towards rear 700 M out. One-paced final stages.
On fence 1 to 2Ls off speed until 700 M out. Moved out to 2-wide and under pressure 500 M out. 3-wide and 2Ls behind pace into straight. Kept on quite well but inconvenienced near the line.

2-wide and 2 to 3Ls behind leader rounding final turn and until 800 M out when dropping back a bit. Ridden hard from 450 M when 3 to 4Ls off pace. Shifted out wider straightening up. Ran on steadily, closest at finish.
Tracked leader 2-wide until entering straight. Faded from 250 M out.

3-wide without cover and 1-2Ls behind pace rounding first turn when pulling. Settled back to midfield and 3-wide 700 M out. Raced ungenerously and hung out rounding home turn. Unable to quicken when ask from 500 M out.
Reared when gates opened and was soon very far behind. Did not respond when asked from 800 M out. Tailed off.

Behind midfield and one away from rails until 1000 M out. Was hard to settle due to moderate pace and moved up to take lead at 700 M. Every chance 300 M out but run ended inside final 200 M when hanging out.
Soon settled near rear on rails. Around 1000 M out switched out to 3-wide and commenced to go forward. 2-wide equal lead heading into straight, kept on well.
Tardy start, 2nd last until 600 M out, 4 to 5-wide rounding home turn. Responded well in straight and gained good ground towards outer until no extra near finish.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the pace through to home straight, stayed on at the one pace to line.
2-wide 10Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 7Ls down turning for home, no threat whatsoever when short of running about 100 M out.
On fence 8Ls off the pace on the fence 1000 M out, 6Ls off the lead entering straight, never much of a threat.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off the speed 1100 M out, bit keen down the back straight, driven along when 2-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, weakened right out.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1100 M out, caught 4-wide without cover down the back in points, niggled along 600 M out, 4Ls down on the swing, nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5Ls down into straight, stayed on strongly through final 200 M to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious and broke through gates beforehand, on fence about 4Ls off speed until home straight, disappointed for running twice in the stretch, never looked like a winner, however.
Always in rear or one from rear throughout, never any better than 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout and never worse than 2Ls off the pace until home straight, slightly outpaced 300 M out, stayed on well again close home.
Had a good spot 2-wide and about 3Ls off the pace from 1100 M until home straight when ridden along, very one-paced on run-in.
2-wide and no worse than 1L off pace in 2nd place through to home straight, grabbed lead just inside 200 M pole, stayed on well.
Gained a soft lead on fence 1600 M out, never more than 1L clear through to home straight, all out when headed by winner about 180 M out, kept on quite well and hung on for 2nd place.
Tardy start, towards rear. Hung out badly from 700 M. Made up some ground home bend to be midfield turning in. Kept on.
Midfield to 800 M. Dropped back steadily.
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead from 850 M. Maintained advantage until failing to resist winner's challenge final strides.
Towards rear early. Soon recovered ground along rail to reach front briefly 1000 M. Raced 2nd from 850 M to straight. Kept on but was one-paced closing stages.
Led field to 1000 M. Raced 3rd to straight. Ran on well 250 M to re-gain advantage narrowly near finish.
Near rear. Recovered some ground final turn. One-paced.
Towards rear from widest draw. Recovered good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, rear. Making progress but soon raced ungenerously and lost position 850 M. Crept closer order turning in, soon found no extra.
Behind midfield early. Made steady progress to be 4th passing 800 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Midfield. Gave ground rounding home bend.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit to midfield home bend. No improvement in straight.
Prominent very briefly after start. Dropped back to the rear group in the rest of his trip.
Prominent when badly hampered home bend. Never recovered.
Never far off. Took up running when leader dropped back home bend. Kicked some 3Ls clear about 200 M out. Won readily.
Towards rear into straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Rear. Baulked for a run over 300 M out before producing good late impression closing stages.
Prominent early. Dropped to 5th into straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Well there. Bumped by faller and badly unbalanced on home bend. Never recovered.
Prominent into straight. Weakened.
Towards rear early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Faded gradually from 3rd into straight.
In last few into straight. Closing off race well.
Never seen with a chance.
Led far side. Raced awkwardly and lost position on home bend shortly before fell and unseated rider.
Broke well then held up in prominent position. One-paced in straight and swamped closing stages.
Always towards rear.
Settled towards rear. Ran home well to claim 2nd closing stages.
Towards rear from widest draw. Ran on well in straight until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Progressed to 5th 400 M. Responded well to take lead 200 M. Held on but just lost narrowly final strides.
Mainly 5th to straight. Soon weakened.
Mostly 4th before improving to 3rd final turn. Failed to hold place inside 250 M.
Led field soon after start. Dropped back steadily when headed 400 M.
Prominent. Raced 2nd far side. Faded upon straightening. (Finished distressed.)
Prominent early, then raced in midfield or behind. Dropped to the rear home bend. Ran past a few beaten horses 200 M.
Prominent. Took lead from 400 M to 200 M. Weakened.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground from 350 M. Failed to quicken close home.
Towards rear. Stayed on in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Given reminders final turn. Faded inside 300 M.
Rear. Widest turning in. Made up good ground in straight, doing best work at finish.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield final turn. Ran on well to snatch victory near finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Made running till joined into straight. Fought on well to resist serious challenges early on but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Raced keenly in rear of midfield. Weakened into straight.
Rear into straight. Ran on past beaten runners.
Trailed field throughout. (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield. One-paced.
Well there joining lead entering straight. Gained upper hand closing stages.
Held up in forward of midfield. Quickened well closing stages doing best work at finish.
Always in last few.
Raced 3 or 4 deep. Well there into straight. Soon weakened.
Missed the break but quickly in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Well back. Ran on well down inside of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Fought on well to make some late impression closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away at back. Closer order turning for home. Produced nothing in the straight.
Broke awkwardly and raced at back. Never a factor.
Led briefly and sat behind leader. Shifted out on straightening and ran on well until 100 M out where weakened.
Midfield. Never a factor. (Bled.)
Jumped awkwardly. Soon recovered to be a little worse than midfield. Under pressure from 400 M and ran on well without threatening the placegetters.
Midfield. Taken out rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Pushed along to lead and headed around 300 M. Soon weakened.
Steadily eased to the back, closer order near 600 M and ran on strongly from 400 M to just miss at the post.
Pushed along but outpaced early. Settled in midfield or better, under pressure from 400 M and ran on fairly.
Eased to be racing towards the rear. Made no impression in straight. (A roarer.)
Not far off but wide early. 2nd or 3rd to 600 M under pressure and dropped out from straightening. Eased down.
Better than midfield on inner. Shifted out for running turning for home, ran on strongly but was strongly challenged by 2nd horse final 100 M. Just held on.
Jumped well and steadily eased to the back. Wide to 800 M. Made up good ground from 300 M.
Midfield on inner. Under pressure 500 M and kept on evenly until weakened passing 200 M.
Checked about 1300 M out, 8Ls down on the inner turning for home, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish but had no chance with principals.
Raced 2-wide and was 3Ls off the pace 1400 M out, steady improvement to be 2Ls down in 2nd place 200 M out, no extra.
About 7Ls or 8Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1200 M to home straight, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Driven along early to maintain good spot 3Ls off the pace down the back straight, one-paced in the home straight.
Caught 4-wide down the back straight when about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace, 5-wide turning for home, no impression.
Slowest away, 3Ls off the pace when inconvenienced 1400 M out, 4-wide and driven along entering straight, weakened.
Led on fence 1400 M out, headed at the 250 M, faded rapidly.
Caught 3-wide 6Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, disappointed for running at top of straight, no impression and eased close home.
On fence 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, similarly positioned off home turn, very one-paced.
Caught very wide (5-wide) without cover down the back straight, sent on to be 3-wide and 2Ls off the pace at the 1000 M out, faded right out very rapidly between 800 M and 600 M out.
Never worse than 1L off pace racing 2-wide until home straight, led 250 M out, stayed on strongly.
2-wide and 8Ls off the pace in rear 1200 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down turning for home, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Checked 1000 M out when 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed, was one-paced in the straight.
On fence 3Ls off speed 1400 M out, similarly placed turning for home, no impression and eased final 200 M.
Settled in rear about 8Ls or 9Ls off the early running, moderate late headway through some beaten rivals in straight.
Led early on, never clear by more half a length, driven along turning for home, headed by winner about 350 M out, weakened.
3-wide and 1L off the speed 1000 M out, dropped back to be 3Ls down turning for home and 4-wide, ran on strongly, just failed to overhaul winner.
Raced 4 and 5-wide without cover when 3Ls down 1000 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2 and 3-wide and was about 3Ls off the pace from 1000 M out until the home straight, one-paced to line.
6Ls or 7Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, disappointed for running at the top of the straight, finished off evenly.
On fence 4Ls off the pace from 1000 M marker to home straight, stayed on fairly well but didn't have the pace of principals.
Raced and 2 and 3-wide and was 7Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 8Ls down entering straight, stayed on pretty well but never had much running room to work with.
Slowest away, settled out 3-wide and towards rear early on, 6Ls down and 5-wide entering straight, stayed on okay to be nearest at the finish.
Driven along to lead early on and didn't succeed, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 1000 M out, very weak in home straight.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, closer and 3-wide into home straight, beaten over 300 M out.
Broke okay, raced 2 and 3-wide down the back straight about 5Ls off the pace, 6Ls down entering straight, stayed on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
Disputed lead out 2-wide from 1000 M out, led about 350 M out, kept on gamely under pressure.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, ran on strongly, just failed.
Led on fence over 1000 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls, 1L up turning for home, headed about 200 M out, faded.
Didn't break that well, about 8Ls off the pace in rear 800 M out, about 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on very well late on.
On fence about 4Ls off the pace until home straight, outpaced at top of home straight and never competitive.
Settled towards rear about 6Ls off the speed from back straight until home straight when 4-wide, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Raced keenly towards inner about 5Ls off the pace early on, weakened from top of home straight.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, similarly placed turning for home, weakened right out.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off the pace down the back straight, posed little threat through final stages.
Travelled okay in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace until the home straight, quite one-paced when short of room about 200 M out, didn't recover.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed until home straight, didn't find much in the straight.
Raced 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, checked 800 M out, kept on well in straight but had no chance with the winner.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace through to home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, ran on very strongly late on.
Always at least 3-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace through to home straight, picked up well to lead about 200 M out, driven out.
Awkwardly into stride, raced 2-wide about 6Ls off the lead 1000 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
2Ls or 3Ls off the pace early on, outpaced through final 400 M.
Settled 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace from 800 M out until about 400 M out, closer 200 M out, no extra.
Never better than 4Ls off the pace at any stage.
Settled 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace 700 M out, one-paced through concluding stages.
4Ls off the pace 700 M out, never looked like reaching principals.
4Ls off the pace on the far side early on, outpaced from 400 M out and could only stay on at the same pace.
Very awkwardly away, 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace until 600 M out, found nothing under pressure.
6Ls down and driven along 600 M out, became further detached from then on.
Driven along early 5Ls off the pace, moderate late headway through beaten rivals through final 200 M.
2Ls or 3Ls off the pace early on, under pressure to pick up 400 M out, didn't respond.
Led by 1L 800 M out, still in front but hard ridden 200 M out, headed by winner about 70 M from line.
In 2nd place 1L off the early speed, still there 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Prominent about 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, half a length down and in with every chance 200 M out, no extra.
About 3Ls off the pace nearer stand's side about 700 M out, driven along 400 M out, kept finding to lead about 70 M from line.
Ridden early to be in touch. Was steadied 1300 M, dropping to midfield 800 M. Renewed effort early in straight before giving ground closing stages.
Mostly in 6th to home turn. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Soon in rear. Never on terms.
Settled in rear to straight. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M despite not reaching first 2.
Towards rear before making some late ground final 200 M.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well final 250 M to threaten close home.
Well there before failing to hold position 250 M out.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on well down centre of track to challenge close home.
Never far off to straight. Ridden to lead passing 200 M, holding on under pressure to retain advantage at the finish.
Mostly among rear group to home turn. Doing best work final 200 M.
Was 2nd from 1200 M and held every chance 250 M. Soon gave ground and dropped out of contention.
Was prominent before taking charge from 1300 M. Headed and found no extra 200 M.
Well there to straight where he stayed on to challenge 200 M out. Found one-paced under pressure near finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Left awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground from 500 M to reach midfield 200 M out. Weakened closing stages.
Made no show.
Soon led until headed 300 M. Failed to maintain a minor placing final 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages. (Bled.)
Mainly behind midfield. One-paced.
In touch. Made gradual progress to hit front 250 M. Won well.
Never in contention.
Better than midfield. Dropped out passing 400 M. Hung in.
Midfield. Failed to quicken final 250 M.
Well there. Reached lead briefly near 300 M. Kept on when headed 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground to midfield halfway. Kept on without threatening.
Mainly in midfield throughout.
Prominent until finding no extra 250 M.
Soon led and made all to win easily.
Never better than midfield. Not much room upon straightening. Found nothing closing stages.
Never far off till finding no extra 200 M out.
Broke well and settled behind leader. Quickened well clear of rest of field but unable to threaten winner.
Never on terms.
Never in contention.
Raced wide in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Began slowly from difficult draw but quickly improved to settle in 2nd outside leader coming out of back straight, but soon faded under pressure after home turn.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Well back. Ran greenly but went past beaten horses in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on well in straight, getting a narrow victory in a 3-horse battle at finish.
Mainly 6th to straight. Ran on well but was bumped twice near 200 M. Just missed marginally. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Dropped back a bit to behind midfield final turn. Unable to find clear passage early straight. Ran on when in clear 200 M.
Soon 2nd. Joined the lead final turn. Found no extra when headed 300 M.
In touch. Weakened 250 M.
In touch, was 3rd from 1400 M. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Soon 5th. Dropped out from 300 M. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Made good progress from outside rounding home bend to reach 3rd on straightening. Hit front 300 M. Kept on when headed 100 M.
Rear. Crept closer order turning in. Unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Rear. Last and widest turning in. Ran on strongly final 250 M, just missed narrowly.
Towards rear. Shifted out for a clear run early straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Soon led. Headed 300 M. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Jumped well from widest draw, soon dropped back to the rear group. No significant progress in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. No response when given reminders final turn. (Mucus in trachea.)
Midfield far side, then raced with backmarkers around home bend. Romped home to win convincingly.
Began fairly. Raced in midfield before taking closer order coming out of back straight. Soon dropped out from prominent position after straightening.
Settled at the back. No clear run early in straight. Sprinted home to narrowly miss placing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Never far off. Quickened to hold some chance early in straight but swamped close home.
Attempted to make all but overhauled inside 200 M.
Never in contention. Tailed off into straight. (Nasal discharge.)
Held up behind midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on late to grab placing late.
Held up behind leader. Held some chance upon straightening but had nothing to give closing stages.
Behind midfield. Went wide into straight. Ran on steadily.
Around midfield and wide. Faded in straight.
Forward of midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Produced moderate progress under strong driving early in straight, then no extra.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Badly hampered early in straight. Never recovered.
Began awkwardly and soon raced in prominent position to 400 M. Steadily dropped out. Hung out badly throughout.
Tardy start. Midfield on stands rail. Made up some ground final 150 M.
Worse than midfield on far side. Ran on steadily from 400 M never troubled the winner.
Well there to 600 M. Under pressure but no response and soon eased down.
Jumped very awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Never a factor.
Became very fractious after being boxed. Better than midfield in centre of track to 800 M. Steadily dropped back. Never a factor.
Broke awkwardly but soon recovered to be in prominent position. Under pressure from 400 M found little.
Towards the rear. Under pressure from 200 M and made no improvement.
Midfield. Weakened from 200 M.
Prominent to 300 M. Soon weakened.
Checked after start and raced at back. Improved from 800 M to be better than midfield. Weakened from 250 M.
Mainly midfield. Kept on fairly to the line.
Well there and led narrowly from 400 M. Kicked clear from 200 M despite hanging in throughout the race. Comfortably.
Midfield. Under pressure at 400 M. One-paced.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace from 1400 M to 800 M, struggling and 5-wide on straightening, faded out.
Led on fence 1500 M out, never clear by more than a length, shot well from top of home straight, easily.

Always about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed towards rear on fence through to home straight when travelling quite well, ran on through beaten horses to grab 3rd place close home.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace on the fence until home stretch, very one-paced from then on.
Caught very wide (at least 5-wide) throughout, 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, closer 800 M out, was weakening before the turn for home.
Never travelled, always hard ridden, was not remotely competitive at any point.
Disputed lead or settled 1L off the pace through to home straight when driven along but with every chance, weakened rapidly.
Always caught at least 4-wide, 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, struggling turning for home, beaten over 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed until home straight, no acceleration.
2-wide and about 5Ls off the lead until home straight, bit short of room 350 M out but posed no threat whatsoever.
In 3rd or 4th place about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace and 2-wide through to home straight, could only stay on at the same pace.
Had the run of the race on fence and between 2Ls and 3Ls off the pace until home straight, no chance with winner.
Always niggled along, 3-wide 4Ls off the pace from 800 M out to home straight, weakened.
Bit keen early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M, shifted ground 700 M out, 3Ls down entering straight, one-paced through closing stages.
Settled about 5Ls off the pace early on; about 3Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, short of room 300 M out, switched out and ran on strongly through final 150 M to lead near line.

3-wide and about 2Ls off the speed 800 M out, still well there turning for home, weakened right out.
Broke badly, 7Ls off the pace and 2-wide 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, one-paced thereafter.
Away well, had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls through to home straight, kept on evenly to line.
Checked exiting gates on fence 8Ls off the pace in rear 800 M out, 5-wide and 4Ls down turning for home, dropped out tamely.
Always towards rear, driven along when 7Ls off the pace 600 M out, soon with no chance.
Led 1200 M out, never clear by more than a length and a half, headed about 250 M out, no extra.
Keen through early stages, 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace down the back straight, 1L down at the top of home straight when still 3-wide, kept on at the same pace.
Raced 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2Ls down turning for home, every chance 100 M out when a neck down, no extra.
About 5Ls down the pace down the back, hindered twice on the circle, 6-wide into the home straight, one-paced.
Bit keen early on, on fence about 5Ls off the lead 1000 M out, 3Ls down turning for home, not fully extended in straight with jockey clearly concerned as to its well-being.
4-wide without cover and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, still wide and 3Ls down turning for home, no impression.
Didn't break well, was hardly sighted.
Raced 3-wide and 4-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace down the back straight, grew steadily detached from then on.
Never competitive, driven along early on, never any better than 6Ls off the pace at any stage.
No closer than 6Ls off the pace at any point.
In 2nd place and 2-wide about half off the pace 800 M out, led about 350 M out, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Didn't break that well, raced 2-wide and 3Ls off the lead 800 M out, closer turning for home, kept on okay but never looked like overhauling quinella pair.
About 5Ls off the pace and 2-wide until home straight, kept on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 3-wide without cover and was 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 2Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, kept on well to lead about 100 M out, pushed out.
Never closer than 8Ls off the speed until the home stretch, made some moderate late headway through beaten rivals.
Carried head high with the run of the race early on 2Ls off the pace on the fence, very awkward about 700 M out and lost a few lengths, didn't recover.
Led, 2Ls clear on fence 900 M out, headed by DEVON ELITE at the top of the straight, weakened.
Raced 3-wide 1L off the pace 800 M out, 2Ls down 400 M out, was rather one-paced in the straight.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6-wide and 4Ls down entering home straight, didn't pick up at all.
Totally blew the start and lost at least 6Ls as a result, never any closer than 10Ls off the lead at any point.
Raced 3Ls off the pace and 2-wide 900 M out, disappointed for running and unbalanced at the top of the home straight when 2Ls down, didn't quite recover.

Disputed lead on fence until home straight, headed by winner about 300 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, closer and 4-wide into the home straight, kept on well enough without seriously threatening winner.
Checked exiting gates, 5Ls behind lead on fence 800 M out, 4Ls down and 2-wide on the swing, faded out.
7Ls off the pace and 2-wide or 3-wide down the back straight, 7-wide into home straight when over 4Ls down, posed no real threat and nearest at finish.
Disputed lead out 2-wide 1000 M out, about 1L down in 2nd place turning for home, faded very rapidly from then on.

Awkwardly away, about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace and 2-wide down the back straight, 5-wide and closer entering straight, kept on well enough.
Never competitive early on about 8Ls off the pace, 7Ls down and wide turning for home, made some moderate late headway through beaten runners.
8Ls off the pace and on fence 800 M out, 4Ls down on straightening, kept on okay to be nearest at the finish.
About 3L off pace in rear into straight. Kept on same pace final 250 M.
Worse than midfield 1000 M and similar place home turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear of closely bunched field into straight. Kept on well closing stages despite not reaching winner.
In touch to straight. Stayed on without quickening final 200 M.
Among rear group approaching home turn. Found little under pressure from 300 M.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Ridden to lead from 1200 M after being slowly into stride Could find no extra shortly on straightening.
Always well there. Quickened to lead 300 M, keeping on strongly to line.
Headway from midfield approaching home bend to be in touch turning into straight. Looked dangerous 300 M but did not sustain effort close home.
In rear to straight where he was steadied 200 M. Renewed effort and ran on strongly but again was denied a run near the line.
About 5th or 6th to home bend. Made no show on straightening.
About midfield halfway to straight. Kept on till losing ground a bit near finish.
Soon in last and remained there to straight. Made up some ground final 250 M.
